quotes.translation: 由于暗示持续被运用，且被你身体的每个细胞所运用，因此问题不在于你是否能运用暗示，而在于如何更有效地运用它。这将涉及一个平衡的人格，因为在这种人格中，行动将被允许自由表达。自我在此过程中将获益而非受损，但我们不会拥有一个专制任性的自我，而是一个理性甚至自律的自我——它知晓自身的位置，知晓自身的依赖性，也知晓自身独特而与众不同的感知独立性。因为这种独立性正依赖于它作为整体完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego of the personality does not trust its own inner organisms. It must attempt to stand apart from them, and keep an eye on them. The ego does not believe that they are treating it right. The ego is therefore in its present circumstances because it fears itself so solitary, since it has to a large degree cut itself off from its inner self; yet not entirely, for the intuitive still speaks.
quotes.translation: 人格的自我并不信任自身的内在有机体。它必须试图与它们保持距离，并监视它们。自我不相信它们会善待自己。因此，自我之所以处于当前处境，是因为它如此恐惧自身的孤独——它在很大程度上切断了与内在自我的联系；然而并非完全切断，因为直觉仍在发声。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Many actual physical intervening steps are cut out. The ego becomes more similar to the inner ego than to its old self, comparatively speaking. This altered ego is aware of large portions of inner reality that were previously denied. Structurally it remains intact, and yet it has changed chemically, and electromagnetically. It is able to open up so that inner experience can be received.
quotes.translation: 许多实际的身体介入步骤被省略了。相对而言，自我变得比其旧有的自我更接近内在自我。这个被改变的自我意识到先前被否认的大量内在实相。它在结构上保持完整，却在化学和电磁层面发生了改变。它能够敞开，以便接收内在体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There is communication between them but they are not aware of it. The tape is the element common to all the channels. Now. The inner ego is the director as you know, but the whole self must know itself simultaneously. It is not enough that the inner ego knows what is going on. Ultimately therefore the inner ego must itself bring about comprehension on the parts of the various portions.
quotes.translation: 它们之间存在着沟通，但它们并未意识到这一点。磁带是所有频道共有的元素。现在。内在自我正如你所知是导演，但整体自己必须同时知晓自身。内在自我知道正在发生什么还不够。因此最终内在自我本身必须促使各个部分产生理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The personal subconscious can be thought of as a threshold between the ego and the inner self; not only can glimmerings of the inner self be glimpsed through the subconscious, but also the diverse characteristics of the ego touch this personal subconscious. When the ego, therefore, becomes too overbearing it attempts to impede the flow of action. It cannot so impede action directly, for the very act of forming such impediments involves action. Nevertheless such impediments often set up actions that block the overall movement or direction of the action that composes the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 个人潜意识可以被视为自我与内在自己之间的一个门槛；不仅可以通过潜意识瞥见内在自己的微光，而且自我的各种特性也会触及这个个人潜意识。因此，当自我变得过于专横时，它试图阻碍行动的流动。它不能直接如此阻碍行动，因为形成这种阻碍的行为本身就涉及行动。然而，这种阻碍常常会建立起一些行动，这些行动阻断了构成整个人格之行动的总体运动或方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now when you use the word I, more and more, this is the portion of the self of which I spoke in our last session. You are aware of the ego and able to see yourself as something more than the ego is. This is the I that you have been using in the pendulum sessions, that questions both the ego and subconscious. These are all portions of the self, however; the difference is functional.
quotes.translation: 现在，当你越来越多地使用"我"这个词时，这就是我在上次课中提到的那个自己部分。你意识到自我，并且能够将你自己视为比自我更多的东西。这就是你在钟摆课中一直使用的那个"我"，它既质疑自我也质疑潜意识。然而，这些都是自己的各个部分；区别在于功能性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The basic personality would be fearful of such communications, knowing instinctively the weakness of the ego. The ego would be extremely insecure. On the other hand, the personality would almost welcome a strong organizing force, regardless of its source, and could tend to latch onto it as much as possible. A study of secondary personalities is most fascinating, since such a study would give you an excellent idea of the manner in which the ego in general is formed, for it is but a unity of energy under auspices of the strongest actions characteristic within the given personality system.
quotes.translation: 基本人格会本能地惧怕这类沟通，深知自我（ego）的脆弱。自我会极度缺乏安全感。另一方面，人格却几乎会欢迎任何强大的组织力量，无论其来源为何，并可能尽可能紧抓不放。对次级人格的研究极为迷人，因为这样的研究能让你清楚了解一般自我形成的方式——它不过是在特定人格系统内，以最强行动特征为护持的能量统一体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You do exist therefore in both of these dimensions. The ego cannot participate directly in such experience. There is a compliance on the part of the ego, however, that allows it to step aside so that it does not block inner awareness of other-dimensional existence. It is difficult, but not impossible, for the ego to correlate the information gained. Dreams involve as you know several dimensions. The dream state itself is a very loose term, for there are several layers of consciousness within it, and there is no limit to the states of consciousness that can be achieved, ideally speaking.
quotes.translation: 因此，你确实存在于这两个维度中。自我无法直接参与这类体验。然而，自我会有所顺从，允许自己退居一旁，以免阻碍对其它维度存在的内在觉知。对自我而言，整合所获信息虽困难，却并非不可能。如你所知，梦境涉及多个维度。梦状态本身是个非常宽泛的术语，因为其中有多个意识层次，且理想而言，可达到的意识状态并无限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Again, when you are in a state that is not the normal waking one, when you have forsaken this daily self, you are nevertheless conscious and alert. You merely block out the memory from the normal waking ego. So when the attributes of consciousness are given, creativity is largely ignored. It is assigned instead primarily to the unconscious. My point is that the unconscious is conscious. Creativity is one of the most important attributes and aspects of consciousness. We will differentiate between normal ego consciousness then, and consciousness that only appears unconscious to that ego.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，当你处于非正常清醒状态、放下日常自我时，你依然有意识且警觉。你只是阻断了正常清醒自我的记忆。因此，在列举意识的属性时，创造力常被忽视，而被主要归为无意识。我的要点是：无意识是有意识的。创造力是意识最重要属性与面向之一。我们将区分正常的自我意识，以及仅对自我而言看似无意识的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The fact is, that any given self, as we have described the self, may have more than one ego, though these egos will not be aware of each other, even though operating simultaneously. You have information on the inner ego. There is also a dream ego, in that there is within that reality field a directive part of the self that is concerned with the construction of purpose and meaning.
quotes.translation: 事实上，任何特定的自己（如我们所描述的）都可能拥有不止一个自我，尽管这些自我即使同时运作，也不会意识到彼此的存在。你们有关于内在自我的信息。此外还存在一个梦的自我，因为在那个实相领域中，有一个与目的和意义构建相关的自己之指导性部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You see, dear Joseph, the subconscious and the ego, of course, are both you. For simplicity's sake I will speak of the ego and the subconscious, though they are actually one. The subconscious forms and projects the materializations of the ego as a tool to enable it to attain its goals. When these goals and talents are attributed to the ego alone they are so to speak decapitated.
quotes.translation: 你看，亲爱的约瑟，潜意识与自我当然都是你。为简化起见，我将分别谈论自我与潜意识，尽管它们实为一体。潜意识形成并投射出自我的物质化形态，作为使其达成目标的工具。当这些目标与才能被单独归于自我时，它们可以说被"斩首"了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The nonphysical systems are frightening to the ego-centered personality; but the bulk of the individual's reality does not lie within the physical universe, but in those unknown areas. As you know the ego is the topmost portion, so to speak. Were it not for the dreaming self the ego would not exist. Were it not for past existences the personality as you know it would not exist.
quotes.translation: 非物理系统令以自我为中心的人格感到恐惧；但个体实相的主体并不存在于物质宇宙中，而是存在于那些未知领域。如你所知，自我好比是顶层部分。若非梦的自己，自我根本不会存在。若非过去世的存在，你所知的人格也不会存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It is when significant actions, important to the whole personality, are so rejected that the difficulties arise. It is also true however that these refusals to assimilate action on the egos part are also an integral part of the characteristics of the personality as a whole action. In each individual, certain categories of action may be habitually denied. As the characteristics of a personality may be somewhat deduced from those actions which the ego accepts, so also much may be learned about any given personality by a study of those actions which the ego habitually denies.
quotes.translation: 当那些对整个人格至关重要的重大行动被如此排斥时，困难便随之产生。然而，自我拒绝同化这些行动的做法，同样也是整个人格作为整体行动的特征中不可或缺的一部分。每个个体都可能习惯性地否认某些类别的行动。正如人格的特征可以从自我所接受的行动中略窥一二，通过研究自我习惯性否认的那些行动，也能对任何特定人格有诸多了解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There is an involvement that would seem, would seem, intense. The ego appears to be extremely intense, but to a large degree this is a deception, for the intenseness is caused by the attempt of the ego not to become involved with action, unless the ego can dominate action. There is no basic trust of the inner self. The personality does not basically recognize or trust the ability of the inner self, and this results in an intense inhibited fear.
quotes.translation: 其中存在一种看似、看似强烈的卷入。自我显得极为强烈，但在很大程度上这是一种欺骗，因为这种强烈感源于自我试图不卷入行动，除非自我能主导行动。自我对内在自体缺乏基本信任。人格从根本上不认可或不信任内在自体的能力，这导致了一种强烈的压抑性恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The very nature of the ego and of the personality is formed by the ability to choose between actions or stimuli; but life as it is not connected to a highly differentiated ego, rejoices in all stimuli, as sensation, whether it is pleasurable or painful, for these distinctions do not exist in your terms. In the beginning of our sessions I spoke in a general manner, for example, saying that trees and plant life had a consciousness, but not a developed ego system. The tree, therefore, is conscious of the pain connected with, say, the severing of a limb.
quotes.translation: 自我和人格的本质正是由在行动或刺激之间做出选择的能力所塑造；但生命本身——若未与高度分化的自我相连——会欢庆所有刺激，无论其作为感觉是愉悦还是痛苦，因为以你们的说法，这些区分并不存在。在课程初期，我曾以概括性的方式提及，例如说树木和植物拥有意识，但并未发展出自我系统。因此，树木能意识到与断枝相关的痛苦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: (10:27.) You do not have the same ego now that you had five years ago, but you are not aware of the change. Ego rises out of what you are, in other words. It is a part of the action of your being and consciousness, but as the eye cannot see its own shifting colors and expressions, as it is not aware that it lives and dies constantly as its atomic structure changes, so you are not aware that the ego continually changes, dies, and is reborn.
quotes.translation: （10点27分）你现在拥有的自我与五年前并不相同，但你并未察觉这种变化。换言之，自我源于你的本质。它是你存在与意识活动的一部分，但正如眼睛无法看见自身流转的色彩与表情，正如它意识不到自身原子结构变化中不断生灭的过程，你同样未能察觉自我持续变化、死亡与重生的本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The hope and the possibilities here, as well as some of the dangers, lie in the fact that the ego does indeed change, and is not one specific reality but a series or group of actions, with direction, that have the potentiality for unlimited value fulfillment. The ego will never be less than it is now. It may very well be more. Possibilities for development here are very great, but most such possibilities lie still in the future, and only, so far, as possibilities. There is nothing that will force the ego to enlarge the scope of its awareness.
quotes.translation: 希望与可能性，以及某些危险，正源于自我确实会改变这一事实——它并非某个固定实体，而是一系列具有方向性的行动群组，蕴含着无限价值完成的潜能。自我永远不会比现在更少，它完全可能变得更多。此处的发展可能性极为广阔，但大多数可能性仍停留在未来，目前仅作为可能性存在。没有任何力量能强迫自我扩展其觉知范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The caution and ego strength behind such amusing episodes work to our benefit, however. He has used them well this time, to give himself added discipline, and this is all to the good. Without this ego elasticity, that is without the ability of the ego to assume control and to guide Ruburt back, immediately reassuming control, we would be in for much less peaceful sessions, and the quantity and quality of the overall material would suffer. I certainly would not want to get him angry at me. as I am so familiar with his explosive reactions.
quotes.translation: 然而，这类趣闻背后蕴含的谨慎与自我力量实则为我们所用。这次他善加运用这些特质，赋予自身更强的自律性，这全然有益。若非具备这种自我弹性——即自我能立即重掌控制权引导鲁柏回归的能力——我们的课程将远不如现在平和，整体资料的数量与质量也会受损。鉴于我深知他爆发时的激烈反应，自然不愿惹他对我动怒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The ego itself attempts as its function to be the director and center of other functions. The ego, while considering itself apart from action, is obviously not apart from it. As dreams allow the inner self great freedom, and as in dreams great perspectives of time are available, and great freedom in space, though no space as you know it is involved, so it is possible for the ego itself to achieve the experience of freedom from time and space, if it would only allow itself for a short while to relax the intensity of its objective focus.
quotes.translation: 自我本身试图以其功能作为其他功能的指挥者和中心。自我虽然自认为与行动分离，但显然并非如此。正如梦境给予内在自我极大的自由，在梦中可以体验时间的大尺度视角和空间的极大自由——尽管其中并不涉及你所知的空间——因此，如果自我愿意暂时放松其客观焦点的强度，它本身也有可能获得脱离时间与空间的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There is no particular reason why others could not hear me, but practically speaking the ego is usually on guard to prevent such communications. The ego regards anything but itself as an alien, even the portions of the individual's own subconscious. Since these are so often denied by the ego, it is no wonder that voices such as mine only infrequently break through.
quotes.translation: 没有特别理由说明为何其他人无法听见我，但实际而言，自我通常处于警戒状态以防止此类沟通。自我将除自身以外的一切视为异己，甚至包括个体自身潜意识的各个部分。由于这些部分常被自我否认，难怪像我这样的声音只能偶尔突破防线。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The inner ego is a portion of the self, for example -- is the portion of your self -- that is aware of your reincarnational activities. It is the part of you that exists outside of time, yet simultaneously lives in time. You form your own reality. The ego that you are aware of obviously could not form your body for you, however, or grow your bones. It knows how to assess the conditions of the world. It makes deductions. Your reasoning is highly important, yet alone it cannot pump your blood or tell your eyes how to see.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是自体的一部分——例如，它是你自体的一部分——它知晓你的转世活动。它是你存在于时间之外、同时又活在时间之中的那部分。你创造了自己的实相。然而，你所觉察到的自我显然无法为你塑造身体或生长骨骼。它懂得评估世界的状况，进行推论。你的推理能力极为重要，但仅凭推理无法泵送你的血液，也无法指示你的眼睛如何观看。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: When the ego becomes a mere observer rather than a controller, and momentarily suspends its rigid judgments, then inner direct experience is given some freedom and yet the ego is still aware of it. When the ego is completely or nearly completely subjugated, as in sleep, then there is direct experience through the inner senses, but no conscious awareness of it.
quotes.translation: 当自我成为纯粹的观察者而非控制者，并暂时搁置其僵化的评判时，内在的直接体验便获得某种自由，而自我仍能觉察到它。当自我完全或近乎完全被压制时（例如睡眠状态），内在感官会带来直接体验，但意识层面却无法察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: (11:40.) The ego is an offshoot of the conscious mind, so to speak. The conscious mind is like a gigantic camera with the ego directing the view and the focus. Left alone, various portions of the identity rise and form the ego, degroup and reform, all the while maintaining a marvelous spontaneity and yet a sense of oneness. (See both sessions in Chapter One.)
quotes.translation: （11:40）可以说，自我是意识心智的一个分支。意识心智如同一台巨型摄像机，由自我操控视角与焦距。当它不受干扰时，人格的不同部分会自然浮现并形成自我，随后解组重组，始终保持着惊人的自发性与一体感。（参见第一章两节课程。）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: For, because you perceive reality in a limited fashion only, this in no way affects the basic nature of reality itself. The ego attempts to stand apart from action, to view action as the result of ego. However, again, the ego's attempt to stand apart from action in no way changes the basic nature of action itself, and the ego merely limits its own perception.
quotes.translation: 因为，尽管你仅以有限的方式感知实相，但这丝毫不会影响实相本身的基本性质。自我试图脱离行动，将行动视为自我的产物。然而，自我脱离行动的企图同样无法改变行动本身的基本性质，它只是限制了自己的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It can judge whether an action is a constructive or an impeding one for itself. Upon many occasions the purposes of the ego coincide with the purposes of the whole personality, but upon many occasions the purposes of the ego do not coincide with the best purposes of the whole personality. And in such cases the ego is not equipped to judge, except for itself.
quotes.translation: 它能够判断某个行动对自身而言是建设性的还是阻碍性的。在许多情况下，自我的目的与整个人格的目的是一致的，但在许多情况下，自我的目的与整个人格的最佳目的并不一致。而在这种情况下，自我除了为自己判断外，并不具备判断的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: When the two are in balance and when there is communication between them, then the inner ego can directly communicate with the outer ego, bring to it the necessary enlightenments, and give it, that is give the outer ego the benefit of its own, the inner ego's own, condensed comprehension and direct participation in the existence of the universe as a whole.
quotes.translation: 当两者处于平衡状态，并且它们之间存在沟通时，那么内在自我可以直接与外在自我沟通，为其带来必要的启迪，并赋予它——即赋予外在自我——内在自我自身浓缩的理解和直接参与宇宙整体存在的益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Channels, psychological and psychic, always exist, sending communications back and forth through the various levels of the self, and the ego accepts necessary information and data from inner portions of the personality without question. Its position in fact depends in a large manner upon this unquestioning acceptance of inner data. The ego, in other words, the "exterior" self that you think of as your self -- that portion of you maintains its safety and its seeming command precisely because inner layers of your own personality constantly uphold it, keep the physical body operating, and maintain communications with the multitudinous stimuli that come both from outside conditions and inside conditions. The soul or entity is not diminished but expanded through reincarnations, through existence and experience in probable realities -- something that I will explain later.
quotes.translation: 心理和灵性的通道始终存在，通过自我的各个层面来回传递信息，而自我毫无质疑地接受来自人格内在部分的必要信息和数据。事实上，它的地位在很大程度上依赖于对这种内在数据的无条件接受。换句话说，自我——你认为是自己的那个“外在”自我——它之所以能维持其安全感和表面上的掌控，恰恰是因为你人格的内在层面不断支持它，维持身体的运作，并与来自外在条件和内在条件的众多刺激保持沟通。灵魂或本体并不会因转世、因在可能实相中的存在与体验而减少，反而会扩展——这一点我稍后会解释。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The ego is scarcely conscious of these. Your experiences occurred when the ego, because of your illness, was momentarily exhausted, its control lessened. The personality was then momentarily aware of realities that the ego would ordinarily attempt to block. These were pulsations, in actuality of corresponding strength, but interpreted differently by you.
quotes.translation: 自我几乎意识不到这些。你的经历发生在因疾病导致自我暂时衰竭、控制力减弱之时。人格于是短暂意识到自我通常会试图屏蔽的实相。这些实际上是强度对应的脉动，但被你以不同方式解读。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego must act therefore as a director of activity in the personality's relationships with the physical environment. The ego is concerned with purposeful action. However when the ego is too restrictive its conception of purposeful action becomes so narrow that many legitimate and necessary impulses are dammed up, forming these rejected action patterns.
quotes.translation: 因此自我必须充当人格与物质环境互动时的活动导演。自我关注有目的性的行动。然而当自我过于严苛时，它对有目的性行动的认知会变得极为狭隘，导致许多合理且必要的冲动被阻塞，形成这些被拒绝的行动模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The creative body consciousness creates the eye. The creative inner psyche creates the ego. The body forms the eye in the splendid wisdom of its great unconscious knowing. The psyche brings forth the ego that perceives psychologically as the eye perceives physically. Both the eye and the ego are formations focused toward perception of exterior reality.
quotes.translation: 创造性的身体意识创造了眼睛。创造性的内在心灵创造了自我。身体以其伟大无意识认知的卓越智慧形成眼睛。心灵生出自我，如同眼睛在物质层面感知那般进行心理层面的感知。眼睛与自我都是聚焦于外在实相感知的构造。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: For safety's sake a firm relationship between the ego and its environment should be considered a prerequisite for serious or extensive psychic investigation. The ego must have something to come back to. This is extremely important. I do not mean to discourage the personality in his laudable interest in unseen reality. I do want to caution him that first steps must be taken first if his inner goals in this direction are ever to be achieved, without unnecessary difficulties for the ego.
quotes.translation: 为安全起见，自我与其环境之间稳固的关系应被视为进行严肃或广泛心灵探究的先决条件。自我必须有个可回归的基点。这极为重要。我并非要打击人格对不可见实相的可贵兴趣，而是想提醒他：若要达成此方向的内在目标，必须先走好第一步，以免给自我带来不必要的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego feared for its position, frightened that it would dissolve back into the inner self from which it came. Yet in its emergence it provided the inner self with a new kind of feedback, a different view not only of itself; but through this, the inner self was able to glimpse possibilities of development of which it had not previously been aware. In your terms, by the time of Christ, the ego was sure enough of its position so that the projected picture of God could begin to change.
quotes.translation: 自我曾为其地位而恐惧，害怕它会消融回它所源自的内在自体。然而在其浮现过程中，它为内在自体提供了新的反馈——不仅是对自身的不同视角，更通过此视角，内在自体得以瞥见先前未曾察觉的发展可能性。以你们的说法，到基督时代，自我已足够确信自身地位，以至于投射出的上帝形象开始转变。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Although someone begins reading this material on page one, for example, this does not mean that page four hundred does not already exist. Your outer ego is forced into what could be called successive action, but the inner ego is not so bound. This should make the point more clear. I mentioned earlier that cause and effect operates in various manners, and what seems to be cause and effect is often merely a result of your necessary disposition to view actions in a successive manner.
quotes.translation: 举例而言，虽然有人从第一页开始阅读这份资料，但这并不意味着第四百页尚未存在。你们的外在自我被迫进入所谓的连续行动，但内在自我并不受此束缚。这应能使观点更清晰。我先前提到因果以多种方式运作，而看似因果的现象，往往只是你们以连续方式看待行动的必要倾向所导致的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The strength of the ego of course is also a factor here. If the ego is not a particularly strong one to begin with however, the conflict will seldom reach these proportions. Instead the ego will merely be slightly surprised at behavior which it does not condone, but eventually will accept because it has been forced to recognize its reality.
quotes.translation: 当然，自我（ego）的强度在此也是一个因素。如果自我一开始并非特别强大，冲突很少会达到这种程度。相反，自我只会对它所不认可的行为感到些许惊讶，但最终会接受，因为它被迫承认了这些行为的真实性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The inner ego is focused inward, with as much intensity as the outer ego is focused outward. This inner ego is in many respects a composite, as indeed to a lesser degree the outer ego is a composite.
quotes.translation: 内在自我（inner ego）向内聚焦，其强度与外在自我（outer ego）向外聚焦的强度相当。这个内在自我在许多方面是一个复合体，正如外在自我在较小程度上也是一个复合体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is a great mistake to imagine that the human being has but one ego, however. The ego represents merely any given pattern of characteristics, psychological characteristics, that happen to be dominant at any given time. If any kind of a thorough investigation were to be carried on, it would become apparent that during one lifetime any given individual will display several, sometimes quite different, egos at various times, each one quite honestly seeing itself as the permanent I.
quotes.translation: 然而，认为人类只有一个自我是一个巨大的错误。自我仅仅代表任何特定时刻占主导地位的特定心理特征模式。如果进行任何彻底的调查，就会明显发现，在一生中，任何特定个体在不同时期会展现出几个、有时甚至截然不同的自我，每一个都真诚地将自己视为永恒的“我”。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: What happened was this. When the conscious ego desires information, and when the outer ego is in full control, then the information is sought from the outer senses. When the outer ego is caught unawares and information is requested, the subconscious often delivers it through the use of the inner senses. You will see that this was the case.
quotes.translation: 事情是这样的。当有意识的自我渴望信息，而外在自我完全掌控时，信息便通过外在感官寻求。当外在自我猝不及防且信息被请求时，潜意识往往通过内在感官传递信息。你会发现这正是当时的情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The child's ego is not the adult's ego. As a rule you perceive the similarity, and overlook the differences of psychological patterns of this sort. The ego is not the most powerful or the most knowledgeable portion of the self. It is simply a well-specialized portion of the personality, well equipped to operate under certain circumstances.
quotes.translation: 孩童的自我并非成人的自我。通常你只看到相似之处，却忽略了这类心理模式的差异。自我并非自身最强大或最博学的部分，它只是人格中高度专门化的部分，能在特定情境下运作自如。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: And again, dreams are themselves never completed, but continue on whether or not your perception of them continues. For dreams also are gestalts. When you look into the mirror you see the camouflage image. You do not see the ego, though you know that it exists. But the idea, ego, is in itself an arbitrary unit chosen for particular reasons. It is not a thing. You have drawn lines, imaginary lines, and made an arbitrary boundary. This does not mean that the ego does not exist.
quotes.translation: 再者，梦境本身永不完结，无论你是否继续感知它们，它们仍在延续。因为梦境也是完形。当你照镜子时，你看到的是伪装形象。你虽知自我存在，却看不见它。但"自我"这个观念本身，是为特定原因而选择的任意单位。它并非实体。你划定了界线——想象的界线，并设定了任意边界。这并不表示自我不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When and if the dominant personality becomes aware of this situation, it automatically expands. It consciously contains experience that was previously subconscious. Now. The inner ego is quite familiar with the existence of the physically-oriented ego, but the physically-oriented ego is not usually familiar with its inner counterpart.
quotes.translation: 当主要人格意识到这种情况时，它会自动扩展。它有意识地容纳了先前属于潜意识的经验。现在，内在自我非常熟悉以物质为导向的自我存在，但以物质为导向的自我通常不熟悉其内在对应体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Usually this occurred when alcohol relaxed the ego, and the results would then make the ego tighten its control. When Ruburt becomes leery or afraid to allow himself the normal amount of social drinking, this is a symptom, telling you that the subconscious is being too tightly held. The ego fears any weakening, for it feels the pressure of the subconscious demand for expression. You may now take your break. I will try to finish this, this evening, for it will be invaluable.
quotes.translation: 通常这种情况发生在酒精放松自我时，而结果又会让自我加强控制。当鲁柏变得警惕或害怕让自己进行正常的社交饮酒时，这是一个症状，告诉你潜意识被过于紧握。自我害怕任何削弱，因为它感受到潜意识要求表达的壓力。你现在可以休息了。我今晚会尽量完成这部分，因为它将是无价之宝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: (10:13.) Many probable systems have perceptive mechanisms far different from your own. In fact, some are based upon gestalts of awareness completely alien to you. Quite without realizing it, your ego is a result of group consciousness, for example; the one consciousness that most directly faces the exterior world, is dependent upon the minute consciousness that resides within each living cell of your body; and as a rule you are only aware of one ego -- at least at a time.
quotes.translation: （10:13分。）许多可能系统拥有与你截然不同的感知机制。事实上，有些基于完全陌生的觉知完形。例如，你的自我是群体意识的结果，而你并未意识到这一点；那个最直接面对外在世界的意识，依赖于你身体每个活细胞内的微小意识；通常你只意识到一个自我——至少一次一个。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience under these circumstances transforms the ego also in beneficial ways. Otherwise the ego is left behind, unable to perform, as a rule now, its primary functions. The ego can organize the old data when it undergoes a psychedelic experience as a part of the whole self. Then it can also organize the new data.
quotes.translation: 在此类情境下的迷幻体验也会以有益的方式转化自我。否则自我将被抛在身后，通常无法执行其主要功能。当自我作为整体自性的一部分经历迷幻体验时，它能够组织旧有数据，也能组织新数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: We must use analogies. It can be thought of as the most exterior projection of the inner ego. When you find yourself, so to speak, watching what you think of as the ego, then you are in contact with this portion of the self. It is aware of both conscious and subconscious motivations and realities, and it is also aware of projections into other fields of actuality. I have hinted before of these matters, for when I say that you will use this other portion of the self to examine waking consciousness and probe beneath it, I already presuppose a you that uses this self. In other words, you are already magnifying the limitations of the self and extending them.
quotes.translation: 我们必须使用类比。它可以被视为内在自我的最外层投射。当你仿佛在观察你所认为的自我时，你便与自性的这一部分取得了联系。它既觉察有意识与无意识的动机和实相，也觉察向其他实相领域的投射。我之前已暗示过这些事，因为当我说你将运用自性的这一部分来检视清醒意识并深入其下时，我已预设了一个运用此自性的"你"。换言之，你已在放大自性的局限并扩展它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: A steady program, such as I have outlined, because of its conditioning routine, will allow the personality a progressive and safe entry into psychic experience that is firm, and will also strengthen the ego in its relation to environment. This is not to suggest that the ego is weak in this case, for it is not. But its ability to relate to others on the physical plane needs strengthening, particularly since the personality is vitally concerned with psychic investigation.
quotes.translation: 如我所概述的稳定计划，因其条件化的常规程序，将允许人格渐进且安全地进入稳固的灵性体验，同时也会强化自我与环境的关系。这并非暗示此案例中的自我是软弱的——事实恰恰相反。但它在物质层面与他人建立联系的能力需要加强，尤其当人格正全神贯注于灵性探索时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This, temporarily, is something like what happened to you, Joseph. The inner self is aware of other realities. It is aware of the ego. Remember here the difference between consciousness of self and the ego, for the difference is important. The ego is but part of the self, part of the conscious self, but focused in one direction.
quotes.translation: 这暂时有点像你所经历的情况，约瑟夫。内在自体知晓其他实相。它知晓自我。请记住此处自体意识与自我的区别，因为这种区别很重要。自我只是自体的一部分，是意识自体的一部分，但只聚焦于单一方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When in such dreams your perceptions seem exceedingly clear, you can be certain that the inner ego is operating. Now all portions of the personality, of the present personality, belong to this inner ego. It functions constantly, and yet it is always in a state of becoming. It is more than what you are at any given moment in your time. It contains, and j^, the psychological blueprint containing the full potential of the present personality within any given incarnation.
quotes.translation: 当你在这类梦境中感知变得异常清晰时，可以确定内在自我正在运作。人格的所有部分——当前人格的所有部分——都归属于这个内在自我。它持续运作，却始终处于"成为"的状态。它远不止你在时间中任何特定时刻所是的那个你。它包含并构成着心理蓝图，其中蕴含当前人格在任何特定转世中的全部潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I have often said that all these divisions and separations are arbitrary. All exist one within another. Apparent boundaries are not boundaries, but only differences in the focus of attention. Even this inner ego is not the same from one given moment to another, for it is not a static thing, but is a part of continuing action. It is much more familiar with the subconscious and with the dream universe, and with the inner self, than it is with the outside ego, however.
quotes.translation: 我常说所有这些划分与分离都是人为的。一切皆彼此相融。表面的界限并非真正的界限，只是注意力焦点的差异。即便是这个内在自我，在不同时刻也并非同一存在，因为它不是静态之物，而是持续行动的一部分。然而，它对于潜意识、梦境宇宙及内在自体的熟悉程度，远超过对外在自我的了解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This is not to say that the outer ego is a puppet. It is to say that the outer ego is far less conscious than the inner ego or the inner self, that its perception is less, that it is far less stable, though it makes great pretense at stability; that it springs from the inner self, and is less rather than more, aware. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这并不是说外在自我是个傀儡。而是说外在自我远不如内在自我或内在自体有意识，它的感知力较弱，远不如内在自我稳定——尽管它极力伪装出稳定；它源自内在自体，但意识程度较低而非较高。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Basically this concern for human welfare is indeed virtuous, but overindulged in it becomes loaded with possibilities that could be most unfortunate. You knew I was going to light into you this evening, as Ruburt would say. What I want, here, is the balance. Neither plunge yourself into the ignorance, doubts and injustices, so that you can see nothing else, nor close your eyes to them. But there must be a place within you where these do not exist, or the freedom of the inner self will be hampered, as far as its connection with the ego is concerned. Your deep consideration for human problems has indeed helped lead you to these sessions.
quotes.translation: 基本上，这种对人类福祉的关怀确实是美德，但过度沉溺其中，就会充满可能极为不幸的隐患。正如鲁柏所言，你知道我今晚要对你开刀。这里我要强调的是平衡。既不要让自己沉溺于无知、怀疑与不公之中，以至于看不见其他事物；也不要对它们视而不见。但你的内在必须有一个这些都不存在的空间，否则就内在自我与自我的关联而言，内在自体的自由将受到阻碍。正是你对人类问题的深切关怀，才引导你参与了这些课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You are aware, alert, and participating in many more realities than you know as your soul expresses itself through you. That consciousness of your usual daylight hours, the ego consciousness, rises up like a flower from the ground of the "underneath," the unconscious bed of your own reality. Though you are not aware of it, this ego itself emerges, then falls back again into the unconscious, from which another ego then rises as a new bloom from the springtime earth.
quotes.translation: 当你的灵魂通过你表达自身时，你所觉察、警醒并参与其中的实相，远比你已知的要多。你日常清醒时刻的意识——自我意识——就像花朵从"底层"的地面升起，从你自己实相的无意识土壤中绽放。尽管你并未察觉，这个自我本身浮现出来，随后又落回无意识之中，接着另一个自我如同春日大地的新花般再次升起。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: When the inner ego and the outer ego pursue directly opposed viewpoints and different aims and goals, then you run into difficulty. In studying human personality and the psyche, your psychologists have not gone far, nor deeply enough. When a complete barrier, or nearly complete barrier, exists between the inner and outer egos, then the whole self is denied value fulfillment to a large degree. Such a division occurs at various times in history, and is occurring now.
quotes.translation: 当内在自我与外在自我追求截然对立的观点和不同的目标与目的时，你就会陷入困境。在研究人类人格与心灵时，你们的心理学家走得不够远，也不够深入。当内在自我与外在自我之间存在完全或近乎完全的屏障时，整个自体便在很大程度上被剥夺了价值完成。这种分裂在历史上不同时期都会发生，而此刻正在发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is thinned out further by my own subconscious, because my inner and outer egos are not yet a complete unity, although I am, or my outer ego is, in direct contact with my inner ego on some occasions. Nevertheless my subconscious is not yet dispensed with but is still retained somewhat in the order of your archaic appendix.
quotes.translation: 它被我的潜意识进一步削弱，因为我的内在自我与外在自我尚未完全合一，尽管我——或者说我的外在自我——在某些情况下与内在自我有直接接触。然而我的潜意识尚未被摒弃，仍像你们那古老的阑尾一样被保留着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is precisely because the inner vitality is not accepted by the ego, that when it is acknowledged by the ego it seems so explosive. The ego attempts, this ego attempts, to stand aside and to deny the inevitability of change. The ego in this case, as in many cases, attempts to maintain stability and permanence at all costs.
quotes.translation: 正是因为内在活力不被自我所接纳，所以当它被自我承认时，才会显得如此具有爆发性。这个自我试图——这个自我试图——置身事外，否认变化的必然性。在此案例中，如同许多案例一样，自我试图不惜一切代价维持稳定与恒常。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This incidentally is the least acceptable survival pattern. The ego may be strong enough to insist upon its old prerogatives of control, yet too inflexible to adjust to the new conditions. It may accept the challenge of great change on the other hand, and allow a reorganization of psychological processes, in which case identity is not only saved but renewed. The ego is then in command after some struggle of generic frameworks, in a way not possible to it earlier.
quotes.translation: 这恰巧是最不可接受的生存模式。自我可能足够强大，坚持其旧有的控制特权，却又过于僵化而无法适应新条件。另一方面，它也可能接受重大变革的挑战，允许心理过程的重组——在这种情况下，身份不仅得以保存，更获得新生。经过与通用框架的某种斗争后，自我便能以早期不可能的方式掌控局面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: As you know therefore we have differentiated between an outer ego, who manipulates within physical reality, and an inner ego who directs the activities of the inner self. Now then, the next step should indeed be clear. In the main, the ego deals with secondary realities, and in the main, the inner ego deals with primaries.
quotes.translation: 因此如你所知，我们区分了在物质实相中运作的外在自我，与指挥内在自我活动的内在自我。那么下一步确实应当清晰：大体而言，自我处理次要实相，而内在自我则主要处理首要实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Now. As you have a tendency to think that earth is the center of the universe, although you know this is not true, so you have a tendency to think that the ego is the center of the personality, and that other aspects of the personality exist for the use of the ego, that all else revolves about the ego. This is not true.
quotes.translation: 现在。正如你们倾向于认为地球是宇宙中心——尽管明知并非如此——你们同样倾向于认为自我是人格中心，人格的其他面向皆为自我所用，万物皆围绕自我旋转。这并非事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Ego concern is a very jealous concern, and it is directly connected to the personality's concept of survival necessities within the physical universe. The ego that is overly fearful for survival will allow little potential to show itself unless that potential is directly connected with physical survival. Actually what happens here is that the ego sells the personality short, out of fear, and denies those very abilities that are needed, and in practical terms.
quotes.translation: 自我关注是一种非常善妒的关注，它直接与人格在物质宇宙中的生存需求概念相连。过度恐惧生存的自我，除非潜能与物质生存直接相关，否则几乎不允许其显现。实际上，这里发生的情况是，自我出于恐惧而低估了人格，并否定了那些实际所需的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: As the outer ego is constantly creative, so is the inner ego. The focus in which the creativity occurs is merely different. The subconscious could be thought of as a nucleus, surrounded by the inner and outer egos. Certain tensions are maintained here, and all communications, incidentally, are the results of tensions.
quotes.translation: 正如外在自我持续具有创造力，内在自我也是如此。创造力发生的焦点仅仅不同。潜意识可被视为一个核心，被内在自我与外在自我所环绕。此处维持着特定的张力，而所有沟通，顺便一提，都是张力的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego may also have particular desires of its own along these lines. Now you will see what I am saying. In various reincarnations upon your plane, the ego that reincarnates is the same ego. The information of past lives is retained by that ego's subconscious, for obvious reasons. But this information can be tapped.
quotes.translation: 自我在这些方面也可能有它自己特定的欲望。现在你会明白我在说什么。在你们层面的各种转世中，转世的自我是同一个自我。前世的信息因显而易见的原因被那个自我的潜意识所保留。但这一信息是可以被触及的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space. This is not nearly as mysterious as it might sound. Each of my readers plays a game in which the egotistical conscious self pretends not to know what the whole self definitely does know. Since the ego is definitely a part of the whole self, then it must necessarily be basically aware of such knowledge. In its intense focus in physical reality, however, it pretends not to know, until it feels able to utilize the information in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 灵魂或存有始终处于流动、学习与发展的状态，这些发展关乎主观体验而非时间或空间。这并不像听起来那般神秘。我的每位读者都在玩一场游戏：自我意识假装不知道整体自我确知之事。既然自我确实是整体自我的一部分，那么它必然在根本上知晓这类知识。然而，当它极度聚焦于物质实相时，便假装不知，直到它感觉能够以物质形式运用这些信息为止。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: When communication takes place between a survival personality and one who exists within the physical system, this involves a reshuffling on the part of the survival personality, where the ego is momentarily given greater reign ... If this was not done, then in most cases communication would not be possible, just because the survival personality would have such difficulty impressing the personality who was still ego-oriented within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 当存续人格与物质系统内的人格进行沟通时，存续人格方面会经历一次重组，此时自我被暂时赋予更大的主导权……若非如此，在大多数情况下沟通将不可能实现，因为存续人格将极难对仍以自我为导向的物质系统内人格留下印象。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The manipulation of camouflage material depends to a large degree upon the outside ego's confidence, and the outside ego's confidence is only strong when it follows the inner ego's pattern. You can for a while fake the sort of disbelieving belief required, but your ability to sell is based upon your own confidence as an integrated and principled personality. Practically you would find your ability minimized, and do you speak to me about practicality?
quotes.translation: 对伪装材料的操控很大程度上取决于外在自我的信心，而外在自我的信心唯有遵循内在自我的模式时才足够强大。你或许能暂时伪装出所需的那种怀疑性信念，但你的说服能力建立在作为整合且原则性人格的自身信心之上。实际上你会发现自己的能力被削弱——你竟敢与我谈论实用性？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is quite true that the inner ego is aware through the inner senses of any choices that the outer ego will make with the use of free will. This does not mean that decisions are in any way predetermined. It only means that the inner ego is not bound by the dimensions in which those free will choices are made.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实通过内在感官预知外在自我运用自由意志所做的任何选择，但这绝不意味着决定是预先注定的，只表明内在自我不受那些自由意志选择所发生的维度限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The conscious ego rises indeed out of quote "the unconscious," but the unconscious being the creator of the ego, is necessarily far more conscious than its offspring. The ego is simply not conscious enough to be able to contain the vast knowledge that belongs to the inner conscious self from which it springs.
quotes.translation: 有意识的自我确实从所谓的"无意识"中升起，但既然无意识是自我的创造者，它必然比其产物更具意识。自我只是意识程度不足，无法容纳它源出的内在有意识自体所拥有的浩瀚知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now this sense, like all other inner senses, is being used by the inner self-conscious ego, but the outer ego is not permitted awareness along these lines. A minimum amount of information from these inner senses is given to the outer ego after it is sifted through the subconscious. But only a minimum amount.
quotes.translation: 这种感官与其他内在感官一样，正被内在有意识自我所运用，但外在自我不被允许沿这些方向获得觉知。这些内在感官的信息在通过潜意识筛选后，只有极少量的信息被传递给外在自我——但确实只有极少量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The ego is only one layer of the self that has self-consciousness. Being self-conscious, the ego attempts to be conscious only of itself. Self-consciousness results in an intense, but necessarily limited focus. It necessitates boundaries. It depends upon some sort of inner psychological decision as to what will be considered self, and therefore accepted by consciousness, and that which will be considered notself, and not accepted by consciousness.
quotes.translation: 自我只是拥有自我意识的自我的一部分。由于具有自我意识，自我试图只意识到自身。自我意识导致强烈但必然受限的聚焦。它需要界限。它依赖于某种内在的心理决定，即什么将被视为自我，从而被意识接受，什么将被视为非我，而不被意识接受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: His ego is his ego, and because it is his he loves it indeed. All egos fear that which is not ego. A necessary defense mechanism, which is part of each personality.
quotes.translation: 他的自我是他的自我，正因为是他的，他确实珍爱它。所有自我都恐惧非我之物。这是一种必要的防御机制，是每个人格的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: A dispersion has begun in which the ego will find it more and more difficult to hold energy within forms of personal identity, or to use energy for the purposes of the ego. The energy will fly every which way, uncontrolled, and no longer channeled. Habit will still have some power of restraint for a while yet, but whole blocks of conceptual realizations, and whole blocks of time realizations, are now surely drifting away from the ego's control.
quotes.translation: 一种分散已经开始，自我将越来越难以将能量保持在个人身份的形态中，或为了自我的目的而运用能量。能量将四处飞散，不受控制，不再被引导。习惯在一段时间内仍会有些许约束力，但整块的概念认知和整块的时间认知，如今确实正逐渐脱离自我的掌控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: This electrical pattern the personality, with all the experiences of its earthly time. It then can join or partake of the inner self. In other words, though the ego was adopted originally by the inner self, and was a product of physical heredity and environment, it does not die; but its existence is changed from physical reality into electrical reality. It is still individual. No individuality is lost, but it becomes a part of the inner self, and its experiences are added to the total experience of the many personalities that have composed the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这个电力模式包含了人格及其尘世时间的所有经验。然后它可以加入或参与内在自体。换句话说，虽然自我最初是由内在自体所采用，并且是物质遗传与环境的产物，但它并不会死亡；而是其存在从物质实相转变为电力实相。它仍然是独立的。没有任何个体性会丧失，但它成为内在自体的一部分，其经验被添加到构成内在自体的众多人格的总经验中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Reactions will therefore appear to be intensified. Nevertheless this intensification is a pretense that one part of the self plays upon the other part, for the very intensity of the emotional reaction on the part of the ego to even small stimuli, allows the ego to say to itself "I feel deeply, therefore I know the depths of myself." And this sham allows the ego to continue denying those inner emotions in an effort to maintain its permanence.
quotes.translation: 因此，反应似乎会变得强烈。然而，这种强烈化是自体的一部分对另一部分所玩的把戏，因为自我对即使是微小刺激的情绪反应强度，让自我可以对自己说：“我感受深刻，因此我知道自己的深度。”这种伪装让自我得以继续否认那些内在情绪，以努力维持其永恒性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Here we will most probably run into some difficulty, but I will try to explain what I mean, and will clear up any questions later. As the self has an inner and an outer ego, so also does the inside finally become the outside. Theoretically for example, if followed through, a deep trance leading to a deeper inside so to speak, would bring you ultimately to another outside. The outer ego for example would meet the inner ego, and vice versa.
quotes.translation: 这里我们很可能会遇到一些困难，但我会尽量解释我的意思，稍后再澄清任何问题。正如自体有内在自我和外在自我，内在最终也会变成外在。例如，理论上，如果深入追踪，一个导致所谓更深内在的深度出神状态，最终会带你到达另一个外在。例如，外在自我会遇到内在自我，反之亦然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Your ego is now focused within this reality. You have other egos focused in other realities. The inner self is aware of what is being done in all of these realities. There is some compensation, and the race knows this. Ruburt wrote that there were clumps of consciousness, and of course he is correct. You are a part of many such clumps of consciousness. The abilities and potentials are not only being developed in this system but in others.
quotes.translation: 你的自我现在聚焦于这个实相。你还有其他自我聚焦于其他实相。内在自己知晓所有这些实相中正在发生的事。存在某种补偿机制，人类种族明白这一点。鲁柏曾写道存在意识团块，他当然是对的。你正是许多这类意识团块的一部分。能力与潜能不仅在这个系统中发展，也在其他系统中发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The term mechanism may be a poor one, but I use it now to emphasize the physical aspects of its nature. When the ego is resilient this mechanism works automatically and well. It is the ego in many cases who clogs the works, so to speak. Ruburt has for years done fairly well in this matter, automatically regulating large areas of his health, with as you know some small failures, such as the sinus condition mainly, and the faulty eyesight.
quotes.translation: "机制"这个术语或许不够恰当，但我现在用它来强调其本质的物理面向。当自我具有弹性时，这个机制会自动良好运作。在许多情况下，正是自我堵塞了运作流程。鲁柏多年来在这方面做得相当不错，自动调节着健康的大部分领域，如你所知，只有少数小问题，主要是鼻窦状况和视力缺陷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Such a rejection is definitely an impeding action. It is this rejection on the ego's part that is the basis for so-called neurosis in many cases. The fault is not that a particular action has been buried by the subconscious. The fault is that the ego has refused to accept the action from the subconscious, therefore impeding the natural flow of energy. Naturally, all actions are not recognized by the ego, nor is it necessary in any case.
quotes.translation: 这种拒绝无疑是一种阻碍行为。在许多所谓的神经症案例中，正是自我层面的这种拒绝构成了基础。问题不在于某个特定行动被潜意识埋藏，而在于自我拒绝接受来自潜意识的行动，从而阻碍了能量的自然流动。当然，并非所有行动都会被自我识别，在任何情况下也都没有必要如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Your own subconscious is the fountain of your individuality and personality. From it springs your talent. When the ego becomes too concerned with daily matters, with worry in other words, then the works of the tool become clogged. It becomes ineffective. Dissociation, and I will give you many ways of achieving it, unclogs the tool and is absolutely necessary. The freely working subconscious, or the inner you, is completely capable of taking care of all practical considerations, and will use the ego as a tool to see that this is done.
quotes.translation: 你自己的潜意识是你个体性与人格的源泉，你的才华由此涌现。当自我过度关注日常琐事——换言之，陷入忧虑——这工具便会堵塞失灵。解离（我将提供多种达成方法）能疏通这工具，且绝对必要。自由运作的潜意识，即内在的你，完全有能力处理所有实际考量，并会运用自我作为工具来确保此事达成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: A survival personality in many respects is psychologically much different from the individual that he was. The ego is now under the control of what may be loosely called the inner self. When communications take place between a survival personality and a personality who exists within the physical system, then this involves a reshuffling, again, on the part of the survival personality, where the ego is momentarily given greater reign.
quotes.translation: 从许多方面来看，存续人格在心理上与生前的个体截然不同。此时自我受控于可泛称为内在自体的部分。当存续人格与物质系统内的人格进行沟通时，这涉及存续人格方面的重新调整——在此过程中，自我会暂时获得更大的主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The woman involved could gain immeasurably through the development of her own abilities. However she is fearful of them, fearing mostly a quite actual lack of discipline. The ego, her ego, is presently too concerned with other problems to allow her any such inner freedom. At the same time the difficulty experienced by her ego cries out for the sort of fulfillment that could be achieved through the development of these abilities.
quotes.translation: 这位女性本可通过发展自身能力获得无可估量的收获。然而她畏惧这些能力，主要担忧的是相当真实的自律缺失。她的自我目前过度纠结于其他问题，以致无法给予她任何内在自由。与此同时，其自我所经历的困境正迫切呼唤着那种唯有通过发展这些能力才能实现的圆满。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In other words the apparent intensity of the egotistical reactions is a sham on the part of the ego, to hide the fact that it refuses to become involved with action as a whole, because it fears for its permanence. When the ego understands, and it will, that it is a portion of the whole self, and itself a part of action, then indeed it will not fear for its own permanence, for it will realize that being a part of action, its very nature is dependent upon change, and vitality, and value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 换言之，自我反应的表面强度是一种伪装，用以掩盖自我拒绝全面参与行动的事实，因为它担心自身存续的永久性。当自我理解到——它终将理解——它是整体自性的一部分，也是行动的一部分时，它便不再恐惧自身的存续，因为它会明白，作为行动的一部分，其本质依赖于变化、活力与价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now. This inner ego can also operate within the dream state, and in certain awake-seeming dreams it is the portion that realizes that the personality is not in its normal waking condition. It is this portion of the self that is with you in the most excellent projections. The inner ego is the part of the personality that contains the highest aspirations and capabilities. It has been called by psychologists the subliminal self.
quotes.translation: 现在。这个内在自我也能在梦境状态中运作，在某些看似清醒的梦中，正是这一部分意识到人格并未处于正常的清醒状态。正是自性的这一部分，在最优越的投射中与你同在。内在自我是人格中蕴含最高志向与能力的部分。心理学家称之为阈下自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Rising ego consciousness then would have its religious reasons for domination and control. The pope became God the Father personified, but that god had indeed changed from the old Jewish Jehovah. Christ, historically speaking, had altered that concept enough so that at least God the Father was not quite as capricious as Jehovah. (Pause.) Some mercy came to the forefront. Growing ego consciousness could not run rampant over nature. On the other hand, holy wars and ignorance would keep the population down. The church, however -- the Roman Catholic Church -- still held a repository of religious ideas and concepts that served as a bank of probabilities from which the race could draw. The religious ideas served as social organization, much needed, and many of the monks managed to preserve old manuscripts and knowledge underground. Those who were allied with religious principles, now, mainly survived, and brought forth communities and descendants who were protected. Psychic and religious ideas, then, despite many drawbacks, served as a method of species organization. They are far more important in terms of "evolution" than is recognized. Religious concepts from the beginning kept tribes together, provided social structures, and insured physical survival and the protection that made descendants most probable.
quotes.translation: 因此，崛起的自我意识会为其支配与控制找到宗教理由。教皇成了天父的化身，但那位神祇确实已从古老的犹太耶和华转变而来。从历史角度看，基督已充分改变了这一概念，至少天父不再像耶和华那般反复无常。（停顿。）些许慈悲浮现出来。日益增长的自我意识无法在自然中横行无忌。另一方面，圣战与愚昧会抑制人口增长。然而教会——罗马天主教会——仍保存着宗教思想与概念库，如同种族可以汲取的或然率银行。宗教思想作为急需的社会组织形态而存在，许多修士设法在地下保存了古老手稿与知识。当时与宗教原则结盟者主要存活下来，并繁衍出受到保护的社群与后代。因此，通灵与宗教思想尽管存在诸多缺陷，却充当了物种组织的方法。它们在"进化"方面的重要性远超世人所认知。宗教概念自始便维系部落团结，提供社会结构，确保肉体生存与保护，使后代繁衍成为最可能的结果。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: "The growth of ego consciousness by itself set up both challenges and limitations. This automatically meant that emerging man, in that framework, must let go of a certain kind of animal comprehension that was extremely valuable overall, but could inhibit ego growth ... For many centuries there was no clear-cut differentiation between various species of man and animal ... There were also, of course, parallel developments in the emergence of physical man. Again, for many centuries, there were innumerable species of man-in-the-making, in your terms; various postures, and even types of manipulation, as well as alterations in brain size and activity. In some, different kinds of senses predominated. At the same time a great give-and-take was occurring at all levels -- including vegetation, for example -- so that together the creatures and the earth worked out the kind of stability best suited for the particular kind of developments that were to emerge.
quotes.translation: 自我意识的发展本身既带来了挑战也造成了限制。这自动意味着，在那个框架中，正在崛起的人类必须放弃某种在整体上极具价值、但可能抑制自我成长的动物性理解……许多世纪以来，不同种类的人类与动物之间并没有明确的区分……当然，在物质人类的崛起过程中也存在着平行的发展。同样，在你们看来，许多世纪以来存在着无数种正在形成中的人类：各种姿态，甚至不同的操作方式，以及大脑大小和活动的变化。在某些种类中，不同的感官占据主导地位。与此同时，在所有层面上——例如包括植被——都发生着巨大的互动与交换，因此生物与地球共同发展出最适合即将出现的特定发展类型的稳定性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: I speak as my whole self to you ... since my personality structure is more advanced than is usual for communications from other systems. Therefore, I do not need to adopt a past ego [of my own]. Perhaps because this is not necessary, the psychological bridge is required to make my messages comprehensible to Ruburt. This connecting framework does some of the translating for me that a reassembled ego would do. It delivers information to Ruburt in a way that he can understand. Occasionally [in your tests] I do impress him directly, telepathically (see Note 19), with a concept. When he receives data in the form of images the framework is operating. With my direction, this framework uses Ruburt's personal associations to direct his impressions toward the correct point. Then when we are successful I insert the right information.23
quotes.translation: 我以我的整体自我对你说话……因为我的个性结构比来自其他系统的通常通讯更为先进。因此，我不需要采用[我自己的]一个过去的自我。也许正因为这并非必要，所以需要心理桥梁来让我的信息被鲁柏理解。这个连接框架为我做了部分翻译工作，而这些工作本应由一个重新组合的自我来完成。它以鲁柏能够理解的方式向他传递信息。偶尔[在你们的测试中]，我会直接以心电感应（见注19）的方式将一个概念印在他心中。当他以图像形式接收数据时，这个框架就在运作。在我的指引下，这个框架利用鲁柏的个人联想，将他的印象引向正确的方向。然后当我们成功时，我会插入正确的信息。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The tale has always appealed to children because they recognize the validity behind it.2 The fairy godmother is a creative personification of the personalized elements in Framework 2 -- a personification therefore of the inner ego, that rises to the aid of the mortal self to grant its desires, even when the intents of the mortal self may not seem to fit into the practical framework of normal life. When the inner ego responds in such a fashion, even the commonplace, ordinary, seemingly innocuous circumstances suddenly become charged with a new vitality, and appear to "work for" the individual involved. If you are reading this book you are already too old to clearly remember the constant fantasies of your early childhood. Children however know quite well, automatically, that they have a strong hand in the creation of the events that then seem to happen to them.
quotes.translation: 这个故事一直吸引着孩子们，因为他们认识到其背后的真实性。仙女教母是框架二中个性化元素的创造性人格化——因此也是内在自我的人格化，它升起来帮助凡俗自我实现其愿望，即使凡俗自我的意图似乎并不符合正常生活的实际框架。当内在自我以这种方式回应时，即使是平凡、普通、看似无害的情境也会突然充满新的活力，并似乎"为"相关的个体"运作"。如果你正在读这本书，你已经太老了，无法清晰记得你童年早期持续的幻想。然而，孩子们自动地非常清楚，他们在创造那些随后似乎发生在他们身上的事件中扮演着重要角色。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: As far as these drugs are concerned there are a few points I would like to make. One of your purposes as I have said is to learn to organize energy units and to focus your own energy along those lines. That is, you are the energy that you use. The self-consciousness is not to be blotted out but taken along. It is so to speak to walk side by side with the inner self. The use of these drugs sweeps the personality off its feet. Often the personality does receive a rewarding glimpse of the inner reality, but more often the ego is merely sent tumbling through frightening images of chaotic phantom realities formed by a suddenly-released subconscious, and with no guide. The experience is often vivid and long remembered, but so unorganized and undisciplined that no inner order is arrived at, no other organization glimpsed, and the ordinary but necessary camouflage footing suddenly dispensed with.
quotes.translation: 关于这些药物，我想提出几点看法。正如我所说，你们的目的之一是学习组织能量单元，并沿着这些路线聚焦自己的能量。也就是说，你们就是自己所用的能量。自我意识不应被抹去，而应被带着同行。可以说，它应与内在自我并肩而行。使用这些药物会使个性失去平衡。个性有时确实能获得对内在实相的有益一瞥，但更常见的是，自我只是被抛入由突然释放的潜意识所形成的混乱幻象实相的可怕意象中，且没有向导。这种体验往往生动且长久难忘，但如此无组织、无纪律，以至于无法达到内在秩序，无法瞥见其他组织方式，而平常但必要的伪装基础突然被舍弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: On a particular level however this makes little difference, because such communications are carried on constantly at subconscious levels, seldom reaching ego awareness, so that individuals are subconsciously conditioned--and underline subconsciously conditioned--therefore expecting, all unknown to the ego, such communications when certain chemical changes come about; since these chemical changes also occur for other reasons when these conditions occur, on a practical level communications will then most easily happen. These chemical changes without the proper subconscious focus point, will result in clairvoyance or telepathy strong enough on some occasions to be conscious. When the proper focus point is reached however, these communications will result in rapport between the living and that portion of personality essences, or so-called dead, who are still at least psychically connected with life on your field.
quotes.translation: 然而，在特定层面上，这并无太大区别，因为这类沟通持续在潜意识层面进行，很少达到自我意识层面，因此个体在潜意识中被条件化——请强调“潜意识中被条件化”——因此在自我全然不知的情况下，当某些化学变化发生时，便预期这类沟通；由于这些化学变化在其他情况下也会因这些条件而发生，在实际层面上，沟通便最容易发生。这些化学变化若没有适当的潜意识焦点，有时会导致足够强烈的千里眼或心灵感应，从而被意识察觉。然而，当达到适当的焦点时，这些沟通将导致生者与那些仍至少与你们场域上的生命有灵性联系的人格本质部分（即所谓的死者）之间的共鸣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: As inner energy forms more complicated gestalts through the processes that I have earlier explained, then inner energy continues its communication with the physical matter that it creates about it. When inner energy desires to construct a more complicated gestalt, then it must telepathically communicate this intent and purpose through the matter which it collects about itself, forming a more complicated inner telepathic pattern first, that can then be filled in with physical matter. The manners in which telepathy operates are difficult to explain because of the divergence of definition held by the ego and by the inner self of any given individual. To the human being it must appear that telepathy is a mental or psychic communication occurring between two or more entirely separate selves. The ego, you see, has one definition for the self and its own idea of the limitations of itself.
quotes.translation: 当内在能量通过我之前解释的过程形成更复杂的完形时，内在能量便继续与其所创造的周围物质进行沟通。当内在能量想要构建更复杂的完形时，它必须通过其收集在自身周围的物质，以心灵感应方式传达这一意图和目的，首先形成一个更复杂的内在心灵感应模式，然后才能用物质来填充。心灵感应的运作方式难以解释，因为任何特定个体的自我和内在自我对定义存在分歧。对人类而言，心灵感应必定表现为两个或多个完全独立的自我之间发生的心理或灵性沟通。你看，自我对自我有其自身的定义，并对其自身的局限性有自己的看法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In sleep, when the ego is quieted, then the self looks in other directions. In sleep the self becomes conscious of its dreams, but this does not mean that the dreams have not existed while you were not conscious of them. Nor does it mean that they cease to exist when you are no longer conscious of them, for they have their own sort of molecular and electrical construction. But the ego cannot tune into that perceptive range.
quotes.translation: 在睡眠中，当自我平静下来时，自我便会转向其他方向。睡眠中自我意识到自己的梦境，但这并不意味着当你未意识到梦境时它们就不存在。也不意味着当你不再意识到它们时它们就停止存在，因为它们拥有自己独特的分子与电性结构。但自我无法调频进入那种感知范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Jung's collective unconscious was an attempt to give your world its psychological roots, but Jung1 could not perceive the clarity, organization, and deeper context in which that collective unconscious has its own existence. Reality as Framework 2 is organized in a different fashion than it is in the Framework 1 world, and the processes of reasoning are far quicker. In Framework 1 the reasoning processes work largely by deduction, and they must constantly check their own results against the seemingly concrete experience of physical events. The reasoning of the inner ego is involved with the creative invention of those experiences. It is involved with events in a context of a different kind, for it deals intimately with probabilities.
quotes.translation: 荣格的集体潜意识试图为你们的世界赋予心理根源，但荣格未能看清集体潜意识自身存在所依托的清晰性、组织性与更深层脉络。作为架构二的真实以不同于架构一世界的方式组织，其推理过程远为迅捷。在架构一中，推理过程主要依靠演绎法运作，且必须不断以看似具体的物理事件经验来检验自身结果。内在自我的推理则涉及对这些经验的创造性发明。它在一个不同性质的脉络中与事件打交道，因为它与可能性密切互动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Identity is no longer limited to the outer ego alone. The outer ego is now familiar with the whole self, or the entire identity, and has available to it strength of which it was not previously aware. In periods of exuberance, when you are working well, and your health is extraordinarily good, when you are able to remember and manipulate your dreams, then such periods are signs of the emergence of this new consciousness.
quotes.translation: 身份不再局限于外在自我。外在自我如今已熟悉整体自性或完整身份，并能运用先前未曾察觉的力量。当你处于丰沛时期——工作顺遂、健康极佳、能记忆并操控梦境时——这些阶段正是新意识浮现的征兆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The extent of your realization of this fact is the extent of your freedom or vitality, fulfillment and power. It should not be forgotten, however, that the ego is also a portion of All That Is, a highly specialized portion, enabling the inner self to manipulate and interpret particular conditions. If the ego considers itself as the only self, then you are cut off to a large degree from the vitality and energy available.
quotes.translation: 你对此事实的领悟程度，决定了你的自由、活力、圆满与力量。但切勿忘记，自我亦是"一切万有"的一部分，是高度专门化的部分，使内在自性能操控并诠释特定情境。若自我视己为唯一自性，你将在很大程度上与可用的活力及能量隔绝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Clairvoyance exists and is possible because of its basis within the spacious present, and this is not known because man will not accept the available data. Clairvoyance exists because matter and energy are one and the same thing. There is clairvoyance within the organs of the physical body itself, because the organs of the body are not, quote, "just" matter, but energy which has composed itself into matter. Such inner data continually and automatically is accepted by every other portion of the human framework except by the outer ego. Even this outer ego, however, acts all unknowingly often on the basis of such information, which it will not admit it has received; and often such action saves it from dire circumstances.
quotes.translation: 千里眼之所以存在且可能，因其根基在于"广袤当下"，而人类因不愿接受可得数据对此一无所知。千里眼存在，因为物质与能量实为同一事物。物理身体器官本身即存有千里眼，因为身体器官并非"仅"是物质，而是将自身凝聚为物质的能量。此类内在数据持续自动地被人类架构中除外在自我外的每个部分所接收。然而即便这外在自我，也常在不自知中依据这类它拒不承认已接收的信息行事；此类行动往往使其免于险境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now you are looking at the personality with the ego as your starting point. Other portions of the personality however perceive, or attempt to perceive, the whole self from their own starting point. The ego is seen in quite a different light when it is viewed by other portions of the self. It is not viewed--this was a poor term--as much as it was experienced, for no portion of the personality can be viewed as an object.
quotes.translation: 现在，你们以自我为出发点来审视人格。然而，人格的其他部分却从它们自身的出发点来感知或试图感知整体自体。当自体其他部分审视自我时，自我会呈现出截然不同的面貌。它并非被"审视"——这个用词欠妥——而是被体验，因为人格的任何部分都无法被当作客体来审视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Throughout the ages some have recognized the fact that there is self consciousness and purpose in certain dream and sleep states, and have maintained, even in waking life, the sense of continuity of this inner self. To such people it is no longer possible to identify completely with the ego consciousness. They are too obviously aware of themselves as more. When such knowledge is gained, the ego can accept it, for it finds to its surprise that it is not less conscious, but more conscious, that its limitations are dissipated; now it is not true, and I emphasize this strongly, that so-called unconscious material, given any freedom, will draw energy away from the egotistically organized self in a normal personality.
quotes.translation: 古往今来，有些人已认识到某些梦境与睡眠状态中存在自我意识与目的，甚至在清醒生活中也保持着这种内在自体的连续性感知。对这些人而言，完全认同自我意识已不再可能。他们过于清晰地意识到自己远不止于此。当获得这种认知时，自我能够接纳它，因为它惊讶地发现：自己并非意识减弱，而是意识增强，其局限被消解；在此我强烈强调，在正常人格中，所谓的无意识素材若获得任何自由，绝不会从以自我为中心组织的自体那里抽走能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The ego, then, is as much characterized by those types of action which it habitually denies, as by those types of actions which it habitually accepts. It is not the only organizing aspect of the personality, however. It is simply the organizing aspect of the personality in its dealings with the physical environment. The inner ego is another organizing feature of the personality in its dealings with inner environment.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我既以其惯常否认的行为类型为特征，也以其惯常接受的行为类型为特征。然而，它并非人格唯一的组织面向。它只是人格在处理与物质环境关系时的组织面向。内在自我则是人格在处理与内在环境关系时的另一个组织特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: To some extent it also acts like a director of experience and action. It is not actually composed of the past egos, but of those dominant aspects of the various personalities. The inner ego, as action, thrusts in an inward direction; that is, back toward the originating impulse. The outside ego thrusts outward. They are two faces, therefore, and form one of many spheres of action, one pulling inward and one outward.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，它也像经验与行动的导演。它实际上并非由过去的自我构成，而是由各种人格的主导面向组成。内在自我作为行动，向内推进；即，回归到原初的冲动。外在自我则向外推进。因此，它们是两张面孔，构成众多行动球体之一，一个向内拉，一个向外推。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: We will resume dictation ... You will react, therefore, to all the information that you receive according to your conscious beliefs concerning the nature of reality. The deeper portions of the self do not have to take the ego's idea of time into consideration, so these portions of the self also deal with data that would ordinarily escape the ego's perception, perhaps until a certain "point" of ego time was reached.
quotes.translation: 我们将继续口述……因此，你将根据自己对实相本质的意识信念，对你接收到的所有信息做出反应。自我的深层部分不必考虑自我对时间的概念，因此自我的这些部分也处理那些通常逃过自我感知的数据，或许直到达到自我时间的某个特定"点"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The ego is not as a rule aware of this broader time experience. The subconscious however is so aware, and the associative processes of the mind can, and do, react to a future event, while the ego is closed off to it. Therefore it is possible for Frederick, this year, to become ill at the smell of a particular perfume because subconsciously he knows that in 1980 his mother will be wearing that perfume when she dies.
quotes.translation: 自我通常并不觉察到这种更广阔的时间经验。然而潜意识却觉察得到，而心智的联想过程能够也确实会对未来事件做出反应，尽管自我对此是封闭的。因此，弗雷德里克今年有可能因为闻到某种特定香水的气味而生病，因为他在潜意识里知道，1980年他母亲去世时会穿着那种香水。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Such financial success is therefore important, and has its place, but when Ruburt allows himself to become overly concerned with this, then he identifies too closely with the ego alone. There are obvious financial moves he intends to make. Well and good. These moves are not however basically important to the personality as a whole. They should be taken simply, but the overall energies should be used in creativity. When he identifies too closely with the ego he loses inner direction.
quotes.translation: 因此，这种财务上的成功有其重要性，也有其位置，但当鲁柏让自己过度关注此事时，他便过于与自我认同。他打算采取一些明显的财务举措。这很好。但这些举措对整个人格而言并非根本重要。它们应该被简单地执行，但整体能量应被用于创造力。当他过于与自我认同时，他便失去了内在方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: More difficult to achieve is an experience in which the ego becomes more alert in self defense. The ego, for example, did not have to worry about Ruburt's physical survival as he lay in bed and "saw" （in quotes） the clock in the other room. When the ego's instinct for self-protection is aroused, then of course it rises up in arms. This is one of the reasons why the experience of levitation is so seldom achieved.
quotes.translation: 更难达成的是自我在自卫中变得更加警觉的体验。例如，当鲁柏躺在床上“看见”（加引号）另一个房间的时钟时，自我并不需要担心他的肉体生存。当自我的自我保护本能被激发时，它当然会奋起反抗。这就是为什么漂浮体验如此难以达成的其中一个原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is in this area that such conflicts arise. The man, or ego, who has never really accepted such violence as a part of his action pattern, will usually have no conflicts in this particular line, simply because the inclination was never a strong part of the ego's inner image, and is more or less discarded automatically, along with all those other characteristics or inclinations which are not in his ego pattern.
quotes.translation: 正是在这个领域，这类冲突才会产生。那个从未真正接受此类暴力作为其行为模式一部分的人或自我，通常不会在此特定方面产生冲突，原因很简单：这种倾向从未成为自我内在意象的强烈组成部分，并且会与其他不属于自我模式的特质或倾向一起，或多或少地被自动摒弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It could still do this and retain its own nature, merely by allowing into its awareness the reality of other actions as a part of its self-image. There is for example no basic reason why the subconscious and the ego cannot communicate to a much larger extent than is now usual. Such communication would result in the acceptance of additional energy and action by the ego, and an expansion of the ego's self-image.
quotes.translation: 它仍能保持自身本质，只需允许其他行动的现实作为其自我意象的一部分进入觉知。例如，潜意识与自我之间本无根本理由不能进行比现在更广泛的沟通。这种沟通将导致自我接纳额外的能量与行动，并扩展自我的自我意象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The overall needs of the personality are always taken into consideration by what I have called in the past the inner ego. Now this portion of the self is indeed self-conscious in the highest meaning of the term--aware of the subconscious portion of the personality, aware of the primary conscious framework that you call your ego, and constantly directs the overall activities. This portion is aware of the complicated workings of the nervous system and all bodily functions. It is the overseer. It knows when to allow subconscious needs and wishes their fulfillment. It knows when to put fulfillment off for a time. It is this part of the personality that is in charge of overall stability.
quotes.translation: 人格的整体需求始终被我过去所称的"内在自我"所考量。这部分的自我确实具有最高意义上的自我意识——它觉察到人格的潜意识部分，觉察到你称之为自我的主要意识框架，并持续指导整体活动。这部分意识了解神经系统的复杂运作及所有身体功能。它是监督者。它知道何时允许潜意识的需求与愿望得到满足，也知道何时将满足暂时延后。正是人格的这一部分负责整体的稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I said that the inner ego reasons, but its reasoning is not restricted to the cause-and-effect limitations that you apply to the reasoning process. The action of the inner ego within the wider sphere of Framework 2 explains many events and seeming coincidences that otherwise seem to make no sense within your world. Many realities within Framework 2 cannot suitably be explained as facts to you in Framework 1, simply because they involve psychological thicknesses that cannot be translated into facts as you think of them. These often appear in the symbolic language of the arts instead, and many of your dreams are translations in which the events of Framework 2 appear in symbolic form.
quotes.translation: 我曾说过内在自我会推理，但其推理不受你们应用于推理过程的因果限制。内在自我在框架二更广阔领域中的运作，解释了许多在你们世界中看似毫无意义的巧合与事件。框架二中的许多现实无法作为事实向你们在框架一中恰当解释，只因它们涉及无法转化为你们所认知事实的心理厚度。这些现实常以艺术的象征语言呈现，而你们的许多梦境正是框架二事件以象征形式出现的翻译。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Just before the experience of death, timelessness, or the spacious present, begins to be perceived. It is because the ego is tied to its past that it sees the past seemingly rise up. It has the ability to see what is coming, so to speak, but while the frightened ego is still in control it chooses to see only a portion of what is possible, and before the point of death it usually chooses to hide in the past.
quotes.translation: 就在死亡体验之前，无时间性或广阔当下开始被感知。正因自我与它的过去紧密相连，它才会看到过去似乎浮现出来。可以说，它有能力预见即将发生之事，但当受惊的自我仍掌控时，它选择只看到可能性的部分，而在死亡来临前，它通常选择躲进过去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Jung's dark side of the self is the ego, not the unconscious. The complicated, infinitely varied, unbelievably rich tapestry of Jung's, in quotes "unconscious," could hardly be unconscious. It is the product of an inner consciousness with far more sense of identity and purpose than the daily ego. It is the daily ego's ignorance and limited focus that makes it view so-called unconscious activity as chaotic.
quotes.translation: 荣格所说的"自我的阴暗面"其实是自我本身，而非无意识。荣格笔下那个复杂、无限多样、难以置信地丰富的所谓"无意识"织锦，几乎不可能是无意识的。它是内在意识的产物，其身份感与目的感远胜于日常自我。正是日常自我的无知与狭隘焦点，才使它将所谓的无意识活动视为混沌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: I now suggest your break, and I do myself indeed enjoy your pleasant summer evening. I would like to make it plain here, however, that on a surface psychological level, the personality plunges into activity, and it is for the present this portion of the personality with whom we must deal. Nevertheless, beneath there is a denial of involvement, and a strong desire for permanency, both of which are repressed, and the stronger the efforts put forth by the ego to repress these tendencies, then these tendencies will explode with inadequate stimuli. There will be an over action on the part of the ego to compensate for the refusal to accept involvement on deeper levels.
quotes.translation: 我现在建议你们休息，我确实也很享受你们这宜人的夏夜。然而，我想在此说明，在表面心理层面上，人格投入活动，而目前我们必须处理的就是人格的这一部分。尽管如此，在底层却存在着对参与的否认，以及对永恒性的强烈渴望，这两者都被压抑着。自我越是努力压抑这些倾向，这些倾向就越会在不充分的刺激下爆发。自我会过度行动，以补偿在更深层面上拒绝接受参与。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Mans ego causes him to interpret everything else in the light of himself. He loses very much in this manner. The ego is definitely an advancement, but it can be compared to the bark of the tree in many ways. The bark of the tree is flexible, extremely vibrant, and grows with the growth beneath. It is a tree's contact with the outer world, the tree's interpreter, and to some degree the tree's companion.
quotes.translation: 人类的自我导致他以自身为基准来解释一切事物。他因此损失良多。自我无疑是一种进步，但在许多方面它可以被比作树的树皮。树皮具有弹性，极其充满活力，并随着底层的生长而生长。它是树与外在世界的接触点，是树的诠释者，在某种程度上也是树的伴侣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The ego is now somewhat in the confidence of the whole self, therefore we have more to contend with. We are no longer tricking the ego, which it would ultimately and sometimes almost disastrously resent, but taking it into the confidence of the whole self, so that it will allow departure from the physical image, as a mother can finally be convinced that it is safe for a son or daughter to go out alone.
quotes.translation: 自我现在多少已获得整个自性的信任，因此我们有更多需要应对的。我们不再欺骗自我——这最终会招致它有时几乎是灾难性的怨恨——而是让它参与整个自性的信任，从而允许它脱离物质形象，就像母亲最终能确信儿子或女儿独自外出是安全的一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: That which was is constantly taken into what you call the present. The ego may choose to use or not use various reactions. It may reject various reactions as a part of the past, for it is the ego alone who is concerned with past, present and future. The ego's denial of a reaction however does not cause the reaction to disappear from within the personality, at least as part of possible pattern reaction.
quotes.translation: 过去之物不断被纳入你所谓的当下。自我可以选择利用或不利用各种反应。它可能将某些反应视为过去的一部分而加以排斥，因为唯有自我才关注过去、现在与未来。然而，自我对某一反应的否认并不会使该反应从人格中消失——至少作为可能模式反应的一部分不会消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego attempts to break down action into smaller and smaller units. The intuitions try to perceive action as a whole. The ego breaks down for purposes of examination, the intuitions construct. Both the ego and the intuitions, in performing their functions, obviously create action. The self may of course be considered as a gestalt of action, perceived in a different manner by various levels of itself.
quotes.translation: 自我试图将行动分解为越来越小的单位，而直觉则试图将行动视为整体来感知。自我为便于检视而分解，直觉则进行建构。自我与直觉在履行其功能时，显然都在创造行动。当然，自体可被视为行动的整体形态，其不同层面会以不同方式感知它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: This sort of communication also comes close to action in a fairly pure state.
