There is also another result of such relative ease of communication between the ego and the subconscious, in that the subconscious, which is listened to and taken into consideration by the ego, will have relatively little need to make its wishes known in other, perhaps less pleasant ways. Illnesses and various minor and major physical symptoms are often caused as the subconscious tries to speak out, in an effort to make itself heard by the unheeding conscious mind. If the conscious mind consults with the subconscious, such nagging or sometimes explosive efforts will not be needed.
quotes.translation: 这种沟通方式也相当接近纯粹状态下的行动。自我与潜意识之间这种相对顺畅的沟通还会产生另一结果：当潜意识被自我倾听并纳入考量时，它便相对无需以其他可能更不愉快的方式表达其意愿。疾病及各种轻微或严重的身体症状，往往源于潜意识试图发声，以让充耳不闻的意识心听见自己。若意识心能与潜意识协商，便无需采用这种纠缠不休甚至有时是爆发性的表达方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Other egos choose instead to become entities of their own, in which case this magnificent outer ego becomes in turn an inner ego, which then from its own unfulfilled desires, abilities and initiatives are formed new outer egos which once again seek fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 其他自我则选择成为自己的存有，在这种情况下，这个宏伟的外在自我反过来成为内在自我，然后从其未满足的欲望、能力和主动性中形成新的外在自我，这些新的外在自我再次寻求实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: "To your way of thinking, some lives are lived in a twinkling (in various systems), and others last for centuries. The perception of consciousness is not limited, however. I have told you, for example, that trees have their own consciousness. The consciousness of a tree is not as specifically focused as your own, yet to all intents and purposes, the tree is conscious of 50 years before its existence, and 50 years hence. Its sense of identity spontaneously goes beyond the change of its own form. It has no ego to cut the 'I' identification short. Creatures without the compartment of the ego can easily follow their own identity beyond any change of form."
quotes.translation: "按照你们的思维方式，有些生命（在各种系统中）转瞬即逝，而另一些则持续数百年。然而，意识的感知并不受限。例如，我曾告诉你们，树木有自己的意识。树木的意识不像你们的意识那样具体聚焦，但就所有意图和目的而言，树木能意识到其存在之前的50年，以及之后的50年。它的身份感自发地超越了自身形态的变化。它没有自我来切断'我'的认同。没有自我这个隔间的生物，可以轻易地跟随自己的身份超越任何形态的变化。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Many individuals imagine the soul to be an immortalized ego, forgetting that the ego as you know it is only a small portion of the self; so this section of the personality is simply projected onward, ad infinitum, so to speak. Because the dimensions of your reality are so little understood, your concepts are bound to be limited. In considering "immortality," mankind seems to hope for further egotistical development, and yet he objects to the idea that such development might involve change. He says through his religions that he has a soul indeed, without even asking what a soul is, and often he seems to regard it, again, as an object in his possession.
quotes.translation: 许多人想象灵魂是一个不朽的自我，忘记了你们所知的自我只是自体的一小部分；所以人格的这一部分只是被无限地投射向前，可以这么说。因为你们实相的维度如此不被理解，你们的概念必然受限。在考虑"不朽"时，人类似乎希望进一步自我发展，然而他又反对这种发展可能涉及改变的想法。他通过宗教声称自己确实拥有灵魂，甚至不问灵魂是什么，而且他常常再次将其视为自己拥有的一个物件。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The personality is not the whole self. It is a portion of the whole self, which is activated during a particular existence. The ego, as I have explained, does not vanish. However, it must always be remembered here that the ego is not the self-conscious self in its entirety by any means. It is simply a portion, a field of focus whereby the self attempts to objectify itself within the world of matter.
quotes.translation: 人格并非完整的自己。它只是完整自己的一个部分，在特定存在期间被激活。如我所解释的，自我并不会消失。然而，在此必须始终牢记，自我绝非全然等同于有意识的自己。它仅仅是一个部分、一个聚焦场域，借由这个场域，自己试图在物质世界中客观化自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When through training the ego becomes more aware of this inner self, the whole personality benefits. The whole self as it exists at any given time can be glimpsed through studying the actions of the physically-oriented ego, as seen in physical manipulation, and in studying the activities of the inner ego as seen in dream experiences. Obviously some training is necessary before this can be achieved.
quotes.translation: 当通过训练使自我更觉知到这个内在自己时，整个人格都会受益。通过研究物质导向的自我在物理操作中的行动，以及通过研究内在自我在梦境体验中的活动，可以窥见任一特定时刻存在的完整自己。显然，在达成此目标之前，需要一定的训练。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You will recall that the ego, while disliking change, is nevertheless dependent for its identity upon change. The ego to a large degree, therefore, chooses during its development those characteristic actions which will form its nature. Because the ego necessarily changes however, actions or emotions which at one time it chose as acceptable, at a later date so to speak it may attempt to deny.
quotes.translation: 你会记得，自我虽厌恶改变，却依赖改变来维持其身份认同。因此，自我在很大程度上会在其发展过程中选择那些将构成其本性的特征性行动。然而，由于自我必然改变，那些曾被视为可接受的行动或情绪，可以说在日后它可能会试图否认。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The inner ego directs all activities which are deeply subjective. The outer ego as you know deals with the manipulation of the self in the physical environment. You must remember that the whole self is more than the sum of its parts; and also, since it is action, it is never the same. It is therefore impossible at any moment to pinpoint the personality. Therefore the whole self is not only the sum of the personality as you know it in your time, it is also the sum of what it has been and what it shall be. For as I have explained action is simultaneous, and time as you think of it is caused by your own physical perception.
quotes.translation: 内在自我主导所有深具主观性的活动。你所知的外在自我则处理自我在物质环境中的操控。你必须记住，整体自我大于其各部分之和；同时，由于它是行动，它从不相同。因此，在任何时刻都不可能精确指出人格。所以整体自我不仅是你时间中已知的人格总和，也是它过去和未来所是的一切的总和。因为正如我所解释的，行动是同时性的，而你所认为的时间是由你自己的物质感知造成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The center of consciousness, that is the center of outward consciousness, the outer ego, is finally chosen by the inner ego after certain portions of the inner self show greater tendencies for objectification; these portions of course grouped around one of the subconscious subpersonalities which then wins out to become the outer ego, the manipulator for and the spokesman for the whole self.
quotes.translation: 意识中心，即外在意识中心、外在自我，最终由内在自我在内在自我的某些部分展现出更强的客体化倾向后选择；这些部分当然围绕着一个潜意识次人格聚集，然后这个次人格胜出，成为外在自我，即整体自我的操控者和代言人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego, as a rule, is frightfully leery of such action, since to it an out-of body experience always symbolizes physical death. At the same time the ego becomes more assured after successful projections, since ir discovers itself not only intact but immeasurably enriched. Indeed, the ego both fights, fears and desires any creative act. Any creative act, including the production of any art,
quotes.translation: 自我通常对这种行动极为警惕，因为对它而言，出体经验总是象征着物质死亡。同时，在成功的投射后，自我会变得更加确信，因为它发现自己不仅完好无损，而且得到了无可估量的丰富。确实，自我既对抗、恐惧又渴望任何创造性行为。任何创造性行为，包括任何艺术的创作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: "These choices, however, are based upon your changing perception of past and present. Because I have a larger scope of perception than you, I can with greater facility predict what may happen. But this is dependent upon my prediction as to which choice [of probable events] you will make, and the choice is still your own ... Predictions, per se, do not contradict the theory of free will, though free will is dependent upon much more than any freedom of the ego alone. If the ego were allowed to make all the choices, with no veto power from other layers of the self, you would all be in a sad position indeed.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些选择是基于你对过去与当下不断变化的感知。由于我的感知范围比你更广，我能更轻易地预测可能发生之事。但这取决于我对你将在[可能事件中]做出何种选择的预测，而选择权依然属于你……预测本身并不违背自由意志理论，尽管自由意志所依赖的远不止自我（ego）的单一自由。若允许自我全权做出所有选择，而其他自我层面毫无否决权，你们所有人的处境确实会相当可悲。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The ego can perceive only certain portions of any given moment point or present instant, and it sees the moment point indeed as if it were one of a series of lights that approaches the ego from one side, and passes him by on the other side. The ego perceives this moment point, then, very much as if it were a flat cardboard-like object which comes, is flashed before him, and disappears.
quotes.translation: 自我只能感知任一特定时间点或当下瞬间的特定片段，它看待时间点的方式，仿佛那是一串从一侧接近自我、又从另一侧掠过的灯光。于是，自我感知这时间点的方式，就像它是个扁平的纸板状物体——出现、在眼前一闪而过、随即消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Now, in the past when you said the word I, this I was the ego I, and you identified the whole self with the ego. Later you learned to distinguish between the ego and the subconscious. All of this simply means that you became aware of larger portions of the whole personality, and were consciously able to use these abilities, conscious and subconscious being, of course, artificial terms.
quotes.translation: 过去当你们说出"我"这个字时，这个"我"指的是自我之我，你们将整个自我等同于自我。后来你们学会了区分自我与潜意识。这一切不过意味着你们开始意识到整体人格中更庞大的部分，并有意识地运用这些能力——当然，"意识"与"潜意识"只是人为设定的术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The patterns evolve according to certain laws. They merely reflect the ideas behind them, and these ideas you must realize originate from different sources. They originate in the subconscious, it is true, but before this an idea quality is received by the inner senses. Sometimes this idea quality is received as intuition, where it sparks into the conscious mind. But the conscious ego is the primary manipulator of camouflage patterns and the obvious mover. The actual material from which camouflage patterns are formed is the vitality which exists and which is unconsciously used by your personalities.
quotes.translation: 这些模式依照特定法则演化。它们只是反映其背后的理念，而你必须明白这些理念源自不同源头。它们确实源于潜意识，但在此之前，一种理念特质会经由内在感官接收。有时这种理念特质以直觉形式被接收，并由此激发进入意识心智。但意识自我是伪装模式的主要操控者与显性推动者。构成伪装模式的实际材料，是存在于你们人格中且被无意识运用的生命力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The inner self chooses from its available potential personalities the one that it finds most adequate. Sometimes it simply makes an error, for the inner self is not a perfected thing, any more than the ego is. But identity does exist, and the ego is but a pseudo identity formed for utilitarian reasons, and as such it is of course a part of the basic identity from which it springs.
quotes.translation: 内在自体从其可用的潜在人格中，选择最合适的一个。有时它也会犯错，因为内在自体并非完美之物，正如自我一样。但本体确实存在，而自我不过是为实用目的形成的伪本体，因此它自然是从所源出的基本本体中衍生的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Other portions of the self, on the one hand, are not so limited. It must be clearly understood however that these other portions of the self are incapable of the ego's intense focus within physical reality. Their focus is elsewhere. However, these selves are not limited as is the ego to one main field of perception only, in the manner which Dunne believes. Dunne does leave intervening areas between dimensions which may be perceived by an observer from a neighboring dimension, but all in all his serial selves are to some large degree prisoners of those dimensions in which they exist.
quotes.translation: 自体的其他部分则不受如此限制。然而必须清楚理解，这些自体部分无法像自我那样在物质实相中保持强烈聚焦。它们的焦点在别处。但不同于自我被局限在单一主要感知领域，这些自体并不像邓恩所认为的那样受限。邓恩确实承认维度间存在可被邻近维度观察者感知的过渡区域，但总体而言，他所说的序列自体在相当程度上仍是其所在维度的囚徒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Cellular consciousness itself straddles, so to speak, various levels of sleep activity. Various aspects of it come to the forefront at definite times. This consciousness is constant, whether you wake or sleep. It existed before the ego's formation, and in many cases exists after the ego's organization is altered. In sleep cellular consciousness often intrudes into the dream process, appearing in the form of dream images. Cellular consciousness is highly codified in actuality, much more Emotional than visual, and the visual dream images are but translations of inner comprehensions.
quotes.translation: 细胞意识本身可以说横跨了不同层次的睡眠活动。它的各个层面会在特定时间浮现到前台。无论你清醒或睡眠，这种意识都持续存在。它在自我形成之前就已存在，在许多情况下，当自我的组织架构改变后它依然存在。在睡眠中，细胞意识常会侵入梦境过程，以梦境影像的形式出现。细胞意识实际上高度编码，比视觉更富情感性，而视觉梦境影像不过是内在理解的转译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Then, the strong conflict between the ego and subconscious was the result of home environment. He allowed himself no spontaneous expression at home with his mother. This denied, his normal spontaneity exploded when it was allowed opportunity, sometimes in unfortunate circumstances. In panic, the ego then tripled its defenses. He was not capable of loving Zeh or anyone, later. They both knew this and counted upon it. With Zeh, again, Ruburt denied the spontaneous self in normal daily interaction with him; with Zeh. And this denied spontaneous self exploded when and where it could.
quotes.translation: 那么，自我与潜意识之间的强烈冲突是家庭环境的结果。他在家中与母亲相处时不允许任何自发表达。当这种压抑的自发性获得机会时——有时是在不幸的情境中——便会爆发出来。在恐慌中，自我于是将防御增强三倍。他后来无法爱泽赫或任何人。他们双方都明白这点并加以利用。与泽赫相处时，鲁柏再次在日常互动中压抑了自发自我；正是与泽赫的相处中。而这种被压抑的自发自我会在可能的时间和地点爆发出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The characteristics needed for "mediumship" are much like those needed by any strongly creative person. A strong supportive ego is a necessity, particularly in initial stages. In periods of severe personality disturbances that can occur simultaneously with great creativity, the ego becomes terrified of the strength of the creative ability, fearing that it can be crushed beneath.
quotes.translation: "通灵"所需特质与任何高度创造性人格所需特质极为相似。强而有力的支持性自我是必要的，尤其在初始阶段。在可能伴随伟大创造力同时发生的人格严重失调时期，自我会恐惧创造力的强度，担心被其碾压。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This data must be interpreted in such a way that the conscious mind then can give a prediction, say, but also in such a way that its reality exits simultaneously with consciousness, but never so replacing consciousness that the ego grows alarmed. This is often done by the use of symbols which are not immediately apparent to consciousness, and thus are allowed through. Then it is too late for the ego to close its gates against them. But the symbols chosen must be of a nature so that they will become meaningful to consciousness, to as large an extent as possible after emergence.
quotes.translation: 这些资料必须被诠释成一种方式，使意识心能够做出预测，但同时也要让它的实相与意识同时存在，但绝不能取代意识到让自我警觉的程度。这通常通过使用意识心无法立即察觉的象征来完成，因此它们得以通过。等到自我想要关闭大门阻挡它们时已经太迟了。但所选用的象征必须具有这样的性质：在浮现之后，能尽可能对意识心产生意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: If you want to change your job, and hold that desire, a new job will come into your experience in precisely the same fashion, in that the inner events will be arranged by the inner ego. A body event involves the working of numerous muscles and joints and so forth. An event involving a job change concerns motion on the part of many people, and implies a network of communication on the part of all of the inner egos involved. Obviously, then, a mass physical event implies an inner system of communications of proportions that would put your technological communications to shame.
quotes.translation: 如果你想换工作，并持有这个渴望，一份新工作会以完全相同的方式进入你的经验——内在事件将由内在自我安排。一个身体事件涉及众多肌肉与关节的运作等等。而涉及换工作的事件则牵涉到许多人的行动，并暗示所有相关内在自我之间的沟通网络。显然，一个大规模的物质事件暗示着一个内在沟通系统，其规模之大足以让你的科技通讯相形见绌。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Words are quite ineffectual methods of communication. The question, "When is the self born?", would take many sessions to answer. As simply as possible the self, the inner self with which the ego is only vaguely familiar, that self which is the inner strength, continuity and identity, that gives the ego its vital meaning, that inner self, dear friend, is constantly being born.
quotes.translation: 语言是相当无效的沟通方式。"自我何时诞生？"这个问题需要许多节课才能回答。尽可能简单地说：那个自我——那个内在自我，自我对它只有模糊的认识，那个作为内在力量、连续性与身份认同的自我，那个赋予自我重要意义的自我——亲爱的朋友，那个内在自我正在不断地被诞生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is, again, the ego's misguided attempt to stand apart to gain stability, that makes the ego react in such a manner. It fears loss of control and of discipline. But all appearances to the contrary, the emotions are natural controlling devices that in themselves aid discipline, since they allow for the spontaneous flow of energies outward. It is only when they are denied that they become explosive or dangerous to the personality. Then indeed they result in explosive barrages, ranting and shouting, organic and psychological illnesses, and of unfortunate manifestations.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，正是自我试图抽离以获取稳定性的错误企图，导致它以这种方式反应。它害怕失去控制与纪律。但所有表象恰恰相反，情绪是天然的控制机制，本身就能辅助纪律，因为它们允许能量自发向外流动。只有当情绪被否定时，它们才会对人格具有爆炸性或危险性。那时它们确实会导致爆发性的连珠炮、咆哮与喊叫、器质性与心理疾病，以及不幸的显化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Either it attempts to return the emotion to a subjective state, or it attempts to objectify it further away from itself. In either case the ego is at fault for not assimilating or accepting the emotion. It is easy to see then that the ego is itself a series of actions, that it is a collection of more or less similar actions, selected from a larger mainstream of other actions.
quotes.translation: 它要么试图将情绪回归主观状态，要么试图将其进一步客观化远离自身。无论哪种情况，自我都因未能同化或接纳情绪而失职。由此不难看出，自我本身是一系列行动，是从其他行动的更大主流中筛选出的、或多或少相似的行动集合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In your present framework, because of the male-female specialization -- the male orientation, the implication that the ego is male while the psyche is female -- you force upon yourselves great divisions in which operationally the intellect seems separate from the intuitions, and you set up a situation in which opposites seem to apply where there are none. When you think of a scientist, the majority of you will think of a male, an intellectual, an "objective" thinker who takes great pains not to be emotional, or to identify with the subject being examined or studied.
quotes.translation: 在你们当前的架构中，由于男女分工——男性导向暗示自我为男性而心灵为女性——你们迫使自己陷入巨大分裂，在运作上理智似乎与直觉分离，并制造出本不存在对立却看似对立的局面。当你们想到科学家时，大多数人会想到男性、知识分子、竭力避免情绪化或与被研究主体认同的"客观"思考者。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Creation is constant. Due to the nature of action creation cannot be anything but simultaneous. Each act of creation brings forth another, and opens up further dimensions of activity. Within your own system, thought becomes materialized, and there is literally no end to the activity of thoughts. Thoughts however are connected with language and with highly organized ego development. They are translations and symbols for inner activity. As a rule they are highly physically oriented, their function being to acquaint the physically adapted ego with some inner data.
quotes.translation: 创造是持续不断的。由于行动的本质，创造只能是同时发生的。每一个创造行为都会引发另一个创造，并开启进一步的活动维度。在你们自己的系统中，思想会物质化，而且思想的活动确实永无止境。然而，思想与语言以及高度组织化的自我发展相关联。它们是内在活动的翻译和象征。通常，它们高度以物质为导向，其功能是让适应物质世界的自我了解某些内在数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: You are exploring the inner contents of a moment, delving into its experience. Now this is what the ego does you see within a lifetime, only to a greater degree. In projections, and in your dreams, your perceptions to some extent enable you to leap out of the ego's time limitations. The physical body is indeed the ego's vehicle. You do not need it, you see, for projections.
quotes.translation: 你们正在探索一个时刻的内在内容，深入其经验。你看，这就是自我在一生中所做的事，只是程度更大。在投射中，在你们的梦里，你们的感知在一定程度上使你们能够跳出自我的时间限制。物质身体确实是自我的载具。你看，你们进行投射时并不需要它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: But the outer ego as you know is that portion of the whole self that is given over to the maintenance of physical manipulations, and it perceives only through those physical equipment, those outer senses. It sees its dominion in jeopardy and rises up in arms. It, the ego, is that small portion of the whole self which the whole self has allowed to be completely, or almost completely, bewitched by the self-hypnotic trance. It is that portion which believes implicitly in the given specifications of the hypnotist, and as such it will be last to leave the trance.
quotes.translation: 但你们所知的外在自我，是整体自我中负责维持物质操控的那一部分，它只通过那些物质装备、那些外在感官来感知。它看到自己的领域岌岌可危，便奋起反抗。这个自我，是整体自我中允许自己被自我催眠的恍惚状态完全或几乎完全迷惑的那一小部分。它是绝对相信催眠师所给特定指令的那一部分，因此它将是最后一个离开恍惚状态的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: To some extent, there is a natural and spontaneous merging of what you would think of as conscious and unconscious activity. This in itself brings about a greater understanding of the give-and-take that exists between the ego and other portions of the self. The unconscious is no longer equated with darkness, or with unknown frightening elements. Its character is transformed, so that the "dark" qualities are seen as actually illuminating portions of conscious life, while also providing great sources of power and energy for normal ego-oriented experience.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，你们所谓的意识与无意识活动之间存在着一种自然且自发的融合。这本身就带来了对自我与自身其他部分之间互动关系的更深理解。无意识不再等同于黑暗或未知的可怕元素。它的特质被转化了，以至于那些“黑暗”的特质被视为实际上照亮了意识生活的部分，同时也为正常的自我导向经验提供了巨大的力量与能量源泉。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The topmost layer of the subconscious contains predominantly present associations, but in these are mixed and interwoven associations which have their origin elsewhere. These may be called self-unifying associations, since merely by their presence in the uppermost layers of the subconscious they provide a unifying sense of psychic continuity; of which however the ego is not aware. For one thing, there are basic similarities between an individual's personality in various existences, so that quite naturally many associations of the same nature will arise.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的最上层主要包含当下的联想，但这些联想中混杂并交织着源自他处的联想。这些可被称为自我统一性联想，因为它们仅仅存在于潜意识的最上层，就提供了一种心灵连续性的统一感；然而自我对此并无察觉。原因之一在于，个体在不同存在中的性格存在基本相似性，因此很自然地会产生许多相同性质的联想。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I have told you that through many existences you don egos for the purposes set by the inner self. It is necessary of course that you believe in your role. The difficulty is that you must believe in your role, and yet also realize that it is a role that you, the inner self, have chosen. Otherwise your connections with the inner self are nearly forgotten. The ego forgets that it is only a part of a much more complete personality structure, and therefore cuts itself off from abilities and insights that are necessary, even for its own comfort and stability.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你们，在多次存在中，你们为了内在自己设定的目的而披上自我。当然，你们必须相信自己的角色。困难在于，你们既要相信自己的角色，又要意识到这是你们——内在自己——所选择的角色。否则，你们与内在自己的联系几乎会被遗忘。自我忘记了自己只是更完整人格结构的一部分，因此切断了与必要能力与洞见的联系，而这些能力与洞见甚至对其自身的舒适与稳定都是必需的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The cells and molecules, forming their psychic gestalt into a particular human physical structure, are separated from what you might call the outer environment, and yet they are also connected to the outer environment more than they are separated from it. It is the inner ego, and the inner vitality and the inner ego's determination, along with the cooperation of all the cells that compose the physical body, that enables such a particular structure as the human body to exist as a separate construction, and to maintain the necessary sense of identity.
quotes.translation: 细胞与分子，将其心灵完形凝聚成特定的人类物质结构，与你们所谓的外在环境分离，然而它们与外在环境的联系更甚于分离。正是内在自我、内在活力与内在自我的决心，连同构成物质身体的所有细胞的合作，才使人体这样的特定结构得以作为独立的构造存在，并维持必要的身份感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Its sense of identity spontaneously goes beyond the change of its own form. It has no ego to cut the "I" identification short. Creatures without the compartment of the ego can easily follow their own identities beyond any changes of form. The inner self is aware of this integrity of identity, but the ego focused so securely in physical reality cannot afford this luxury.
quotes.translation: 其身份感自发地超越自身形式的改变。它没有自我来截断"我"的认同。没有自我隔间的生物，能轻易地跟随其身份超越任何形式的改变。内在自己知晓这种身份的完整性，但如此稳固地聚焦于物质实相的自我，却无法承受这种奢侈。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Only when a certain level of confidence is reached can the outer ego afford to become familiar with these inner workings, at least on your plane. Otherwise you would falter. As a rule, even though the whole self is capable of organizing the data from all of the inner senses, the subconscious can rarely receive such communications full blast; and the outer ego, concerned as it is with camouflage pattern, and really born to deal with camouflage pattern, simply could not stand the shock of realization that a complete set of inner senses would bring.
quotes.translation: 只有当达到某种程度的自信时，外在自我才能在你的层面上熟悉这些内在运作，否则你会步履蹒跚。通常而言，即使整体自体能够组织所有内在感官的数据，潜意识也很少能全盘接收这类讯息；而外在自我既专注于伪装模式，且生来就为处理伪装模式而存在，根本无法承受完整内在感官系统所带来的认知冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The inner ego is the self who drives the wheel with purpose; at the same time there are many other wheels and many spokes... Our moment point analogy will also help you here. The sleeping self will of course be considered the primary self from the standpoint of its own reality. I cannot emphasize too strongly the fact that all of these portions are self-conscious. They may not be conscious of the other selves however. The inner senses connect all the selves, and the movements of consciousness are far more complicated than that of a Ferris wheel.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是带着目标掌控方向盘的自己，同时还有许多其他轮辐与轮圈……我们的"瞬间点"类比在此也能帮助理解。从自身实相的角度来看，沉睡的自体自然被视为主要自体。我必须再三强调：所有这些部分都具有自我意识，但它们未必意识到其他自我的存在。内在感官连接着所有自我，而意识的运动远比摩天轮复杂得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The process could or could not have developed, according to the probabilities and the circumstances. Even the early environment, so abhorred by the ego, were chosen in order to deepen the desire for truth and to force the personality to face the issues of life and death, evil and goodness, full face. Ruburt's ego would have avoided the questions and taken the easy road, and this easy road would not have developed the full potentials that were necessary if the personality were to use its creative and intuitional abilities in any important manner.
quotes.translation: 根据或然率与情境，这个过程可能发展也可能不发展。就连被自我深恶痛绝的早期环境，也是刻意选择的——为的是加深对真理的渴望，迫使人格直面生死善恶的本质问题。鲁柏的自我本会回避这些课题而选择捷径，但若人格要以重要方式运用其创造力与直觉能力，这条捷径将无法发展出必要的全部潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: This discipline however should be followed rigorously only with a program of ego orientation, in which the ego tries to discipline itself in the most difficult manner, for this particular personality, toward freedom. He should express himself when he feels a diverse opinion, when he feels wronged. It is only when aggressions are unexpressed that they are dangerous, and the repressed rage will hold back the desired psychic development. Even chemically such anger causes reactions that will make desired states of being difficult to achieve.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种训练必须严格遵循自我导向的规划，即自我以最困难的方式——针对这个特定人格——朝向自由进行自我约束。当持有不同意见或感到受委屈时，他应当表达自己。唯有未被表达的侵略性才是危险的，被压抑的愤怒会阻碍渴望的心灵发展。即便从化学层面而言，这种愤怒引发的反应也会使理想的存在状态难以达成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: As I have explained the ego to you, within your system it can only perceive in terms of continuity, in a straight-line fashion so to speak, one event after the other. It can only choose to experience one event out of all the probable events at a time. The ego is however the only portion of the self that is, in the main, limited to follow experience along these lines.
quotes.translation: 如我向你们解释过的，在你们的系统内，自我只能以连续性的方式感知——可以说像直线般一个事件接一个事件。它每次只能从所有可能事件中选择体验一个事件。然而，自我是自体唯一主要被限制于沿此路径追随经验的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It has its own possibilities of development and achievement. This should not be forgotten, and all potential egos have, also, their own possibilities. The inner self or identity must express itself through its ego in order to manipulate within physical reality. The inner self is composed of all the potential egos that compose it, but it is more than the sum of these.
quotes.translation: 它拥有自身的发展与成就可能性。这一点不应被遗忘，所有潜在自我也各自具有其可能性。内在自体或本体必须通过其自我来表达，以便在物质实相中运作。内在自体由构成它的所有潜在自我组成，但它大于这些自我的总和。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: His ego however is also very strong. His mother taught him to be extremely fearful of his subconscious, and the rigid ego became a protection from it and her. As he grew older he thought of the ego as a balancing agent against an inner spontaneous self that always, it seemed, got him into trouble. Now I would like to continue here, but I imagine your hands are tired.
quotes.translation: 然而他的自我也非常强大。他母亲教导他对潜意识极度恐惧，僵化的自我便成了对抗潜意识与她的保护。随着年岁增长，他将自我视为对抗内在自发自我的平衡机制——那个内在自我似乎总给他惹麻烦。此处我本欲继续探讨，但想必你的双手已感疲惫。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: In those terms there is "an ideal" psychological pattern to which you are yourself intimately connected. The inner ego constantly moves you in that direction. On the other hand, that pattern is not rigid, but flexible enough to take advantage of changing circumstances, even as a plant will turn toward the sun though you move it from room to room while the sunlight varies its directions. The inner ego does not exist in time as you do, however, so it relies upon your assessment of situations with which your reasoning is equipped to cope.
quotes.translation: 就这些术语而言，存在着与你自身紧密相连的"理想"心理模式。内在自我持续引导你朝此方向前行。另一方面，这个模式并非僵化不变，而是具有足够弹性以善用变化的情境——正如植物会转向阳光，即便你将其在不同房间移动，阳光的方向也随之改变。然而内在自我并不像你那样存在于时间之中，因此它仰赖你对情境的评估，而你的理性能力正足以应对这些情境。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: As you know, at one time it was necessary for the ego to focus exclusively upon outer data, but the channels never closed between the inner self and the ego. The ways for communication between the two have been left open. If they had not been left open, man would have no knowledge at all, nor any hint, of his basic inner existence. There is no real dual state. The inner self will make itself known. For the species this present period is transitory, but the length of this period, if drawn out, could bring about results most unfortunate.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，曾有一段时间自我必须完全专注于外在信息，但内在自我与自我之间的通道从未封闭。两者之间的沟通途径始终敞开。若这些通道曾被封闭，人类将完全无从知晓自身内在存在的本质，连一丝线索都不会有。根本不存在真正的二元状态。内在自我终将彰显自身。对物种而言，当前时期只是过渡阶段，但若这段时期被过度延长，可能带来极为不幸的后果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Through the inner senses then, you may perceive the inner laws, and remember that the inner ego knows what it is about. The intellect of the outer ego is but a pale image of your own inner ego. We will also go into this later.
quotes.translation: 因此，透过内在感官，你便能感知内在法则，并记住内在自我知晓其本质。外在自我的智力不过是内在自我苍白的映像。这点我们稍后也会深入探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It begins to travel down safe paths, and out of fear it continually enlarges the scope of limitations. In the particular personality's case, perception becomes also limited, and rejections occur. In this as in many such cases foods are rejected. In many such cases the ego itself chooses to perceive only within those areas where it feels safe, and it rejects more and more any involvement that it can avoid. And now the ego has the self-created ulcer to blame, and it rejects many foods, for foods are symbolistic of involvement.
quotes.translation: 它开始沿着安全的路径行进，出于恐惧不断扩展限制的范围。就特定人格而言，感知也变得受限，并产生排斥现象。在此类案例中，食物往往被排斥。许多这类案例中，自我本身只选择在它感到安全的领域内感知，并越来越排斥任何它能避免的涉入。如今自我有了自创的溃疡作为借口，它排斥许多食物，因为食物象征着涉入。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Through dreams the self communicates with the self, and with all layers of the self. For the self is not one concrete thing. The self has no boundaries, the self is not limited. Consciousness is the direction in which the self looks, again, but the ego is not aware of the whole self. The ego is not even familiar with the context or the meaning of your own dreams.
quotes.translation: 通过梦境，自我与自我沟通，并与自我的所有层次交流。因为自我并非单一具体之物。自我没有边界，自我不受限制。意识是自我注视的方向，但自我并不觉知完整的自我。自我甚至不熟悉你自己梦境的情境或意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The chemical and electrical construction of the human individual opens other pathways, and requires other activities in other fields than those with which the conscious ego is familiar. The mechanics are not important, but as dreaming is partially caused by chemical poisons that make dreaming a necessity for physical survival, so there are other mechanisms of this kind that are actually doorways, built within and natural to the physical mechanism, that at the same time necessitate experience upon other fields of reality.
quotes.translation: 人类个体的化学与电性构造开启了其他通路，并在意识自我所不熟悉的领域要求其他活动。机制本身并不重要，但正如做梦部分是由化学毒素所引发，使得做梦成为肉体生存的必要条件，同样也存在其他这类机制——它们实际上是内建于肉体机制且自然存在的通道，同时迫使个体在其他实相领域获得体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: As it grows, in your terms, it looks outward for confirmation of this inner knowledge. The inner self upholds the ego with its support. It forms its truths into physically oriented data with which the ego can deal. It then projects these outward into the area of physical reality. Seeing these truths thus materialized, the ego then finds it easier to accept them.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，当它成长时，它会向外寻求对这种内在知识的确认。内在自体以它的支持来支撑自我。它将自身的真理转化为自我能够处理的、面向物质实相的数据，然后把这些投射到物质实相的领域中。当自我看到这些真理以这种方式物质化后，便更容易接受它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This does not mean that it ignores its earlier functions. In true expansion of consciousness then, you become more and more aware, more conscious, underlined, of inner realities that were previously never realized on a conscious level. Since the ego is presently your main vehicle of consciousness, it will not be obliterated. It will indeed be resurrected. It simply changes not only its form, but its inner core, accepting as a part of itself realities which it previously ignored out of fear, ignorance and insecurity.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着它忽略了早期的功能。在真正的意识扩展中，你会越来越觉察、越来越有意识（强调）地认识到那些先前从未在意识层面被了悟的内在实相。由于自我目前是你意识的主要载体，它不会被消灭。它确实会复活。它不仅改变形式，更改变内在核心，接纳那些它先前因恐惧、无知与不安全感而忽视的实相作为自身的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: I used the term (ego) often myself for your convenience, and I use it now for the same reason. I believe that I will tell you this for your definition: the ego is the portion of identity that is presently focused within an apparent now--that is, it is primarily designed as a mental tool, focusing within time as it is known and experienced by physical creatures.
quotes.translation: 我常为方便而使用（自我）这个术语，现在也基于同样理由使用它。我相信我会告诉你这个定义：自我是身份中目前聚焦于一个明显当下的部分——也就是说，它主要被设计为一种心智工具，聚焦于物质生物所认知与体验的时间之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: As mentioned earlier (in the 610th session in Chapter One), what you call the ego is a portion of the inner identity that rises to face the world of physical existence. In the regular course of events it will change into another ego, but while losing its "dominant" status it will not die to itself. It will alter its organization as a part of the living psyche.
quotes.translation: 如先前所述（第一章第610节），你所谓的自我是内在身份中升起面对物质世界的那一部分。在常规事件进程中，它会转变为另一个自我，但在失去其"主导"地位时，它并不会自我消亡。它会作为活的心灵的一部分重组其组织架构。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The inner ego, however, while conscious of itself, has returned to a subjective position within action, and views itself as a part of action. The outer ego, if you recall, views itself as apart from, or separate from, action. The inner ego contains the various purposes toward which the entity, as seen in its various personalities, has been working to achieve.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在自我虽意识到自身，却已回归行动中的主观位置，视自身为行动的一部分。若你记得，外在自我则视自身为独立于或脱离于行动的存在。内在自我包含各种目的，这些目的正是本体透过其不同人格所努力达成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: That image is only connected with your present personality ego, and could be likened to a fibrous projection or growth, into which your present personality could become entombed. I use the word purposely to show the danger, because such an occurrence would be a setback, not only to your present personality but indirectly for your entity, since you would be further away from it than you are now. By the same token, your triumph represented a necessary one, and reinforced the healthy points of your present ego.
quotes.translation: 那个形象仅与你当前的人格自我相连，可比喻为一种纤维状的投射或增生，你当前的人格可能被埋葬其中。我特意用这个词来显示危险，因为这种情形不仅是你当前人格的挫折，也间接影响你的本体——你将比现在更远离它。同理，你的胜利代表一次必要的突破，并强化了你当前自我的健康面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In my communications to you, I speak as my whole self, and not on the part of any one of the egos which have been dominant in other existences. If I had known either of you as contemporaries within your physical time in your present existence, then after death I would have assumed, once again, the dominant ego by which you had known me. I am not tied to physical existence by any strong emotional bonds however, and my personality structure is more advanced than is usual for communicators from other systems.
quotes.translation: 在我与你沟通时，我是以我的整体自我说话，而非以曾在其他存在中主导的任一自我身份。若我在你当前存在的物理时间内认识你们任何一位为同时代人，那么死后我会再次采用你曾认识我的主导自我。然而，我并未被强烈的情感纽带束缚于物理存在，我的人格结构比来自其他系统的沟通者更为先进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I am speaking largely to a Western audience, and so here I am using terms for a particular reason, to explain concepts in a way that will be understood. The inner ego (see the last session) is perfect as a term to suit my purposes. Let me stress again that the "unconscious" is indeed conscious -- and by conscious I mean that its reasoning is not irrational. Its methods are not chaotic, and its characteristics are not only equal to those of the known ego, but indeed are more resilient and knowledgeable.
quotes.translation: 我主要对西方听众说话，因此在此特意使用某些术语，以便用易于理解的方式解释概念。内在自我（见上一节）这个术语完美契合我的目的。让我再次强调，"无意识"确实是有意识的——我所说的"有意识"是指其推理并非非理性。它的方法并非混乱，其特性不仅不亚于已知自我的特性，而且实际上更具韧性与智慧。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: I do not want to give you too many details too quickly. The inner ego, however, you may think of as another face that looks inward. We are using an analogy, and an analogy that is for simplicity's sake only. We may say therefore, starting from the outer environment, that you would have first of all what you consider the ego, which I will call the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 我不想太快给你太多细节。然而，你可以将内在自我视为另一张向内观看的面孔。我们在此使用一个类比，且仅为简化起见。因此我们可以说，从外在环境出发，你首先会拥有你所认为的自我，我称之为外在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The self does not remain as permanently attached to the physical body as you imagine, during physical existence. The ego is much more dependent upon the physical self than are other portions of the personality. The physical body is more like a home station, from which frequent excursions are made. The ego is like a guardian who is left at home, as watchdog.
quotes.translation: 在物质存在期间，自我并不像你想象的那样永久依附于肉体。自我比人格的其他部分更依赖物质自体。肉体更像一个基地站，由此频繁进行外出探索。自我则像留守家中的守护者，担任看门狗的角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: In such cases the ego is too rigid, and does not expand with the nature of the personality's whole creative experience. Of course this could happen with mediumship, as with any other such activity. In this case, however, Ruburt's ego gradually began to let its rigidity go, in a gradual process that allowed the whole personality, itself included, to expand.
quotes.translation: 在此类情形中，自我过于僵化，未能随着人格整体创造性经验的本质而扩展。当然，这种情况可能发生在通灵活动中，正如其他任何此类活动一样。然而在此案例中，鲁柏的自我逐渐开始放下其僵固性，通过一个渐进的过程让包括自身在内的整体人格得以扩展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The organism is the center of this happening, then, the core. The ego attempts to stand apart and observe, but in order to do so it narrows the available field of perception. Once it has formed its characteristics, it has already become too specialized to do more than observe certain limited fields of activity. It is of course itself observed by the inner ego, which has managed to maintain its position securely within subjective reality, where it has a wider though somewhat less intense viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 有机体是此事件的核心，即中心所在。自我试图抽离旁观，但为了做到这点，它必须收窄可感知的场域。一旦形成自身特性，它已变得过于专门化，只能观察某些有限的活动领域。当然，它本身也被内在自我所观察——内在自我成功稳固地立足于主观实相中，在那里拥有更宽广但强度稍低的视角。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The practice of psychological time will allow you to reach these portions of the self. The ego is not artificially disorganized by such practice. It is simply, for the moment, bypassed. The experience gained does become a part of the physical structure, but there is no massive disorganization of perception, since the ego agrees to step aside momentarily.
quotes.translation: 心理时间的练习将使你触及自我的这些部分。此类练习不会人为地瓦解自我，只是暂时绕过它。所获得的经验确实会成为物质结构的一部分，但感知不会产生大规模混乱，因为自我同意暂时退居一旁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It will be our concern here, therefore, to aid the personality to discover and use these resources. I will have more to say concerning the manner in which the organic illness has been accepted by the ego, as a part of the ego's self-image. This acceptance does indeed take place in that area of the personal subconscious that is closely allied to the ego.
quotes.translation: 因此，我们的关注点在于协助人格发现并运用这些资源。关于有机疾病如何被自我接纳为自我形象的一部分，我将进一步阐述。这种接纳确实发生在与自我紧密相连的个人潜意识领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This is not done at all times, but the ego is not usually aware either of the motion nor of the other systems involved. Through your own abilities, and partially through circumstances that happen to be favorable, you are able with my help, to some degree, to add this experience of mobility to your natures and transfer the knowledge to the conscious ego.
quotes.translation: 这并非始终发生，但自我通常既未察觉运动本身，也未意识到所涉及的其他系统。凭借你自身的能力，部分得益于偶然的有利环境，在我的协助下，你得以在一定程度上将这种流动体验融入本性，并将认知传递给意识自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There are other self-conscious portions of the self however, with which the ego is not at all familiar, but of which the subconscious has intuitive knowledge. These self-conscious portions of the self exist in different reality systems. Before we go into our Dr. Instream material, let me remind you however that there is a whole self, composed of these various self-conscious selves, and that a portion of the self is indeed aware of the unity that exists to form the whole psychological gestalt.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我还有其他具有自我意识的部分，这些部分自我完全不熟悉，但潜意识却对它们有直觉性的了解。这些具有自我意识的部分存在于不同的实相系统中。在我们进入英斯壮博士的资料之前，请容我提醒各位：存在一个由这些不同自我意识部分组成的整体自我，而自我中确实有一部分觉察到构成整体心理完形的统一性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Messages from the inner self if strong enough will pass through the conscious barriers, and the conscious ego is only too happy to receive them. But such intuitions have usually first appeared in dream form, appearing to the ego later; and many such messages appear in dreams ahead of time, to be released to the conscious mind when situations demand it.
quotes.translation: 来自内在自我的讯息如果足够强烈，就会穿透意识的屏障，而有意识的自我也非常乐意接收它们。但这种直觉通常首先以梦境形式出现，之后才显现在自我面前；许多这类讯息会提前在梦中出现，待情况需要时才释放给意识心智。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When such focus of energy quickens, it will often then propel itself onward, having built up momentum. This is what occurred today. The ego, in anger, would not allow the suggestions made to be carried out. The energy that would have been used in what you may call, for now, astral projection, was dammed up. The difficulty lay not necessarily in the particular suggestions given. The trouble was that the energy that would have been used to carry out the suggestions was dammed up by the ego.
quotes.translation: 当这种能量焦点加速时，往往会因累积了动量而自行推进。今天的情况正是如此。自我在愤怒中不允许所给予的建议被执行。原本可用于你们目前所谓的"星光体投射"的能量被阻塞了。问题不一定在于所给予的特定建议，而在于原本要用来执行这些建议的能量被自我堵住了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: These energies are naturally drawn from within the whole personality. What is not generally recognized is the fact that the ego itself constantly changes. It is only when the change is unusually vivid, and definitely perceivable, that you speak of secondary personalities. But the main characteristic drives of any given personality shift continually; for all its attempts in the opposite direction, the ego must change just to exist, and its very permanence is dependent upon its flexibility.
quotes.translation: 这些能量自然源自整个人格内部。人们普遍未能认识到的是，自我本身也在不断变化。只有当这种变化异常鲜明且确实可感知时，你才会谈论次级人格。但任何特定人格的主要特质驱动力都在持续转变；尽管自我竭力朝相反方向努力，它仍必须通过变化才能存在，而其持久性恰恰依赖于自身的灵活性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego is your idea of your physical image in relation to the world. Your self image is not unconscious, then. You are quite aware of it, though often you reject certain thoughts about it in favor of others. False beliefs can result in a rigid ego that insists upon using the conscious mind in one direction only, further distorting its perceptions.
quotes.translation: 自我是你对自身与物质世界关联的物理形象认知。你的自我形象并非无意识存在。你对此相当清楚，尽管你常会为了接纳某些想法而排斥另一些关于它的念头。错误信念会导致僵化的自我，它坚持只朝单一方向运用意识心，进一步扭曲其感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: You see perhaps havoc within the physical field, and this is indeed to be faced and dealt with, and set straight, as aid is given to the victims of a hurricane. But you are familiar only with the results of action as they appear within the physical field, as long as you insist upon viewing your physical universe with the eyes of the ego-self; for the ego-self attempts to cut itself off from that action of which it is a part, and in so attempting it loses contact with this larger reality.
quotes.translation: 你或许在物质场域中看到混乱，这确实需要面对、处理并矫正，如同援助飓风灾民一般。但只要你坚持用自我之眼审视物质宇宙，就只会看到行动在物质场域呈现的结果；因为自我试图切断自身与它所从属的行动的联结，这种企图使它失去了与更大实相的联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Waking consciousness is taken into the dream state, but the ego is not. The ego would immediately falter, and cause immediate failure and catastrophe. What you will meet in your experiments are varieties of conditions, and until you have learned the control it may be difficult to distinguish between them. Some you can manipulate, some you cannot.
quotes.translation: 清醒意识会进入梦境状态，但自我不会。自我会立刻动摇，导致即刻的失败与灾难。你在实验中会遇到各种状态，在学会控制之前，可能难以区分它们。有些状态你可以操控，有些则不能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You shut off stimuli to concentrate on other stimuli. This is a simplified example of how in the dream state you shut out stimuli usually accepted by the ego, and become conscious of other realities that you usually ignore in the waking state. You create the dream world continuously. You are familiar with it and intimate with it, and you know it well. In this discussion there should be some remarks made concerning the existence of the inner ego, of which I believe you are not familiar.
quotes.translation: 你关闭某些刺激以专注于其他刺激。这是一个简化的例子，说明在梦境状态中你如何关闭自我通常接受的刺激，并意识到你在清醒状态时通常忽略的其他实相。你持续创造着梦境世界。你熟悉它、亲近它，并且深知它。在这场讨论中，应该提及内在自我的存在——我相信你对它并不熟悉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: An analyst might consider Augustus as schizophrenic and label him neatly, but such terms are basically meaningless. If the analyst, over a period of time, should convince Augustus that his condition in the present resulted from some specific inhibited event in the past, and if the analyst was an intuitive and understanding man, then Augustus might change his beliefs enough so that some kind of "cure" was worked. He would then conveniently remember such an event and display the expected emotions as he re-experienced it. Unfortunately in his present state, powerless as it were without Augustus Two, he might also simply call on his "alter ego" to show the good doctor that he was no one to trifle with.
quotes.translation: 分析师可能会将奥古斯都视为精神分裂症患者并轻易贴上标签，但这类术语基本毫无意义。如果分析师经过一段时间能让奥古斯都相信，他当下的状况源于过去某个被压抑的特定事件，且这位分析师直觉敏锐、善解人意，那么奥古斯都可能改变信念到足以产生某种"治愈"效果。届时他会方便地记起这样的事件，并在重新体验时表现出预期的情绪。不幸的是，在他目前的状态下——仿佛没有奥古斯都二号就无能为力——他也可能直接召唤他的"第二自我"，向那位好医生证明自己绝非可轻易戏弄之人。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Since the conscious ego is composed of the gestalt molecular consciousness, then when it leaves the physical body it takes the molecular consciousness with it, and this molecular consciousness is therefore present to aid in future construction. However, since you must deal with physical laws while dwelling upon the physical plane, you cannot dispense entirely with the physical constructions, but in such extensions of consciousness you must utilize other physical molecules and atoms.
quotes.translation: 由于有意识的自我是由分子意识的完形所构成，因此当它离开肉体时，会带着分子意识一同离去，而这分子意识便会在场协助未来的建构。然而，由于你居住在物质层面时必须遵循物质法则，你无法完全舍弃物质建构，但在这类意识延伸中，你必须运用其他物理分子与原子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Your world is populated by individuals concentrating upon physical activities, dealing with events that are "finished products" -- at least in usual terms. Your inner egos populate Framework 2, and deal with the actual creation of those events that are then objectified. Since "the rules" of Framework 2 are different, that reality is not at all bound by your physical assumptions. It contains, therefore, the inner ego of each individual who has lived or will ever live upon the earth.
quotes.translation: 你的世界住满了专注于物质活动的个体，他们处理的是"成品"事件——至少以通常的说法而言。你们的内在自我则栖居于架构二中，处理那些随后被具体化的事件的实际创造。由于架构二的"规则"不同，那个现实完全不受你们物质假设的束缚。因此，它包含了每个曾活在地球上或将要活在地球上的个体的内在自我。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Obviously then so-called astral projection occurs frequently in the sleeping state. It also occurs however in the waking state, although the ego is not aware of such projection as a rule. When through training there is greater communication between the inner and outer selves, then it is possible for the ego to realize what has happened.
quotes.translation: 显然，所谓的星光体投射在睡眠状态中频繁发生。然而，它也会在清醒状态中发生，尽管自我通常并不察觉这类投射。当透过训练使内在自我与外在自我之间有更佳的沟通时，自我便有可能意识到所发生的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: I have spoken of "you," yet this must not be confused with the "you" that you often think you are -- the ego alone, for the ego is only a portion of You; it is that expert part of your personality that deals directly with the contents of your conscious mind, and is concerned most directly with the material portions of your experience.
quotes.translation: 我曾提及"你"，但这不可与你常以为的那个"你"——仅指自我——相混淆，因为自我只是你的一部分；它是你人格中专司处理显意识内容的部分，最直接关切你经验中的物质层面。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Incidentally, suggestion will reach many aspects of the self, and some which are very distant from the ego, for you are setting into motion psychic action, which is behind all realities. Suggestion will reach portions of the self of which the ego is entirely unfamiliar. Suggestion can indeed change experience which has already passed.
quotes.translation: 附带一提，暗示将触及自我的诸多面向，甚至包括那些远离自我的部分，因为你正在启动作为一切实相基础的心灵活动。暗示能触及自我完全陌生的自我层面，甚至能改变已然逝去的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Ego failure may result. Development of the inner senses is a much more effective method of perceiving other realities, and followed correctly, the ego is not only stronger but more flexible, and consciousness even of physical reality is increased. Such development becomes an unfolding and a natural expansion of the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 可能导致自我失效。发展内在感官是感知其他实相更有效的方法，若正确遵循，自我不仅会更强大，也会更具弹性，甚至对物质实相的觉知也会增强。这样的发展将成为整体人格的自然展开与扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: These potential egos at one time or another will have their chance, as dominant egos, in this existence or in another reincarnation. They represent the overall potentials of the whole identity in respect to physical existence. The identity has in other words latent abilities which it will not use within the physical system, but all of the latent ability ever available lies within the original identity.
quotes.translation: 这些潜在自我在某个时刻将有机会成为主导自我，无论是在此生还是另一次转世中。它们代表了整个身份在物质存在方面的整体潜能。换言之，身份拥有它不会在物质系统内使用的潜在能力，但所有曾经可用的潜在能力都存在于原始身份之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now. A strong part of the ego identity is based upon the continuity of creative achievement, which springs from the subconscious. If this were severely tampered with, the ego itself would suffer. Now give us a moment on the clairvoyant question. If the suggestion is given daily as I told you, there will be no great difficulty in any case. There is at present no outstanding clairvoyant data that is affecting his symptoms or causing any new symptoms, outside of those given.
quotes.translation: 现在。自我身份的一个重要部分基于创造性成就的连续性，这源于潜意识。如果这一点被严重干扰，自我本身也会受损。现在让我们花点时间讨论通灵问题。如果我告诉你的那样每日给予暗示，任何情况下都不会有太大困难。目前除了已给出的那些之外，没有显著的通灵数据影响他的症状或引起任何新症状。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The whole self contains the ego, and he ignored this. Any investigations into the nature of existence, and any true learning, must take place within all levels of the self. He cut off his ego to save his soul, and nearly lost both in the bargain. The ego indeed is part of the soul. It is one of the voices of the soul. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 整体自我包含自我，而他忽略了这一点。任何对存在本质的探究，以及任何真正的学习，都必须在自我的所有层面上进行。他切断自我以拯救灵魂，结果几乎两者皆失。自我确实是灵魂的一部分。它是灵魂的声音之一。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Death is the personality's release from the physical plane, or we will use the term "the physical field," and that is all. To the ego this is a frightening future in prospect. To the ego, even sleep seems a slap in the face. Recognition in physical life of the whole self would do much to negate this death fear, since there are rather pleasant psychological experiences which are akin to the experience of death, and which would prepare the personality for this eventuality.
quotes.translation: 死亡是人格脱离物质层面（或称“物质场域”）的过程，仅此而已。对自我而言，这预示着可怕的未来。在自我看来，连睡眠都像是一记耳光。在物质生活中认知到完整自体，将极大消解这种死亡恐惧——因为存在某些与死亡体验相似的心理经验，这些愉悦体验能为人格做好面对这种终极可能性的准备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: For one thing levitation as such has little value. However the ego instantly stiffens its control when it feels that any physical law is being disobeyed, because the ego is concerned with your physical universe, and your existence upon your plane is definitely determined by your recognition and obedience to camouflage necessities.
quotes.translation: 首先，漂浮术本身并无价值。但当自我感知到任何物理法则被违背时，会立即强化其控制——因为自我专注于你们的物质宇宙，而你们在物质层面的存续，完全取决于对伪装必要性的认知与服从。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Once or twice he looked for signs, and this is hardly a healthy reaction. For one thing, Ruburt's ego is extremely strong. Ruburt's intuition is the gateway that relaxes an otherwise stubborn and domineering conscious ego. The intuitive qualities however are not frivolous, and the personality is integrated. Have no fear of this.
quotes.translation: 他偶尔会寻找征兆，这绝非健康的反应。首先，鲁柏的自我极为强大。鲁柏的直觉是放松这个顽固专横的意识自我的通道。但直觉特质并非轻浮之物，其人格是整合的。对此无需担忧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: When he sips of it, as you have sipped of it, and as all conscientious human beings sip of it, then indeed the taste is bitter. It is not too farfetched however to add that all, or many, medicines have unfortunately a foul taste, and that the child who sips such a medicine finds it difficult to believe that such a distasteful brew can do him good. Basically, all action Basically there is no evil action. All is unfolding. With the limited perceptions that the ego has itself adopted, the whole is not visible, and it sees what it will see. Within your field, within your moral field, you must indeed strike out against that which appears evil to you.
quotes.translation: 当他啜饮它时，正如你们曾啜饮过它，也正如所有有良知的人类啜饮过它，那滋味确实是苦涩的。然而，补充一点并不牵强：所有或许多药物不幸地带有难闻的味道，而啜饮这种药物的孩子很难相信如此难喝的药水能对他有益。基本上，所有行动基本上没有邪恶的行动。一切都在展开。由于自我所采纳的有限感知，整体是不可见的，它只看到它想看到的。在你们的领域内，在你们的道德领域内，你们确实必须对抗那些对你们而言显得邪恶的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I am going to say more here concerning those characteristics of Ruburts whole self, which allow me to communicate with your field. Here, however, I merely wished to make the point that this communication between your own egos and your own subconscious must depend upon yourselves, and the easier the communication between the ego and the personal subconscious the greater the strength, abilities, potentialities and value fulfillment of the present personality as a whole.
quotes.translation: 这里我要进一步谈谈鲁柏整个自我的那些特征，这些特征使我能够与你们的领域沟通。然而，在此我只想指出一点：你们自己的自我与你们自己的潜意识之间的这种沟通必须依赖于你们自己，而自我与个人潜意识之间的沟通越顺畅，当前人格整体作为整体的力量、能力、潜能和价值完成就越大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: We start once more with our moment point. For now this moment point which appears within your physical universe is but a small materialization of larger portions of the spacious present. In the dreaming state, when the ego is released from its idea of time as a series of moments, then other portions of the self can travel through these moment points, and you have here a journey through depths that have nothing to do with your （underline your） concept of time or space.
quotes.translation: 我们再次从我们的片刻点开始。此刻，这个出现在你们物质宇宙中的片刻点，只是广袤现在更大部分的一个微小物质化。在梦境状态中，当自我从它对时间作为一系列片刻的观念中解脱出来时，自我的其他部分便能穿越这些片刻点，而你们在此经历了一段与你们（强调你们的）时间或空间概念毫无关系的深度之旅。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The sensation occurred mere seconds before the outward rush, but provided just enough of a dim warning to the ego. The ego could not prevent the outward rush. It did not react in time. The warning was not therefore sufficient from the egos standpoint. It yelped and pulled the escaping inner self back by its imaginary coattails.
quotes.translation: 这种感知发生在外涌之前仅数秒，但足以给自我一个模糊的警告。自我无法阻止外涌，它未能及时反应。因此从自我的角度来看，这个警告并不充分。它惊叫着，用想象中存在的衣角将逃逸的内在自我拽了回来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You exist in many dimensions, although the ego is not aware of such existence. The ego can be taught however. What it cannot experience directly it can still understand to some degree if it is given the proper information. There is no reason for Ruburt to be surprised at Mr. Fox's thesis on dreams and out-of-body experiences.
quotes.translation: 你存在于许多维度中，尽管自我并未意识到这种存在。但自我是可以被教导的。若给予适当的信息，它无法直接体验的事物仍能在某种程度上被理解。鲁柏无需对福克斯先生关于梦境与出体经验的论文感到惊讶。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The physical body is formed about its electrical counterpart, yet they are both intertwined in completely different dimensions. All the knowledge gained by the present ego is retained in electrical form, as is all experience so retained. The camouflage material will be discarded as a physical gestalt, as far as the individual is concerned. The matter of the physical body will simply be used in other gestalts, in the manner that I have explained in earlier sessions.
quotes.translation: 物质身体是围绕其电性对应体形成的，然而两者却交织在完全不同的维度中。当前自我所获得的所有知识都以电性形式保留，所有经验亦如此保存。就个体而言，伪装物质将作为物质完形被舍弃。物质身体的物质将以我在早期课程中解释过的方式，被用于其他完形中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is precisely because the ego is excluded from the psychedelic experience with drugs that difficulties are encountered afterward. Given the opportunity the ego can and does merge with other portions of the self, and yet loosely maintains a psychological framework within which the experience can be translated in your terms.
quotes.translation: 正因药物引发的迷幻体验将自我排除在外，事后才会遭遇困难。若给予机会，自我能够也确实会与自我的其他部分融合，同时松散地维持一个心理框架，使体验得以用你们的术语被转译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: If the material is to be understood by the ego, then it must be translated in the beginning into terms which the ego is competent to handle, unfortunately. Inner data, which will be and is being received, will be valid, vivid, and will exist beyond any doubt. We shall set up plans so that any experiences will be documented.
quotes.translation: 若要让自我理解这些材料，不幸的是，最初必须将其转译为自我能够处理的术语。内在数据——正在且将持续被接收——将是有效的、鲜活的，且不容置疑。我们将制定计划，使任何体验都能被记录存档。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: We are bringing the ego inward, so to speak. It is partaking of this consciousness expansion. In the past the ego has been over exaggerated. It has ruled the roost. This does not mean that the changing pendulum must now attempt to eliminate the ego. Any expansion of consciousness must also include this portion of the self.
quotes.translation: 可以说，我们正将自我向内引导。它正参与这场意识扩展。过去自我被过度夸大，它曾独揽大权。但这并不意味着摇摆的钟摆现在必须试图消除自我。任何意识的扩展都必须包含自我的这一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The conscious mind, the ego, must be momentarily diverted, so that the intuitive self is allowed freedom. He should know that inspiration does not come from the ego. He knows this intellectually, but upon this occasion he insists in using his ego as a whip to force speed. In the past he was more sensible in this respect.
quotes.translation: 意识心（自我）必须暂时转移，让直觉的自我获得自由。他应该知道灵感并非来自自我。他理智上明白这点，但此刻却坚持用自我作为鞭子来催逼速度。过去他在这个方面要明智得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: An occurrence only remotely approaching this can be disastrous. Not because it is basically undesirable, for such an experience has the greatest potentials for development of the self. Such experiences can be disastrous simply because the self structure is not yet strong enough to assimilate and contain the intensity of the experience. In many cases dream experiences, as I have mentioned, are much more vivid and intense than waking experience. You do not even remember the majority of these. But the inner self is more flexible, you see, than the ego, and it can therefore contain greater intensities without undue alarm.
quotes.translation: 任何仅略微接近此等强度的经历都可能带来灾难。并非因其本质不可取——这类体验对自我发展具有最巨大的潜能——而是因为自我结构尚不够强大，无法吸收并容纳这种强烈体验。如我所言，许多梦境体验比清醒时的体验更为生动强烈。你们甚至记不住其中大部分。但内在自我比自我更具弹性，因此能在不过度惊慌的情况下容纳更强烈的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Later you may be able to follow this inner self even while the physical ego operates in its normal manner, but this is much more difficult if overall personality balance is to be maintained. It should be fairly obvious that identity hardly resides exclusively within the physically-oriented ego. In one sense, identity is always a becoming, and it can never be a static, finished thing. For it knows itself through change, and that which is finished cannot change.
quotes.translation: 日后你或许能在物质自我正常运作时仍跟随这个内在自我，但若要维持整体人格平衡，这要困难得多。显而易见，身份认同绝非仅存在于以物质为导向的自我之中。从某种意义来说，身份认同始终处于"成为"的状态，它永远不可能成为静止的、完成的事物。因为它通过改变来认识自己，而完成之物无法改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: In other systems this is not necessarily the case. The time system within them is entirely different than your own. In these the inner self is aware of itself as more than one ego. (Pause.) The inner self can play more than one role at once, consciously in other words. Simply as an analogy, it would be as if within physical reality you lived, say, the life of a rich man of great talent, the life of a poor man with entirely different talents, and the life of a mother and career woman. You would be aware of yourself in each of these three roles, and find qualities being developed in each of the separate lives.
quotes.translation: 在其他系统中情况未必如此。它们内部的时间系统与你们的截然不同。在这些系统中，内在自己意识到自身不止一个自我。（停顿。）换言之，内在自己可以有意识地同时扮演多个角色。打个比方，就像在物质实相中，你同时过着一位才华横溢的富人的生活、一位拥有完全不同天赋的穷人的生活，以及一位母亲兼职业女性的生活。你会意识到自己在这三个角色中的存在，并发现每个独立生命都在发展不同的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now. It is true that much of our work is done outside of session time. Session time often represents the end result of our work. In projections other portions of Ruburt's personality leave your system. They are not portions needed for physical manipulation. The ego is not even aware of them. There is nothing particularly unusual in this. The unusual aspect, comparatively speaking, is that the information gained can be translated and used within your system.
quotes.translation: 现在。确实，我们大部分工作是在课程时间之外完成的。课程时间往往代表我们工作的最终成果。在投射中，鲁柏人格的其他部分会离开你们的系统。这些部分并非物理操控所需。自我甚至察觉不到它们的存在。这本身并无特别之处。相对而言，特殊之处在于，所获得的信息能够被翻译并在你们的系统中使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Physical time, or that is clock time, was invented by mans ego to protect the ego itself, because of the mistaken conception of dual existence--that is, because man felt that a predictable conscious self did the thinking and the moving, and an unpredictable almost automatic self did the breathing and dreaming. He set up boundaries to protect the predictable self from what he considered the unpredictable self, and ended up by cutting the whole self in half.
quotes.translation: 物理时间，或者说钟表时间，是人类自我为了保护自身而发明的，源于对二元存在的错误认知——即人类认为一个可预测的意识自我负责思考与行动，而一个不可预测的近乎自动的自我负责呼吸与做梦。他设立界限来保护可预测的自我免受所谓不可预测自我的侵扰，结果却将完整的自我一分为二。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The primary ego is equally unaware of the other personalities, who very often are actually struggling for dominancy. Now. With this in mind, consider once more the various aspects of the self in the waking and the dream states. The conscious "I" is unaware of the "I" who dreams. Indeed, the dreaming "I" seems more familiar with the waking self upon many occasions. Here you have excellent examples that correspond to your dual or multiple personality thesis.
quotes.translation: 主要自我同样对其他经常争夺主导权的人格毫无察觉。记住这一点，再重新审视清醒与梦境状态中自我的各个面向。有意识的"我"对做梦的"我"浑然不知。事实上，在许多情况下，做梦的"我"反而更熟悉清醒的自我。这里就有绝佳的例子，对应你们所说的双重或多重人格理论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Though we speak in definite terms of the inner self, the entity and the ego, neither the inner self, the entity or the ego are stationary and complete. We freeze them, so to speak, in order that we might hold them within our grasp, but we cannot, nor is there a time, as such, when they will be completed or finished.
quotes.translation: 虽然我们用明确术语谈论内在自我、存有与自我，但内在自我、存有或自我都不是静止不变的。可以说，我们冻结它们以便能将其握在手中，但我们做不到，而且也不存在它们会完成或终结的所谓时间点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: (10:38.) So the concept of God began to change as the ego recognized its reliance upon inner reality, but the drama had to be worked out within the current framework. Mohammedanism was basically so violent precisely because Christianity was basically so gentle. Not that Christianity was not mixed with violence, or that Mohammedanism was devoid of love. But as the psyche went through its developments and battled with itself, denying some feelings and characteristics and stressing others, so the historic religious exterior dramas represented and followed these inner aspirations, struggles, and searches.
quotes.translation: （10:38）因此，当自我认识到它依赖内在实相时，神的概念开始改变，但这出戏必须在当前框架内上演。伊斯兰教之所以本质上如此暴力，恰恰是因为基督教本质上如此温和。并非基督教没有掺杂暴力，也非伊斯兰教缺乏爱。但随着心灵经历其发展并与自身搏斗，否定某些感受和特质而强调其他方面，历史上宗教的外在戏剧便代表并追随这些内在的渴望、挣扎与追寻。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: When action is allowed to flow unimpeded, the cooperation that is necessary to maintain the efficiency of the gestalt is maintained. It is most frequently the error of the ego, who upon many occasions attempts to deny its dependency upon this cooperation, that sets up impediments, and sets up counter suggestions that can be somewhat considered cancerous, in that if it had its way the ego would envelop all other aspects of the whole organism, and run riot.
quotes.translation: 当行动得以无阻地流动时，维持完形效率所需的合作便得以维系。最常是自我的错误——它在许多场合试图否认对这种合作的依赖——设置了障碍，并提出了可被视为具有癌变性质的反向建议，因为若任其发展，自我将吞噬整个有机体的所有其他部分，并肆意妄为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Feelings and sensations and memories that it knows nothing of have built up your psychological identity, and given you a sense of continuity. Of these this ego knows but little. Intimacy with your self and with your own identity, that is intimate knowledge of your own identity, resides in all portions of the self, and is not dependent upon a survival based upon the survival of the physically-oriented ego. This would represent a sham of a survival indeed.
quotes.translation: 它所不知的感觉、感受和记忆，构建了你的心理身份，并赋予你连续感。对此，自我知之甚少。与你自己及你自身身份的亲密——即对你自身身份的亲密认知——存在于自我的所有部分中，并不依赖于以物质导向自我的存续为基础的生存。那确实将是一种虚假的存续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: (11:40) To some extent there is also an assault upon simple creaturehood. Its images and experience, furthermore, are seldom forgotten, and the so-called new ego is born with the memory of their imprint. Some psychologists like to say that you cry out unconsciously against the natural method of your birth.* But here you have the situation where a self is faced with its own annihilation, while another "self" arises after conscious participation with its death.
quotes.translation: （11:40）在某种程度上，也存在对单纯生物本性的攻击。此外，它的意象和体验很少被遗忘，所谓的新自我带着这些印记的记忆而生。有些心理学家喜欢说，你无意识地反抗你出生的自然方式。但这里的情况是，一个自我面临自身的湮灭，而另一个“自我”在意识参与其死亡后浮现。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: I have been wanting to speak further concerning the inner ego, for we have not discussed this issue in any depth. The inner ego is formed about characteristics and abilities that have been dominant in previous personalities, characteristics which the entity has developed through its experience in various lives.
quotes.translation: 我一直想进一步谈谈内在自我，因为我们尚未深入探讨过这个问题。内在自我是由先前人格中占主导地位的特质与能力所形成，这些特质是存有通过在不同生命中的经验发展而来的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The other, older perceptive mechanisms still linger on however. The ego does not and cannot make use of them. Indeed the ego is almost entirely formed by the physical senses method of perception. Other layers of the self biologically respond to the older, more generalized but less limited perceptive mechanisms.
quotes.translation: 然而，其他更古老的感知机制仍然存留。自我并不利用也无法利用它们。事实上，自我几乎完全由物质感官的感知方式所形成。自我的其他层面在生物层面上会回应那些更古老、更普遍但限制较少的感知机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: When the ego impedes such expression, then the emotions are translated into other actions, and can turn into impediments. It is only because the ego blocks freedom of the emotional expression, out of fear, that it appears to the ego that emotions are indeed fearful characteristics. Dammed up, they are indeed.
quotes.translation: 当自我阻碍这种表达时，情绪就会被转化为其他行为，并可能变成障碍。正是因为自我出于恐惧而阻断了情绪表达的自由，才使得情绪在自我看来确实是可怕的特质。一旦被压抑，它们确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego cannot see that this moment point is open, so to speak, and represents an opening into many other dimensions. These dimensions may be traveled through; but they may not be traveled through by the ego, for the ego can only perceive those dimensions which it is physically equipped to see, or perceive.
quotes.translation: 自我无法看见这个当下点是开放的，可以说，它代表着通往许多其他维度的入口。这些维度可以被穿越，但自我无法穿越它们，因为自我只能感知其物理配备所能看见或感知的那些维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The ego's false ideas prevent it from accepting this energy, but once the ego is aware of its position as a portion of the self, then it should not be shunted aside, but can take its place. It is sometimes referred to almost as if it stood entirely outside of basic reality. It is, of course, within it also.
quotes.translation: 自我的错误观念阻止它接受这种能量，但一旦自我意识到它作为自体一部分的位置，那么它就不应被搁置一旁，而可以各就其位。它有时几乎被描述为仿佛完全立于基本实相之外。当然，它也在实相之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: With such a firm foundation he will indeed be most successful, and he can achieve such a foundation. Then he can apply inner knowledge to the ego's environment. The feet of the ego, of any ego, must not rest on quicksand, or when the venturing self returns there will be no sound foundation to receive him.
quotes.translation: 有了如此稳固的基础，他确实会最为成功，而且他能达成这样的基础。然后他可以将内在知识应用于自我的环境。自我的脚——任何自我的脚——绝不能立于流沙之上，否则当冒险的自体归来时，将没有稳固的基础来接纳他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I do not speak here of acquaintances who do not understand the importance of psychic investigation. I speak now of the ego's ability to handle itself. And psychic investigation will, and should, increase that ability, if it is properly begun, and if the ego is properly related to the physical environment.
quotes.translation: 我在此并非谈论那些不了解心灵探索重要性的泛泛之交。我此刻说的是自我处理自身的能力。而心灵探索若以正确方式展开，且自我与物质环境建立适当关联，它必将——也应当——增强这种能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In our dream experiments therefore, this is one of the purposes that we hope to achieve. The ego is not equipped of itself to delve directly into nonphysical realities. If the ego is trained to be flexible however, it will accept such knowledge from the subconscious, and other wider horizons of the self.
quotes.translation: 因此在我们进行的梦境实验中，这正是我们希望达成的目标之一。自我本身并不具备直接深入非物理实相的能力。然而若自我被训练得足够灵活，它便能从潜意识及自我更广阔的领域中接纳此类知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: When the ego is a very rigid one however, it will not accept the reality of these rejected patterns so easily, and according to the nature of its rigidity it may restrict so many areas of activity that the inside action, or the inside impetus for expression, almost equally balances the ego force itself.
quotes.translation: 但若自我极为僵化，它便不会轻易接纳这些被排斥模式的真实性。根据其僵化程度的本质，它可能限制如此多的活动领域，以至于内在行动或内在表达驱力几乎与自我力量本身形成势均力敌的平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Nevertheless the course of future events will move in this direction. It must. The ego must change in this rather basic manner, including other realities within its scope of awareness. There is no basic reason why it cannot add its directive energies to other aspects of the personality, and if it could so expand it would, theoretically, be possible for the ego to become aware of many experiences which have been impossible for it in the past.
quotes.translation: 然而未来事件的进程将朝这个方向发展。它必须如此。自我必须以这种相当根本的方式改变，将其他实相纳入其觉知范围。没有根本理由说明它为何不能将其导向性能量加入人格的其他面向，若能如此扩展，理论上自我将有可能觉知到许多过去无法体验的经历。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is true that the inner self in the last analysis is the durable self. Nevertheless the various outer egos are extremely important, and without them the inner self would be blocked. Nor are these inner abilities as a rule ever left unfulfilled. The outer egos are not gobbled up, so to speak, after a particular existence, but remain in control of those characteristics and abilities which they have been so important in forming and training.
quotes.translation: 确实，内在自体在最终分析中是持久的自体。然而各种外在自我极为重要，没有它们内在自体将受阻。这些内在能力通常也从未被闲置。可以说，外在自我在特定存在之后并不会被吞噬，而是继续掌控那些它们在形成与训练中扮演重要角色的特性与能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: We have seen that all experience is retained in electrically coded data within the cells, and that the material of the cells forms about this coded experience. We have seen that the ego begins, sparked into being, by the inner self, greatly influenced by heredity and physical environment; and that this ego as it continues to exist gradually builds up an electrical reality of its own, as its experiences form into coded data within the cells.
quotes.translation: 我们已经看到所有经验都以电性编码数据保留在细胞内，而细胞的物质围绕这编码经验形成。我们已经看到自我由内在自体激发而生，深受遗传与物质环境影响；这个自我在持续存在过程中逐渐建立起自身的电性实相，因为其经验在细胞内形成编码数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Some of these states take place above the ego or the subconscious, although I am using the terms above or below simply for your convenience. You think of the ego as the center of the self, therefore I am forced to use these terms. You think the other portions of the personality revolve about the ego.
quotes.translation: 这些状态有些发生在自我或潜意识之上，虽然我使用'之上'或'之下'这类词只是为了方便你们理解。你们将自我视为自我的中心，因此我不得不使用这些术语。你们认为人格的其他部分都围绕着自我运转。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: This does not mean that the personality must be completely swept away by an emotion, though this is what such an ego fears. Emotion replenishes even the ego. Emotions demand resiliency, and resiliency is both the result of spontaneity, inner assurance, and discipline. All this is action, for the personality itself is composed of action, and is constantly changing. This is action, therefore, delighting in the expression and form of itself.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着人格必须被情绪完全席卷，尽管这正是自我所恐惧的。情绪甚至能滋养自我。情绪要求弹性，而弹性既是自发性、内在确信与自律的结果。这一切都是行动，因为人格本身由行动构成，且不断变化。因此，这是行动在表达与展现自身形态时的欢愉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There are various types of dreams and dream fragments. I will follow this through also later, since in these beginning sessions I am giving you what may be considered a broad outline to be filled in. These dissociated states often occur in sleep, an excellent time since the ego is quieted. At such times it is extremely possible for present personalities to be visited by others such as myself, but only on the bidding of the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 梦境与梦的片段有各种类型。我稍后也会继续探讨这一点，因为在最初这几节中，我给予你们的可视为待填充的粗略纲要。这些解离状态常在睡眠中发生——这是极佳时机，因自我已趋于平静。此时，现世人格极有可能被如我这般的存在造访，但唯有在存有本身的授意下才会发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: But past, present and future as such simply do not have meaning to the other aspects of the personality. The idea and reality of physical time parallels the development of the ego. Consciousness of self, alone, is unaware of your physical time.
