The physical time idea is a product of the ego's tendency to make finer distinctions in order that it can classify and categorize, and therefore identify and give permanence to its own sensations.
quotes.translation: 但过去、现在与未来本身，对人格的其他面向而言根本毫无意义。物理时间的概念与实相，与自我的发展是平行的。唯有自我意识本身，对你的物理时间毫无觉知。物理时间的概念，是自我为了做出更精细的区分，以便分类、归纳，从而辨识并赋予自身感受以永恒性，这种倾向的产物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You would find it difficult to attend to or be aware of regular outer stimuli while you dealt with the ordinary function of daily life. Is it then any wonder that the outer ego leaves the inner data to the safekeeping of the inner ego? You are truly babes in the woods, having enough trouble getting along in your own universe. And do not get your feelings hurt, I am not referring to either of you in particular, as you should know by now.
quotes.translation: 当你处理日常生活的普通功能时，你会发现很难关注或觉察常规的外在刺激。那么，外在自我将内在资料交由内在自我保管，又有什么好奇怪的呢？你们真是林中的稚子，在自己的宇宙里生存已经够困难了。别觉得我伤了你的感情，我并非特指你们中的任何一位，你现在应该明白了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: When the personality is well integrated, then even when it operates as a separate unit the ego still fulfills the basic purposes of the personality as a whole. It is the communication between the very areas of the self which is so important here, as in many other matters. It is possible for the ego to realize its position as but one part of the whole personality, while it still behaves in a directive manner toward physical manipulation.
quotes.translation: 当人格整合良好时，即使自我作为独立单位运作，它仍能实现人格整体的基本目的。自我各区域之间的沟通在此至关重要，正如在许多其他事务中一样。自我有可能认识到自己只是整体人格的一部分，同时仍以指导性的方式处理物质层面的操作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There is a possible new beginning for him, however, and it will be a new reorganization of tendencies that results in the formation of a new ego, born out of the old. (Long pause.) It must be formed slowly, as the child's ego is. He wanted to cut out too many steps, you see, hence his difficulty.
quotes.translation: 然而，对他而言仍存在一个新的开端——那将是一种倾向的重新整合，最终从旧我中诞生出一个新我。（长停顿）这个新我必须像孩童的自我结构那样缓慢形成。他试图跳过太多步骤，你瞧，这便是他困境的根源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Each channel will represent a portion of the self, each one existing in a different dimension, and yet all part of the whole self, or the whole tape. You can see that it would be highly ridiculous to say that the material on your Mono One was any more or any less valid than your material on Mono Two. Mono One and Mono Two could be compared then to self one and two; self one and two here, however, in the context of the ego as self one and the subconscious as you know it as self two. We are not using Dunnes terms here, in other words.
quotes.translation: 每个频道都代表自我的一部分，各自存在于不同维度，却同属整体自我（或完整磁带）。若声称第一声道的内容比第二声道更有效或更无效，显然荒谬至极。第一声道与第二声道可比作自我一与自我二——此处自我一指代自我结构，自我二则指代你们所认知的潜意识。换言之，我们并未沿用邓恩的术语体系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: In other words, your friend's ego has declared me legitimate now. On the other hand, I have always counted upon Ruburts ego as an ally in this fashion. It kept Ruburt in strong protection under its wing, and if it was overly stubborn, it was so because it always recognized Ruburts intuitive abilities, and the full strength of Ruburts sense of commitment, once given.
quotes.translation: 换言之，你友人的自我结构如今已承认我的合法性。而另一方面，我始终将鲁柏的自我结构视为此类同盟。它曾将鲁柏严密护于翼下，若它显得过分固执，实因它始终认可鲁柏的直觉能力，以及鲁柏一旦许下承诺便全然投入的意志力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: In the last analysis the channel for vitality or for vitality's transformation into physical matter is of course the inner senses' ability, and there is a counteraction here as far as the conscious ego is concerned. The conscious ego often blocks much energy. In dreams the blocking is minimized.
quotes.translation: 归根结底，生命力或生命力转化为物质实相的管道当然是内在感官的能力，就意识自我而言，这里存在一种反作用。意识自我常常阻塞大量能量，而在梦境中这种阻塞被减至最低。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: There are shadings and variations and that is all. The inner ego is that part of the inner self which is closely allied with the outer ego, in that it is to some degree a director of function and activity. But it is not sharply focused. It looks inward. Here we run into some language difficulty.
quotes.translation: 只有程度与变化的差异，如此而已。内在自我是内在自体中与外在自我紧密相连的部分，因为它在一定程度上是功能与活动的指挥者。但它并非焦点分明，它向内观照。在此我们遇到了语言上的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Only when such nourishment is for some reason cut off to a considerable degree, is the ego threatened by starvation... We will have more to say concerning the ego's relationship with the so-called unconscious. In a healthy personality the inner self easily projects all experience into EE units, where they are translated into actuality. Physical matter therefore acts as a feedback. Now we will end our session unless you have questions.
quotes.translation: 只有当这种滋养因故被大幅切断时，自我才会面临匮乏的威胁……关于自我与所谓潜意识的关系，我们后续将有更多阐述。在健康的人格中，内在自体能轻易将所有经验投射到电磁能量单位中，使其转化为实相。因此物质实相充当了反馈机制。若无问题，本次课程到此结束。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: In such a case it is not necessary that the conscious self recall the dreams which it requests. In many cases, in fact, it is to the ego's advantage that it remain unaware of the actual dreams involved; for the ego is indeed touchy, rigid and querulous as an old arthritic gentleman, and cranky.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，有意识的自我并不需要记得它所要求的那些梦境。事实上，在许多情况下，让自我不知道实际涉及的梦境反而对它有利；因为自我确实像个患关节炎的老绅士一样敏感、固执又爱抱怨，而且脾气古怪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This sixth sense is too important to skim over, and yet I wanted to mention it this evening because it fits in with our discussion. Without this sixth sense, and without its constant use by the inner self-conscious ego, you could not even construct the physical camouflage universe of your own plane. This sense, again, is used constantly beneath the outer egos awareness, and forms the basis for camouflage constructions on every plane.
quotes.translation: 这第六感太重要了，不能轻描淡写地掠过，但我今晚想提它，因为它与我们的讨论相符。没有这第六感，没有内在有意识自我对它的持续运用，你甚至无法构建你自己层面的物质伪装宇宙。这第六感同样在外在自我觉知之下持续运作，并构成每个层面上伪装构建的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Nor is the dream itself a chaotic action, but a complicated and unique action by which symbols are chosen with such precise and careful attention that they have meaning to all levels of the inner self, and various levels of the subconscious. Here you will find clues as to many of your own conscious problems. Here with study and attention you will find information concerning your own previous lives, which the ego is not familiar with.
quotes.translation: 梦境本身也并非混乱的行为，而是一种复杂而独特的行为，通过它，符号被如此精确而谨慎地选择，以至于它们对内在自我的所有层面以及潜意识的各个层面都有意义。在这里，你会找到许多你自己有意识问题的线索。在这里，通过研究和关注，你会找到关于你自己前世的信息，而这些是自我所不熟悉的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now. Ruburt is always under my protection in his out-of-body experiments. There is nothing to prevent his seeing me on such occasions but his own attitude, as I have said before. He progresses at a natural rate however, at his own rate. He will not overdo, for in this his ego is an aid and it will see to it that overexertion does not occur. When experiments fail this is usually the reason, and also the reason for the rhythmic effect.
quotes.translation: 现在。鲁柏在出体实验中始终受到我的保护。正如我之前所说，除了他自己的态度之外，没有任何事物能阻止他在这种场合看见我。他以自然的速度进展，以他自己的速度。他不会过度，因为在这方面他的自我是一种助力，它会确保不会发生过度消耗。当实验失败时，这通常是原因，也是节奏效应的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The concepts of God that you have, have gone hand-in-hand with the development of your consciousness. The ego, emerging, needed to feel its dominance and control, and so it imagined a dominant god apart from nature. Often nations acted as group egos -- each with its own god-picturing, its own concepts of power. Whenever a tribe or a group or a nation decided to embark upon a war, it always used the concept of its god to lead it on.
quotes.translation: 你们所拥有的神的概念，与你们意识的发展是相辅相成的。自我在浮现时，需要感受到它的支配和控制，因此它想象出一个与自然分离的支配性神祇。国家常常扮演着群体自我的角色——每个国家都有自己描绘的神祇形象，自己的权力概念。每当一个部落、团体或国家决定发动战争时，它总是利用其神的概念来引领前进。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The solution may or may not be given to the consciousness. In many instances this would not be necessary. The inner ego of which we have spoken is the director of such unifying activities, and while the inner ego is mainly concerned with inner reality, it is also aware of physical existence.
quotes.translation: 解决方案可能会或可能不会给予意识。在许多情况下，这并非必要。我们所说的内在自我是这种统一活动的指导者，虽然内在自我主要关注内在实相，但它也觉察到物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ruburt's mother is part of an entity, and he should remember this. He does not have arthritis, although he has been mimicking the symptoms, and could in time hypnotize himself into believing he did have the disease, though this is highly improbable given his own constitution. The spontaneous self happens to be basically more powerful and far more sensible than the ego, and would never stand for this development. It would doubtless cause some sort of an explosion however, in order to prevent any such occurrence.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的母亲属于一个存有的一部分，他应当记住这一点。他并没有关节炎，尽管他一直在模仿相关症状，并且可能最终催眠自己相信确实患有此病，但鉴于他的体质，这极不可能发生。自发性自体本质上比自我更强大、更明智得多，绝不会容忍这种发展。不过，它无疑会引起某种爆发，以防止任何此类情况发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now. The inner self exists in quite a different fashion than that seen by Dunne. For the inner self can indeed perceive events that will occur after physical death. It is not, and never was, imprisoned by ego time. Its perceptions of other times are merely inhibited by the ego. The inner self can perceive events that will occur to itself after physical death, and it also can see events that will occur in which it is not involved.
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自体的存在方式与邓恩所见的截然不同。因为内在自体确实能感知肉体死亡后会发生的事件。它从未被自我时间所囚禁，也永远不会。它对其他时间的感知只是被自我所抑制。内在自体既能感知肉体死亡后自身将经历的事件，也能看到它未参与其中但即将发生的事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The span of a whole man's lifetime is no more than a moment point. The ego is the portion of you equipped to explore and experience this moment point in depth. （Smile.） Value fulfillment demands this slowing down of perception. This is most difficult to explain. Consider using psychological time. You have experiences within a few physical moments of physical time, experiences that are entirely independent of your time structure.
quotes.translation: 整个人生的跨度不过是一个瞬间点。自我是你装备来深入探索并体验这个瞬间点的部分。（微笑。）价值完成要求这种感知的放慢。这极难解释。考虑使用心理时间。你在物理时间的几个物理瞬间内所获得的体验，完全独立于你的时间结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The ego must be understood as having certain general necessary characteristics. Again, it must attempt to see itself as apart from action, even though basically the attempt to do so must fail. The attempt however allows the ego to act as a front man, so to speak, an organized and disciplined agent to deal with physical environment for the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 自我必须被理解为具有某些普遍的必要特征。它必须试图将自己视为与行动分离的独立存在，尽管这种尝试从根本上注定失败。然而，这种尝试使自我得以充当所谓的"前台人物"，一个组织有序、训练有素的代理人，为整个人格处理物质环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The information is sifted often through the dreaming self to the subconscious, which has intimate knowledge of the ego with which it is closely connected. The subconscious makes its own value judgments here, and passes these on to the ego. But then the ego must come to its own decision.
quotes.translation: 信息常常通过做梦的自我筛选后传递给潜意识，而潜意识与自我关系密切，对其了如指掌。潜意识在此做出自己的价值判断，并将这些判断传递给自我。但最终自我必须做出自己的决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: He makes a good point, saying that the ego cannot know unconscious material directly. He does not realize however, nor do your other psychologists, what I have told you often --that there is an inner ego; and it is this inner ego that organizes what Jung would call unconscious material.
quotes.translation: 他说自我无法直接知晓无意识材料，这点说得很好。但他和你们其他心理学家一样，并未意识到我常告诉你们的——存在一个内在自我；正是这个内在自我在组织荣格所谓的无意识材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now, no psychological structure is easy to describe in words. Simply to explain the nature of personality as it is generally known, all kinds of terms are used: id, subconscious, ego, superego; all of these to differentiate the interweaving actions that make up the physical personality. The dreaming self is just as complicated. So you can say that certain portions of it deal with physical reality, physical manipulation, and plans; some with deeper levels of creativity and achievement that insure physical survival; some with communication, with even more extensive elements of the personality now generally unknown; some with the continuing experience and existence of what you may call the soul or overall individual entity, the true multidimensional self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何心理结构是容易用言语描述的。仅仅为了解释通常所知的人格本质，人们就使用了各种术语：本我、潜意识、自我、超我——所有这些术语都是为了区分构成物质人格的那些交织运作。做梦的自己同样复杂。因此你可以说，它的某些部分处理物质实相、物质操控与计划；某些部分处理更深层的创造力与成就，以确保物质生存；某些部分处理沟通，以及人格中那些通常不为人知的更广泛元素；某些部分处理你所谓灵魂或整体个体存有——那真正的多维自己——的持续经验与存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Because of the ego's particular line of development, you have experimented with artificial drugs and chemicals, both in foods and for medicinal purposes, as well as for "religious" enlightenment. Some of the effects of LSD7 and other artificial psychedelic drugs give you a hint of other probable directions your consciousness might have followed, or might still follow. As the experiments are conducted, however, and in the ignorance of the framework, the conscious mind takes a subordinate position. Instead, using methods other than drugs, it could be taught to expand its knowledge far more safely, to organize it in ways that could be most advantageous. Still, some of the experiments do give hints of certain aspects of one of the species' probable developments.
quotes.translation: 由于自我的特定发展路线，你们曾实验过人工药物与化学物质，既用于食物和医疗，也用于"宗教"启蒙。LSD7及其他人工迷幻药的某些效果，暗示了你们意识本可追随或仍可能追随的其他可能方向。然而，在这些实验进行时，由于对架构的无知，意识心处于从属地位。其实，若使用药物以外的方法，意识心本可被教导以更安全的方式扩展其知识，并以最有利的方式组织它。尽管如此，某些实验确实暗示了该物种可能发展的某些面向。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: As specified,2 ego consciousness grew. These inner patterns, native to the psyche of any species, turned into concepts, mental images -- intuitive projections that were all meant to give conscious direction. The gods served, then, as stimulators of development. Seemingly outside of the self, they were meant to lead the self into its greatest area of fulfillment. The god images would change as consciousness did. The various god concepts that have fallen by the wayside, so to speak, represent areas of development that were not chosen, in your terms, but they are still latent. The totem pole, for example, is a remnant from an era where there was much greater communication between man and the animals -- when, in fact, men went to the animals to learn, and from them first acquired knowledge of herbs and corrective medicinal behavior.3
quotes.translation: 如前所述，自我意识逐渐成长。这些内在模式——任何物种心灵所固有的——转化为概念、心象——那些旨在提供有意识指引的直觉投射。于是，诸神充当了发展的刺激物。它们看似在自我之外，实则旨在引导自我进入其最伟大的圆满领域。神祇意象会随意识而改变。可以说，那些被弃置路旁的种种神祇概念，代表着在你们说法中未被选择的发展领域，但它们仍处于潜伏状态。例如图腾柱，便是人类与动物之间曾有更密切沟通时代的遗存——那时，人类确实去向动物学习，并首次从它们那里获得草药知识与矫正性医疗行为的知识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: At certain levels the brain can handle simultaneous material, of course, even though you may be conscious of only a smattering of it. The body is aware of multitudinous simultaneous stimuli that consciously escape you, and is able to act on the information. This includes all kinds of sense data that are not consciously pertinent. (Intently:) Because of the particular kind of ego-orientation that the race decided upon, however, many probabilities of development inherent in the species have been latent. Inherently the physical brain is capable of dealing with more than one main line of consciousness. This does not mean the development of dual personality, by the way. It means the further expansion of the concept of identity: "You" would not only be aware of the you that you have always known, in the same way that you are now, but a deeper sense of identity would also arise.
quotes.translation: 在某些层次上，大脑当然能处理同时发生的资料，即使你只意识到其中一小部分。身体觉察到大量同时发生的刺激，这些刺激在意识层面逃过了你的注意，并且能够根据这些信息采取行动。这包括所有在意识上不相关的感官数据。（专注地：）然而，由于人类种族决定采用特定的自我导向，物种固有的许多发展潜能一直处于潜伏状态。本质上，物理大脑能够处理不止一条主要意识线。顺便说一句，这并不意味着双重人格的发展。它意味着身份概念的进一步扩展："你"不仅会意识到你一直所知的自己，就像你现在这样，而且还会产生更深层的身份感。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: What you think of as (underlined) male ego-oriented characteristics are simply those human attributes that the species encouraged, brought into the foreground, and stressed. Using those actually as guidelines, you have so far viewed your world and formed your cultures. There are some exceptions of note, but here I am speaking historically of the Western world with its Roman and Greek heritage. Your gods became masculine then; competitive. You saw the species pitted against nature, and man pitted against man. You consider the Greek tragedies great because they echo so firmly your own beliefs. Man is seen in opposition in the most immediate fashion with his own father. Family relationships become a mirror of those beliefs, which are then of course taken as statements of fact concerning the human condition. You thus have a very polarized male-female concept.
quotes.translation: 你所认为的（强调）男性自我导向特征，仅仅是人类种族鼓励、突出并强调的那些人类属性。实际上，你一直以这些为指导原则来观察你的世界并形成你的文化。有一些值得注意的例外，但在这里我是在历史上谈论西方世界及其罗马和希腊遗产。你的神祇变得男性化；具有竞争性。你认为人类物种与自然对立，人与人之间对立。你认为希腊悲剧伟大，因为它们如此坚定地呼应了你自己的信念。人类以最直接的方式与自己的父亲对立。家庭关系成为这些信念的镜子，然后这些信念当然被视为关于人类状况的事实陈述。因此，你有一个非常两极化的男女概念。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Once scientists theorized the ether as the medium in which the physical universe existed.1 Framework 2 is the psychological medium in which the consciousness of the world exists. The word "ego" is much bandied about, and in many circles it has a poor reputation. It is, however, as I use it, a term meant to express the ordinarily conscious directive portion of the self. It is your conscious version of what you are -- an excellent description, if I do say so myself (with amusement). It is directed outward into the physical world. It is also aware, however, of some of your "unconscious" activities. It is the you you identify with, so it is as aware of your dreams, for example, as you are, and it is quite conscious of the fact that its existence rests upon knowledge that it does not itself possess.
quotes.translation: 科学家曾假设以太是物理宇宙存在的介质。框架二是世界意识存在的心理介质。"自我"这个词被广泛滥用，在许多圈子里名声不佳。然而，在我使用这个词时，它是指自我通常有意识的那部分指导性部分。它是你对自己是什么的有意识版本——如果我自己这么说的话，这是个绝妙的描述（带着戏谑）。它向外指向物质世界。然而，它也意识到你的一些"无意识"活动。它是你认同的那个你，所以举例来说，它和你一样意识到你的梦境，并且很清楚它的存在依赖于它自身并不拥有的知识。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: （In a most amused way the personality said he and the others did not think much of our fumbling around with various tests this evening. The group was not with us when we tried moving the ring; it was with us when we concentrated upon the rocker. "A corridor had been open " then. I did not ask for predictions and none were volunteered. Future contact was a possibility. The group was "interested" in watching our progress with Seth. They thought Seth was "all right" as a teacher. We could not be told now why they must remain anonymous. Although some instruction was given to personalities on this plane through dreams, it was difficult because of the ever-guarding ego. They were able to accomplish more in the way of education after personalities had left this plane.
quotes.translation: （人格以极其戏谑的方式说，他和其他人对我们今晚各种测试的笨拙尝试不以为然。当我们试图移动戒指时，那个群体并不与我们同在；当我们专注于摇椅时，它才与我们同在。"那时一条走廊已经打开。"我没有要求预测，也没有人主动提供。未来的接触是可能的。这个群体对观察我们与赛斯的进展"很感兴趣"。他们认为赛斯作为老师"还不错"。现在不能告诉我们为什么他们必须保持匿名。虽然通过梦境给这个层面的人格提供了一些指导，但由于始终警惕的自我，这很困难。在人格离开这个层面后，他们在教育方面能完成更多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There is always an imbalance here that may of itself be termed action. It cannot be perceived as any one thing, for it is a relationship and a dimension. It can be perceived most directly, and with less distortion, in the dream state. For here it is allowed the freedom of itself. Here you have also the inner vitality that has not been materialized within the realm of material camouflage. You have the tendency of this inner vitality to materialize, and its inability to completely do so. In the dream state the tendency for this vitality to materialize meets with little resistance. Action within actions result, without physical space. Distances appear and are experienced as such. Action is much less limited. Rather, action itself is not less limited, but you can experience action with less limitations, for the ego which erects such limitations lets down its guard.
quotes.translation: 这里始终存在一种不平衡，这种不平衡本身可被称为行动。它无法被感知为任何单一事物，因为它是一种关系与维度。在梦境状态中，它最直接且较少扭曲地被感知。因为在此处，它被允许拥有自身的自由。在此你也能接触到尚未在物质伪装领域内物质化的内在活力。你拥有这种内在活力趋向物质化的倾向，以及它无法完全实现这一倾向的特性。在梦境状态中，这种活力趋向物质化的倾向几乎遇不到阻力。行动中的行动得以发生，无需物理空间。距离显现并被如实体验。行动所受的限制大大减少。更准确地说，并非行动本身所受限制减少，而是你能以更少限制体验行动，因为设立这些限制的自我放松了警惕。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Suggestions given by an individual on any kind of a conscious basis have to be given with the cooperation of the ego. Many suggestions bypass the ego entirely. Suggestion however, as you think of it, operates both ways. This is not usually understood. Suggestions may come therefore from the physical world, to act upon the personality. Suggestions may also come from within the personality to act upon the physical environment.
quotes.translation: 个体在任何有意识基础上给出的暗示，都必须得到自我的配合。许多暗示完全绕过了自我。然而，暗示——如你所理解的那样——是双向运作的。这一点通常未被理解。因此，暗示可能来自物质世界，作用于人格；暗示也可能来自人格内部，作用于物质环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is indeed more fluid and resilient than the ego. It is the failure of the ego to listen to the inner voice of the subconscious that causes many difficulties. The ego would wish the subconscious out of existence. It does not want a partner. It wants to master the entire personality.
quotes.translation: 它确实比自我更具流动性与韧性。正是自我未能倾听潜意识的内在声音，才导致了诸多困境。自我希望潜意识不复存在。它不想要伙伴。它想要掌控整个人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: First of all you must understand, again, that now you do not realize your true identity. You identify instead with your present ego, so when you think in terms of life after death you really mean a future life of the ego that you know. At the end of the reincarnational cycle you understand quite thoroughly that you, the basic identity, the inner core of your being, is more than the sum of your reincarnational personalities.
quotes.translation: 首先你必须再次明白，此刻你并未意识到自己的真实身份。你反而认同于当前的自我，因此当你思考死后生命时，你真正指的是你所知的自我在未来的一种生命形态。在轮回周期结束时，你会彻底领悟：你——这个基本身份、你存在的内在核心——远比你所有轮回人格的总和更为宏大。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Hypnotism is a safer method to begin with than drugs, but hypnotism itself is not necessary if there is an inner willingness to explore the inner universe. The main barrier is the ego's fear of being subjugated, even as it fears subjugation imagined in death. If the ego can be made to understand that inner awareness, exploration and investigation will actually enlarge its scope of awareness there will be little difficulty.
quotes.translation: 催眠是比药物更安全的入门方法，但若内心愿意探索内在宇宙，催眠本身并非必需。主要障碍在于自我对被征服的恐惧——正如它恐惧想象中死亡带来的征服。若能让自我明白：内在觉知、探索与考察实际上会扩展其觉知范围，那么困难便会微乎其微。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: He intended a strong inner self to take over control of the entire personality. The ego however was terrified at the thought. Long after he wished the ego to return, the ego hid. He battered down his own doors. He is seeking enlightenment, but he was not strong enough to contain it.
quotes.translation: 他意图让一个强大的内在自我接管整个人格。然而，自我对此感到恐惧。在他希望自我回归很久之后，自我仍躲藏着。他撞毁了自己的门。他在寻求开悟，却不够强大到容纳它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Now I will say more concerning the changes worked in the ego as a result of our sessions, and from the psychedelic experience in general. The ego structure as such remains, of course. The responsibility of dealing with manipulation within the physical universe remains, but in some respects the nature of this manipulation changes. It becomes more direct: Physical properties are manipulated more and more on a mental level.
quotes.translation: 现在我将进一步说明，由于我们的课程以及一般迷幻体验，自我所经历的变化。自我的结构本身当然依然存在。在物质宇宙中处理操控的责任依然存在，但在某些方面，这种操控的性质发生了变化。它变得更加直接：物质属性越来越多地在心智层面上被操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Various portions of the self therefore face physical reality at any given time as the ego. The process is constant. An attempt to maintain the status quo is of course natural on the part of the ego, but when this becomes a stubborn effort to maintain dominancy then the difficulties arise. The self throws up those portions of itself that it considers most able to handle the changing physical environment at any given time.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我的各个部分在任何特定时刻都以自我的身份面对物质实相。这个过程是持续不断的。自我自然倾向于维持现状，但当这变成固执地维持主导地位时，困难便随之而来。自我会抛出它认为在任何特定时刻最能处理不断变化的物质环境的那部分自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The energy of this inner self is directed and used by it to richly form from itself, from components and inner experience, a material counterpart in which the outer ego then can act out its role. The outer ego is most in the role, acting out a play that the inner self has written.
quotes.translation: 内在自体的能量由其引导和运用，从自身、组成部分及内在经验中丰沛地塑造出一个物质对应体，外在自我便可在其中扮演其角色。外在自我最投入于角色之中，演绎着内在自体所编写的剧本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: It goes without saying that in our methods the ego is changed rather completely but gradually in many cases, and only through its own willingness to do so. It recognizes its identity as a part of. underlined, the inner self. Therefore basically it has no need to fight the inner self, since it knows its survival is dependent upon this inner framework.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，在我们的方法中，自我在许多情况下会相当彻底但逐渐地改变，且唯有通过其自身的意愿才能达成。它认识到自己的身份是内在自体的一部分（强调）。因此，它基本上无需与内在自体对抗，因为它知道自身的存续依赖于这个内在架构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now: This extended period, given to waking consciousness without rest periods, builds up chemicals in the blood that are discharged in sleep. But in the meantime they make the body sluggish and retard conscious concentration. The long sleep period to which you are accustomed then does become necessary. A vicious circle then is formed. This forces overstimulations during the night, increasing the body's work, making it perform continuously over an extended time physical purifications that ideally would be taken care of in briefer periods of rest. The ego feels threatened by the extended "leave of absence" it must take, becomes wary of sleep, and sets up barriers against the dream state. Many of these are highly artificial.
quotes.translation: 现在：这种无休息时段持续给予清醒意识的延长状态，会在血液中累积本应在睡眠中排出的化学物质。但与此同时，这些物质使身体迟钝并阻碍意识专注。你所习惯的长时间睡眠因此变得必要，从而形成恶性循环。这迫使夜间过度刺激，增加身体负担，使其在延长时段内持续进行本可在较短休息期间完成的物理净化。自我因必须承受的延长"休假"而感到威胁，对睡眠产生警惕，并设置重重障碍对抗梦境状态——其中许多障碍是高度人为的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The very fact that you breathe and dream and perform countless other activities without any aid from the conscious ego should of itself convince even the most stubborn scientific skull that more is involved than science is willing to admit. The idea of the subconscious mind is merely a grudging, hedging, partial admission that man is more than the conscious ego, more than the sum of his parts, and more than a mechanism.
quotes.translation: 你呼吸、做梦，并在没有意识自我任何协助的情况下进行无数其他活动，这一事实本身就足以说服最顽固的科学头脑——其中涉及的科学不愿承认的更多内容。潜意识心智的概念不过是一种勉强、回避、部分的承认，即人类远不止是意识自我，远不止是其各部分的总和，也远不止是一台机器。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: For convenience's sake, you close out the multitudinous inner communications that leap between the tiniest parts of your flesh, yet even as physical creatures, you are to some extent a portion of other consciousnesses. There are no limitations to the self. There are no limitations to its potentials. (Pause.) You can adopt artificial limitations through your own ignorance, however. You can identify, for example, with your outer ego alone, and cut yourself off from abilities that are a part of you. You can deny, but you cannot change, the facts. The personality is multidimensional, even though many people hide their heads, figuratively speaking, in the sand of three-dimensional existence and pretend there is nothing more.
quotes.translation: 为了方便起见，你关闭了在你肉体最微小部分之间跳跃的无数内在沟通，然而即使作为物质生物，你在某种程度上也是其他意识的一部分。自我没有限制。其潜能也没有限制。（停顿）不过，你可以通过自己的无知采用人为的限制。例如，你可以只认同外在自我，并切断属于你自身一部分的能力。你可以否认事实，但无法改变事实。人格是多维的，即使许多人比喻性地将头埋在三维存在的沙子里，假装没有更多的东西。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I mentioned earlier that the personality is an excellent example of action as it is sometimes projected into the physical field, while not appearing within it in tangible form. For here we see many of actions characteristics: the mobility that does not necessarily involve space, the thrusts outward, and the corresponding thrusts inward. We see action acting upon itself and constant change. A thorough study of the personality will be an excellent exercise, and will lead you close to the nature of action itself. The experiences about which you asked, for example, involved actions of the personality and not, of course, of the ego. Expansion and contraction occur constantly as characteristic of action, as I have explained.
quotes.translation: 我之前提到，人格是行动的一个绝佳例子，因为它有时被投射到物质场域中，却未以有形形式出现在其中。因为在这里我们看到了行动的许多特征：不一定涉及空间的移动性、向外的推力，以及相应的向内的推力。我们看到行动作用于自身并不断变化。对人格的彻底研究将是一个极好的练习，并将引领你接近行动本身的本质。例如，你问及的经历涉及人格的行动，当然不是自我的行动。正如我所解释的，扩张和收缩作为行动的特征不断发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now, the ego, the dominant ego, does indeed affect the inner identity, and changes it even as it affects and changes the dominant ego. For we are dealing here after all with an interdependent gestalt. The interworking's of the whole gestalt have never been completely understood.
quotes.translation: 现在，自我，那个主导性的自我，确实影响着内在身份，并改变它，正如它影响和改变主导性的自我一样。因为我们毕竟是在处理一个相互依存的全我。整个全我的内在运作从未被完全理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The ego specialized in expansions of space and its physical manipulation. It specialized with objects. As a result, now, a person in any given hour is aware of events happening at the other end of the world. No immediate physical response he or she can make seems adequate or pertinent on many occasions. Bodily physical action, then, to that extent, loses its immaculate precision in time. You cannot kick an "enemy" who does not live in your village or country; an enemy, furthermore, whom you do not even know personally. (Intently:) Again, to that extent instant physical action in time is not the same kind of life-and-death factor that it was when a man was faced with an enraged animal, or enemy, in close combat.
quotes.translation: 自我专门处理空间的扩展及其物理操控。它专门处理物体。结果，现在一个人在任何一个小时里都能知晓世界另一端发生的事件。在许多情况下，他或她无法做出似乎恰当或相关的即时身体反应。因此，身体物理行动在某种程度上失去了在时间中的完美精确性。你不能踢一个不住在你村庄或国家的"敌人"，更何况是一个你甚至不认识的人。（专注地：）同样，在某种程度上，即时物理行动在时间中已不再是那种生死攸关的因素，就像一个人与愤怒的动物或敌人近距离搏斗时那样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: As a rule, secondary personalities are given their energy as a direct result, so to speak, of a too-rigorous and rejecting ego. In many, though not all instances, such a secondary personality may represent simply the whole personality's quite healthy attempts at expression that have been too long denied. You get a regrouping of unifying principle actions, and a division of energies about two different ego systems.
quotes.translation: 通常而言，次要人格之所以被赋予能量，是过于严苛且排斥性的自我直接导致的结果。在许多（虽非全部）案例中，这种次要人格可能仅仅代表整体人格长期被压抑的、相当健康的表达尝试。你会看到统一性原则行动的重新组合，以及能量在两个不同自我系统间的分裂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ego consciousness must now be familiarized with its roots, or it will turn into something else. You are in a position where your private experience of yourself does not correlate with what you are told by your societies, churches, sciences, archaeologies, or other disciplines. Man's "unconscious" knowledge is becoming more and more consciously apparent. This will be done under and with the direction of an enlightened and expanding egotistical awareness (much louder), that can organize the hereto neglected knowledge -- or it will be done at the expense of the reasoning intellect (again louder), leading to a rebirth of superstition, chaos, and the unnecessary war between reason and intuitive knowledge.
quotes.translation: 自我意识现在必须熟悉其根源，否则它将蜕变为其他东西。你正处于这样的境地：你对自己的私人经验与社会、教会、科学、考古学或其他学科告诉你的内容并不相符。人类的"无意识"知识正越来越明显地浮现。这将在开明且扩展的自我觉知（声音更响亮）的指引下完成，从而组织起迄今被忽视的知识——否则它将牺牲理性智性（再次提高音量），导致迷信、混乱的复兴，以及理性与直觉知识之间不必要的战争。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The ego can exist only within the context of these root assumptions. The primary dream experience is finally woven into a structure composed of these root assumptions, and it is these that you remember. These serve you as basic information, but the information is then put into symbolic form. Objects, you see, are symbols. These objects in dreams are symbols of realities that the ego could not otherwise perceive.
quotes.translation: 自我只能存在于这些根本假设的脉络中。主要的梦境经验最终被编织成由这些根本假设构成的结构，而你所记住的正是这些假设。它们作为基本信息为你服务，但随后这些信息会被转化为象征形式。你看，物体就是象征。梦境中的这些物体是自我无法以其他方式感知的实相的象征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It can however be taught a very valuable function here. The first prerequisite is that the ego understand both the nature of its dependence upon the whole personality, and the nature of its peculiar directive abilities in relation with the physical universe. When there is good communication between all areas of the self, and this is a big when, then the judgment of the ego can be trusted to some greater extent.
quotes.translation: 然而，在此处它可被教导一项极有价值的功能。首要前提是，自我必须理解其对整体人格的依赖本质，以及与物质宇宙相关的独特指导能力的本质。当自我所有层面之间保持良好沟通时——这是个重大前提——那么自我的判断在某种程度上才更值得信赖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: When this does happen it usually occurs as a bleed-through from the subconscious from the dream state, for the subconscious is somewhat acquainted with probabilities, and to some degree experiences these in a problem-solving manner. It views various probabilities with the purposes of the ego in mind, and therefore aids the ego in its decisions as to which probable events it should choose for its own experience.
quotes.translation: 当这种情况发生时，通常表现为潜意识从梦境状态中渗透而出，因为潜意识对可能性有所了解，并在某种程度上以解决问题的方式体验这些可能性。它带着自我的目的审视各种可能性，从而协助自我决定应选择哪些可能事件作为自身经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The ego is a jealous god, and it wants its interests served. It does not want to admit the reality of any dimensions except those within which it feels comfortable and can understand. It was meant to be an aid but it has been allowed to become a tyrant. Even so, it is much more resilient and eager to learn than is generally supposed. It is not natively as rigid as it seems. Its curiosity can be of great value.
quotes.translation: 自我是个善妒的神祇，它要求自身利益得到满足。它不愿承认任何令其感到不适或无法理解的维度之真实性。它本应成为助力，却被允许变成了暴君。即便如此，它比人们通常认为的更具韧性且更渴望学习。它本质上并不像表面那般僵化。其好奇心可具有极大价值。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: What the personality must be led to see is that any real permanence would indeed be the death of the ego and the personality. For as we know, the ego is not the same today, in your terms, as it was yesterday, nor yet as it will be tomorrow. That "I" continually changes.
quotes.translation: 人格必须被引导看见的是，任何真正的恒常性确实会导致自我和人格的死亡。因为如我们所知，就你们的时间而言，今天的自我与昨天不同，也与明天不同。那个"我"在持续变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Individuals are always warned of disasters, so that the organism can prepare itself ahead of time. The day of death is known. Consciously such knowledge is not given to the ego for obvious reasons, but every organism, through its inner senses, is equipped with subconscious knowledge of personal disasters, deaths, and so forth, the personality itself deciding beforehand what it considers disastrous; and the members of the species as a whole know in advance of their wars. As telepathy operates constantly at a subconscious level, as a basis for all language and communication, so clairvoyance operates continually so that the physical organism can prepare itself to face its challenges.
quotes.translation: 个体总是被预先警告灾难，以便有机体能够提前做好准备。死亡之日是已知的。出于明显的原因，这种知识不会在意识层面给予自我，但每个有机体通过其内在感官，都具备对个人灾难、死亡等的潜意识知识，人格本身事先决定什么被视为灾难；整个物种的成员预先知道它们的战争。正如心电感应持续在潜意识层面运作，作为所有语言和沟通的基础，所以千里眼也持续运作，使物质有机体能够准备好面对其挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It happened so quickly that Ruburt's old dog of an ego was taken by surprise almost completely, and the whole affair might have been successful, as far as its purpose being achieved, had not a quick preliminary sensation caused the ego to rouse from its pleasant doze.
quotes.translation: 事情发生得如此之快，以至于鲁柏那条老狗般的自我几乎完全措手不及，要不是一阵快速的初步感觉让自我从它愉快的打盹中惊醒，整件事本可能成功达成其目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The practical nature of his own dreams was also more apparent, for again, his dreams sent him precise visions as to where food might be located, for example, and for some centuries there were human migrations of a kind that now you see the geese make. All of those journeys followed literal paths that were given as information in the dream state. [But] more and more man began to identify himself with his exterior environment. He began to think of his inner ego almost as if it were a stranger to himself. It became his version of the soul, and there seemed to be a duality--a self who acted in the physical universe, and a separate spiritlike soul that acted in an immaterial world.
quotes.translation: 他自身梦境的实际性质也变得更加明显，因为举例来说，他的梦境会向他发送关于何处能找到食物的精确景象。有好几个世纪，人类进行着某种迁徙，就像现在你们看到的雁群迁徙一样。所有这些旅程都遵循着在梦境状态中作为信息给出的实际路径。但人类越来越开始将自己与外在环境认同。他开始把内在自我几乎视为陌生人。内在自我成了他心目中的灵魂版本，于是出现了一种二元性——一个在物质宇宙中行动的自我，和一个在非物质世界中行动的、类似灵体的灵魂。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Now all the richly creative, original work that is done by this inner self is not unconscious. It is purposeful, highly (underlined) discriminating, performed by the inner conscious ego, of which the exterior ego is but a shadow, and not you see the other way around.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我所完成的所有丰富、创造性的原创工作并非无意识。它是有目的的、高度（强调）有辨别力的，由内在有意识的自我执行，而外在自我只是它的一个影子，而不是你们所认为的相反情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Our ego must have its feet upon the solid earth, it is out of its element, naked and in an unfamiliar environment, outside of the normal characteristics of physical existence. Its basic distrust of dream experience is necessary for the overall balance of the personality. Physical reality is a rock to which the ego must cling, and from which it achieves its power, energy, position, and reason for existence.
quotes.translation: 我们的自我必须立足于坚实的大地，否则它就会脱离其本质，赤裸裸地处于不熟悉的环境中，超出物质存在的正常特性。它对梦境体验的基本不信任对于人格的整体平衡是必要的。物质实相是自我必须紧抓的岩石，自我从中获得其力量、能量、位置和存在的理由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The urge between the child's desire to do so, the basically kind nature, and the inability to carry out any such actions in any case, led to an over guarding ego. The ego did not appear rigid, for the inner seethings made it impossible, and spontaneity constantly erupted, but in ways the whole personality felt were the least dangerous.
quotes.translation: 孩子想要行动的冲动、其本质善良的天性，以及无论如何都无法实施此类行为的能力缺失，共同导致了一个过度防卫的自我。这个自我并未显得僵化，因为内在的翻腾使其无法如此，自发性不断爆发，但都是以整个人格认为最不危险的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: If many of the inner senses behave as if your conception of time and space do not exist, then the obvious reason is of course that they do not. You are merely allowing yourself a momentary release from the limitations of camouflage ideas, and release of these ideas brings a corresponding release from the physical camouflage patterns themselves. There is a breaking through. Now this breaking through is a release of the inner self from the camouflage, and the resulting camouflage laws of any particular plane. The barriers to such experiences are mainly those set up by the ego. The sort of experience Ruburt had last night is one of the simplest along these lines.
quotes.translation: 如果许多内在感官表现得仿佛你们对时间和空间的概念并不存在，那么显而易见的原因当然是它们确实不存在。你只是允许自己暂时摆脱伪装观念的束缚，而释放这些观念会带来对物质伪装模式本身的相应释放。这是一种突破。现在，这种突破是内在自我从伪装以及任何特定层面的伪装法则中解放出来。此类体验的障碍主要是由自我设立的。鲁柏昨晚经历的那种体验，是这类体验中最简单的一种。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is true however to say that the memories of the physically-oriented ego take their place with memories that were once subconscious. I am speaking now of the psychological makeup of the survival personality. The memories remain in physical existence. There is no real distinction between psychological reality and physical reality. The physically-oriented ego manufactures this distinction of necessity.
quotes.translation: 然而，确实可以说，以物质为导向的自我的记忆，与曾经是潜意识的记忆并存。我现在谈论的是存续人格的心理构成。这些记忆在物质存在中保留。心理现实与物质现实之间并无真正的区别。以物质为导向的自我出于必要制造了这种区别。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Theoretically, the self is unlimited, if you will recall. The ego within your field is limited because of the nature of its rigidity. The ego operates as a partitioning agent. It directs and uses the abilities of the personality for manipulation in the physical universe. It can mobilize a smaller or larger amount of these energies according to its own strength. It has a small focus but a powerful one.
quotes.translation: 理论上来说，自我是无限的，如果你还记得的话。你们场域内的自我之所以受限，是因为其僵固的本质。自我扮演着划分者的角色，它引导并运用人格的能力，以便在物质宇宙中进行操控。它能根据自身的力量调动或多或少的这些能量。它的焦点虽小，却十分强大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It can therefore, without loss of its basic integrity, change egos when such a change becomes necessary. Now. In some cases this may cause inconvenience and considerable psychological difficulties, but when such an instance occurs it is because the ego structure that is being deposed was not carrying out the main aims or goals of the identity which originally gave it that envied position of dominance.
quotes.translation: 因此，当改变成为必要时，自我可以在不丧失其基本完整性的情况下进行更替。现在。在某些情况下，这可能会引发不便和相当大的心理困难，但当这种情况发生时，是因为被废黜的自我结构未能实现最初赋予它那令人觊觎的主导地位的本体之主要目标或目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now. There were some notes I wanted to give you concerning dreams in which you feel certain that you are awake. When these dreams are unusually vivid, then the ego is aware of participating. The ego is not using its critical faculties however as a general rule.
quotes.translation: 现在。我想给你们一些关于梦的笔记，在这些梦中你确信自己是清醒的。当这些梦异常生动时，自我会意识到自己在参与其中。然而，一般而言，自我并未运用其批判能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: While it (ego consciousness) recognized its deep oneness with the earth and all creatures, it could not at the same time develop those abilities of specialization and its own particular unique focus. The growth of separate tribal cultures, for example, and later of nations, could emerge only through a sense of separation, and a certain kind of alienation. This, however, allowed for a diversity that could not otherwise be achieved under the accepted conditions. (Pause.) The seemingly local Jewish god (Yahweh/Jehovah) ended up in one way or another by destroying the Roman Empire, and in so doing brought about a complete reorganization of planetary culture.
quotes.translation: 虽然它（自我意识）认识到自身与大地及所有生灵的深层一体性，却无法同时发展出专门化的能力及其独特而专属的焦点。例如，分离的部落文化乃至后来的国家，只能通过分离感与某种疏离感才能成长。然而，这却促成了在既有条件下无法实现的多样性。（停顿）看似地方性的犹太神祇（耶和华/雅威）最终以某种方式摧毁了罗马帝国，并借此引发了行星文化的彻底重组。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The ego however is not an afterthought disconnected from the whole self, and when the intellect becomes aware of data given to it by the intuitions or the inner self, it is then capable of informing the ego, which then changes its attitude accordingly. This way we are assured of the cooperation of the whole self, and avoid any possibility of splitting one self, one part of the self, against another.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我并非脱离整体自性的后设产物，当理智觉察到直觉或内我给予它的数据时，它便能告知自我，而自我随之调整其态度。如此，我们确保了整体自性的合作，并避免了任何将自性的一部分与另一部分对立分裂的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego would if it could, stop personality's motion and development for the security of stability. The ego would drive the personality into preconceived channels. This consciousness-of-self--I suggest hyphens between consciousness- of-self--this consciousness-of-self is seen in man as personality, as the human personality. It appears, however, in all types of consciousness to one degree or another.
quotes.translation: 自我若能如愿，便会为了稳定的安全感而阻止人格的运动与发展。自我会驱使人格进入预设的轨道。这种自我意识——我建议在"自我-意识"之间加连字符——这种自我意识在人类身上显现为人格，即人类人格。然而，它以不同程度存在于所有类型的意识之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: All such projections have an electromagnetic and chemical reality that has its origin within the field of the given personality. This projection of energy is one of the main characteristics of your kind. Dreams and dream images are then projected by the individual in sleep, and also in the waking state, although on a subconscious basis. So are thoughts constantly sent outward, and other projections which we have not yet discussed. Therefore as the individual sends out these projections, so does he receive the projections of others. As you know, telepathy operates constantly beneath the dictates of the ego, and so is your intellectual climate formed.
quotes.translation: 所有这类投射都具有电磁与化学实相，其根源在于特定人格的场域。这种能量投射是你们这类存在的主要特征之一。梦境与梦意象由个体在睡眠中投射，在清醒状态下也会进行，尽管是在潜意识层面。思想同样不断向外发送，还有我们尚未讨论的其他投射。因此，当个体发出这些投射时，也同时接收他人的投射。如你所知，心电感应持续在自我指令之下运作，你们的知识氛围由此形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: When the physical self sleeps the astral image may indeed wander. It always returns to the physical body during physical life. Its telepathic and clairvoyant abilities are not hampered in any way by the ego when that self sleeps. In waking hours the communications system is more or less closed on the ego's side, but in sleep the barriers are lifted and knowledge from the inner self has a freer flow.
quotes.translation: 当物质自我睡眠时，星光体确实可能游历。在物质生命期间，它始终会回归物质身体。当自我沉睡时，其心电感应与千里眼能力完全不受自我阻碍。清醒时刻，通讯系统在自我一侧或多或少呈封闭状态，但睡眠时屏障解除，来自内在自我的知识得以更自由流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Here we have a blockage. The personality, the present ego, will not acquiesce to action, will not go along with it as part of it, but attempts to force it along its own directions. This will become clearer when passages concerning action and the ego are read.
quotes.translation: 此处存在阻塞。人格，即当前的自我，不愿顺从行动，不愿将其作为自身的一部分与之同行，反而试图迫使行动遵循其自身方向。当阅读关于行动与自我的段落时，这一点将更为清晰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Part of the subconscious for example deals with camouflage, but the deeper portions are in direct contact with the basic vitality of the universe. When you or Ruburt wonder if this material comes from the subconscious, you often take it for granted that the subconscious is personal, exclusively dealing with matters of your egos' personal past. You are sometimes willing to concede that perhaps an element of racial memory might enter in. Racial memory is of course a conglomeration of camouflage data. The subconscious also contains the undistorted material of the mind, which is un-camouflaged, and which operates between planes, knowing no boundaries.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的一部分处理伪装，但更深层的部分直接与宇宙的基本活力相连。当你或鲁柏怀疑这些资料是否来自潜意识时，你们常理所当然地认为潜意识是个人的，只处理你们自我个人过去的事务。你们有时愿意承认或许有某种种族记忆的元素介入。种族记忆当然是伪装资料的集合体。潜意识也包含未经扭曲的心智资料，这些资料未经伪装，在层面间运作，不受界限限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Quite the contrary, the ego is replenished, and rather directly. (Pause.) It is the fear that the unconscious, so-called, is chaotic, that causes psychologists to make such statements, and there (Pause) is also something in the nature of those who practice psychology, a fascination, in many cases, already predisposed to fear the so-called unconscious in direct proportion to its attraction for them.
quotes.translation: 恰恰相反，自我得到了补充，而且是相当直接的补充。（停顿。）正是对所谓无意识是混乱的恐惧，导致心理学家做出这样的陈述，而且（停顿）那些从事心理学工作的人，其本性中也有某种东西——在许多情况下，一种迷恋——已经倾向于对所谓无意识的恐惧，其程度与无意识对他们的吸引力成正比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: We will continue our discussion concerning action and identities. I have said that identity is a part of action, and basically inseparable from action. Identity attempts to form meaningful patterns and relationships from action. Consciousness is action that perceives itself. The ego is action's attempt to stand off from itself.
quotes.translation: 我们将继续讨论关于行动与身份的话题。我曾说过，身份是行动的一部分，且本质上与行动不可分割。身份试图从行动中构建有意义的模式与关系。意识是感知自身的行动。自我则是行动试图抽离自身的一种尝试。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It was a moment of momentary （underlined） terror, as the ego realized that what it fought against and what it would continue, though ineffectually, to fight against, was indeed no enemy to it but a most familiar omnipresent inner self, against which it was now powerless. The ego returned but this was the first instant where it actually came face to face with its counterpart in essence and in fact.
quotes.translation: 那是一个瞬间的（下划线强调）恐怖时刻——当自我意识到，它奋力对抗且将持续徒劳对抗的，并非它的敌人，而是一个最熟悉、无所不在的内在自体，此刻它已无力与之抗衡。自我虽回归了，但这却是它首次在本质与事实上与自己的对应物正面相遇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The inner senses also convey the knowledge that death is merely an energy transformation, and your almost numberless religions merely represent idea symbols that attempt to make this knowledge plain to the ego. That they deal with distortions and camouflage material is not to be wondered at. They have managed in some way to make this inner knowledge a part of the ego-understanding of the species.
quotes.translation: 内在感官也传递着这样的认知：死亡不过是能量的转化，而你们那数不胜数的宗教，不过是试图让自我理解这一认知的意念象征。它们涉及扭曲与伪装材料并不足为奇。毕竟，它们以某种方式使这种内在认知成为人类自我理解的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: This concept is hardly a new one. It is not a generally accepted theory, but it has ancient roots. When you carry the waking I into the dream state, this is one approach to this different consciousness. There is also an opening up that can occur in the waking condition. When this occurs the inner and outer egos merge. The outer ego recognizes its own duties, but it is aware that more is involved.
quotes.translation: 这个概念并非新创。它虽非普遍接受的理论，却有着古老的根源。当你将清醒的自我带入梦境状态，这便是接近这种不同意识的一种途径。在清醒状态下也会发生一种开启。当这种开启发生时，内在与外在的自我便融合了。外在自我认识到自身的职责，但也意识到其中涉及更多层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It does originate in the inner self that exists in your world, but is not of your world. The inner self-conscious ego as I have said--and this is for Philip's edification--the inner self-conscious ego can be compared to another face, looking out upon a different world. And yet it is the driving personality and force in your world, and you use its energy as you construct your camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 它确实源自存在于你们世界、却不属于你们世界的内在自我。正如我所说——这是为了菲利普的启发——内在自意识自我可以比作另一张面孔，正注视着另一个不同的世界。然而它却是你们世界中的驱动人格与力量，当你们构建自己的伪装模式时，你们便运用它的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: On a subconscious basis you react to many events that have not yet occurred, as far as your egotistical awareness of them is concerned. Such reactions are carefully screened out, away from conscious awareness, by the ego. The ego finds such occurrences extremely distracting and annoying, and when forced to admit their validity will resort to the most far-fetched rationalizations to explain them.
quotes.translation: 在潜意识层面，你对许多尚未发生的事件做出反应，就你自我对这些事件的觉察而言。这些反应被自我仔细筛选，远离意识觉察。自我发现这类事件极为分散注意力且令人烦恼，当被迫承认其有效性时，会诉诸最牵强的合理化解释来搪塞。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: In each dimension the inner self begins to handle further aspects of reality. The primary personality must therefore deal with a much larger number of perceptions, while still maintaining its identity. It manipulates in a larger number of dimensions, until it is able you see to handle many, not just one, of its own egos at any given "time"--and you may put time in quotes--while still maintaining its own inner stability and individuality. It takes on more roles, you see, and the psychological structure becomes more complicated as the inner self becomes sure enough of itself to admit ever more stimuli, while still retaining its own core.
quotes.translation: 在每个维度中，内在自体开始处理实相的进一步面向。因此，主要人格必须处理更大数量的感知，同时仍维持其身份认同。它在更多维度中运作，直到你瞧，它能够在任何给定的"时间"——你可以把时间加上引号——同时处理多个（而非仅一个）自我，同时仍维持其内在稳定性和个体性。它承担更多角色，你瞧，随着内在自体变得足够确信自身，能够接纳越来越多的刺激，同时仍保留其核心，心理结构变得更加复杂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: There is the same sort of disorientation that the ego experiences within physical reality when an individual dreams. The same sort of psychological reshuffling occurs. If it did not occur, then in most cases communication would not be possible, simply because the survival personality would have such difficulty in impressing the personality who was still ego-oriented within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 当个体做梦时，自我在物质实相内也会经历同样类型的迷失方向。同样类型的心理重组也会发生。如果它不发生，那么在大多数情况下沟通就不可能，仅仅因为生存人格在给仍以自我为导向、处于物质系统内的人格留下印象时会遇到极大困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now Ruburt's ego, so hard to win over, is now up in arms because it regards me as its exclusive property. (Smile; pause.) It need not worry. It took me long enough in your terms to set up our communications, and our relationships in the past helped in this behalf. (Re-incarnational relationships.) It is quite natural that others in your acquaintanceship who are experimenting should go through a stage in which it seems to them they are receiving information from me. Suggestion operates, and any trance deeper than ordinary for them can be interpreted in these terms. He should understand this, and explain it simply to his students.
quotes.translation: 如今鲁柏的自我好不容易才被说服，现在却剑拔弩张，因为它视我为它的专属财产。（微笑；停顿）它无需担忧。以你们的时间来说，我花了够久才建立起我们的沟通管道，而过去的关系对此也有所助益。（转世关系）你们相识者中那些正在尝试实验的人，自然会经历一个阶段，让他们觉得自己正从我这里接收讯息。暗示作用在此运作，任何比他们平常更深的出神状态都可以用这些术语来解释。他应当明白这点，并简单地向他的学生们说明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Remember, the normal consciousness is not synonymous with the ego. The ego is only a portion of consciousness. For Ruburt's benefit yes, indeed, the cure is permanent, as long as he utilizes what he has learned, and it seems fairly certain that he will.
quotes.translation: 切记，正常意识并不等同于自我。自我只是意识的一部分。为了鲁柏的好处，是的，确实如此，只要他运用所学到的，疗愈就是永久的，而看来他相当确定会这么做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The personality also contains good intellectual capacities, and he should examine psychic experience in the light of his intelligence also. There are truths which the intellect cannot perceive, but the intellect knows the ego, and represents a firm and reliable pathway between the inner self and the ego; and psychic experience--I repeat, psychic experience--will not suffer from such scrutiny.
quotes.translation: 人格也包含良好的智力能力，他应当运用自己的智力来审视心灵体验。有些真理是智力无法感知的，但智力了解自我，并在内在自我与自我之间充当一条坚实可靠的通道；而心灵体验——我重复一遍，心灵体验——不会因这种审视而受损。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Computer like, the data is instantly made available exactly when and where it is needed. The ego is indeed equipped to handle physical reality. Its purpose is the manipulation of the personality within the physical universe. Its most effective method of procedure however is to form the problem concisely, and then to feed it to the subconscious before the personality enters the dreaming state.
quotes.translation: 如同计算机一般，资料会在需要时、需要处即时提供。自我确实被配备来处理物质实相。它的目的是在物质宇宙中操控人格。然而，它最有效的运作方式是精确地形成问题，然后在人格进入梦境状态之前将其输送给潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now, and this can hardly be called a controversial statement, the imagination is waking mans connection with the universe of dreams. Imagination often restates dream data, and applies it to particular circumstances or problems within the physical universe. Imagination is never basically destructive. In some cases the ego construction may be weak, or incapable of holding its own, in which case the imagination is often said to be too excitable, and to be at fault.
quotes.translation: 现在，这几乎不能算是有争议的说法：想象力是清醒之人与梦境宇宙的连接。想象力常常重新表述梦境资料，并将其应用于物质宇宙中的特定情境或问题。想象力本质上从不是破坏性的。在某些情况下，自我的结构可能薄弱，或无法坚守立场，此时想象力常被指责为过于亢奋、出了差错。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is equipped, as an animal is, to perform beautifully in its environment. You would call it mindless, since it would seem not to reason. For the purpose of this discussion alone, imagine a body with a fully operating body consciousness, not diseased for any reason or defective by birth, but one without the overriding ego-directed consciousness that you have. There have been species of such a nature. In your terms they would seem to be like sleepwalkers, yet their physical abilities surpassed yours. They were indeed as agile as animals -- nor were they unconscious.10 They simply dealt with a different kind of awareness.
quotes.translation: 它像动物一样，在其环境中能够完美运作。你会称之为无意识，因为它似乎不会推理。仅就本次讨论而言，想象一个拥有完全运作的身体意识的身体——并非因任何原因患病或天生缺陷——但没有你所拥有的那种主导性的自我导向意识。曾有物种具有这种性质。用你们的说法，它们看起来像梦游者，但它们的身体能力超越你们。它们确实像动物一样敏捷，也并非无意识。它们只是处理着不同种类的觉知。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: What you are pleased to call the subconscious represents merely the part of the inner senses, or of the inner self, that even your society can no longer ignore. And this is indeed only the surface. Here you find of course the repository for personal memories, and not of personal ego-bound conscious memories either, but also of psychological experiences that the ego itself prefers to forget.
quotes.translation: 你们乐于称之为潜意识的东西，仅仅代表了内在感官或内在自我的那一部分，即使是你们的社会也无法再忽视它。而这确实只是表面。在这里，你当然会发现个人记忆的储存库，不仅包括受限于自我的意识记忆，也包括自我本身宁愿遗忘的心理体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is this inner self, out of the massive knowledge and unlimited scope of its consciousness, that forms the physical world, that provides stimuli to keep the ego constantly at the job of awareness . It is the inner self, termed here the inner ego, that organizes, initiates, projects, controls the EE units of which we have been speaking lately, transforming energy into objects, into matter.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在自己，凭借其意识的庞大知识与无限范围，形成了物质世界，提供了刺激，使自我持续处于觉察的工作中。正是这个内在自己——此处称为内在自我——组织、启动、投射并控制我们近来所讨论的EE单位，将能量转化为物体，转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: While the cells required future and past data, and used it to form from that invisible tension the body's present corporal reality, the same kind of information could be a threat then to the ego consciousness, which could be overwhelmed. Within the corporal structure, however, there are indeed messages that leap too quickly or too slowly2 from your viewpoint to allow for any physical response. In that way cellular comprehension is allowed its free flow; but the selectivity mentioned (in sessions 682-3) bypasses such information, so that it does not conflict with present sense data requiring physical action in time.
quotes.translation: 虽然细胞需要未来与过去的数据，并利用这些数据从那种无形的张力中形成身体的当下物质实相，但同样的信息对自我意识而言可能构成威胁，因为它可能被淹没。然而，在物质结构内部，确实存在一些信息，从你的视角来看，它们跳跃得太快或太慢，以至于无法引发任何身体反应。这样，细胞的理解得以自由流动；但（第682-3节中）提到的选择性则绕过了这类信息，使其不与需要及时身体行动的当下感官数据相冲突。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The inner self, feeling itself part of action, is aware of facets of reality of which the ego is ignorant. It knows that roles can be reversed. There is so much here to be explained, and so many questions that must be answered. For I tell you, at the risk of being misunderstood grossly, that there is only one reality, and value fulfillment, which you may, if you like, equate with goodness.
quotes.translation: 内在自己，感觉自身是行动的一部分，觉察到自我所不知的现实面向。它知道角色可以互换。这里有太多需要解释之处，也有太多必须回答的问题。因为我告诉你，冒着被严重误解的风险，只有一个实相与价值完成，你若愿意，可将其等同于善。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: (Another one-minute pause.) Give us a moment ... The "unknown" reality sustains you and the web of life as you understand it. Your conscious concepts must enlarge so that the conscious self can understand its true nature. As you think of it, consciousness is barely -- barely -- half developed. It has learned to identify with one small group of neurologically accepted responses. Portions of the brain not used lie latent, waiting for the recognition that will trigger them into activity (intently). When this happens, the mind will become aware of the rich bed of probabilities upon which the ego now rides so blindly.
quotes.translation: （又停顿一分钟。）稍等片刻……“未知”的实相支撑着你，也支撑着你所理解的生命之网。你的意识概念必须扩展，使意识自己能够理解其真实本质。如你所想，意识几乎——几乎——只开发了一半。它已学会认同于一小群神经学上可接受的反应。大脑未使用的部分潜伏着，等待那将触发它们活动的认知（专注地）。当这发生时，心智将意识到自我如今如此盲目驾驭的丰富概率之床。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The characteristics of the ego therefore change as various situations are met. The term ego, implying one phenomena, is therefore confusing. What was ego today may belong to the subconscious tomorrow. Any attempt at rigidity is therefore defeating.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我的特征会随着各种情境的遭遇而改变。“自我”这个术语暗示单一现象，因此令人困惑。今日的自我可能属于明日的潜意识。任何僵化的企图因此都是自败的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: These directions are not forced upon action by any laws. They are merely the resultant patterns with which energy expresses itself. You are only familiar as a rule with this impetus, or these directions, in rather shallow manners, for the ego prefers not to perceive them. These motions are merely the flow which action takes. What you term negative suggestions are usually impeding actions, or directions of action which impede the main directive inner flow. They operate then in much the same manner as crosscurrents, setting up blockages, and impeding main energies by dividing them in several diverse directions.
quotes.translation: 这些方向并非由任何法则强加于行动之上。它们仅仅是能量表达自身时产生的模式。通常，你们只以相当肤浅的方式熟悉这种动力或这些方向，因为自我倾向于不去感知它们。这些运动只是行动所采取的流动。你们所谓的负面暗示通常是阻碍行动，或阻碍内在主要指令流动的行动方向。它们运作的方式与逆流非常相似，设置障碍，并通过将主要能量分散到几个不同方向来阻碍它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In dreams, when you expect none, none appear. Out of body experiences indeed can be a health boon. Your system is automatically relaxed and free of pressure. Also, incidentally, free of time. It does not age during a projection; that is, the body does not age. It is in suspension. Any interpretations that are made are made by consciousness itself. The physical senses are not， underline not, utilized. At the moment of perception the traveling consciousness perceives through the inner senses, and by itself automatically makes the necessary adjustments so that the ego can perceive the data in its accustomed way.
quotes.translation: 在梦中，当你没有期待时，它们就不会出现。出体体验确实可以成为健康的恩赐。你的系统会自动放松，没有压力。顺便说一句，也没有时间。在投射期间，它不会老化；也就是说，身体不会老化。它处于悬浮状态。任何诠释都是由意识本身做出的。物质感官没有被使用，请注意，没有被使用。在感知的瞬间，旅行中的意识通过内在感官感知，并自动做出必要的调整，以便自我能够以它习惯的方式感知数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The reason that direct inner experience is often cut off and rarely sustained is that the ego almost immediately clamps down to examine the phenomena; and, Joseph, the bulk of the sessions is somewhat shorter for two reasons. For one thing I am getting the data through to Ruburt in a clearer, more concise fashion, and thereby dispensing with many unnecessary phrases. Also, I do not have to backtrack as frequently. I have given you some shorter sessions, though not many, because of your own changed schedule, and because I work through your energies, your combined energies, in a way that I have yet to explain.
quotes.translation: 直接内在体验之所以常被切断且难以持续，原因在于自我几乎立即介入并开始检视这些现象；约瑟，许多课节之所以较短，有两个原因。其一，我正在以更清晰、更简洁的方式将资料传递给鲁柏，从而省去了许多不必要的措辞。其二，我不必像以前那样频繁地回溯。我给你们上过一些较短的课节，虽然不多，部分是因为你们自己时间安排的变化，也因为我正以一种我尚未解释的方式，通过你们的能量——你们结合的能量——来运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The outer ego then remains at the end a controller and director of those strengths which it gathered about itself during its particular existence. But even this is not the end. It, that is it meaning the outer ego, can even continue growth and development after a particular existence, according to its inherent ability and according to its ability to communicate with the basic inner self.
quotes.translation: 外在自我最终仍是一个控制器和指挥者，掌控着它在特定存在期间所聚集的那些力量。但即便如此，也并非终点。它——即外在自我——甚至可以在特定存在之后，根据其内在能力以及它与基本内在自我沟通的能力，继续成长和发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now. The conscious self responds without knowing it, often changing course and direction, to these dreams of which he is often not aware. The ego, the conscious ego, the so-called conscious self, is only the front man in the front lines, supported by multitudinous areas or portions of himself that he does not know, and whose messages come to him only through the correspondence of dreams.
quotes.translation: 现在。意识自我在不知不觉中回应着这些他通常意识不到的梦境，常常改变其进程和方向。自我，意识自我，所谓的意识自我，只是前线的代言人，由他自身众多未知的领域或部分所支持，而这些部分的信息只能通过梦境的对应传递给他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I am using you here and the physician probability as an example. Art, you see, is also closely connected with healing. The projections of which I spoke do happen occasionally and spontaneously on both of your parts. Various aspects of the personality are being developed, you see. Reincarnation is but a part of this probability system, the part that falls within your particular universe. This all involves value fulfillment, which is at its basis. It is obvious then that you perceive consciously only a small part of your own overall reality. The doctor obviously has his own ego, though not within your system.
quotes.translation: 我在此以你和那位医师的概率为例。艺术，你看，也与疗愈紧密相连。我所说的投射确实偶尔会在你们双方身上自发发生。你看，人格的各个面向正在被发展。转世只是这个概率系统的一部分，是落在你们特定宇宙内的那部分。这一切都涉及价值完成，这是其基础。那么显而易见，你只会有意识地感知到自己整体实相的一小部分。那位医师显然拥有他自己的自我，尽管不在你们的系统内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Your ego gains assurance from what seems to be the memory of its immediate past. A man who loses memory of past events feels insecure and lost, but other types of personality gestalts operate far differently. Instead of a time sequence that governs or seems to govern thought, mental activity of any kind, and overt action, you have associative processes, offshoots, and possibilities. To some extent you can gain an idea of this through an examination of your own stream of consciousness. But the comparison is highly superficial, for here too continuity reigns, even though associations are given greater play.
quotes.translation: 你的自我从看似是其直接过去的记忆中获得了确信。一个失去过去事件记忆的人会感到不安全与迷失，但其他类型的人格完形运作方式则大相径庭。取代了支配或看似支配思想、任何心智活动及外在行为的时间序列，你拥有联想过程、分支与可能性。在某种程度上，你可以通过检视自己的意识流来获得对此的理解。但这种比较是极为肤浅的，因为即使联想被赋予更大的发挥空间，连续性仍然主宰着一切。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: He has been reading various sections of the material, including portions having to do with the ego, personality and action, and you see attempted to set himself aside from the action in which his whole personality was intimately involved. As impossible [to do] as the ego's general attempt to insist upon some sort of permanent, unchanging, stable identity, since it is composed of action.
quotes.translation: 他一直在阅读资料的各个部分，包括与自我、人格和行动相关的部分，你看，他试图将自己置身于其整个人格密切参与的行动之外。这就像自我普遍试图坚持某种永久、不变、稳定的身份一样不可能，因为它是由行动构成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Now, the strong ego structure has been adopted as a necessary guard and protection to hold the abilities in check until the present personality learned to develop its abilities to a sufficient level. For the energy behind the personality could have swept the temporary psychological (word missed here) ... apart until sufficient preparation had been carried on. So do not berate that ego.
quotes.translation: 现在，强大的自我结构已被视为必要的守卫与保护，用以约束能力，直到当前人格学会将其能力发展到足够水平。因为人格背后的能量本可轻易摧毁那暂时的心理结构……直到充分的准备完成。所以，不要责难那个自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: The early Hebrew god became a symbol of man's unleashed ego. God behaved exactly as an enraged child would, had he those powers, sending thunder and lightning and fire against his enemies, destroying them. Man's emerging ego therefore brought forth emotional and psychological problems and challenges. The sense of separation from nature grew. Nature became a tool to use against others.
quotes.translation: 早期希伯来神祇成为人类释放自我的象征。若拥有那些力量，神的行为正如同暴怒的孩童——降下雷霆闪电与烈火攻击敌人，将其毁灭。因此，人类正在浮现的自我带来了情感与心理层面的问题与挑战。与自然分离的感受日益增强。自然沦为对抗他人的工具。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There are certain requirements as you remember that must be met, upon your plane and upon others. Yet an ego, an outer ego, cannot choose to be an entity in any case until its comprehension attains a certain degree. And now, my dear patient Joseph, may I tell you also that you are part of that same entity; and this is one of the main reasons why I am able to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: 如你所忆，在你们层面及其他层面，必须满足某些条件。然而，一个自我，一个外在自我，在其理解力达到一定程度之前，无论如何都无法选择成为一个存有。现在，我亲爱的耐心约瑟夫，请容我告诉你，你也是那同一个存有的一部分；这也是我能够与你们两人沟通的主要原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You withdraw yourself to a large extent from the physical field of actuality, but you do not only withdraw from the physical system. You enter other fields of actuality. Sleep is far from a negative state. In the sleep state there are as you know several stages. Some of these you call dream states, because the ego is aware upon awakening that some kind of Mental activity has occurred.
quotes.translation: 你在很大程度上从物质实相领域抽离，但你并非仅从物质系统抽离。你进入了其他实相领域。睡眠远非一种消极状态。如你所知，睡眠状态包含数个阶段。其中有些阶段你称之为梦境状态，因为自我在醒来时意识到某种心智活动曾经发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Personal identity, the basic "I", is a product of the subconscious, and as such it exists as an actuality within the electric field; because of this it is basically independent of the physical field, held to it mainly by the ego. The ego directs the identity toward physical orientation. This is an important point.
quotes.translation: 个人身份，即基本的"我"，是潜意识的产品，因此它作为电性场中的实相存在；正因如此，它基本上独立于物质场，主要借由自我维系于物质场。自我将身份导向物质取向。这是重要的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Joy and the spontaneous expression of it will always bring increased strength and resiliency to the personality. It also brings deep and abiding satisfaction to the subconscious, which is much more joyful than it is given credit for. The subconscious, for example, the personal subconscious, takes great pleasure in its manipulation of the physical fibers in locomotion. The expression of joy also makes the ego more resilient, less fearful, less resentful of diverse conditions when they occur. The emotion itself is an automatic signal that unites the conscious and subconscious in shared experience.
quotes.translation: 喜悦及其自发性表达，总会为个性带来增强的力量与韧性。它也为潜意识带来深刻而持久的满足——潜意识比人们通常认为的要喜悦得多。例如，个人潜意识在操控身体纤维进行运动时，会获得极大乐趣。喜悦的表达还能让自我更具弹性，减少恐惧，并在面对各种状况时减少怨恨。这种情绪本身就是一个自动信号，将意识与潜意识在共享体验中联结起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: A note. The material was not distorted when Ruburt gave the April 15th date in connection with Miss Callahan, and the crisis of which I spoke. Her ego has given up the struggle. It realizes that it will not be liquidated. Moments of lucidity will flash and die away. She is basically satisfied now, realizing from direct experience of her own that death involves a transformation, and if there is an ending in your terms, then there is also a new beginning.
quotes.translation: 附注：当鲁柏在四月十五日提及卡拉汉小姐及我所说的危机时，资料并未失真。她的自我已放弃挣扎，意识到自己不会被消灭。清醒的时刻会闪现又消逝。她现在基本感到满足，从自身直接经验中明白死亡涉及一种转化——若以你们的说法存在终结，那么也必然存在新的开始。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The authors made several excellent points, without however carrying the main point in any actuality. They conceive of the psychological structure as a gestalt, dominated by the ego, formed by various needs and potentialities. When the dominating ego relaxes its control for any reason or becomes weakened, then according to their concept any one of the subsidiary groups may take over.
quotes.translation: 作者们提出了几个精妙观点，却未能真正触及核心。他们将心理结构视为由自我主导的完形，由各种需求与潜能构成。当主导的自我因任何原因放松控制或变得虚弱时，根据他们的概念，任何附属群体都可能接管主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: These fears do not belong to the subconscious. Then these materializations of panic and pain play about the physical body, projected by the ego and stealing the powers of the subconscious mind from their natural constructive tasks to do so. In other words, the ego becomes a tool to disrupt rather than to create.
quotes.translation: 这些恐惧并不属于潜意识。于是这些恐慌与痛苦的具象化在肉体周围游荡，由自我投射而出，并窃取潜意识心智的力量，使其偏离自然的建设性任务来达成此目的。换言之，自我成了破坏而非创造的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The ego is that portion of the self which experiences time as continuity, and to whom experience is a series of stimuli and responses carried on one after another. And yet this is in itself a division, so to speak, or a kind of value fulfillment, for the simultaneous nature of a given action is here experienced in slow motion, as a child must learn to walk before the child can run.
quotes.translation: 自我是自体的一部分，它将时间体验为连续性，对自我而言，体验是一连串相继发生的刺激与反应。然而，这本身可以说是一种分割，或一种价值完成，因为在此，一个特定行动的同步本质被以慢动作体验，正如孩子必须先学会走路才能奔跑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Consciousness cannot be separated from mobility. It is true that you focus within the physical system mainly, yet the inner self is highly mobile and embarks simultaneously upon a variety of projections. The closest example in your experience of this mobility is the dream situation. These dreams make little impression upon the waking consciousness unless you train it and take it with you as far as it can go. It is then able to translate the dream reality at least in part. In the psychedelic experience the ego can be trained to act in the same manner. Later it can serve as an interpreter.
quotes.translation: 意识无法与流动性分离。诚然，你主要聚焦于物质系统内，但内在自体具有高度流动性，并同时进行多种投射。在你们的经验中，这种流动性最接近的例子是梦境情境。除非你训练清醒意识并尽可能带它同行，否则这些梦对清醒意识影响甚微。清醒意识至少能部分翻译梦之实相。在迷幻体验中，自我可被训练以同样方式运作，随后能担任翻译者角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The deeply and strongly dimensioned sphere I used as an analogy for an action, if you recall, for any portion of action; you can now indeed further imagine one entity being composed of such an action, with egos like many faces looking outward in all directions, and each perceiving vastly different fields of reality; looking inward and outward, backward and forward as it were, through and beyond. And yet each action, or entity, is a part of another, and is both within and without another. And none of it is meaningless, and yet in a basic manner all of it has the meaning that you give it.
quotes.translation: 我曾用深度与广度兼具的球体来比喻行动——若你记得，它代表任何行动片段；现在你确实可进一步想象，一个存有由这样的行动构成，其自我如同许多面向外张望的脸孔，各自感知截然不同的实相领域；仿佛向内向外、前后穿越地观照。然而每个行动或存有都是另一存有的一部分，既在另一存有之内又在其外。这一切皆非无意义，但根本上，它拥有你赋予它的意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Consider this analogy: The self as a moving circle, such as a Ferris wheel. A tree in front of the wheel will represent physical reality. The whole self, or the whole wheel, is composed of many selves in various positions, as the many people who sit on the Ferris wheel. As the wheel turns you call the person or the self who faces the tree the ego, simply because this is the portion that faces physical reality, represented by our tree. But the self who faces the tree one moment is not the self that faces it the next moment, and the operator of the wheel is never in evidence, you see.
quotes.translation: 试想这个比喻：自体如同移动的圆环，譬如摩天轮。轮前的树代表物质实相。整个自体（或整个轮子）由处于不同位置的许多自体组成，如同摩天轮上众多乘客。当轮子转动时，你称面向树的那个人或自体为"自我"，只因这是面向物质实相（以我们的树为代表）的部分。但此刻面向树的自体并非下一刻面向树的自体，而轮子的操控者始终隐而不现，你明白吗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Action can be experienced directly, however, but only when no effort is made to tamper with it. It must be plunged into. Once more, action is not a function of structure. Action is inseparable from structure. Structure is action. Identities are action, as I have explained. Your idea of action as it occurs within dreams comes closer to the real nature of action than does your idea of muscular force. For in dreams the ego makes little attempt to impede action. Though in dreams you see or feel your arm move, your legs run, still the arm and the legs of the physical body may not move.
quotes.translation: 然而，行动可以直接被体验，但只有当你不试图干预它时才能如此。你必须投身其中。再次强调，行动并非结构的功能。行动与结构不可分割。结构即是行动。身份认同即是行动，正如我之前解释过的。你对行动的理解，若以梦境中的行动为参照，比以肌肉力量为参照更接近行动的真实本质。因为在梦境中，自我几乎不试图阻碍行动。尽管在梦中你看见或感觉到手臂移动、双腿奔跑，但物质身体的手臂和双腿可能并未移动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This is a responsibility laid upon you by the code of limitations which the ego itself has adopted as a part of its own nature. You may find it most difficult to follow me here without any strong affirmation.
