However, as you do not blame, as you do not morally blame the wind for the tumultuous hurricane, and as you do not punish the wind, so you must somehow manage to understand that a wrongdoer, in your eyes, is no more or less to blame than this. It would be foolhardy to ignore the results of such activity. Nevertheless, I tell you now that there is much you do not see or know.
quotes.translation: 这是自我所采纳的限制法则赋予你的责任，这些法则已成为其自身本质的一部分。若无强烈的肯定，你可能会觉得很难跟上我的思路。然而，正如你不会责怪风——不会在道德上谴责飓风的狂暴，也不会惩罚风一样，你必须设法理解：在你眼中，一个做错事的人，其应受责备的程度与风并无二致。忽视此类行为的结果是鲁莽的。尽管如此，我现在告诉你，有许多事情是你未曾看见或知晓的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: All right now. You may be interested to some degree, dear Doctor Instream, in the sort of personality through whom I speak. I wanted a personality who was at the same time both intelligent and intuitional. I wanted an ego which was well balanced, healthy and strong. Yet I also wanted a personality which would allow itself the spontaneity necessary, and the inner freedom, so that such communications could take place. A personality without basic stability would not serve my purposes, and a personality that was too rigid in its beliefs and abilities would not serve my purposes well.
quotes.translation: 好了。亲爱的因斯特里姆博士，你或许对我借以说话的这个人格类型有些兴趣。我想要一个既聪慧又直觉敏锐的人格。我想要一个平衡、健康且强大的自我。但同时，我也想要一个能允许自身具备必要自发性与内在自由的人格，以使这类沟通得以发生。一个缺乏基本稳定的人格无法满足我的目的，而一个信念与能力过于僵化的人格也无法很好地服务于我的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In the dreaming state and in other states of consciousness, he can indeed to some degree become aware of perceptions which will be neglected by the ego alone. In other words, psychologically there is only one portion of self A that is limited in its perceptions to the physical dimension, and that is the ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态及其他意识状态中，他确实能在某种程度上觉察到单靠自我会忽略的感知。换言之，从心理学角度来看，只有自我这一部分自体将感知局限于物质层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Your own experiments in psychological time have allowed you, to some extent, to experience within yourselves such unimpeded action. You know now that the ego, because of its nature, attempts to set itself aside from action. It obviously cannot do so. The ego, being part of action, nevertheless affects the nature of action as seen in the various manifestations of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 你们在心理时间中的实验，已让你们在某种程度上体验到自身内部这种不受阻碍的行动。你们现在明白，自我因其本性试图将自己与行动分离，但它显然无法做到。作为行动的一部分，自我仍会影响整个自体在不同显现中所展现的行动本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now when this ego becomes overly concerned over practical matters it becomes overly conditioned to negative responses. The outer senses are not as quick or as fluent. The creative energies build up their thickly-dimensioned pseudo realities of pain. For a certain amount of time, according to your condition, they automatically create the patterns of fear that belong to the ego.
quotes.translation: 当这个自我过度关注实际事务时，它就会过度受制于负面反应。外在感官变得不再那么敏捷或流畅。创造性能量累积起它们那浓密维度的痛苦伪实相。根据你的状况，在一段时间内，它们会自动创造出属于自我的恐惧模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience is a most fruitful one. Drugs are not a prerequisite however. In an experience without drugs, the ego loses its substantial quality momentarily. It remains however as a protection. In all our work we have been allowing the nonphysical self more and more freedom. We have been and we are expanding consciousness, and this consciousness includes the ego.
quotes.translation: 迷幻体验是最富有成果的体验之一。然而药物并非先决条件。在无药物的体验中，自我会暂时失去其实质特性。但它仍作为保护而存在。在我们所有的工作中，我们一直在给予非我性自体越来越多的自由。我们一直在且正在扩展意识，而这个意识包含了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: They are more than prehistoric. They are in some respects evolutionary developments, being the end portions of the inner senses transformed to some degree, to permit manipulation of camouflage pattern. Before the conscious ego evolved, emotion served well as necessary stimuli to action in the camouflage environment. I am trying to put over the thought here in one way or another that as the inner senses come more and more within the field of the whole self on your plane, they take on its characteristics while yet retaining within themselves their own characteristics.
quotes.translation: 它们比史前更古老。在某些方面，它们是进化发展的产物，是内在感官的末端部分经过某种程度的转化，以便操控伪装模式。在有意识的自我进化之前，情感在伪装环境中作为行动的必要刺激物已足够。我正试图以某种方式传达这个想法：当内在感官越来越多地进入你们层面上的整体自体的领域时，它们会呈现出该领域的特性，同时在其内部仍保留自身的特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The objects that you will see and the places that you will visit, in dream or out-of-body experiences, are basically as real as any physical object or location, because neither are basically real. Nor of course are they unreal. As soon as you begin to translate an idea you are distorting it. The inner senses you see do not distort the data, but when you attempt to make such data available to the ego, then distortion to some extent must enter in.
quotes.translation: 你在梦境或出体经验中看到的事物与造访的地点，本质上与任何物质实体或地点同样真实，因为两者皆非根本真实。当然它们也并非不真实。当你开始将某个理念转化为具体形式时，便已扭曲了它。内在感官不会扭曲资料，但当你试图让这类资料为自我意识所理解时，某种程度的扭曲必然会产生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The choice was made and is always made by the inner ego, who does this appointing according to his knowledge, or its knowledge, of the personality's qualities. Any of these subconscious personalities could have learned in some fashion to cope with the outside world as well as the present dominant ego, but for various reasons of inner development they could not be so trusted.
quotes.translation: 这个选择由内在自我做出，且始终如此。内在自我根据其对人格特质的认知来指派。这些潜意识人格中的任何一个，本可学会以某种方式应对外在世界，如同当前主导的自我意识一般，但基于内在发展的种种缘由，它们无法被如此信任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In light of the excerpts to come in this appendix from the 44th session, it should be noted that when Seth used the term "camouflage," he referred not only to our physical world as one of the forms (or camouflages) taken by basic reality, but to another kind of time as well -- the medium of successive moments the outer ego is used to, and in which our ordinary world exists.
quotes.translation: 参照本附录后续第44次课的摘录，需注意当赛斯使用"伪装"一词时，不仅指我们的物质世界是根本实相所采取的形式（或伪装）之一，更指向另一种时间——即外在自我所习惯的连续片刻媒介，我们的寻常世界便存在于其中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: It goes without saying that there are electromagnetic connections between the ego and the subconscious, within the physical system. Again, we speak of the ego and the subconscious as separate merely for the sake of convenience. They merely are interchanges and mass identity centers where highly intricate self-translations take place, and where various transformations occur.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，在物质系统内，自我与潜意识之间存在着电磁连接。再次说明，我们为了方便起见才将自我与潜意识分开讨论。它们不过是高度复杂的自我转化与各种转变发生的交换站与质量认同中心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The subconscious, so-called, is aware to some extent of the ego, regarding it as an extension of itself, over which it does not have as much control as it would like. This is precisely however the way the ego views the subconscious, as a rule. These two self-conscious portions of the self simply happen to coincide or to coexist with some proximity, psychologically speaking.
quotes.translation: 所谓的潜意识在某种程度上觉察到自我，将其视为自身的延伸，但对其的控制力却不如己愿。而这恰恰是自我看待潜意识的惯常方式。从心理学角度而言，这两个自我的意识部分恰好以某种邻近性共存或并存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Now at times I will be using the term "camouflage," referring to the physical world to which the outer ego relates, for physical form is one of the camouflages that reality adopts. The camouflage is real, and yet there is a much greater reality within it -- the vitality that gave it form. Your physical senses then allow you to perceive this camouflage, for they are attuned to it in a highly specialized manner. But to sense the reality within the form requires a different sort of attention, and more delicate manipulations than the physical senses provide.
quotes.translation: 我有时会使用"伪装"一词，指涉外在自我所关联的物质世界，因为物质形态是实相所采用的伪装之一。这伪装是真实的，但其内部存在着更伟大的实相——赋予它形态的生命力。你的物质感官让你得以感知这种伪装，因为它们以高度专门化的方式与之调谐。但要感知形态内部的实相，则需要不同于物质感官所提供的另一种注意力，以及更精微的操作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The inner and outer egos do not have a cementlike relationship, but can interrelate with each other in almost infinite fashions, still preserving the reality of physical experience, but varying the accents put upon it by the inner areas of subjective life. Even the bare-seeming facts of history are experienced far differently according to the symbolic content within which they are inevitably immersed. A war, in your terms, can be practically experienced as a murderous disaster, a triumph of savagery--or as a sublime victory of the human spirit over evil.
quotes.translation: 内在自我与外在自我之间并非水泥般凝固的关系，它们能以近乎无限的方式相互关联，既保持物质经验的真实性，又通过主观生命的内在领域改变其重点。即便是看似赤裸的历史事实，也会根据其必然浸染的象征内容而被截然不同地体验。用你们的话来说，一场战争既可能被实际体验为一场杀戮灾难、野蛮的胜利，也可能被体验为人类精神战胜邪恶的崇高胜利。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The ego is not aware of the manner in which dreams are created. Neither is it aware of the manner in which the inner self creates physical matter. Neither, therefore, is it aware of those distortions that cause it to construct faults within physical matter, for in all cases the physical matter of the human body will be subconsciously created in line with inner conditions.
quotes.translation: 自我并不知晓梦境被创造的方式，也不知晓内在自我创造物质的方式。因此，它同样不了解那些导致它在物质中构建缺陷的扭曲——因为在所有情况下，人类身体的物质都将根据内在状态被潜意识地创造出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: But you have on a subconscious level all the knowledge and experience of your previous selves upon which to build. Your dreams are free from the restrictions imposed by your ego, and your dreams affect your daily life much more than you know. For situations appear in them that affect your actions, and these are elements from your own previous selves. This is a large subject; but though I can tell you some things about your future, the future is not predestined, and subconsciously you are well aware yourself of what will happen, and all human beings are.
quotes.translation: 但在潜意识层面，你拥有所有前世自我的全部知识与经验作为基础。你的梦境不受自我施加的限制，而梦对你日常生活的影响远超你的认知。因为梦中会出现影响你行动的情境，这些元素来自你自身的前世自我。这是个庞大的课题；虽然我能告诉你一些关于未来的事，但未来并非注定，而潜意识中你早已清楚将会发生什么——所有人类皆是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Because you are obsessed with the idea of time as past, present and future, you are forced to think of reincarnations as strung out one before the other, and indeed we speak of past lives simply because you are used to the time sequence concept. What you have of course, loosely speaking, is something like the developments narrated in The Three Faces of Eve. You have various dominant egos, all part of an inner identity, dominant in various existences. To make the concept understandable to you it is convenient to speak of past and future reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 由于你执着于过去、现在、未来的时间观念，你被迫认为转世是前后相继的线性排列，我们之所以谈论前世，确实只因你习惯时间序列的概念。粗略来说，你所拥有的更像是《三面夏娃》中叙述的发展模式——你拥有多个主导性自我，皆属同一内在身份，在不同存在中占据主导。为使你理解这个概念，方便起见才谈论过去与未来的转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The personality itself, as you know, is a gestalt of action, and as such it is necessary that the flow of action within it follow the overall directives of the entity and the inner self. When for example the ego is allowed to apply too tightly and too rigorously its inhibitory functions, then this freedom of action within the personality is seriously divided and impeded.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身是行动完形，因此其内部行动之流必须遵循存有与内在自我的整体指令。例如当自我被允许过度严苛地运用其抑制功能时，人格内部的行动自由便会严重分裂与受阻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: No action can be considered by itself. There is no solitary action. Such a possibility is basically meaningless. Nor does a tension exist in isolation. In all of these matters there is also constant pulsations of action within the outer ego, the inner ego, and all the other aspects of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何行动可以被单独看待。没有孤立的行动。这种可能性基本上毫无意义。紧张状态也不会孤立存在。在所有这些问题中，外在自我、内在自我以及整体自我的所有其他面向内部，也存在着持续的行动脉动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: We are dealing here, again, merely with the various aspects of action. As a personality itself is an action gestalt, within the inner self there is a capsule comprehension of the purposes and intents of the whole personality. These are indeed within the very structure, both psychic and physical, of the personality itself. The ego, on its own as a separate unit, does not have such data, although since it is after all a portion of the whole self, it does have such information available. But when it acts as a unit it does not use such information.
quotes.translation: 我们在此再次处理的只是行动的各种面向。正如人格本身是一个行动完形，在内在自我内部存在着对整体人格的目的与意图的胶囊式理解。这些确实存在于人格本身的心理与物理结构中。自我作为一个独立的单位，并不拥有这样的数据，尽管它毕竟是整体自我的一部分，确实可以获得这些信息。但当它作为一个单位运作时，它并不使用这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now. Your stereophonic setting can be compared to what we have termed the inner ego. Now each of these selves experience time in their own manner, and as you should see by now this only means that they build their own realities according to the nature of their own perceptions. But the nature of their own perceptions is not chaotic. The portions of the self are so constructed, so to speak, that when the stereophonic channel is turned on the selves then know their unity. Their various realities merge in the overall perceptions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们的立体声设定可以比作我们所说的内在自我。现在，这些自我中的每一个都以自己的方式体验时间，而正如你们现在应该明白的，这仅意味着它们根据自己感知的本质构建自己的实相。但它们感知的本质并非混乱无序。可以这么说，自我的各个部分被如此建构，以至于当立体声频道开启时，这些自我便知晓它们的统一性。它们各自不同的实相在整体自我的全面感知中融合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: I would suggest that you keep up a closer correspondence with your younger brother on a personal basis, and I suggest this rather strongly. I would also suggest that you visit your younger brother much more frequently than you have in the past, and indeed that you do not let more than two months go by before you visit him for a weekend. Unlike you and Loren, he does not have a strongly developed ego core to protect him. He is somewhat like a snail without a shell, and could benefit strongly by your affection, shown in a more practical manner.
quotes.translation: 我建议你与弟弟保持更密切的个人联系，这个建议相当强烈。我也建议你比过去更频繁地探望他，实际上，你应确保不超过两个月就去看望他共度周末。与你和洛伦不同，他尚未发展出强大的自我核心来保护自己。他有点像没有壳的蜗牛，你若能以更实际的方式表达关爱，将对他大有裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The package of experience that you can focus upon and make sense of, is indeed composed of many small packages, but the whole package of reality is actually much larger than this. There is however a portion of the self that can and does experience events in an entirely different fashion, and this portion of the self goes off on a different tangent. For when our individual perceives event X, this other portion of the self branches off, so to speak, into all the other probable events that could have been just as easily experienced by the ego.
quotes.translation: 你能聚焦并理解的经验包，确实由许多小包组成，但实相的整体包实际上远大于此。然而，自我有一部分能够且确实以完全不同的方式体验事件，这部分自我会沿着不同的切线偏离。因为当我们的个体感知事件X时，这另一部分自我会分支出去，可以说，进入所有其他同样容易被自我体验到的可能事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: This requires on the egos part an excellent ability to perceive correctly the elements of the physical situation, to express it in terms that the subconscious can understand, and to deliver the message properly. The subconscious will then break the physical data given to it down into its psychic components, translate it into symbols; and the inner self, at the request of the subconscious, will then focus all of the energies at its command to deliver the most acceptable solution, taking the entire needs of the whole self into consideration.
quotes.translation: 这需要自我部分具备卓越能力，能正确感知物质情境中的元素，以潜意识可理解的方式表达，并妥善传递信息。随后潜意识会将接收到的物质数据分解为心灵成分，转化为象征符号；而内在自我在潜意识的要求下，会调动所有可支配的能量，在考量整体自我的全部需求后，提供最可行的解决方案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You remember this from our material on action and the personality. The ego therefore is pleased when information is proven correct. (Long pause.) If the nature of perception were clearly understood then the nature of reality as you know it would also be understood much more clearly. Only half the process of perception, so-called, is even considered, however. Only half of the circle is known. The entire circle consists of those projections outward that form events, as well as the mechanisms by which the events are then physically perceived.
quotes.translation: 你应记得我们关于行动与人格的资料。因此当信息被证实正确时，自我会感到愉悦。（长停顿。）若感知的本质能被清晰理解，那么你所认知的现实本质也将被更透彻地理解。然而所谓感知过程，通常仅有一半被纳入考量。这个圆环仅有一半为人所知。完整的圆环既包含向外投射形成事件的过程，也包含事件随后被物质感知的机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: (10:45.) Behind all faces there is one face, yet this does not mean that each man's face is not his own. The further religious drama of which I have spoken, in your terms still to come, represents another stage in both the internal and external dramas in which the emergent ego becomes aware of much of its heritage. While maintaining its own status, it will be able to have much greater commerce with other portions of the self, and also to offer to the inner self opportunities of awareness that the inner self on its own could not procure.
quotes.translation: （10:45）所有面孔背后都有一张面孔，但这并不意味着每个人的面容不属于自己。我曾提及的宗教戏剧——按你们的说法尚未到来——代表着内外戏剧的新阶段：在此阶段，浮现的自我将逐渐认知其大部分遗产。在维持自身地位的同时，它将能与自我的其他部分建立更深入的交流，并能为内在自我提供其自身无法获得的觉知契机。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: A very delicate network of imbalances is here maintained. The ego must not be too rigid, or too much a disciplinarian, or it ceases to speak for the whole personality, and becomes a warden, imprisoning the main expressive urges of the deeper self. It must not on the other hand be composed of too disorganized a system of actions, for in this case it is not capable of maintaining a consistent sense of identity or purpose, and is not strong enough to act in a magnetic manner, that will attract or hold the basic energies of the personality.
quotes.translation: 此处维持着一套极为精微的不平衡网络。自我不能过于僵化，或成为过度的纪律执行者，否则它便不再代表整个人格发声，而沦为一名狱卒，禁锢深层自性主要的表达冲动。另一方面，它也不能由过于混乱的行动系统构成，因为在这种情况下，它无法维持连贯的认同感或目的感，也不够强大到能以磁性的方式运作，从而吸引或维系人格的基本能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Action may show itself as motion, but it is much more than motion in the terms which you usually use, and motion is but one small dimension within actions realm. All types of consciousness represent a different focus of energy's perception within itself. There is no past or future to action. All action is simultaneous. Identities, some identities and some forms of consciousness, particularly the ego, perceive a past or a present, but this is merely the result of the manner in which such identities and consciousness view available data.
quotes.translation: 行动可能表现为运动，但在你们通常使用的术语中，它远不止于运动，而运动只是行动领域内一个微小的维度。所有类型的意识都代表能量在其自身内部感知的不同焦点。行动没有过去或未来。所有行动都是同时发生的。身份——某些身份和某些形式的意识，尤其是自我——会感知到过去或现在，但这仅仅是此类身份和意识审视可用数据的方式所导致的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Because there is no time, as you think of time, we will not say that action retains a memory of all its previous actions or selves, for this would be misleading. Action is aware of itself in all of its spontaneous and simultaneous workings. The self that you are, in a basic sense, is the self that you were in past instances within this existence, the self or series of selves that you were in previous existences within the physical field, and also the myriad selves that you are now, in various perception experiences unknown to the ego.
quotes.translation: 因为不存在你们所理解的时间，所以我们不会说行动保留了其所有先前行动或自我的记忆，因为这会具有误导性。行动在其所有自发且同时的运作中知晓自身。从根本意义上说，你现在的自己，就是你在这一存在中过去时刻的那个自己，是你在物质领域内先前存在中的那个自己或一系列自己，也是你现在在自我未知的各种感知体验中的无数个自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It follows then that I am aware of the other Seth personality, and he of me. Because of your time misconceptions you make serious errors whenever you attempt any predictions into life after death, or life within other systems than your own. It is most difficult for you to conceive of an ego who experiences events not in serial form. When any contact is attempted in so-called mediumistic situations, then it is expected that the survival personality will "remember," in quotes, events as you do; but events no longer exist in that way.
quotes.translation: 因此，我意识到另一个赛斯人格的存在，他也意识到我的存在。由于你们对时间的误解，每当你们试图预测死后生命或自身系统之外的生命时，总会犯下严重错误。对你们而言，要构想一个不以序列形式体验事件的自我意识是极其困难的。当在所谓通灵情境中尝试任何接触时，人们期待幸存人格会像你们一样"记住"事件——但事件已不再以那种方式存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: If you will think （I hope） for simplicity's sake of the whole self as it exists on your plane with its physical body, conscious ego and inner self as one field unit, which is also part of the larger or more complete entity as one field unit within another, then perhaps it will not be too much for you to imagine the connection, or one of the connections, between the entity field and the whole-self field, which is on your plane as being the inner senses--that is, the inner senses are one of the connectives between these two fields.
quotes.translation: 为简便起见，我希望你们能将存在于你们层面的完整自我——包括其物质身体、意识自我和内在自我——视为一个场域单元，它同时又是更大或更完整存有这个场域单元的一部分。这样或许不难想象存有场域与完整自我场域之间的连接（或连接之一），即内在感官——换言之，内在感官正是这两个场域之间的连接纽带之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: This out ego, among its purposes, has the duty of expressing not only itself but to a lesser extent those various hidden personalities which compose the subconscious. In larger terms and in more comprehensive terms, the whole self, the whole field of the complete subconscious and inner self, reaches back to the entity. There is no end to the past projection or existence of the subconscious of any given self; and though it is not understood in your field, there is no end to the forward thrust of the subconscious of any given self.
quotes.translation: 这个外在自我，在其诸多目的中，不仅负有表达自身的职责，也在较小程度上表达构成潜意识的那些隐藏人格。从更宏观更全面的角度来看，完整自我——即完整潜意识与内在自我的完整场域——可回溯至存有。任何特定自我的潜意识，其过去的投射或存在永无止境；尽管这在你们的场域中不被理解，但任何特定自我潜意识的向前推进同样永无止境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego is so strong that it clings even to the new materialization. There are two faces of the same problem, you see. As I am sure you know, your father is not unhappy. You never knew your father. The man who was to have been your father left. This does not mean that you were an orphan in that respect, nor did he leave out of cruelty to you. Give me a moment here.
quotes.translation: 自我是如此强大，以至于它甚至紧抓着新的物质化不放。你看，这是同一问题的两面。我确信你知道，你父亲并非不快乐。你从未真正了解过你的父亲。那个本该成为你父亲的人离开了。这并不意味着你在那方面成了孤儿，他的离开也并非出于对你的残忍。请给我一点时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: I have explained somewhat earlier how the gestalt ego consciousness was formed, and to some degree explained its psychic composition, but there is much more to be said here. There is a steady and unwavering cooperation that exists, and it is the basis of your physical universe. You do not see this cooperation. Your senses are rather more equipped to notice difference and divergence than sameness; but nevertheless the cooperation of all conscious entities provides physical objects with whatever appearance of permanence they have.
quotes.translation: 我之前已稍作解释，整体自我意识是如何形成的，并在某种程度上说明了它的心灵构成，但这里还有许多要说的。存在着一种稳定而坚定的合作，它是你们物质宇宙的基础。你们看不到这种合作。你们的感官更擅长注意差异和分歧，而非相同之处；然而，所有有意识实体的合作，为物质对象提供了它们所拥有的任何表面上的持久性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: One more point. The ulcer for example has reality upon many levels, and must be dealt with in a like manner, for it is not enough to handle it even from the viewpoint of the present ego; for indeed causes are involved of which the present ego must necessarily be mainly ignorant. The inner self however has at its command all these reasoning's, and all these causes.
quotes.translation: 还有一点。例如，溃疡在许多层面上都具有实相，必须以类似的方式处理，因为即使从当前自我的角度来看，处理它也是不够的；确实涉及到的原因，当前自我必然主要对此一无所知。然而，内在自我掌握着所有这些推理和所有这些原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You do not know the self as it is within physical existence, and until you do you cannot hope to know what survives physical death, or what part of you is awake while the ego sleeps. When I refer to the ego I do so for simplicity's sake, since the term has meaning to you. There are obviously portions of the self that never operate directly within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 你并不了解在物质存在中的自我本身，除非你了解它，否则你无法期望知道什么在肉体死亡后仍能存活，或当自我沉睡时你的哪一部分是清醒的。我提及自我只是为了简便起见，因为这个词对你们有意义。显然，自我的某些部分从未在物质实相中直接运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Ego also fears spontaneity, for it cannot control action; being a part of action, most of its efforts of necessity are thwarted. Yet it is precisely this struggle between ego's struggles for stability, and the personality's attempt to expand spontaneously, that is at the basis of much of mankind's achievements, and that is certainly the basis for much of his art.
quotes.translation: 自我也恐惧自发性，因为它无法控制行动；作为行动的一部分，它的大部分努力必然受挫。然而，正是自我为稳定而挣扎与人格试图自发扩展之间的这种冲突，构成了人类许多成就的基础，也无疑是其许多艺术的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: At the furthest or innermost area then, we come to the inner ego, which would then be separated from the outer ego by the buffer of the subconscious. Now it goes without saying that we speak here merely for conveniences sake, for all these areas are not indeed so neatly divided; but to explain their various purposes we must therefore speak of them in this manner.
quotes.translation: 因此，在最外层或最内层的区域，我们来到了内在自我，它通过潜意识的缓冲与外在自我分离。不言而喻，我们在此仅为方便起见而讨论，因为所有这些区域实际上并非如此整齐地划分；但为了解释它们各自的目的，我们必须以这种方式来谈论它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: We come here also to one of the other causes of the dreaming state, beside those of which we have spoken in the past. The mind, of itself and separated from the ego, must still be action, and therefore never still. Since action of any kind, being composed of inner vitality, must seek materialization, the dreams become the constructions of that dream universe of which, again, we have spoken. But action can never complete itself. The dream once begun continues, and the dream universe itself forms anew other constructions.
quotes.translation: 除了我们过去讨论过的那些原因之外，这里也涉及梦境状态的另一个成因。心灵本身，当与自我分离时，仍然必须是行动，因此永不停歇。由于任何形式的行动，由内在活力构成，必须寻求物质化，梦境便成为那个梦境宇宙的建构——我们再次提到这个宇宙。但行动永远无法完成自身。一旦梦境开始，它便持续下去，而梦境宇宙本身又形成新的建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Phis characteristic way of interpreting perceived data, and of reacting to it, is not as constant as it appears to be however. The stability and illusion of permanence is highly misleading. The four manifestations of personality all belonged to one identity, and this is perhaps the main point missed. For if the authors say that oftentimes a subordinate or potential ego will rake over control when necessary in order to insure the survival of the whole, then this implies a decision that has been made; and who has made it?
quotes.translation: 然而，菲斯解读感知数据并对其做出反应的特征方式，并不像表面看起来那样恒定。稳定性和永恒性的假象极具误导性。人格的四种显现都属于同一个本体，而这或许是被忽略的关键点。因为如果作者们说，为了确保整体的生存，一个从属的或潜在的自我会在必要时接管控制权，那么这暗示着一个已经做出的决定；而又是谁做出了这个决定？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I am suggesting that psychological time experiments be again adopted for you both. Ruburt has great faith in such experiments when they are successful and when he knows I am not connected with them. The autumn will be an auspicious season in this respect. When our next session arrives I will discuss the furthermost level of the subconscious from the present ego, the particular advantage of the undifferentiated levels, and at least begin a discussion of dreams and the types of dreams that spring from the various levels.
quotes.translation: 我建议你们俩再次采用心理时间实验。当这类实验成功且鲁柏知道我与它们无关时，他对它们抱有极大信心。在这方面，秋天将是个吉利的季节。下次课到来时，我将讨论潜意识中距离当前自我最远的层面、未分化层面的特殊优势，并至少开始探讨梦境以及源自不同层面的梦境类型。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego maintains much of its stability by looking backwards, so to speak, into its experience of its past, and finding something of itself there. Now the past may be an illusion, but it is not illusion to the ego. The portions of the self that deal in probabilities do not have such an experience with a past, to give them their feeling of identity or continuity.
quotes.translation: 自我主要通过回顾——可以说是回望其过去经验——来维持其大部分稳定性，并在其中找到自身的某些部分。过去或许是个幻相，但对自我而言并非如此。处理或然性的那部分自我，并没有这样的过去经验来赋予它们身份认同或连续性的感受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The root assumptions upon which physical reality is formed represent secure ground to the ego. We always operate with the ego's consent. It consents to step aside momentarily. It interprets the inner knowledge gained in its own way, true, but it is immeasurably enriched by so doing. Other layers of the self interpret the same inner experiences quite differently.
quotes.translation: 物质实相赖以形成的根本假设，对自我而言代表着稳固的根基。我们始终在自我的同意下运作。它同意暂时退居一旁。它确实以自己的方式诠释所获得的内在知识，但这样做却使其自身得到无可估量的丰富。自我的其他层面则会以截然不同的方式诠释同样的内在体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It is this inner director who maintains all of these functions, and who is responsible for the physical health. It is this director to whom you must communicate when health fails. There are ways of doing this which we will discuss at later date. It is this inner director who chooses the dream symbols in such a way that they will be meaningful to all layers or areas of the subconscious, and who is responsible for the amount, rate and type of subconscious data which is given to the outer ego by means of the intuitions.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在指挥者维持着所有这些功能，并负责身体健康。当健康出现问题时，你必须与这个指挥者沟通。我们将在日后讨论达成此目的的方法。正是这个内在指挥者选择梦的象征符号，使其对潜意识的各个层面或领域都具有意义，并负责通过直觉传递给外在自我的潜意识资料的数量、速率和类型。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In any fairly normal personality the intellect will indeed stand guard. There is no need to fear identity's complete immersion into emotional sensation. Such emotional experience actually strengthens not only the ego, but it opens communications between the ego and the subconscious, and allows for a much greater flow of energy from the primary source of action.
quotes.translation: 在任何相当正常的人格中，理智确实会担任守卫。无需担心本体完全沉浸在情感感受中。这种情感体验不仅实际上强化了自我，还开启了自我与潜意识之间的沟通管道，并允许来自行动主要源头的能量获得更大量的流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The whole self or identity is aware of the experiences of all the egos, and since one identity forms these egos there is bound to be some similarities between them, and characteristics. The material that I have given you on reincarnation in the past is quite valid, particularly for working purposes, but it is a highly simplified version of what actually occurs.
quotes.translation: 整体自性或本体觉察到所有自我（egos）的经验，由于同一个本体形成了这些自我，它们之间必然存在某些相似性与特质。我过去给予你们的轮回资料相当有效，尤其适用于实际运作，但这只是对实际发生情况的极度简化版本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: They will be formed to impress world conditions at any given time, and therefore couched in symbols and events that will most impress the populace. This is craftily done, for the inner self knows exactly what will impress the ego, and what kinds of personalities will be best able to personify the message at any given time. When such a personality appears in history then, he is intuitively recognized, for the way has long been laid, and in many cases the prophecies announcing such an arrival have already been given.
quotes.translation: 它们将被塑造成在任何特定时代最能震撼世界状况的形式，因此会以最能打动大众的象征与事件来呈现。这是巧妙的设计，因为内在自性确切知道什么最能触动自我，以及何种人格特质最能体现特定时代的讯息。当这样的人物在历史中出现时，人们会直觉地认出他——因为道路早已铺就，许多情况下宣告其降临的预言也早已给出。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I spoke, for example, of the acquiescence of action at certain levels to any kind of stimuli, indiscriminately, whether painful or pleasurable. Without this basic acquiescence, actions would not have been given the freedom to break patterns down and evolve new ones of them. This is not necessarily a more primitive aspect. It is simply a basic characteristic of action at certain levels, and the human personality, with its complicated ego structure, is nevertheless composed of many actions that operate at this level.
quotes.translation: 举例而言，我曾谈到行动在特定层次上对任何刺激——无论痛苦或愉悦——不加区分的默认接纳。没有这种基本的默认，行动便无法获得自由去打破旧有模式并演化出新模式。这未必是较原始的面向，它只是行动在特定层次上的基本特性。而人类人格虽具有复杂的自我结构，却仍由许多运作于此层次的行为所构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ruburt possesses two necessary qualities which luckily do not blot each other out, though they could. He is extremely receptive, open to and even appreciative of inner data, and also possesses an ego strong enough to maintain necessary discipline. This makes it easier and also more difficult for me, but goes a long ways toward minimizing any psychological dangers on your part, and what is gained is solid. There will be no backtracking, and while achievements along some lines may be slower they can be counted upon.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏具备两种必要的特质，幸运的是它们并未相互抵消，尽管存在这种可能。他既极度开放，能接纳甚至欣赏内在资料，又拥有足够强大的自我以维持必要的纪律。这对我而言既让工作更顺畅也更具挑战性，但大大降低了你们可能面临的心理风险，且收获是扎实的。不会有倒退，虽然某些领域的进展可能较慢，但成果值得信赖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: In prehistoric times mankind evolved the ego and self-consciousness to help him deal with the camouflage patterns that he had created. This is no contradiction, and will be explained later. He did the job so well that even when he had things under control he was not satisfied. He developed at a lopsided level. He used himself as a tool to dissect himself. The inside senses led him to a reality he could not manipulate as easily as he could a camouflage world, and he feared what he thought of as a loss of mastery.
quotes.translation: 在史前时期，人类进化出自我意识与自我，以协助应对自身创造的伪装模式。这并非矛盾，后续将予以解释。人类将此事完成得如此出色，以至于即便掌控局面后仍不满足。他们以失衡的方式发展，将自身作为解剖自我的工具。内在感官引领他们触及一个无法像操控伪装世界般轻易掌控的实相，于是他们恐惧这种"失去掌控"的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The ego is indeed but one part of the self that speaks for the other portions of the self, but when it tries to speak for itself only, then indeed its words become meaningless, and the words become threats to the rest of the self. The discipline required in following our program as it develops, that discipline will itself represent the first steps to recovery.
quotes.translation: 自我确实只是自我的一部分，它代表自我的其他部分发言，但当它试图仅代表自身发言时，其话语便失去意义，并对自我的其余部分构成威胁。遵循我们逐步展开的课程所需的纪律，这纪律本身便是迈向康复的第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: I could have spoken at any time on the question of spontaneity and discipline. It may appear that Ruburt is too easy or too willing to hold sessions. However his ego is very well in control, so well in control that on occasion when I would have spoken on these very matters, I have not been allowed to do so. Of course I realize the time limitations, and others.
quotes.translation: 我本可随时谈论自发与纪律的问题。鲁柏似乎过于轻易或过于乐意举行课，但他的自我控制得非常好，好到有时当我想谈论这些特定议题时，竟不被允许。当然，我明白时间限制及其他因素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The energy that composes personality therefore consists of an inconceivable number of separate identities. These separate identities form what we call the inner self, which retains its individuality even while the energy that composes it constantly changes. There are continual groupings and regroupings, but basic identities are always retained. The potential egos within any given identity therefore retain their own individuality and self-knowledge, regardless of their relative importance in the order of command.
quotes.translation: 因此，构成人格的能量由无数个独立的身份组成。这些独立的身份形成了我们所谓的内在自体，即使构成它的能量不断变化，它仍保留其个体性。持续的分组与重组在进行，但基本身份始终被保留。因此，任何特定身份内的潜在自我都保留着自身的个体性与自我认知，无论它们在指挥序列中的相对重要性如何。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: "Imagine a body with a fully operating body consciousness, not diseased or defective, but without the overriding ego-directed consciousness that you have. The sleepwalkers' physical abilities surpassed yours. They were as agile as animals, their purpose simply to be. Their main points of consciousness were elsewhere, their primary focuses scarcely aware of the bodies they had created. Yet they learned 'through experience,' and began to 'awaken,' to become aware of themselves, to discover time, or to create it.
quotes.translation: "想象一个拥有完全运作的身体意识的身体，没有疾病或缺陷，但缺乏你所拥有的主导性自我导向意识。梦游者的身体能力超越了你。他们像动物一样敏捷，其存在目的仅仅是'存在'。他们的意识主要点位于别处，主要焦点几乎察觉不到自己创造的身体。然而他们'通过经验'学习，并开始'觉醒'，意识到自身，发现时间，或创造时间。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: It recognizes the answers given in the sessions as legitimate, and also that these answers involve intellectual as well as intuitional effort. The ego is pleased, for it now finds itself at the helm of a much stronger personality, and with more challenges, free to use its abilities, to question and wonder at will now that it accepts the basis of the sessions.
quotes.translation: 它承认课上传来的答案是合理的，也明白这些答案既需要知性努力，也需要直觉投入。自我感到欣喜，因为它发现自己正驾驭着一个更强大的人格，面临更多挑战，得以自由运用自身能力，在接纳课程基础后，可以随意质疑与惊叹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: In dreaming, such a dissociated state as Ruburt reached is of course the rule, only here the ability is used to form the dream images. But these dream images work for the entity as a whole and serve as a means for the various personalities to communicate. That is, in many cases for the previous incarnated personalities to correspond with the present personality. It is a means of acquainting the present personality with its past and also of reminding it of its goals, without disturbing that blatant awake ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，鲁柏所达到的那种解离状态当然是常态，只是此处这种能力被用来构建梦境影像。但这些梦境影像为整个存有服务，并作为不同人格之间沟通的媒介。也就是说，在许多情况下，这是让前世人格与今生人格相互联系的方式。它让今生人格得以了解自己的过去，同时提醒它自己的目标，而不会惊扰那个警觉的清醒自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: （Malba said connection with her could be renewed by asking questions. Seth, she said, was an excellent teacher, a philosopher where she was not. Don't be discouraged, remember poor Ouija sessions before success. We have been preparing ourselves for this since before our marriage nine years ago, but marriage reinforced our energies. ego spits like a cat to maintain conscious control, but will relax when it sees it can come to itself whenever it chooses. A drink helps, a darkened room, pre-seance preparation.
quotes.translation: （玛尔巴说，可以通过提问重新与她建立联系。她说，赛斯是一位卓越的老师，一位她所不及的哲学家。别气馁，记住成功之前那些蹩脚的灵应盘课。我们从九年前结婚前就一直在为此做准备，但婚姻强化了我们的能量。自我像猫一样喷气以维持意识控制，但当它看到自己随时可以回归本我时，便会放松下来。一杯酒有帮助，昏暗的房间，课前准备。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: He is another aspect of me while being himself. (Pause.) In your terms, I am a guide he also follows. He is much more aware of our relationship however than you are of your relationship to him. (Pause; well over one minute long.) Your time is required... These communications change me as they change you, for they are action on both of our parts. Your egos are being well educated, since they are aware of the sessions, and this will be of great benefit to you when other coordinates come into your perception.
quotes.translation: 他是我的另一个面向，同时又是他自己。（停顿。）以你们的时间概念来说，我也是他所追随的一位向导。然而，他对我们关系的觉察，远胜于你们对他与你们关系的觉察。（停顿；超过一分钟。）你们的时间是必要的……这些交流改变了我，正如它们改变了你们，因为这是双方共同的行为。你们的自我正受到良好的教育，因为它们意识到了这些课，当其他坐标进入你们的感知时，这将为你们带来极大的益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Now. First of all, my greeting to Marleno. She is always welcome. There is on her part a block, that operates in much the same manner as Ruburt's ego on occasion, as far as our sessions are concerned. This is caused by an inner willingness to believe, though this is a bad word, in the legitimate nature of my existence; a willingness however that is sometimes so desperate, if you will forgive the term, and so wholehearted, that it sets up automatic barriers on the part of other portions of the personality.
quotes.translation: 现在。首先，向玛莲诺致意。她始终受欢迎。就我们的课而言，她身上存在一种障碍，其运作方式有时与鲁柏的自我类似。这是由于内在有一种愿意相信——虽然这是个糟糕的字眼——我存在的合法本质的倾向；然而，这种倾向有时如此迫切（请原谅我用这个词），如此全心全意，以至于在人格的其他部分自动设置了屏障。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There are gradations and fluctuations within its activity. It is far more flexible than you give it credit for. (Pause.) The ego can use the conscious mind almost entirely as a way of perceiving external or internal realities that coincide with its own beliefs. It is not that certain answers do not lie openly accessible, therefore, but that often you have set yourself on a course of action in which you believe, and you do not want to open yourself to any material that may contradict your current beliefs.
quotes.translation: 在其活动中有等级和波动。它远比你们所认为的更具弹性。（停顿。）自我几乎可以完全利用意识心，作为感知与其自身信念相符的外在或内在实相的方式。因此，并非某些答案没有公开可及，而是你们常常已为自己设定了一条你们所相信的行动路线，并且不愿向任何可能与你当前信念相矛盾的材料敞开自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Therefore, consciousness-of-self can appear with or without the existence of an ego. Consciousness-of-self is an attribute then of all physical species, regardless of their classification. Personality, human personality, is simply the name given to this class of self, as applied and seen within human beings. Personality changes and acts upon all other action. Personality, then, can be seen to operate as a field of action in identity; but identity that is conscious of its relation to action as a whole.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我意识可以存在于有自我或没有自我的情况下。自我意识是所有物质物种的属性，无论其分类如何。人格，人类人格，只是赋予这类自我的名称，适用于人类并从中可见。人格改变并作用于所有其他行动。因此，人格可以被视为身份中行动的一个场域；但这是意识到自身与整体行动关系的身份。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I did not realize that this particular experience would occur so early. It actually represents an amazing ability to focus the complete inner energy. In other words, to command and focus the entire amount of energy inherent within the personality from the inner universe, and as such it must be used with discretion and discipline. It should never be allowed to be used for the purposes of the emotions belonging to the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 我没想到这个特定体验会这么早发生。它实际上代表了聚焦全部内在能量的惊人能力。换句话说，就是指挥并聚焦内在宇宙中人格所固有的全部能量，因此必须谨慎而有纪律地使用它。绝不允许它被用于属于外在自我的情绪目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The psychic experiences are then used as poetic subjects, and this cycle of creativity is always enriched as the whole personality continually develops itself and grows. Any undue tampering disrupts this function. The personality could not approach its own promise until the poetic nature led to the psychic development. When this occurred, some personality adjustments were required. The ego felt threatened in direct proportion to the strength of the newly felt abilities, and performed a huge trick.
quotes.translation: 心灵体验随后被用作诗意的主题，随着整个人格不断发展和成长，这个创造力的循环总是得到丰富。任何不当的干预都会破坏这一功能。在诗意本质引领心灵发展之前，人格无法接近其自身的潜力。当这种情况发生时，需要进行一些人格调整。自我根据新获得的能力的强度，按比例感到威胁，并耍了一个大花招。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The type of dream, or the types of dreams experienced by any individual, is determined by many factors. I am speaking now of the dream experience as it occurs, and not of the remnant of it that his ego allows him to consciously recall. As an individual creates his physical image and environment according to his abilities and defects, and in line with his expectations and subconscious and inner needs, so does he create his dreams; and these interact with the outer environment which he has created.
quotes.translation: 任何个体所经历的梦境类型或多种梦境，由许多因素决定。我现在说的是梦境体验本身，而非他的自我允许他有意识地回忆的残余部分。正如一个人根据自己的能力和缺陷，以及符合他的期望、潜意识和内在需求，创造了他的物质形象和环境，他也同样创造了他的梦境；而这些梦境与他所创造的外在环境相互作用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Other portions of self one are to some extent aware of these other dimensions. Now you see where we are heading. For now consider what we shall call self A. And we shall say that he is the physical self in the physical universe. He is composed of physical matter, he is composed of psychological matter, a portion of this latter being ego. From your own work you realize however that this individual, or self A, is indeed more than physical matter, even while he exists within the physical dimension.
quotes.translation: 自我一体的其他部分在某种程度上也觉察到这些其他维度。现在你明白我们的方向了。暂且考虑我们称之为自我A的部分。我们说他是物质宇宙中的物质自我。他由物质构成，也由心理物质构成，后者的一部分便是自我。从你们自己的工作中可以认识到，这个个体或自我A，即便存在于物质维度内，确实远不止是物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Any consciousness is therefore innately aware of its basic identity. The inner self knows what is behind the stars and planets that the eyes views, but the ego would be swept aside in panic. This system spoken of earlier, the sun and original 9 planets, in your terms, have long ago passed into and formed other universal systems. The whole cosmic structure however was the materialization of one original thought, for the thought, the real reality, must always exist before the representation of it.
quotes.translation: 因此，任何意识都天生知晓其基本身份。内在自我知道眼睛所见星辰与行星背后的真相，但自我会因恐慌而被扫到一旁。先前提到的这个系统——太阳与最初的九颗行星——用你们的话来说，早已消逝并形成了其他宇宙体系。然而整个宇宙结构是一个原始思想的物质化，因为思想——真实的实相——必须先于其表象存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The ego, for reasons of its own, does not want to accept an action which has already occurred, and does not want to admit it within the framework of its own reality. The point of resistance becomes woven into the personality framework, the problem being not of the subconscious, but again of the ego's denial or attempt to deny a portion of its own reality.
quotes.translation: 自我出于自身原因，不愿接受已发生的行为，也不愿将其纳入自身实相的架构中。抗拒点会融入人格架构，问题并非出在潜意识，而在于自我否认或试图否认自身实相的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Obviously the ego is a part of the whole self. Directly its experiences must be physically oriented, and vet with training it can also learn to appreciate realities that are not physical. It must not be pushed, but with the proper attitudes it can and must participate to some extent in all psychic experiences, if the overall stability is to be maintained.
quotes.translation: 显然，自我是整体自性的一部分。它的经验必须直接以物质为导向，但经过训练，它也能学会欣赏非物质的实相。它不应被强迫，但若要保持整体稳定性，在适当的态度下，它必须且能够在一定程度上参与所有心灵经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The ego must choose one of all these because of its physical time limitations. But this other portion of the self can, and does, delve into what you could call event XI, X2, X3, et cetera. It can pursue and experience all of these alternate events, and it can do so in the same amount of physical time that it takes for the ego to experience event X alone.
quotes.translation: 由于物理时间的限制，自我必须从所有这些中选择一个。但自性的另一部分能够且确实会深入探索你们所谓的事件X1、X2、X3等。它可以追寻并体验所有这些替代事件，并且能在自我仅体验事件X所需的相同物理时间内做到这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Your outside egos are constructed to enable you to deal with the camouflage world. It is necessary. It necessarily also narrows your concentration and your understanding. During your existence you are focused, you are stuck to, you are placed and centered in, your physical universe by the outside ego. It manages your manipulation of camouflage material.
quotes.translation: 你们的外在自我是为了让你们能够处理伪装世界而构建的。这是必要的。它必然也会窄化你们的专注与理解。在你们的存在期间，你们被外在自我聚焦、固定、安置并定位于你们的物质宇宙中。它管理着你们对伪装材料的操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now. Sensual immersion implies dropping momentarily the barriers between the ego and what the ego is enjoying. This should be simple enough to follow, and the information given this evening will be of much value.
quotes.translation: 现在。感官沉浸意味着暂时放下自我与自我所享受之物之间的屏障。这应该很容易理解，今晚提供的信息将具有很大的价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Discipline then should not only be considered, as it is by some schools of thought, as a mere mental discipline over the muscles, or various portions of the body by the inner self, but indeed a discipline in terms of training of the ego by the inner self, so that the ego as a personality achieves a well-balanced relationship with the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 因此，纪律不应仅如某些思想学派所认为的那样，只是内在自我对肌肉或身体各部分的单纯心智训练，而更应是内在自我对自我的训练，使自我作为人格与物质宇宙达成平衡的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When you see that the ulcer does not belong to you in these terms, then indeed you will have no purpose in using your energies to maintain it. It is not part of your heritage. It is not part of the whole self; and now, we will see the purpose of the ego in all this is to protect what it considers the self, for the ego considers itself as the only self.
quotes.translation: 当你明白溃疡在这些层面上并不属于你，那么你便没有理由耗费能量去维持它。它并非你遗产的一部分，也非整体自我的一部分；现在，我们将看到自我在此过程中的作用——保护它视为"自我"的部分，因为自我只将自己视为唯一的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This is what the ego does when it reacts too violently to purely physical data on your plane. As a result it stiffens and you have, my well-meaning friend, the cold detachment with which you have faced the world. I do not want to digress here. I have certain points in mind for this evening. Nevertheless lest Ruburt thinks he is getting off scot-free, let me remind him that the tree's bark is quite necessary, cannot be dispensed with--but I will get into that and into Ruburt at a later time.
quotes.translation: 这就是当自我对你们层面的纯物理数据反应过度激烈时所做的事。结果它变得僵硬，我那位好心的朋友，你便以那种冷漠的疏离面对世界。我不想在此离题。今晚我心中有几个要点。不过，免得鲁柏以为他能全身而退，让我提醒他：树皮是相当必要的，不能缺少——但我稍后会谈到这一点，也会谈到鲁柏。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: （Seth began discussing the inner ego along with the inner senses, so material on it is woven through the sessions. A few recent sessions dealing with the inner ego are: 94, 151, 162, 173. See Volumes 3 and 4.）
quotes.translation: （赛斯开始讨论内在自我与内在感官，因此相关材料贯穿于各节中。最近几节涉及内在自我的有：第94、151、162、173节。参见第三卷和第四卷。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Ruburt has been complaining with loud inner wails because he has been sleeping later in the mornings, and hasn't put in his full work time this week. And of course I am to blame. I am most certainly not to blame. I certainly will not be the family whipping boy. It is true that I have disrupted your schedule to some degree, but not after all in any great manner. How could you be spending the same amount of time any more profitably? The truth is, that the lazy ego finds excuses where it may.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏一直在内心大声哀叹，因为他这周早上睡得更晚，没有完成全部工作时间。当然，这要怪我。我绝对不该被责怪。我肯定不会成为家里的替罪羊。确实，我在某种程度上打乱了你们的日程，但终究并非以什么了不起的方式。你还能如何更有效地利用相同的时间呢？事实是，懒惰的自我总会找到借口。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these concepts in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent as communications to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the physical individual. When the physical individual is trained along these lines however, he helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge, is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 这个重组后的自我试图通过感官知觉来理解这些概念，这些知觉作为信息被传送给另一端的物质个体。有时信息是直接传递的，尽管它们必须经过物质个体潜意识的筛选。然而，当物质个体沿着这些方向接受训练时，他会协助这一过程，并建立起一个心理框架，如同桥梁一般，用以连接两个人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Neither of you realize the strength of the abilities as yet, and the need for forging a strong personality who could learn to handle them wisely, and hold its own while using them. The ego feared that the abilities could sweep Ruburt away in the past even before our sessions, sensing the great but as yet unfocused energy. When it was assured that this was the mission for which the personality had waited, and only when it was positive, did it free its protective hold and give its blessings.
quotes.translation: 你们俩都尚未意识到这些能力的强大程度，以及塑造一个坚强人格的必要性——这个人格必须学会明智地驾驭这些能力，并在运用它们时保持自我。自我曾担心这些能力会在我们开课之前就席卷鲁柏而去，因为它感知到了那股强大却尚未聚焦的能量。只有当它确信这是人格等待已久的使命时，并且只有在它完全肯定之后，它才解除了保护性的控制，并给予了祝福。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The system of probabilities is not as easily perceived even as those events that exist within the dream state, for with these you are familiar, while you are in the dream state. Often the ego is even made aware of dream events. Now the self that is the I of your dreams can quite legitimately be compared to the self that experiences probable events.
quotes.translation: 或然性的系统甚至不如梦境状态中的事件那样容易被感知，因为你在梦境状态中熟悉这些事件。自我甚至常常意识到梦境事件。现在，你梦境中的那个"我"之自己，完全可以合理地与体验或然事件的自己相提并论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Now we shall put this plainly, for his ego has indeed distrusted his intuitional self, and has been jealous of it. There has been a spiritual expansion occurring however that is responsible for these recent gains, and the late difficulty in sleeping has been the result of a flare up, a last struggle, on the part of the ego; a rather weak offensive.
quotes.translation: 现在我们要直截了当地说明，因为他的自我确实不信任他的直觉性自己，并且一直嫉妒它。然而，最近取得的进展是由于一次灵性扩张，而近期睡眠困难则是自我方面一次爆发、最后一次挣扎的结果；这是一次相当软弱的攻势。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: During his life within the physical system attractions with it are of course maintained. At physical death this connection is severed. Polarities are changed in reverse fashion. The individual identity, composed of its electrically and magnetically coded experiences, is therefore intact. I say intact, for to all purposes this is so. When the polarities are changed however in reverse fashion, the present ego follows its attraction to the subconscious, and the two are more or less united.
quotes.translation: 在物质系统内的生命期间，与它的吸引力当然得以维持。在物质死亡时，这种连接被切断。极性以反向方式改变。由电性编码和磁性编码的经验所组成的个体身份，因此是完整的。我说完整，是因为从所有意图和目的来看都是如此。然而，当极性以反向方式改变时，当前的自我会跟随其吸引力进入潜意识，两者或多或少地合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: On occasion the waking consciousness does participate during other usually very depressed periods. But generally speaking high energy is needed in order to maintain overall stability, and in order that the ego is not overstrained. Such conscious projections are automatically spaced out. In this way there is little danger that problems will arise.
quotes.translation: 有时清醒的自我确实会在其他通常非常低落的时期参与进来。但一般而言，需要高能量来维持整体稳定，以免自我过度紧张。这类有意识的投射会自动间隔开来。这样，问题出现的风险就很小。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The stubborn part of his nature has been a characteristic of most of his past lives. It is basically a resolute characteristic with great potential for balance, a characteristic that can keep him headed, despite any disappointments in the proper directions. When the ego controls this resoluteness however, it turns into stubbornness, and works against the personality. Perseverance becomes pigheadedness then, you see.
quotes.translation: 他性格中固执的部分是他大多数前世的特点。这基本上是一种坚定的特质，具有极大的平衡潜力，是一种能让他无论遭遇何种失望都能朝着正确方向前进的特质。然而，当自我控制这种坚定时，它就会变成固执，并违背人格。你看，毅力就变成了顽固。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Upon proper suggestion the personality will work out specific problems in the dream state, as earlier mentioned. If the solution is not clear to the ego, this does not mean that the solution has not been found, necessarily. There may even be instances where it is not only unnecessary but undesirable that the ego be familiar with such a solution.
quotes.translation: 如前所述，在适当的暗示下，人格会在梦境中解决特定问题。如果自我不清楚解决方案，这并不一定意味着解决方案没有被找到。甚至在某些情况下，自我不仅不需要了解这样的解决方案，而且不适宜了解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You have no fear of them. All of this is a progression, I will say for simplicity's sake. Now in such an environment, time as you know it does not exist. This is one of the reasons why some projections are so confusing, particularly when the ego is taken along for the ride. (Humorously.) It is used to past, present and future, kept nicely apart.
quotes.translation: 你并不畏惧它们。为简化起见，我会说这一切都是个进展。在这样一个环境中，你所认知的时间并不存在。这也是为何某些投射如此令人困惑的原因之一，尤其是当自我也随行其中时。（幽默地）它习惯于将过去、现在和未来井然有序地分开。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now basically even the physical universe itself is so constructed, but for all practical purposes, as far as general perception and experience is concerned, time and the physical growth development apply, so that we find the ego portion, particularly of the human personality, is to a large extent dependent for its maturity and development upon the amount of time that the physical image has spent within the system.
quotes.translation: 基本上，就连物质宇宙本身也是以这种方式构建的，但就实际目的而言，就一般感知与经验而论，时间与物质成长发展确实适用，因此我们发现，人类人格中的自我部分，其成熟与发展在很大程度上取决于物质形象在该系统内所花费的时间量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: What you consider your consciousness, or your self, or your thinking ego, represents of course only one portion of your entire consciousness, that part which you are using at this time. It is as if, for example, consciousness of any whole self were compared to a huge, and indeed almost infinite light, with the ability inherent in the light to focus in many directions; to be diffused, as if the light had many switches that would turn it to greater or lesser intensities and directions.
quotes.translation: 你所认为的意识、自我或思考中的自我，当然只代表你整体意识的一部分，即你此刻正在使用的那部分。举例来说，若将整个自性的意识比作一个巨大、甚至近乎无限的光，这光本身具有向许多方向聚焦的能力；它可以扩散，仿佛这光有许多开关，能将其调至不同强度与方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: [The other director] is too much concerned with his own personal image. He does not want to be involved with anything that may fail... this is a personal concern of his. His ego is such that it makes him, in a strange manner, often prevent the sort of effects that he seeks. He asks too much, and receives too little. He will always be that way.
quotes.translation: [另一位导演]过于关注自己的个人形象。他不愿参与任何可能失败的事情……这是他个人的顾虑。他的自我如此强烈，以至于以一种奇怪的方式，常常阻止了他所追求的效果。他索求太多，而收获太少。他将永远如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The Frank Watts material represented communication on the first level of undifferentiated fields. Both Ruburt and Frank Watts were experimenting. According to an individual's abilities and development, he can change his focus so that it encompasses realities further and further from the concern of the ego, and in this Ruburt has come far. The phrase "give unto Caesar the things that are Caesar's" is a good one. You see I am better acquainted with biblical phrases than either of you.
quotes.translation: 弗兰克·沃茨的资料代表了未分化场域第一层面的沟通。鲁柏和弗兰克·沃茨都在进行实验。根据个人的能力与发展，他可以调整自己的焦点，使其涵盖越来越远离自我关注的范围，而在这方面鲁柏已大有进展。"将凯撒的归给凯撒"这句话说得很好。你看，我对圣经语句的了解比你们俩都要深。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The physical matters mentioned should be taken care of immediately. That will be a start. Now, he does not entirely recognize his position. (Long pause.) He has temporarily abdicated, but there is no basic reason to believe that this will be permanent. The danger does exist. However, I told you the ego was set aside, and fear was at the root.
quotes.translation: 所提到的物质事务应立即处理。这将是一个开始。现在，他并未完全认清自己的处境。（长停顿。）他暂时放弃了职责，但没有根本理由相信这会是永久性的。危险确实存在。不过，我告诉过你，自我已被搁置一旁，而恐惧是根源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Some sense impressions fall beneath the threshold of consciousness, these impressions coming from the outside environment. Some impressions however have their origin within inner reality, and the personality is receiving information not available to the egotistical self. If such inner data is to become at all conscious, it must be translated into terms that the ego can recognize. In other words, into sense data.
quotes.translation: 某些感官印象落在意识阈值之下，这些印象来自外部环境。然而有些印象则源于内在实相，人格正在接收自我意识无法触及的信息。若要使这类内在资料进入意识层面，就必须将其转化为自我能够辨识的形态。换言之，即转化为感官资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The idea of dissociation could be likened to the slight distance between the bark and the inside of the tree. Here we do not have a rigid bark, as you should not have a rigid ego. We have instead a flexible bark, changing with the elements, protecting the inner tree or the inner self, but flexible, opening up or closing in rhythmic motion. The bark is so to speak outside our tree; and there is a small space between the inner tree and the bark. This small space is our dissociation.
quotes.translation: 解离的概念可类比为树皮与树干之间的细微间隙。此处我们并非拥有僵硬的树皮——正如你不该拥有僵化的自我——而是具有柔韧的树皮，随环境变化而变化，保护着内在之树或内在自体，却保持弹性，以韵律性的运动开合。这树皮可谓处于树木的外层；而在内在之树与树皮之间存在着微小空间。这个微小空间即是我们的解离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The self then, unknown to the ego, perceives itself in a vast variety of experiences, and in, indeed, a vast number of realities. Each of these so-called realities, for one blends into the other, could be termed, or viewed as, a separate field. Each is therefore composed of the characteristic perception patterns that happen to lie within it, and these so-called minor fields could then be termed other selves, or minor selves, from the standpoint of the self that we are considering.
quotes.translation: 于是，在自我不知情的情况下，自体在浩瀚多样的经验中感知自身，实际上是在无数实相中感知自身。这些所谓的实相——因彼此交融——每个都可被视为或称作独立的场域。每个场域都由恰好存在于其中的特定感知模式构成，从我们正在探讨的自体角度来看，这些所谓的次要场域便可称为其他自体或次要自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego has completely changed its structure. It has changed its electromagnetic identity in your cases, since our sessions. It has learned, to some extent, to assimilate your inner experiences. In the long run this is the most effective method. And in the long run no consciousness expansion can occur unless the ego structure is so altered.
quotes.translation: 自我已完全改变其结构。就你们的情况而言，自我们的课程以来，它已改变了其电磁身份。它已在一定程度上学会吸收你们的内在经验。长远来看，这是最有效的方法。而且长远来看，除非自我结构被如此改变，否则任何意识扩展都不可能发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: I call this seemingly unconscious the "inner ego," for it directs inner activities. It correlates information that is perceived not through the physical senses, but through other inner channels. It is the inner perceiver of reality that exists beyond the three-dimensional. It carries within it the memory of each of your past existences. It looks into subjective dimensions that are literally infinite, and from these subjective dimensions all objective realities flow. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 我称这看似无意识的为"内在自我"，因为它指挥内在活动。它整合并非通过肉体感官，而是通过其他内在渠道感知的信息。它是存在于三维之外实相的内在感知者。它携带你们每一世过去存在的记忆。它审视着实际上无限的主观维度，而所有客观实相皆从这些主观维度流出。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: First of all if you'll forgive me, I would like to go into the situations culminating in your illness of this time last winter. Your psychic state of nervousness, fear, lack of confidence and lack of focus as far as utilizing your artistic abilities were concerned, began to build up like many encircling walls. The ego imprisoned you more and more. Your subconscious healing abilities and the hidden subconscious vitality beneath became dammed up, seemingly with no means of release.
quotes.translation: 首先，请恕我直言，我想探讨导致你们去年冬天此时生病的种种情况。你们在运用艺术才能方面的神经质、恐惧、缺乏自信和缺乏聚焦的心理状态，开始像许多环绕的墙壁一样堆积起来。自我越来越将你们囚禁。你们潜意识中的疗愈能力和其下隐藏的潜意识活力被堵塞，似乎毫无释放途径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In the past you did not understand properly this relationship. You understood the destructive tendencies but you placed them in the subconscious. The endless or seemingly endless circle need not occur now, or in the future. This dissociation of which Ruburt has spoken to you is an excellent discipline that will insure your use of energy in the best possible manner. I am not suggesting that the ego be ignored in any manner, merely that the tool is not allowed to become the master.
quotes.translation: 过去你并未正确理解这种关系。你理解破坏性倾向，却将其归入潜意识。那无尽或看似无尽的循环，如今或未来都无需再发生。鲁柏与你谈及的这种解离法，是极佳的修行方式，能确保你以最佳方式运用能量。我并非建议以任何方式忽视自我，只是提醒不要让工具成为主人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is, as a rule, lack of knowledge on the part of the ego as to the nature of reality, and its part in it, and the resulting fear, that often prevents a personality from accepting spontaneous expression of emotions in general. The capacity to feel is important. When one fears to experience seemingly unpleasant emotions, the personality also tends to set up an emotional pattern of rejection that seriously cuts down, also, not only on the expression but the very perception of joy.
quotes.translation: 通常而言，自我对实相本质及其在其中的角色缺乏认知，由此产生的恐惧，往往阻碍人格普遍接纳情绪的自发表达。感受能力至关重要。当人畏惧体验看似不悦的情绪时，人格也会建立排斥的情绪模式，这不仅严重削减喜悦的表达，更会削弱对喜悦本身的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ruburt is extremely cautious. This will not work to our disadvantage however, for his cautiousness in these matters acts as a strong balancing mechanism, so that he learns to deal with inner perceptions stage by stage. His personality is not overwhelmed therefore. We have taken his ego into consideration at all times, so that he can consciously assimilate what he has learned, as is preferable. At times this may mean that we progress slowly, but the progression is steady and firm.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏极为谨慎。但这不会成为我们的劣势，因为他在这些事上的谨慎形成了强大的平衡机制，使他能循序渐进地处理内在感知。因此他的人格并未被淹没。我们始终将他的自我纳入考量，以便他能有意识地消化所学——这更为理想。有时这或许意味着进展缓慢，但每一步都稳健而坚实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego, if you recall, is self's attempt to set itself apart from action, and to see or perceive action as an object. The ego attempts to attain stability and dominance, and resents change. It seeks to limit certain perceptions, to block out many perceptions of which the self is knowledgeable. In this way limitations become fairly rigid.
quotes.translation: 自我，若你记得，是本体试图将自己与行动分离，并将行动视为客体来观察或感知。自我试图获得稳定与支配权，并抗拒改变。它寻求限制某些感知，屏蔽本体所知晓的许多感知。如此一来，限制便变得相当僵化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The results are then checked by the inner ego against the action that was chosen for actuality within the physical system. These results are then sent to certain portions of the subconscious, where through this information knowledge is gained as to whether or not the ego and the subconscious made the best decision under the circumstances.
quotes.translation: 随后，内在自我会将这些结果与在物质系统内被选为实相的行动进行核对。这些结果接着被传送到潜意识的特定部分，通过此信息，可得知自我与潜意识在当时情况下是否做出了最佳决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Obviously then ego is a part of identity, rather than the other way around, and it is only a part of consciousness. It is when ego attempts to confuse itself with identity that difficulties begin.
quotes.translation: 显然，自我是身份的一部分，而非相反，且它仅是意识的一部分。当自我试图将自己与身份混淆时，困难便开始了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Begin the yoga exercises and follow them faithfully. Your few experiences with autosuggestion upon falling asleep have been ego-bound. Think of this in terms of muscle-bound and you will see what I mean. Be in a drowsy state and suggest, Ruburt, suggest, Joseph; do not attempt to bully or command the subconscious. Suggestions are all that are needed. Your love of nature, Joseph, and Ruburt your love of nature, is another method of dissociation, or can be if you use it as such.
quotes.translation: 开始进行瑜伽练习并忠实遵循。你几次在入睡时运用自我暗示的经验都受限于自我。想想"肌肉僵硬"这个词，你就会明白我的意思。保持昏昏欲睡的状态，然后暗示，鲁柏，暗示，约瑟；不要试图胁迫或命令潜意识。只需要暗示就够了。约瑟，你对大自然的热爱，鲁柏，你对大自然的热爱，是另一种解离的方法，或者如果你这样运用的话，也可以成为解离的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: You were quite correct, Joseph, in cautioning Ruburt against the poetry session the other evening. He knew this but was obstinate. It is not only a case of being obstinate, however. I have told you that it is extremely limiting to regard the ego as the complete self or personality, or to think that the ego makes up the entire identity.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你那天晚上劝告鲁柏不要参加诗歌课，完全正确。他知道这一点，但很固执。不过，这不仅仅是固执的问题。我告诉过你们，将自我视为完整的自己或人格，或认为自我构成整个身份，是极其局限的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Once more, your own inner psychological experiences, and the inner life of every individual, can lead you to some understanding along these lines. Nor, as I said earlier, should this seem so strange. Mankind names and identifies even what he cannot see, and he divides and he separates. As I mentioned, when you look into a mirror you do not see your ego. You can never see it. You experience it directly, and so do you experience directly this sort of distance of which I speak.
quotes.translation: 再者，你自身的内在心理经验，以及每个个体的内在生命，都能引导你沿着这些线索获得一些理解。正如我之前所说，这也不该显得如此陌生。人类甚至为那些看不见的事物命名和辨识，并加以划分和区隔。如我所提，当你照镜子时，你并未看见你的自我。你永远无法看见它。你直接体验它，同样地，你也直接体验我所谈论的这种距离感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The rejected action patterns, however, will find outlet. The nature of the outlet will be the result of the nature of the particular patterns themselves. The quality of the outlet will depend upon the intensity of these patterns, and the necessity or the degree of necessity, for their expression. Unless some adjustments are made at this point, the ego will have nothing to say with the direction that these patterns may take, simply because it will not accept their legitimacy.
quotes.translation: 然而，被拒绝的行为模式终将找到出口。出口的性质取决于这些特定模式本身的本质。出口的品质则取决于这些模式的强度，以及它们被表达的必要性或必要程度。除非在此刻做出某些调整，否则自我对这些模式可能采取的方向将毫无发言权，只因它不愿承认它们的正当性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This is obviously somewhat simplified, in that the ego constantly changes, and the above examples must be read carefully or their meaning could be misinterpreted. Actions may appear to be separate, but they are all part of other actions, this being of course the basis for all organization, including that of the ego and the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这显然有些简化，因为自我不断在变化，上述例子必须仔细阅读，否则其含义可能被误解。行为看似各自独立，但它们都是其他行为的一部分，这当然是一切组织的基础，包括自我与内在自我的组织。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The inner ego however is to some degree still familiar with their activities. Solutions found by these dream personalities are automatically picked up by the inner ego, and transmitted to the various levels of the self. The dream world changes as the personality changes, so that it is always a part of the mobile personality framework.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在自我在某种程度上仍熟悉它们的活动。这些梦人格找到的解决方案会自动被内在自我接收，并传递到自我的各个层面。随着人格的变化，梦的世界也随之改变，因此它始终是流动人格框架的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: As the ego becomes certain of its strength, then it will allow the self to expand. I mentioned in our last session that the scientists did not realize that man has indeed evolved since the development of the human brain. For it has learned to form literally millions of new connections, meanings and concepts, new gestalts that have indeed made man something quite different than he was. All of these are new electromagnetic patterns which are now indelibly a part of the race.
quotes.translation: 当自我确信自身的力量时，它便会允许自我扩展。我在上次课程中提到，科学家们并未意识到，自人类大脑发展以来，人类确实已经进化。因为大脑已学会形成数以百万计的新连接、新意义、新概念以及新的完形，这些确实使人类变得与过去截然不同。所有这些新的电磁模式如今已成为种族不可磨灭的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The identity, the basic identity, of these portions of the self, are carried by what you could compare to the subconscious that you know. This is difficult, but listen: in these portions of the self it is the subconscious that carries the burden of identity, and it is the ego whose experiences are of a dreamlike, plastic nature. I use these terms to make the point clear. Do not let them confuse you. These portions of the self would seem topsy-turvy to you for this reason.
quotes.translation: 这些自我部分的基本身份，由你们可类比为已知潜意识的层面所承载。这很难理解，但请听好：在这些自我部分中，是潜意识承载着身份的重担，而自我则经历着如梦似幻、可塑性的体验。我使用这些术语是为了阐明观点，别让它们混淆你们。因此，这些自我部分对你们而言会显得颠倒错乱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The specific concentration, however, results in an exquisite focus. Ego consciousness lost part of that focus in comparison. The totem poles date back to the time when men and animals understood each other, before that point of departure. Physical species that existed and flourished in those epochs then became probable to you, for they did not develop in your system but became extinct. Their living relics exist in the god concepts that embodied them. Give us a moment ...
quotes.translation: 然而，这种特定专注导致了精妙的聚焦。相比之下，自我意识反而失去了部分聚焦。图腾柱可追溯至人类与动物相互理解的年代，那是在那个分水岭之前。当时存在并繁盛于那些时代的物理物种，对你们而言已成为可能性的存在，因为它们并未在你们的系统中演化而是灭绝了。它们的活化石存在于体现它们的诸神概念中。请稍等片刻……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The present personality cannot travel to the complete entity, again because of these very real laws; that is, while caught in or under the influence of the field of your plane, the personality cannot travel to the entity. The personality can and should be aware of the whole self of which it is a part, and that part of the whole self which the ego ignores, is the one part which can enter into the field influence of the entity, though it cannot travel to the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 当前人格无法抵达完整存有，再次强调是由于这些非常真实的法则；也就是说，当人格被困于或受制于你们层面的场域时，它无法抵达存有。人格能够且应当觉察到它所隶属的整个自己，而自我所忽略的那部分整个自己，正是能够进入存有场域影响的那部分——尽管它无法直接抵达存有本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The inner ego does the actual work that brings about the events you have decided upon. In very simple terms, if you want to pick up a book, and then do so, you experience that event consciously, though you are quite unaware of all of the inner events that occurred to bring the motion about. The inner ego directs those activities.
quotes.translation: 内在自我执行着实际的工作，促成了你已决定要发生的事件。用最简单的话来说，如果你想拿起一本书，然后真的这么做了，你会有意识地经历这个事件，尽管你完全不知道为了完成这个动作而发生的所有内在事件。内在自我指导着这些活动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: （About the subconscious: According to Freud the subconscious is often held to blame for present ego difficulties. This is not so in many cases--the real trouble being that the present ego did not assimilate the subconscious experience. Seth has discussed Freud and Jung to some extent, in the 83rd and 119th sessions, among others.
quotes.translation: （关于潜意识：根据弗洛伊德的理论，潜意识常被归咎于当前自我的困境。但在许多情况下并非如此——真正的问题在于当前自我未能吸收潜意识的经验。赛斯在第83节和第119节等场合，曾在一定程度上讨论过弗洛伊德和荣格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: He would, believe it or not, have ended up with a higher title within five years, though not of director, and it would have so soothed his inner ego that it would have settled for this. But his inner drives would never have let him settle. However, I wanted him to make the adjustments necessary to maintain balance and outward cordiality with the director, to aid his own understanding, and so that his resignation, which I hopefully foresaw, would be relatively painless.
quotes.translation: 信不信由你，他本可以在五年内获得更高的职位，虽然不是主管，但这足以安抚他的内在自我，使其安于现状。但他的内在驱动力绝不会让他就此满足。然而，我希望他能做出必要的调整，以维持与主管之间的平衡和表面上的和睦，这有助于他自己的理解，并且让我所预见到的他的辞职——我满怀希望地预见——能够相对无痛地发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Such an outer ego turned inner ego, has only experienced existence then upon a particular plane. It is therefore filled with impatience as far as existence upon other planes are concerned; and therefore if it developed upon your plane initially, it will not choose to initiate anew there, but will choose other planes of activity.
quotes.translation: 这样一个外在自我转向内在自我，只在一个特定层面上体验过存在。因此，对于其他层面的存在，它充满了不耐烦；如果它最初在你的层面上发展，它不会选择在那里重新开始，而会选择其他活动层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: These questions are worked out by entities between lives, and each entity has many problems to consider. In your technological age such problems are easier to solve than in the past. That is, contemporaries even from different continents can meet in a simpler fashion. The basic problems are necessarily kept from the personality by the entity simply because so many psychological undercurrents would sweep the ego off its feet, and pull the rug of sanity from beneath it.
quotes.translation: 这些问题由存有在转世之间解决，每个存有都有许多问题需要考虑。在你的科技时代，这些问题比过去更容易解决。也就是说，来自不同大陆的同时代人能以更简单的方式相遇。存有必然将基本问题对人格隐瞒，只是因为太多心理暗流会冲垮自我，并从其脚下抽走理智的基石。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: As the number of rejected impulses grows, more and more energy is of course concentrated in this area, the energy that is inherent within the impulses themselves. This sort of grouping together of rejected impulses will occur mainly when the ego's restrictions are too severe, so hampering that very deep and basic needs of the whole personality are being denied expression. It is therefore for the benefit of the whole personality that these impulses be given expression.
quotes.translation: 随着被拒绝的冲动数量增加，越来越多的能量自然集中在这个区域，即冲动本身固有的能量。这种被拒绝冲动的聚集主要发生在自我的限制过于严苛时，从而阻碍了整个人格深层基本需求的表达。因此，为了整个人格的利益，这些冲动应当被表达出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It senses realities usually closed to it. It thinks, "There is more, but beyond I cannot follow." Here with this realization the inner ego may suddenly open.
