Intuitive springs rush to the surface, and because the outer ego has already been alerted, it is able to accept these realities while still performing its ordinary duties.
quotes.translation: 它感知到通常对其封闭的实相。它思忖："还有更多，但超越之处我无法追随。" 在此领悟中，内在自我可能突然开启。直觉之泉涌向表面，由于外在自我已被预先警示，它便能在履行日常职责的同时接纳这些实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You do have access to the inner self, therefore. You are hardly cut off from your own soul or entity. The ego prefers to consider itself the captain at the helm, so to speak, since it is the ego who most directly deals with the sometimes tumultuous seas of physical reality, and it does not want to be distracted from this task.
quotes.translation: 因此，你确实能触及内在自己。你几乎不曾与自己的灵魂或存有隔绝。自我倾向于视自己为掌舵的船长——可以这么说——因为正是自我最直接地处理有时波涛汹涌的物质实相之海，它不愿因此分心。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Recognized concepts of the self are the ego's interpretation of selfhood. They are projected into concepts of God and the universe. They meet with a certain biological validity because of the selectivity earlier mentioned, whereby only one series of neurological pulses is accepted -- and upon these rides the reality of the egotistical self. At one "time" a god interpreted in those terms served as a model for the egotistical behavior of one self toward another self.
quotes.translation: 公认的自我概念是自我对自性的诠释。这些概念被投射为神与宇宙的观念。由于先前提到的选择性机制——即只有一系列神经脉冲被接受，而自我实相便建立在这些脉冲之上——这些概念具备某种生物学有效性。在某个"时间点"，以此类术语诠释的神祇曾作为自我对待其他自我的行为范本。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: For in the very quiet and discipline required to follow the problem, those reactions on the part of the personality will set up actions which will of themselves solve the problem; and we will find that also there will be suggestions given, and very important suggestions, whereby a systematic effort will be made on the part of the personality to enlarge the scope of his action, in spite of the ego's anxiety to limit them, and this itself will seem to work a miracle.
quotes.translation: 因为在追寻问题所需的极度宁静与自律中，人格的这些反应将引发能自行解决问题的行动；我们还会发现其中将出现建议——极为重要的建议——使人格系统性地努力扩展其行动范畴，尽管自我焦虑地试图限制这些行动，而这本身就将看似创造奇迹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego does want to understand and interpret physical reality, and to relate to it. It wants to help you survive within physical existence, but by putting blinders upon it, you hamper its perception and native flexibility. Then because it is inflexible you say that this is the natural function and characteristic of the ego.
quotes.translation: 自我确实想要理解和诠释物质实相，并与之建立关联。它想要帮助你在物质存在中存活，但若给它戴上眼罩，你便阻碍了它的感知与天生的灵活性。而当它变得僵化时，你又说这是自我的自然功能与特性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now. Take for example probable event X. This so-called probable event or action will be experienced by the various portions of the self in their own way. When it is experienced by the ego you call it an actual physical event. When the event is perceived or experienced by other layers of the self, the ego does not know of it.
quotes.translation: 现在。以可能事件X为例。这个所谓的可能事件或行动，将被自我的各个部分以各自的方式体验。当它被自我体验时，你称之为实际的物质事件。当该事件被自我的其他层次感知或体验时，自我对此一无所知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: A confident ego is indeed a prerequisite for psychic venturing, for it is only the confident ego which ultimately feels secure enough to give leeway to the inner self in the long run.
quotes.translation: 一个自信的自我确实是心灵冒险的先决条件，因为唯有自信的自我，最终才能感到足够安全，从而为内在自我留出余地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: First of all, to me the term "unconscious" is a poor one, barely hinting at an actual open psychic system, with deep intertwining roots uniting all kinds of consciousness; a network in which we are all connected. Our individuality rises out of it, but also helps form it. This source contains past, present, and future information; only the ego experiencing time as we know it. I also believe that this open system contains other kinds of consciousness beside our own.
quotes.translation: 首先，对我而言，“无意识”这个术语并不恰当，它几乎无法暗示一个实际开放的心灵系统，这个系统有着深深交织的根系，将各种意识联结在一起；这是一个我们彼此相连的网络。我们的个体性从中升起，但也帮助形成了它。这个源头包含过去、现在和未来的信息；只有自我才体验我们所知的时间。我也相信，这个开放系统除了我们自己的意识之外，还包含其他种类的意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Any gap of assimilation here can be most unfortunate, and sometimes disastrous. Consciousness of self, if you recall, is self-consciousness that still retains self as a part of action, self that perceives its existence within action. Ego, originally a part of this consciousness of self, splits off as previously explained, and attempts to dissociate itself from action, indeed to view action as a result of itself; that is, to view action as a result and not a cause.
quotes.translation: 这里任何同化上的缺口都可能极为不幸，有时甚至是灾难性的。如果你还记得，自我意识是一种仍将自我保留为行动一部分的自觉意识，是感知自身在行动中存在的自我。自我，原本是这自我意识的一部分，如之前所解释的那样分裂出来，并试图将自己与行动分离，实际上是将行动视为自身的结果；也就是说，将行动视为结果而非原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Again past, present and future are definite realities only to the ego. Memory to the ego presupposes the existence of a past that no longer exists within physical reality. When I say that the dreaming self has memory, therefore, of its dream experiences, I mean that it scans its present existence. It is a simultaneous self.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，过去、现在和未来只是对自我而言才是确定的现实。对自我来说，记忆预设了一个在物质实相中不再存在的过去的存在。因此，当我说做梦的自我拥有其梦境体验的记忆时，我的意思是它扫描了它当前的存在。它是一个同时性的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Previous ego patterns can still operate under various circumstances. Ruburt was often a male, and he sometimes attempts to manhandle the feminine aspects of his present personality, to inflict upon it literally qualities that go against its grain. Force, logic over intuition, for example, or intellect over psychic awareness . The psychic abilities in his case are, among other things, aided by that balance of characteristics, and these should not be tampered with.
quotes.translation: 先前的自我模式仍可在各种情况下运作。鲁柏常是男性，他有时会试图粗暴对待自己当前人格中的女性面向，强行赋予其与本质相悖的特质。例如以力量、逻辑压制直觉，或以理智压制心灵觉知。在他的案例中，心灵能力正是得益于这种特质的平衡，这些平衡不应被干扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The selves who ride the wheel therefore also provide some of the power that runs the wheel. It is only because you stress similarities rather than differences that you do not realize that the self that you call the ego is but the appearance, in one particular perspective, of many quite different aspects of the personality.
quotes.translation: 因此，驾驭轮子的诸自己也提供了驱动轮子的部分力量。正因你们强调相似性而非差异性，才未能意识到：你们称为自我的那个自己，不过是人格诸多不同面向在特定视角下的表象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The prime factor of course is the individual's ability to avail himself of energy, and then to utilize it effectively. Coordination and communication between the inner and outer ego is also a strong factor here. You must also keep in mind that the individual creates his own environment through his successive incarnations.
quotes.translation: 首要因素当然是个人运用能量并有效利用它的能力。内在自我与外在自我之间的协调与沟通在此也是重要因素。你还必须谨记，个人通过其连续转世创造自身环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The inner ego sees and knows itself as a part of this action or happening, and sees the entire identity existing in various dimensions simultaneously. The outer ego attempts to cut action short, and so its viewpoint is limited by its own attempt. It perceives its birth and its death, but not beyond its birth or its death.
quotes.translation: 内在自我视自身为这行动或事件的一部分，并看见整个身份同时存在于不同维度。外在自我试图截断行动，因此其视角受限于自身企图。它感知到自身的出生与死亡，却无法超越出生与死亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It does not fear destruction however, as the ego does. It still fights for survival, of course; but the consciousness of plant life involves a consciousness of self as it operates within action. It sees or feels itself as a part of continuing action, and because of this inner atomic knowledge it does not fear destruction, basically, knowing that it will be changed into other kinds of action.
quotes.translation: 然而它并不像自我那样恐惧毁灭。它当然仍为生存而战；但植物生命的意识包含对自我在行动中运作的觉知。它视自身为持续行动的一部分，正因这内在原子知识，它基本不恐惧毁灭，知晓自身将转化为其他形式的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The inner senses collect information of which the conscious self may not be aware. The astral identity of course is aware of communications from both the inner and outer environment. The astral identity is therefore actually a more complete representation of the whole personality, and its abilities are far-reaching. The inner ego of which we have spoken is the director of this astral identity. You should see now how this fits in with some of our older material.
quotes.translation: 内在感官会收集意识自我可能未曾察觉的信息。星光体身份自然能感知来自内在与外在环境的沟通。因此星光体身份实际上是整个人格更完整的代表，其能力深远。我们曾提及的内在自我正是这个星光体身份的指挥者。现在你们应能看出这与我们早期资料如何相互呼应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: I told you that you would have other telepathic or clairvoyant experiences. I did not say however that you would be able to read tomorrows headlines today, so you need have no such fears. Your ego is a sufficiently well-developed one so that you need not worry but that it will set up acceptable blockages, and shield you.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你们会有其他心灵感应或千里眼体验，但并未说你们能提前读到明天的报纸头条，所以无需有此担忧。你们的自我已发展得足够完善，不必担心它不会建立可接受的屏障来保护你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Your own idea of the perilous nature of existence becomes so strong that the ego allows this data to emerge, even though it is "out of time," because your fearful beliefs convince it that you must be on guard. The incidents do not even have to involve you. From all the unconscious telepathic and clairvoyant data available, however, you will be aware of this particular grouping, and it will only serve to reinforce your idea that existence is above all perilous.
quotes.translation: 你们对存在本质充满危险的想法变得如此强烈，以至于自我允许这些"超时空"的数据浮现——因为你们恐惧的信念说服自我必须保持警惕。这些事件甚至不必与你们直接相关。然而从所有无意识的心灵感应与千里眼数据中，你们会特别注意到这类信息群，而这只会强化你们"存在本质充满危险"的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: In many instances however, because of environment and other influences, the ego accepts few of the abilities available, and therefore hampers the full development of personality. Of necessity the ego discards more than it accepts, and this is why Ruburt runs into difficulties when he becomes too egotistically concerned.
quotes.translation: 然而在许多情况下，由于环境及其他影响，自我只接纳了少数可用的能力，因而阻碍了人格的充分发展。自我必然舍弃的多于接纳的，这就是为何鲁柏在过度以自我为中心时遭遇困境的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: --for it has all kinds of implications that we cannot cover in an evening, but it will be more than worthwhile for us to pursue them. Now whether or not a medium is in a trance that is as deep as the Atlantic Ocean, the medium will not be a pure channel. The ego will simply be bypassed, but the other layers of the self, the neurological structures particularly, will continue to operate as always. They will be altered by the perceptions that flow through them.
quotes.translation: ——因为其中蕴含的各种含义我们无法在一晚内尽述，但深入探讨这些议题绝对值得。无论通灵者是否陷入深如大西洋的恍惚状态，都不可能成为纯粹的通灵管道。自我虽会被绕开，但自我的其他层面，尤其是神经结构，仍会一如既往地运作。它们会因流经其中的知觉而改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: It attempted to stop other portions of the personality from entering into the ego framework. This ego that so behaved was then simply a group of particular qualities belonging to Ruburt, that were given control for a while to meet particular circumstances, and then stubbornly refused to return to the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 它曾试图阻止人格的其他部分进入自我架构。如此行事的自我，不过是属于鲁柏的特定特质集合体，这些特质为应对特定情境而暂时获得主导权，随后却固执地拒绝回归完整人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It should be obvious that in Ruburt's case no such habitual rejections by his ego have backed up in this manner. The secondary personality, however, is of course a reality in many circumstances. It can be considered as an impeding action in the same manner that an illness can be considered, but its overall value, or detrimental effects must be judged, again, as with an illness, on the overall service or disservice which it performs for the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 显然在鲁柏的例子中，他的自我并未以这种方式累积形成习惯性的排斥。然而，次人格在许多情况下确实是一种实相。它可以被视为一种阻碍性的行为，正如疾病可以被视为阻碍一样，但其整体价值或有害影响，同样必须像对待疾病那样，根据它对整体人格所起的整体助益或损害来判断。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Permanence as the ego thinks of it would be an alien concept to these portions of the self, and to them a highly distasteful concept, adding up to rigidity. Flexibility is the key here, a voluntary changing or alteration of the self as it is allowed to change freely with each probability that is explored. Experience here therefore is of a plastic nature. Some thought concerning your own dream state may give you an intimate key to understand what I mean here.
quotes.translation: 自我所认为的永恒，对这些自我部分而言将是一个陌生的概念，甚至是一个令它们极度反感的概念，因为它意味着僵化。灵活性才是关键——自我随着所探索的每个可能性而自由改变，这是一种自愿的自我转变或调整。因此，此处的经验具有可塑性。思考一下你自己的梦境状态，或许能让你获得一把亲密的钥匙，来理解我在此所说的意思。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: I have told you that the ego, generally speaking, is self conscious action that attempts to set itself apart from action and to consider action as an alien object. Now this altered ego retains its highly specialized self consciousness, and yet it can now experience itself as an identity within and as a part of action.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，一般而言，自我是试图将自己与行动分离、并将行动视为异己客体的自我觉知行动。如今这个变异的自我保留了高度专门化的自我觉知，却又能将自己体验为行动之内及行动之部分的本体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The personality is that consciousness of self of which I have spoken, which is aware of itself within, and a part of, action. The ego attempts to stand apart from action, and to stand apart from the personality, and to mold the personality into a more or less permanent and stable, dependent portion of the ego itself.
quotes.translation: 人格即是我所说的那种自我意识，它觉察到自身存在于行动之内并作为行动的一部分。自我则试图脱离行动、脱离人格，并将人格塑造成自我本身一个相对永恒稳定且依附性的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Groupings of actions of any kind merge into other groupings, both within the physical field and outside of it. All apparent units are merely formed by functions, the functions of action. In this context the ego is also a function of action. There are of course also functions within functions, which should be obvious.
quotes.translation: 任何种类的行动组合都会与其他组合融合，无论是在物质场域之内还是之外。所有看似独立的单元都只是由功能——即行动的功能——所形成。在此脉络下，自我也是行动的一种功能。当然，功能之内还有功能，这应该是显而易见的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In actuality you see, these separate existences occur simultaneously. It is only the ego who makes the time distinction. The various existences are not perceivable by you, or rather they are not perceivable to the ego. In a basic manner, as you know, the past, present and future exist at once in the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 实际上你看，这些分离的存在是同时发生的。只有自我才做出时间的区分。这些不同的存在你无法感知，或者更确切地说，自我无法感知它们。如你所知，在基本层面上，过去、现在和未来同时存在于广袤的当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I am sorry that I cannot give him a review. However, I held up much material the past few sessions, as I dealt with fluttery Ruburt's ego. I trust we have that sort of thing under control. The best thing when you are standing on a diving board is just to plunge in, Ruburt. This teetering back and forth, shall I jump or shan't I, is done with, I hope. He jumps, so to speak, in the water-- but he jumps, no one else. The element is different, and that is all.
quotes.translation: 很抱歉我无法给他一个回顾。然而，过去几节课我搁置了许多资料，因为我一直在处理鲁柏那飘忽不定的自我。我相信我们已经掌控了那种情况。鲁柏，当你站在跳板上的时候，最好的办法就是直接跳下去。我希望这种左右摇摆、跳还是不跳的犹豫已经结束了。他跳进了水里——但跳的是他自己，没有别人。元素不同了，仅此而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Action is not affected by time as you know it. Action also takes place within the spacious present. You may, however, only perceive parts of action in your time breakdown. Ideally, psychological time experiences will allow you to perceive action more clearly and directly. The ego attempts to control action by standing apart from it. Any such division is arbitrary, and in no way affects the nature of action itself. All that changes is your perception of it.
quotes.translation: 行动并不受你所知的时间影响。行动也发生在广袤的当下之中。然而，你只能在你的时间分割中感知到行动的部分。理想情况下，心理时间的体验将让你更清晰、更直接地感知行动。自我试图通过置身事外来控制行动。任何这样的分割都是武断的，绝不会影响行动本身的本质。唯一改变的是你对它的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: If the self were the ego then indeed such precepts would be necessary, but the ego is a small part of the self. Necessary indeed, still, but less necessary than it once was.
quotes.translation: 如果自我就是本体，那么这样的戒律确实必要，但自我只是本体的一小部分。虽然仍然必要，但已不如从前那般必要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: About the same time that the idea of the unsavory subconscious arose so strongly, the idea of the soul went out the window. Millions of people therefore believed in a reality in which they were deprived of the idea of a soul, and burdened by the concept of a very unreliable, if not definitely evil, subconscious. They saw themselves as vulnerable solitary points of egos, riding perilously and unprotected upon the tumultuous waves of involuntary processes.
quotes.translation: 就在关于不讨喜的潜意识观念如此强烈兴起的同时，灵魂的概念被抛诸脑后。因此数百万人相信一种现实，在其中他们被剥夺了灵魂的概念，却背负着一种极其不可靠、甚至堪称邪恶的潜意识概念。他们视自己为脆弱孤立的自我点，在不由自主的进程的汹涌波涛上危险而无助地颠簸。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Psychological time fits into physical time with little trouble. Originally this enabled man in many ways to live in the inner and the outer world with relative ease. Psychological time can be transposed onto physical time, but psychological time cannot flow unhampered or with any freedom through days chopped up into so many clock divisions. The clock time idea was invented by the conscious ego of man for many various reasons, with fear in the foreground.
quotes.translation: 心理时间几乎毫不费力地融入物理时间。这原本使人类得以在许多方面相对轻松地同时生活在内在与外在世界。心理时间可以转置到物理时间上，但若日子被切割成无数钟表刻度，心理时间便无法畅通无阻或自由流动。钟表时间的概念是人类有意识自我出于诸多原因发明的，其中恐惧占据首要位置。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The very involvement of the ego with the inner self will be of great benefit. Nothing would be gained if I told you now that the ego would allow the ulcer to vanish, for there would still be a definite need on your part to understand. And it is indeed the understanding itself which will allow you to let it vanish.
quotes.translation: 自我与内在自性的密切关联将带来极大益处。若我现在告诉你自我会让溃疡消失，你仍无法真正理解，这毫无意义。而正是理解本身，才能让你允许它消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego will become more of an organizer in general, letting in literally a barrage of experiences, and organizing them into meaningful patterns. Now the ego fears such experiences, and censors them and holds them out because it is not certain of its strength, or its ability to mold them into significant patterns.
quotes.translation: 自我将成为更全面的组织者，让大量经验涌入，并将它们组织成有意义的模式。但自我恐惧这类经验，会审查并阻挡它们，因为它不确定自身的力量，也不确定自己能否将这些经验塑造成有意义的模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The inner ego is quite capable of dealing with both types of experience, and it is of course to this inner ego that your own suggestions will make sense, and be acted upon.
quotes.translation: 内在自我完全有能力处理这两种经验，当然，你的建议会对这个内在自我产生意义，并会被它付诸行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: 3. Seth packed a lot of information into the short 689th session for Volume 1. He discussed the innumerable experiments of consciousness with animal-man and man-animal forms; the great communication between man and animal in ancient times, and the deep rapport of both with their natural heritage; psychic and biological blueprints and cellular precognition; the growth of man's ego consciousness; the beginnings of our god concepts and mythology; and more.
quotes.translation: 3. 赛斯在第一册第689节简短的课程中塞入了大量信息。他讨论了意识在动物-人和人-动物形态上的无数实验；远古时代人与动物之间的伟大沟通，以及两者与自然遗产的深厚共鸣；心灵与生物蓝图及细胞预知能力；人类自我意识的发展；我们神祇概念与神话的起源；以及更多内容。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Your own present personalities are merely the result of the particular qualities and ego-images （hyphen） upon which you have chosen to focus your energies and your intent. Initially, before existence upon the physical plane this time, you could just as easily have focused upon a different quality-personality gestalt, although your choice most probably would be in line with a large field of possibilities, possible according to the desires of your entity.
quotes.translation: 你们当前的人格仅仅是特定品质和自我形象（连字符）的结果，这些品质和形象是你选择集中能量和意图的对象。最初，在本次物质层面存在之前，你本可以同样轻易地专注于不同的品质-人格完形，尽管你的选择很可能与一个庞大的可能性领域相符，这些可能性根据你存体的欲望而存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I have visited several. It is difficult to put this into words. These planes of which I have spoken have some basic similarity with your own, though the camouflage patterns have no similarity. That is, the similarity is one of organization, a variety of historical continuity, a strong and involved ego mechanism, a complicated camouflage code system; without, however, the dual inner and outer sense of alienation with which your race has become involved.
quotes.translation: 我曾探访过几个。这很难用言语表达。我所谈到的这些层面与你们自己的层面有某种基本相似性，尽管伪装模式毫无相似之处。也就是说，这种相似性在于组织方式、某种历史连续性、一个强大且涉入的自我机制、一套复杂的伪装编码系统；然而，没有你们种族所陷入的那种内在与外在疏离的双重感受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The psyche knows itself and is aware of its parts. When ego consciousness reached a certain point of biological and mental competence, when experience in the present became extensive enough, then ego consciousness would be at the stage where it could begin to accept greater data. Indeed, it is now at that stage.
quotes.translation: 心灵认识它自己，也觉知其各个部分。当自我意识达到某种生物与心智的胜任程度，当当下的经验变得足够广泛时，自我意识便进入一个能够开始接纳更庞大数据的阶段。事实上，它现在正处于这个阶段。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The outer ego is not continuously, in your terms, aware of anything. It frequently forgets itself. When it becomes swept up in a strong emotion it seems to lose itself. There is unity then but no sense of apartness. When it most vigorously maintains its sense of individuality it is no longer aware of unity-with.
quotes.translation: 就你们而言，外在自我并非持续不断地觉知任何事物。它常常忘记自己。当它被强烈情绪席卷时，似乎会迷失自我。那时虽有合一感，却无分离感。当它最竭力维持其个体感时，便不再觉知与万物的合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: There is however a portion of you, the deeper identity who forms both the inner ego and the outer ego, who decided that you would be a physical being in this place and in this time. This is the core of your identity, the psychic seed from which you sprang, the multidimensional personality of which you are part.
quotes.translation: 然而，你内在有一部分更深的身份——它同时塑造了内在自我与外在自我——正是这部分决定了你将在此时此地成为物质存在。这是你身份的核心，是你萌生的心灵种子，是你所属的多维人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The inner ego or the inner self-conscious self directs such experiences and uses the inner senses in much the same way that you use the outer senses, except that the inner ego knows all of the mechanics involved in the use of the inner senses, and you know little of the mechanics involved with the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 内在自我或内在意识自我引导着这类体验，并以近乎你运用外在感官的方式运用内在感官——区别在于，内在自我通晓运用内在感官的全部机制，而你对运用外在感官的机制却所知甚少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: After this point was passed, and all inner warnings went unheeded, then to one or another, little by little, or perhaps in flashes, clear pictures from the past would rush to the personality who was no longer strong enough to hold them back. Almost instantly the present ego of the personality concerned would set up countermeasures against what it would consider an invasion. The past's inner data would be turned into delusions, fantasies and so forth.
quotes.translation: 当这个临界点被越过，所有内在警告都被置若罔闻时，过去清晰的画面便会以零碎或闪现的方式涌向那个已无力抵挡的人格。几乎同时，该人格的当下自我会针对它视为入侵的事物建立反制措施。过去的内在资料会被转化为幻觉、幻想等形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In psychological time therefore it is at least possible that you can have some experience with other methods when you close off habitual methods of perception. The ego is firmly attached to the use of the physical senses, however. In the dream state there can also be other methods at least slightly experienced
quotes.translation: 因此在心理时间里，当你关闭惯常的感知方式时，至少有可能通过其他方法获得某些体验。然而自我却紧紧依附于物质感官的运用。在梦境状态中，其他方法至少也能获得些许体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The ego fears death, yet in the space of your own physical lifetime portions of the self have undergone like transformations endless times, of which the ego is unaware.
quotes.translation: 自我惧怕死亡，然而在你肉身一生中，自性的某些部分已历经无数次类似的转化，而自我对此毫无察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Dictation: You may then, again, unknowingly acquire an illness and recover, never aware of your malady, being healed because of a series of events that would seemingly have nothing to do with the illness itself -- because in Framework 2 the inner ego, knowing both the reason for the illness, and its cure, brought about those precise situations that remedied the condition. Such events happen automatically, when nothing hampers recovery at your end.
quotes.translation: 口授：于是，你可能在不知不觉中染病又康复，从未察觉自己的病痛，只因一连串看似与疾病本身无关的事件而痊愈——因为在架构二中，内在自我既明了病因，也知晓疗愈之道，便促成了那些恰好能改善状况的情境。当你的层面没有任何阻碍时，这类事件便会自动发生。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The ego cannot so change its focus, but the inner ego of which we have spoken is indeed the self that dreams, and is the "I" who experiences when the ego "I" sleeps.
quotes.translation: 自我无法如此转换焦点，但我们所说的内在自我，正是那个做梦的自性，也是当自我的"我"沉睡时，那个体验着的"我"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Understanding of these conflicts will go a long way to ease the symptoms. The stiff neck, when it occurs--the neck quite literally expresses the rigidity of attitude. It is easier for him to withdraw than it appears. In this case, however, the subconscious recognized the danger and symbolically expressed through the organism, the ego's intent. The symptoms therefore were therapeutic in nature, in that their purpose was the solving of the dilemma.
quotes.translation: 对这些冲突的理解将大大缓解症状。当颈部僵硬发生时——脖子确实表达了态度的僵化。对他来说，退缩比表面上看起来更容易。然而，在这种情况下，潜意识认出了危险，并通过有机体象征性地表达了自我的意图。因此，这些症状本质上是治疗性的，因为它们的目的在于解决困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: They simply appear to be different. As a rule the ego is not aware of its departure from one physical organism and its growth into another. This is a projection. The years of growth, as I have told you, are illusion. Value fulfillment is the law of the universe, and it appears as growth within your system.
quotes.translation: 它们只是看起来不同。通常，自我并不意识到它从一个物理有机体离开并进入另一个。这是一种投射。如我告诉过你的，成长岁月是幻相。价值完成是宇宙的法则，它在你们的系统内表现为成长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: In the past, for example, the ego accepted only knowledge that came through the senses through the physical surroundings. Now it is open to inner data to a large degree. Granted, certain interpretations must be made. Nevertheless, once this freedom is achieved, the ego can never return to its former state.
quotes.translation: 例如，在过去，自我只接受通过感官从物理环境获得的知识。现在它在很大程度上对内在资料开放。诚然，必须做出某些诠释。然而，一旦这种自由被达成，自我永远无法回到它以前的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: (10:24.) God, therefore, became an idea projected outward, independent of the individual, divorced from nature. He became the reflection of man's emerging ego, with all of its brilliance, savagery, power, and intent for mastery. The adventure was a highly creative one despite the obvious disadvantages, and represented an "evolution" of consciousness that enriched man's subjective experience, and indeed added to the dimensions of reality itself.
quotes.translation: （10:24）因此，上帝被投射成一个独立于个体、脱离自然的观念。他成为人类新兴自我的反映，带着其所有的辉煌、野蛮、力量与主宰意图。尽管有明显的不利之处，这场冒险仍极具创造力，代表了意识的一种"进化"，丰富了人类的主观体验，甚至增添了实相本身的维度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You will see why this is an important point when you reread this material. You will see why, although the conscious human being may seem to be the result of this combination and recombination, he is, nevertheless, more than that result. He is a particular personality formed purposely, and not in a random fashion, the inner ego creating a replica of itself to function within a definite, peculiar set of circumstances. This is extremely important.
quotes.translation: 当你重读这段资料时，就会明白为何这是重点。你会明白，尽管有意识的人类看似是这种组合与再组合的结果，但他却超越了这个结果。他是特意形成的特定人格，而非随机形成——内在自我创造自身的复制品，以便在明确而特殊的情境中运作。这一点极为重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Hypnosis is one method of examining dreams. Our method is perhaps the best one. The inner self constantly changes its focus. I have said that consciousness is merely the direction in which the inner self focuses at any particular time. In order to examine the reality of dreams it is necessary to change the focus of the inner self to those directions in which the inner self moves, when the ego does not limit its scope to camouflage reality only.
quotes.translation: 催眠是检视梦境的一种方法。我们的方法或许是最佳途径。内在自我不断转换其焦点。我曾说过，意识不过是内在自我在特定时刻聚焦的方向。为了检视梦境的实相，必须将内在自我的焦点转向那些当自我不再将其范围局限于伪装实相时，内在自我所移动的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: By adulthood the trance, the intense focus, is most strongly upon him. It is after this period that the trance little by little weakens its hold. By the period you call old age the inner attention is already escaping. The strong focus of psychic energy needed to maintain the splendid physical image-organization is no longer given. The conscious ego with which you are familiar cries out its bewilderment, for has it not always sensed immortality?
quotes.translation: 到成年期，出神状态——即强烈的聚焦——对他影响最为显著。正是此阶段之后，出神状态逐渐减弱其掌控力。到了你们所谓的老年时期，内在注意力已开始脱离。维持那辉煌的形体组织所需的心灵能量强烈聚焦已不再给予。你们所熟悉的有意识自我困惑地呼喊，因为它不是一直感知到不朽吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In his art we have the nostalgia of the ego for past time, and for lost control of a self that has already vanished, and changed into something new. It is ego who plans for the future, trying to anticipate the environment in which it must operate. Its anticipations, of course, then form that environment.
quotes.translation: 在他的艺术中，我们看到了自我对过往时光的怀旧，以及对一个已消逝并转化为新事物的自我失去掌控的怅惘。正是自我为未来做规划，试图预判它必须运作的环境。当然，它的预判随后便形成了那个环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: All projections involve literally an extension of identity and self. The usual limitations set upon the self by the ego vanish. Now. This gives some hint of the abilities that exist for the individual in future existences. （Long pause, head down, eyes closed.） Whether or not projections are conscious, they occur in any case, and the personality learns from them. The conscious projection however involves a much higher achievement. （Long pause.）
quotes.translation: 所有投射都确实涉及身份与自我的延伸。自我所设定的惯常限制在此消失。这暗示了未来存在中个体所具备的能力。（长停顿，低头，闭眼。）无论投射是否有意识，它们总会发生，人格从中学习。但有意识的投射则涉及更高层次的成就。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now. As I have told you in the past, the individual does indeed survive physical death, but there is a reorganization of psychological elements that compose the personality. The personality, even as you know it, is never static, always changing, and even the ego is not the same from one day to the next.
quotes.translation: 正如我过去告诉你们的，个体确实在肉体死亡后继续存在，但构成人格的心理元素会经历重组。即便就你们所知，人格也绝非静止不变，始终在变化，甚至自我也并非日复一日保持相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now. I have said that any of you and all of you create a dream universe of validity, actuality, durability, and for Philip's benefit, self-determination, in the same manner that the entity projects the reality of its various personalities. As there is no contact between the entity and the ordinary conscious ego, so there is no contact on a conscious level between the self who dreams and the dream world which has its own independent existence.
quotes.translation: 我曾说过，你们中的每一位和所有人，都创造了一个具有真实性、实在性、持久性——为菲利普起见，还有自主性——的梦境宇宙，其方式正如存有投射其各种人格的现实。正如存有与普通意识自我之间没有接触，做梦的自我与具有独立存在的梦境世界之间，在意识层面也没有接触。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When the ego is of such a rigid nature that it distorts physical reality out of all context, then however the personality had better rely upon the subconscious even in this respect, for the subconscious will at least perceive those elements of physical reality that immediately threaten the whole self.
quotes.translation: 当自我本质僵化到扭曲物质实相至完全脱离脉络的程度时，即使在这方面，人格最好还是依赖潜意识，因为潜意识至少能感知到物质实相中那些直接威胁整体自我的元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The personal emotions and memories loosened, freed him; but the journey was necessarily destined by the particular emotions that powered it, and the destination was one, incidentally, familiar to the ego, and to some extent at least one to which both ego and subconscious were nostalgically connected.
quotes.translation: 松脱的个人情绪与记忆解放了他；但这场旅程必然由驱动它的特定情绪所注定，而目的地恰巧是自我所熟悉的，至少在一定程度上是自我与潜意识都怀有乡愁联结之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: As far as Ruburt's personality structure is concerned, we are extremely fortunate. The ego is secure enough, and strong enough, as an organizing agent, for the basic personality energies, so that it can allow me to communicate without fear that the personality structure will be in any way disrupted.
quotes.translation: 就鲁柏的人格结构而言，我们极为幸运。作为基本人格能量的组织者，自我足够稳固且强大，因此它能允许我进行沟通，而无需担忧人格结构会受到任何方式的干扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Give us a moment. (Pause.) The brain is capable (underlined)of interpreting and transmitting far more inner information than it does. It is the ego's idea of what is possible, the ego's concept of reality, that determines in a large manner whether or not the brain will interpret any particular data.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻。（停顿。）大脑有能力（强调）解读和传递比它实际所做的更多的内在信息。正是自我对可能性的看法、自我对实相的概念，在很大程度上决定了大脑是否会解读任何特定数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: This one, that one, is one of your favorites, and one of Ruburt's, and for that reason I myself do feel a warmth. I would suggest that Mark also exercise himself in the use of psychological time. He should progress fairly rapidly. His impulsive nature is actually somewhat more restrained in this life than it was in the previously past life. Nevertheless, one of the problems for the personality is still the need for a more disciplined ego.
quotes.translation: 这一位、那一位，是你们最喜欢的人之一，也是鲁柏最喜欢的人之一，正因如此，我本人也感到一种温暖。我建议马克也练习使用心理时间。他应该会进步得相当快。他冲动的本性在这一生中实际上比在前一世受到更多的约束。不过，人格面临的问题之一仍然是需要一个更有纪律的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is this that allows the body its physical manifestation. It is this that allows for all change. It can be called on one level instinct, on other levels it is much more. When it operates at its most efficient level suggestion is indeed the inner affirmation. Without the ego we do not have what you call negative suggestions, for when action is left to itself it flows unimpeded, seeking its fulfillment along its numberless unimpeded ways.
quotes.translation: 正是这个让身体得以物质化显现。正是这个允许一切改变发生。在某一层面它可以被称为本能，在其他层面它则远不止于此。当它以最高效的方式运作时，暗示确实是内在的肯定。没有自我，我们就不会有你们所谓的负面暗示，因为当行动任其自然时，它会畅通无阻地流动，沿着无数条无阻的路径寻求其圆满。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Such encounters also occur during waking hours, but the ego is not aware of them. I will have some comments later in the session that may enable you to become more aware of other realities beside your own, and also some advice that will enable you to operate within your own system more effectively.
quotes.translation: 这类相遇在清醒时也会发生，但自我并未察觉。稍后在本节课中，我会提供一些评论，或许能让你更意识到自身现实之外的其他实相，同时也会给出一些建议，使你能更有效地在自己的系统内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The ego receives, in fact, much of its stability because of this subconscious retention. Were it not for past experiences in other lives on the part of deeper layers of the self, the ego would find it almost impossible to relate to other individuals, and the cohesiveness of society would not exist.
quotes.translation: 事实上，自我之所以获得许多稳定性，正是由于这种潜意识中的保留。若非自我更深层面在过去其他生命中的经验，自我几乎无法与其他个体建立关联，社会的凝聚力也将不复存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The seance affair (last session) frightened the ego to some extent. As a whole personality now, Ruburt has found himself operating at prime efficiency in several late incidents, when the ego and intuitive self have worked in harmony. This is a promise of what he can expect with growing regularity.
quotes.translation: 上次的通灵事件在某种程度上惊吓了自我。作为整体人格，鲁柏在最近几次事件中发现自己以最高效率运作，当时自我与直觉自我和谐共处。这预示着他将能越来越规律地体验到这种状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: It develops, again, as you know, Joseph and Ruburt, it expands as an idea expands, taking up no space. The self may project itself into the dimensions of space and time, but the projection is a small part of its actuality. Even the uppermost or surface elements of the self with which you are familiar, the ego and the uppermost layers of the subconscious, even these cannot be said to be born at any given time, in time as you conceive it.
quotes.translation: 它再次发展，如约瑟夫和鲁柏所知，它如同一个理念般扩展，不占据任何空间。自我可以投射自身进入时空维度，但投射只是其实际存在的一小部分。即使你所熟悉的自我最上层或表面元素——自我与潜意识的最上层，甚至这些也不能说是在你所理解的时间中、于任何特定时刻诞生的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is true the division is arbitrary. Nevertheless the ego is a part of the self. We are acquainting it with other portions of the self. It is still the director of physical activities. Properly trained and intuitively governed this portion of the self can be of benefit in survival circumstances.
quotes.translation: 这种划分确实是武断的。然而，自我是自体的一部分。我们正在让它认识自体的其他部分。它仍然是身体活动的指挥者。经过适当训练并受直觉引导，自体的这一部分能在生存环境中发挥助益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: (9:25.) The states of consciousness merge also one into the other, and it is obvious that I am using the terms of depth to make the discussion easier. Starting with the ego or waking consciousness as the outer self focused toward exterior reality, these states are broad, more like plains to be explored. Each one, therefore, opens in great adjacent areas also, and there are many "paths" to be taken according to your interest and desire.
quotes.translation: （9:25。）意识状态也彼此交融，显然我使用深度术语是为了让讨论更易理解。从作为聚焦于外在现实的外在自我的自我或清醒意识开始，这些状态是广阔的，更像待探索的平原。因此，每个状态也向邻近的广阔区域敞开，根据你的兴趣与渴望，有许多“路径”可供选择。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (10:10. Deliberately but intently:) Other quite-as-valid messages were ignored. They became, while present, biologically invisible. The cells still reacted to these otherwise neglected pulses, as they needed data from both the past and future to maintain the body's balance in "the present." The necessity for immediate conscious exterior action at a "definite" point of intersection with events was left to the emerging ego consciousness.
quotes.translation: （10:10。刻意而专注地：）其他同样有效的讯息被忽略了。它们在存在时，在生物学上变得不可见。细胞仍然对这些被忽视的脉冲做出反应，因为它们需要来自过去和未来的数据，以维持身体在“当下”的平衡。在“明确”的事件交汇点上，立即进行有意识的外在行动的必要性，被留给了正在浮现的自我意识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: With the exception of the ego, the various parts of the personality do not react to time as a series of moments. All is experienced as present. The child therefore within the adult personality is not dead, nor are his reactions considered, basically, as reactions which are part of a past behavior pattern; but these reactions exist side by side with adult reactions.
quotes.translation: 除了自我之外，人格的各个部分并不将时间视为一系列时刻。一切都被体验为当下。因此，成人人格中的孩子并未死去，他的反应基本上也不被视为过去行为模式的一部分；相反，这些反应与成人的反应并存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In many cases memory remains unconscious as far as waking self is concerned, but the experiences themselves can completely change the structure of an individual life. Disastrous courses can be averted through such inner communications and illuminations, whether or not the ego is aware of them.
quotes.translation: 就清醒的自我而言，记忆在许多情况下仍是无意识的，但这些经验本身能彻底改变个体生命的结构。无论自我是否意识到这些内在沟通与启示，灾难性的历程都能因此得以避免。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I suggest your break, and if this hasn't broken you up then nothing will. You are indeed as you can see broken up a million times, and put together in many various manners; and yet you retain the inner ego, and in other words your own identity. But this identity must change. This again is no contradiction. Nothing can be static, and believe it or not, nothing is.
quotes.translation: 我建议你们休息一下，如果这还没把你们拆散，那就没什么能拆散你们了。你们确实如所见般被拆散了无数次，又以各种方式重组；然而你们仍保有内在自我，换言之，你们自己的身份认同。但这身份认同必须改变。这再次并非矛盾。没有任何事物能静止不变，信不信由你，确实没有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The final culmination of the dream, when he did scream and run away, represented his subconscious giving him its solution. The position was threatening because it represented a possible dilution of his energies from his main objective of writing, into a superficial ego satisfaction, which would have left him basically not only unsatisfied but personally betrayed.
quotes.translation: 当他终于尖叫着逃跑时，梦境达到了最终高潮，这代表潜意识给出了它的解决方案。那处境之所以具有威胁性，是因为它代表他的能量可能从写作的主要目标，被稀释为肤浅的自我满足，这最终不仅会让他感到不满足，更会感到被自己背叛。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: There are points in that book which we have not yet discussed, for the ground has not been prepared sufficiently. Reincarnation and projection are as real and as difficult for the ego to grasp, as the nature of dreams. You can begin to understand the effect of dreams at least upon your daily life. Reincarnations and projections of which you are not consciously aware have an equal effect, a stronger effect, upon your daily existence.
quotes.translation: 那本书中有一些我们尚未讨论的要点，因为基础尚未充分建立。转世与投射，其真实性与难以被自我理解的难度，与梦的本质如出一辙。你至少可以开始理解梦对你日常生活的影响。那些你未曾有意识地察觉的转世与投射，对你的日常存在同样具有影响，甚至更为强烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There would still be repercussions, however, though less disastrous, that would be unavoidable. For again, basically the personality does not differentiate between a waking and a sleeping experience. The importance of any experience is judged by the personality according to its personal vividness and significance. It is only the ego who makes other distinctions.
quotes.translation: 然而，即便后果不那么严重，仍会有不可避免的余波。因为从根本上说，人格并不区分清醒体验与睡眠体验。人格会根据体验的生动程度与重要性来评判其价值。只有自我才会做出其他区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Once more, the field of probabilities does not consist of imaginative fancy, nor of nebulous activity. It is quite as real as the physical universe. The experiences that are encountered there by other portions of the self are used by the whole self, and the knowledge thus gains is invaluable. Not only in terms of overall experience, but also as a means of training the ego, and the subconscious, to choose between various activities.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，概率场并非由想象力的幻想或模糊的活动构成。它与物质宇宙一样真实。自我其他部分在那里遭遇的体验，会被整体自我所运用，由此获得的知识具有无可估量的价值。这不仅关乎整体经验的积累，更是训练自我与潜意识在不同活动间做出选择的手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: In dreams also, where no space as you know it exists, you have complete freedom of space. When the ego gives up its hold upon what it considers control of action, then as in dreams almost any action is possible. And when the ego gives up its claim of space in a dream, all space is available.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，也没有你们所认知的空间存在，你们拥有完全的空间自由。当自我放弃它自认为对行动的控制时，就像在梦境中几乎任何行动都可能发生。而当自我在梦中放弃对空间的宣称时，所有空间都变得可用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Much of the needed development takes place in the dream state. I wanted to mention that particular dream of yours, Joseph, in which you saw yourself at your back window. There was a merging of inner and outer egos. The startled outer ego did indeed hold you back from an excellent projection.
quotes.translation: 许多必要的发展发生在梦境状态。约瑟，我想特别提到你那个特定的梦境，在其中你看到自己站在后窗。那是一个内在自我与外在自我的融合。受惊的外在自我确实阻止了你进行一次极佳的出体投射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: To follow the above material, let us emphasize the importance here of a clear, honest, perceptive intellect, for it is largely upon the intellect that the ego depends. The intellect collects from the physical environment those situations and conditions which affect, or will affect, the ego.
quotes.translation: 为理解上述内容，让我们强调清晰、诚实、具有洞察力的心智的重要性，因为自我在很大程度上依赖心智。心智从物质环境中收集那些影响或将要影响自我的情境与条件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Again: a change of schedules and habits. It is good that you are making these changes. If some were not made, they would be demanded by other portions of the self. They are breakthroughs, and therapeutic. The ego is working with you now, for it grew frightened and is taking steps to change.
quotes.translation: 再次强调：改变日程和习惯是好的。你正在做出这些改变，这很好。如果某些改变未能实现，它们也会被自我的其他部分所要求。这些改变是突破，且具有疗愈性。现在自我正与你合作，因为它曾感到恐惧，并正在采取措施进行改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: As it is, he does not have sufficient inner confidence to give reign to his abilities, for changing his focus point. It was the outlet of creative writing, early adopted, that saved him from becoming a most rigid and frozen personality; and if he had adopted such a stone-like ego, then indeed he would now be in dangerous circumstances, since his strong creative nature would finally and disastrously have shattered the stone image.
quotes.translation: 事实上，他缺乏足够的内在自信来释放自己的能力，以改变他的焦点。正是早期采用的创作性写作的出口，拯救了他，使他免于成为最僵化、最冻结的人格；如果他采用了如此石化的自我，那么他现在确实会处于危险的境地，因为他强烈的创造性本质最终会灾难性地粉碎那石像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Without the determination of the inner ego, cohesion of identity would be impossible. The self as you know it is many things, and contains many more vestibules and rooms than you now imagine. Even the outer ego contains multitudinous chambers and interconnections of which you are unaware.
quotes.translation: 没有内在自我的决心，身份的凝聚力将不可能存在。你所知的自我包含许多事物，并拥有比你目前想象的更多的门厅和房间。即使是外在自我也包含着你所不知的众多密室和相互连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now. It should be obvious that the psychological framework must be different when the time system of experience is different. You can see easily for yourself the individual psychological variations that exist simply between the ego and the subconscious, but these portions of the self are very close. Other portions of the self, that deal in what you would call probable realities, are very different in their psychological makeup.
quotes.translation: 现在。显然，当经验的时间系统不同时，心理架构必然不同。你很容易就能看出自我与潜意识之间存在的个体心理差异，但自我的这些部分非常接近。自我的其他部分，处理你们所谓或然实相的部分，其心理构成则大不相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: In a fully ego-oriented state of consciousness this is not so, for the ego constantly tries to maintain a rigid electromagnetic balance. This is obviously impossible, but in the attempt egotistical identity is helped in its efforts to maintain a more or less closed system of perceptions.
quotes.translation: 在完全以自我为导向的意识状态中并非如此，因为自我不断试图维持一种僵化的电磁平衡。这显然不可能，但在这种尝试中，自我身份得以维持其或多或少封闭的感知系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: On one hand, basically, the self is limitless, both electromagnetically and because of the nature of action, which affects all other action. The self does not however proceed along straight lines, from a birth to a death. This is only the self that the ego perceives. Action cannot remain inactive or motionless, though the motion may not always be apparent.
quotes.translation: 一方面，从根本上看，自我既是无限电磁性的，也因行动的本质而无限，这行动影响所有其他行动。然而自我并非沿着直线从出生走向死亡。这只是自我所感知的自我。行动无法保持静止或不动，尽管其运动可能并不总是显而易见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: (From the 58th session for June 1, 1964:) Ruburt and myself are offshoots of the same entity. The difference in time is but a camouflage distortion. The entity was a particularly strong one, and many of its egos have made the decision to turn into entities ... And now, my dear patient Joseph, may I tell you that you are also part of that same entity -- and this is one of the reasons why I am able to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年6月1日第58节课：）鲁柏和我同属一个存有。时间差异不过是伪装扭曲。这个存有特别强大，它的许多自我已决定转化为存有……现在，我亲爱的耐心约瑟夫，容我告诉你，你也是同一个存有的一部分——这也是我能与你们两人沟通的原因之一。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The subconscious--to finish what I began--the subconscious cushions the outer ego really against the shock of true reality. If sometimes it seems to you that you are living in a dream world, in many respects you are. You are not strong enough yet to bear the brunt of basic reality, and you construct complicated dream worlds in order to find shelter from what would appear to you as savage, uncontrolled and undisciplined chaos.
quotes.translation: 潜意识——接续我未说完的部分——潜意识实际上缓冲了外在自我对真实实相的冲击。若有时你觉得自己活在梦境中，从许多方面看确实如此。你尚未强大到能承受基本实相的冲击，于是构建复杂的梦境世界，以躲避在你眼中显得野蛮、失控且毫无纪律的混沌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It will therefore return once more to the same plane with which it was familiar, where it will meet with new challenges, and develop new abilities that will, however, be of the same basic nature; that is, if we are speaking of your plane, the ego would have new experiences, develop new abilities, perhaps solve old problems, balance out deficiencies, but still be dealing with problems of manipulation and physical construction.
quotes.translation: 因此它将再次回到熟悉的同一层面，在那里迎接新的挑战，发展新的能力，但这些能力本质上仍属相同范畴；也就是说，若以你们层面而言，自我将获得新经验、发展新能力，或许解决旧问题、平衡缺陷，但仍需处理操控与物质建构的课题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The consciousness so attuned however is only a small portion of the individual's total consciousness. In your system it is now fashionable to refer to this as the ego. The psychological structures are indeed so imprinted. However they are also aware and conscious of huge portions of themselves that are not so imprinted. They are aware of themselves simultaneously as individuals imprinted so as to react within several systems.
quotes.translation: 如此调谐的意识，却只是个体整体意识的一小部分。在你们的系统中，如今流行将其称为"自我"。心理结构确实被如此铭印，然而它们也觉察到自身未被铭印的庞大部分。它们同时意识到自己是受铭印的个体，以便在多个系统中做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There is a chameleon like characteristic, a continuity, not in terms of successive moments, but a continuity in terms of design. Events are perceived in what would seem a most alien manner to the ego. The probabilities are traveled through, so to speak. Identity or continuity of the self is retained and strengthened in a series of simultaneous events, with value fulfillment foremost insofar as purposeful action is concerned.
quotes.translation: 存在一种类似变色龙的特质，一种连续性——并非指连续的时刻，而是设计上的连续性。事件以对自我而言极为陌生的方式被感知。可以说，概率被穿越了。在同时性事件系列中，自我的身份或连续性得以保留并强化，就目的性行动而言，价值完成居于首位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The situations had changed but the ego framework had grown rigid, rigid enough so that it could in a large degree dominate certain normally subconscious processes, bringing forth the physical symptoms. Now there is always an imprinting process within the personality, belonging to past experience. A previous inclination to gluttony had once led him to some slight gout, and in the present case there was a swelling of the feet.
quotes.translation: 情境已然改变，但自我框架却变得僵化——僵化到足以在相当程度上支配某些通常属于潜意识的过程，从而引发身体症状。人格内部始终存在一个属于过往经验的铭印过程。他先前贪食的倾向曾导致轻微痛风，而此次则表现为脚部肿胀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Latent potentialities, always present within the system, are activated as they are needed. The physical self can, it is true, become somewhat bewildered, but the ego also learns and expands so that it is able to accept and use the new information, and benefit from it. It quickly learns methods for example to utilize such activities for the purposes of the psychological structures that it recognizes and feels responsible for.
quotes.translation: 潜藏的可能性始终存在于系统之内，当需要时便会启动。肉身自我确实可能感到些许困惑，但自我也会学习与扩展，从而能够接纳并运用新信息，从中获益。它很快学会如何利用这类活动，服务于它所认知且自觉负有责任的心理结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Predictions, per se, do not contradict the theory of free will, though free will is dependent upon much more than any freedom of the ego alone. If the ego were allowed to make all the choices, with no veto power from other layers of the self, you would all be in a sad position indeed.
quotes.translation: 预测本身并不违背自由意志的理论，尽管自由意志所依赖的远不止自我层面的自由。若让自我独揽所有选择权，而自我其他层面毫无否决权，你们所有人的处境确实会相当可悲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The mass of valid projections are indeed made from the dreaming body. When the excursion is over the return to the dream body is made with no strain, you see, for the ego is little concerned. In most such instances however the knowledge is then not available to the waking self at all.
quotes.translation: 大量有效的投射确实源自做梦的身体。当旅程结束时，回归梦身体的过程毫不费力，你看，因为自我几乎不参与其中。然而在大多数此类情况下，清醒的自我根本无法获知这些知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: It does therefore contain within it the knowledge of its experiences upon your plane, though such an entity can spring from any plane. This of course represents the most extraordinary possibility, and such an entity can, if it is so propelled by its own strength, exist upon a variety of planes, carrying along with it knowledge of all previous planes; and each of its outer egos have the same opportunities. This is important.
quotes.translation: 因此它确实包含它在你们层面上的经验知识，尽管这样的存有可能源自任何层面。这当然代表了最非凡的可能性，而这样的存有，如果被自身力量所驱动，可以存在于各种层面上，并携带所有先前层面的知识；它的每个外在自我都拥有同样的机会。这一点很重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: We find it most frequently that the ego impedes action by refusals. It attempts to maintain a stability that is indeed illusion. The emotions, as you know, are action. When they are allowed their mobility, then they free the personality from resistances. They actually allow for great stability, since their free expression makes it possible for action to be fulfilled in the manner most constructive for the system as a whole.
quotes.translation: 我们最常见到自我通过拒绝来阻碍行动。它试图维持一种确实是幻象的稳定。如你所知，情感就是行动。当情感被允许流动时，它们就能使人格摆脱阻力。它们实际上允许了极大的稳定，因为它们的自由表达使得行动能够以对整个系统最具建设性的方式完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: If physical laws were the only basis for actuality, then telepathy would be impossible. But then, dreams would be equally impossible. For in the dream state the personality is molded and changed through actions that do not exist within the physical universe. The personality reacts to dream experiences as it reacts to any other experience. It does not discriminate, as the ego does, between one kind of experience and another.
quotes.translation: 如果物理法则只是实相的唯一基础，那么心电感应就不可能存在。但同样，梦境也不可能存在。因为在梦境状态中，人格通过那些在物理宇宙中不存在的行动被塑造和改变。人格对梦境经验的反应，就像它对任何其他经验的反应一样。它不像自我那样，在一种经验和另一种经验之间加以区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There is a rather important section in the work he did today. He hit upon something, and if he had continued working, then he would not have needed to ask me in what dimension dream locations exist. He was close to the answer. In this particular section he told the reader that he suspected that Freud's terms, the ego, or the conscious and the subconscious, had in themselves led you seriously astray. Such is indeed the case.
quotes.translation: 他今天的工作中有一个相当重要的段落。他触及了某个关键点，若他继续深入，便无需问我梦境位置存在于哪个维度。他已接近答案。在这特定段落中，他告诉读者，他怀疑弗洛伊德的术语——自我、意识与潜意识——本身已严重误导了你们。事实确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The inner self is always in the process of trying to perfect the nature of that ego which it has adopted. The ego, as you know, is never the same. It bears indeed the stresses that result from daily encounters with physical situations, but it also reaps the rewards that are involved.
quotes.translation: 内在自体始终在试图完善它所采纳的那个自我的本质。如你所知，自我从未恒定不变。它确实承受着日常与物质情境接触所产生的压力，但也收获其中蕴含的回报。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: As the intense experience of great joy or pain often blots out everything else, so would the direct experience of reality blot out, only completely, the outer ego who experienced it directly. At your level the sieve of the subconscious is a necessity and that is one of the main reasons why Ruburt dissociates during our sessions, even though his experience of inner reality is received second handed, so to speak, through me.
quotes.translation: 正如极乐或剧痛的强烈体验常会抹去其他一切，对实相的直接体验也会——只是彻底地——抹去直接体验它的外在自我。在你们的层面上，潜意识的筛网是必要的，这也是鲁柏在课中解离的主要原因之一——即便他内在实相的体验，可以说是经由我间接获得的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The various ego structures therefore exist simultaneously. They are entirely outside of any such framework. They are aware of your perception of time, but it means nothing to them. The various egos of any personality do not think of themselves as having existed one before the other.
quotes.translation: 因此，各种自我结构同时存在。它们完全处于任何此类框架之外。它们知晓你对时间的感知，但时间对它们毫无意义。任何人格的各个自我并不认为彼此有先后存在之分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The overall efficiency of the inner self, or prime identity, is best displayed of course when it adopts an ego that mirrors its own characteristics and intents as closely as possible. There is bound to be a difference however, between the purposes of the inner identity and the ego.
quotes.translation: 内在自体或主要身份的整体效率，当然在采用尽可能贴近自身特性与意图的自我时，最能得到展现。然而，内在身份与自我的目的之间必然存在差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: In some cases the decision is made by the subconscious. However, for various reasons often the ego will simply refuse to make the decision. Occasionally when a decision has been made by the ego, the subconscious will change it, because the decision is obviously such an unwise one.
quotes.translation: 在某些情况下，决定是由潜意识做出的。然而，由于各种原因，自我往往干脆拒绝做决定。偶尔当自我做出决定后，潜意识会改变它，因为这个决定显然非常不明智。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It may choose to return to the same plane as a great originator, using knowledge that it receives from the inner self to make lasting and original innovations upon that plane, according to its interests, abilities and capacity. It will therefore become a Buddha, a Christ, a Michelangelo, a hero in one field or another, an ego who changes the physical world completely in untold manners by the mere fact of its existence.
quotes.translation: 它可能选择作为一个伟大的开创者回到同一层面，利用从内在自我获得的知识，根据自己的兴趣、能力和容量，在该层面做出持久且原创的创新。因此，它将成为一个佛陀、一个基督、一个米开朗基罗、某个领域的英雄，一个仅凭其存在就以无数方式彻底改变物质世界的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The event is not assimilated. It becomes to all intents and purposes a dead end, isolated from the acceptance of the whole ego, and the most advantageous solution here is, of course, that the ego in one manner or another is made to accept this particular portion of its own past.
quotes.translation: 这个事件没有被同化。它实际上变成了一个死胡同，与整个自我的接纳隔绝开来，而这里最有利的解决方案当然是，让自我以某种方式接受它自己过去的这一特定部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now, in the three-dimensional reality in which your ego has its main focus, becoming presupposes arrival, or a destination -- an ending to that which has been in a state of becoming. But the soul or entity has its existence basically in other dimensions, and in these, fulfillment is not dependent upon arrivals at any points, spiritual or otherwise.
quotes.translation: 现在，在你们自我主要聚焦的三维实相中，"成为"预设了到达或一个目的地——即对处于"成为"状态中的事物的一种终结。但灵魂或存有基本上存在于其他维度中，在这些维度里，圆满并不依赖于在任何点上的到达，无论是灵性上的还是其他方面的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There is a basic difference you see between a survival personality, and the personality as you know it. The individual in physical life shows his surface face, so to speak, outward. Inner psychological realities are hidden beneath the physically-oriented ego simply because it cannot afford to deal with them. Its one main purpose is simply to allow the personality to operate effectively within its physical environment.
quotes.translation: 生存人格与你所知的人格之间存在着根本差异。物质生命中的个体展现的是其表面面貌，内在心理现实被隐藏在以物质为导向的自我之下，只因它无法处理这些现实。自我的主要目的仅是让人格在其物质环境中有效运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: A trained and flexible ego will be able to momentarily relinquish its dominancy during the experience itself. We will have more to say here in connection with these advanced psychological structures, and what is called the psychedelic experience. At our next session, I will begin also to answer Ruburt's questions concerning such an experience without drugs. You have many hints, and I will give you further instruction.
quotes.translation: 训练有素且灵活的自我，能在体验过程中暂时放下主导权。关于这些高级心理结构以及所谓的迷幻体验，我们后续会有更多阐述。在下节课中，我将开始回答鲁柏关于无需药物即可获得此类体验的问题。你们已获得诸多提示，我将给予进一步指导。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The panic itself will not be as severe as Ruburt faces it and realizes the connection with a gulping of air. I know about the book on autohypnosis, and believe that this will be a big help to Ruburt along these lines, as it will enable him to bypass many of the ego's objections. This habit for various reasons then is deeply rooted, and seemed to be a harmless answer to a number of past and present needs and problems.
quotes.translation: 恐慌本身不会像鲁柏面对时那般剧烈，当他意识到这与急促呼吸的关联时。我知晓那本关于自我催眠的书籍，相信这将对鲁柏大有裨益，能助他绕过自我的诸多抗拒。这个习惯因多种原因根深蒂固，看似是对过去与当下诸多需求及问题的无害回应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The inner ego therefore is your counterpart. It breaks energy down into simple components, but it must still operate within the given laws of the inner universe. It therefore forms the separate molecules and atoms that will compose the individual. Its own knowledge is put into condensed form, and the molecules are therefore able to combine and recombine, according to the material properties inherent in your universe.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在自我是你的对应体。它将能量分解为简单的组成部分，但仍须在内在宇宙的既定法则中运作。它由此形成构成个体的独立分子与原子。其自身知识被浓缩为精炼形态，分子因而能依据你们宇宙固有的物质属性进行组合与重组。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The ego then, is only part of a much larger self, but because consciously you do not perceive the whole self you arbitrarily make a unit from a truly indivisible identity, and call this the "I." This designation, this classification, in no way affects the nature of that indivisible self. It merely affects your own conscious attitudes. You succeed in cutting off, in theory, one portion of the self from the whole self.
quotes.translation: 自我仅是更宏大自性的一部分，但因意识层面无法感知整体自性，你便武断地将真正不可分割的存有切割为单元，并称之为"我"。这种命名与分类，丝毫不会影响那不可分割自性的本质，只会影响你自身的意识态度。你成功地在理论上将自性的一部分与整体割裂开来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There is very little danger that Ruburt's ego would be suppressed. Even in psychic work, though generally speaking, of course, the connotations frighten the ego. The danger is that the subconscious be suppressed, and this is the only real time that Ruburt runs into difficulty.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的自我被压抑的可能性微乎其微。即便在通灵工作中——尽管一般而言，这些内涵当然会令自我感到恐惧——真正的危险在于潜意识被压抑，而这才是鲁柏唯一真正陷入困境的时刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It is turned inward mainly in terms of the ego. There is awareness here of the inner self, but the main energy is knotted in tensions and exhaustions. At the same time the personality does not refresh its energies. If the energies of the personality were turned further inward, or on the other hand turned further outward toward the outside world, there would be an improvement in terms of additional, recharged energy.
quotes.translation: 就自我而言，能量主要向内流转。此处虽能觉察内在自体，但主要能量却纠结于紧张与耗竭之中。与此同时，人格未能更新其能量。若人格能量能更深入向内流转，或反之更彻底向外投射于外在世界，则能因获得额外充能而有所改善。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: If the personality handles his dream activities capably, then the problem action finds release. When the ego is too rigid, it will even attempt to censor dreams. When the personality in general is too rigid, freedom of action is not entirely permitted even in the dream state.
quotes.translation: 若人格能妥善处理其梦境活动，则问题行为得以释放。当自我过于僵化时，甚至会试图审查梦境。当整体人格过于僵化时，即便在梦境状态中，行动的自由也无法完全被允许。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This takes energy, and on those occasions when there is much activity of this sort, he will be seen to become fatigued. The resistance is obviously necessary, however. It is this same sort of resistance, on a much simpler level, that he uses to block me whenever his ego becomes overly concerned. Now I will indeed close our session. It has been a most fruitful one, and I feel quite close to both of you this evening.
quotes.translation: 这需要消耗能量，当此类活动频繁时，人们会看到他变得疲惫。然而这种抵抗显然是必要的。正是这种相同性质的抵抗，在更简单的层面上，每当他的自我变得过度担忧时，他就用它来阻挡我。现在我将确实结束我们的课程。这是一次非常富有成果的课程，今晚我感觉与你们俩都非常亲近。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In your dreams, when the conscious ego is stilled, you often and continually work this transformation, and we have gone into this problem. What we are concerned with is this reconstruction, but this reconstruction in durable enough terms so that communication can take place.
quotes.translation: 在你们的梦境中，当有意识的自我静止时，你们经常且持续地进行这种转化，我们已经探讨过这个问题。我们所关注的是这种重建，但这种重建必须以足够持久的方式呈现，以便沟通能够发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I would like to add a few notes here. Ruburt was simply not confident enough in the Father Trainor episode last evening to adequately perform the inner manipulations necessary, without your presence. The first occasion was completely spontaneous, and his ego was not aroused.
quotes.translation: 我想在这里补充几点。昨晚在特雷纳神父的事件中，鲁柏只是不够自信，无法在没有你在场的情况下充分进行必要的内在操作。第一次完全是自发的，他的自我没有被唤起。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ruburt's ego now contains elements that did not at one time belong to it. It contains portions of the self that are--I hesitate, you see, to say superior, for he is not to get conceited--but portions of the self that contain more abilities than those usually held by the ego.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的自我现在包含了某些原本不属于它的元素。它包含了自我的某些部分——我犹豫着，你知道，是否该说这些部分更优越，以免他变得自大——但这些部分拥有比通常自我所持有的更多能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: If you take The Three Faces of Eve, in which actually four egos were involved, and imagine each of these egos taking over, so to speak, in completely separate existences, in your past, present and future, then you may come somewhat closer to the true nature of reincarnation.
quotes.translation: 如果你以《三面夏娃》为例——其中实际上涉及了四个自我——并想象这些自我各自接管，可以说，在完全分离的存在中，在你的过去、现在和未来，那么你或许能更接近轮回的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The increase in voice will not produce fatigue. It never does. Also, there is no invasion of Ruburt. The personality with whom I am working is intelligent. For reasons that I will explain much later, it was necessary that I align myself with a personality who is both intelligent and intuitional. I do not want to shove the ego aside. I have no need or wish to shove the existing personality aside. We get along well.
quotes.translation: 声音的增强不会导致疲劳。它从来不会。此外，鲁柏也没有受到侵犯。与我合作的人格是聪明的。出于我将在很久以后解释的原因，我必须与一个既聪明又直觉的人格结盟。我不想把自我推到一边。我没有需要或愿望将现有的人格推到一边。我们相处得很好。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It dwells in the physical universe, but it can indeed also perceive and appreciate other realities. The ego is part of the personality, and as such it can partake of sturdier, heartier, more vivid realities. The personality can dwell, and does dwell, in many worlds at once.
quotes.translation: 它栖身于物质宇宙，但确实也能感知并欣赏其他实相。自我是人格的一部分，因此也能分享更坚实、更丰沛、更生动的实相。人格可以同时栖身于许多世界，也确实栖身于许多世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The identity, indeed, is as much and more the inner self as it is the ego. This has been mentioned in the past, but Ruburt became so fearful of his own spontaneity in early life that he was more or less forced, out of fear, to deny the validity of his identity with the inner self. On some occasions, as the other evening, he spontaneously accepts this identification, particularly when alcohol acts as a depressant.
quotes.translation: 身份认同，实际上，内在自性所占的比重与自我相当，甚至更多。这一点过去曾提及，但鲁柏在早年生活中对自己的自发性如此恐惧，以至于他出于恐惧，或多或少被迫否认了自己与内在自性认同的有效性。在某些场合，比如前几天晚上，他会自发地接受这种认同，尤其是在酒精作为抑制剂时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is unfortunately true that the dominant present ego can be degraded on your plane to an amazing degree, through for example brainwashing and so forth. However this situation, while bad enough, is not as dire as you might think. When you are considering the human personality as a thing of this time only and destroyed by death, then its disintegration for any reason seems truly a tragic thing. And it is tragic.
quotes.translation: 不幸的是，在你们的层面上，主导性的当下自我确实可能被贬低到惊人的程度——例如通过洗脑等手段。然而，这种情况虽然糟糕，却并不像你们想象的那样绝望。当你们将人类人格视为仅存于当下、终将被死亡摧毁的存在时，其任何形式的瓦解都显得无比悲惨。而它确实是悲惨的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: We come again to the problem of practicality, and at the risk of repeating myself let me say that in the past Ruburt's seeming impracticality has been more practical than your intellectual practicality. This is merely because you have not trusted your egos ability to offer adequate protection. You have forced it into anxiety so that it overcompensates trying to protect you, and ends up half choking you to death.
quotes.translation: 我们再次回到实用性的问题。冒着重复的风险让我说：过去鲁柏表面上的不切实际，比你们理智上的实用主义更为实用。这仅仅是因为你们从未信任过自我提供足够保护的能力。你们迫使它陷入焦虑，以至于它过度补偿地试图保护你们，最终几乎将你们扼杀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience, or any mystical experience, is sometimes apt to put you in touch with what may seem to you to be a future self. This self of course, again, always existed. The inner self has the ability to delve beneath all your camouflage data to perceive these other reality systems. For the fullest development however these perceptions must be made conscious. Even the ego must become aware of them.
quotes.translation: 迷幻体验或任何神秘体验，有时会让你接触到看似未来自我的存在。当然，这个自我始终存在。内在自我有能力穿透所有伪装数据，感知这些其他实相系统。但为了最充分的发展，这些感知必须被意识化——就连自我也必须意识到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It is the prime identity of the whole present personality. In many cases it is the I of your dreams. It is definitely the I of your creative activity. It is the I, you see, which survives physical existence, and the physical, physically-oriented ego is only a part of it.
quotes.translation: 它是整个当前人格的主要身份认同。在许多情况下，它是你梦境中的"我"。它明确是你创造性活动中的"我"。你看，这个"我"在肉体存在之后依然存续，而肉体导向的自我只是它的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Our material on the nature of action will be helpful here. The ego, the physically-oriented ego, is a convenient figurehead. It represents only an imperfect glimpse of a given momentary appearance--the portion of the self that happens in any given instant to show itself.
quotes.translation: 我们关于行动本质的资料在此会有帮助。自我，这个肉体导向的自我，是一个便利的象征性代表。它仅代表对特定瞬间显现的不完整一瞥——即自我在任一特定时刻恰好展现的那部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Without carrying us into a long and lengthy session, it would be impossible for me to go into the complicated relationships involved in the psychic history of the personality whom I will here call Manuk, which is the male as he now sits before me. The solution of the problem is in his hands, and recognition on the part of the ego, which has not assimilated past knowledge, will do much to settle his condition.
quotes.translation: 若不展开冗长讨论，我无法详述这位我称之为马努克（即此刻坐在我面前的男性）之人格心灵史中涉及的复杂关联。问题的解决之道掌握在他手中，而尚未整合过往知识的自我若能认清这一点，将大大有助于改善他的状况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In the dream state these reactions are more easily triggered. This is the result of a lowering of egotistic guards, for the ego sets up controls that act as resistance to various channels, so that many connections are closed. All of these systems are interconnected. They all operate simultaneously. However, the personality is certainly not aware of their existence on a conscious level a good deal of the time.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态中，这些反应更容易被触发。这是由于自我防卫机制的降低——自我会设置控制机制作为各种通道的阻力，导致许多连接被封闭。所有这些系统都相互关联，且同时运作。然而，人格在大多数清醒时刻显然无法意识到它们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Children recall animal dreams more frequently simply because they are closer to cellular consciousness to begin with. Such dreams do carry the individual out away from ego identity, and at the same time closer to an inner identity that the ego usually attempts to deny.
quotes.translation: 儿童更常回忆起动物梦境，仅仅是因为他们本就更接近细胞意识。这类梦境确实会将个体带离自我认同，同时更接近自我通常试图否认的内在认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You do indeed give them energy, as they also give you energy. Dreams, or the dream universe, exists even while you wake, and you only become aware of certain portions of it even while you sleep. You do create it, but it is also to some degree independent of you. As your ego experiences changes in its relationship with the physical world, so do you change aspects of the dream world accordingly, and enrich it.
quotes.translation: 你确实赋予它们能量，正如它们也赋予你能量。梦境或梦宇宙在你清醒时依然存在，即便在睡眠中，你也只能觉察到其中的某些部分。你确实创造了它，但它也在某种程度上独立于你。如同你的自我在与物质世界的关系中经历变化，你也会相应改变梦世界的面向，并使其更加丰富。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now first of all, there are no limitations or divisions to the self, though for purposes of discussion a word like "ego" may be used here because you understand what you think it means. You can indeed depend upon seemingly unconscious portions of yourself. As you will see later, you can become more and more consciously aware, therefore bringing into your consciousness larger and larger portions of yourself.
quotes.translation: 首先，自我并没有任何限制或分割，尽管为了讨论方便，这里可以使用"自我"这样的词，因为你们理解自己认为它意味着什么。你确实可以依赖自己看似无意识的部分。正如你稍后会看到的，你可以越来越有意识地觉察，从而将自身越来越大的部分带入你的意识中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Even in reincarnation for example, an ego who experienced a Civil War life is now aware of another ego who may have experienced life in the year three thousand. Within the earthly cycle, such knowledge is not transmitted to the physical brain, but it is always known.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，在轮回转世中，一个经历过美国南北战争时期的自我，现在也意识到另一个可能经历过公元三千年生活的自我。在地球循环中，这类知识并不会传递给物质大脑，但它始终被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: His ego is indeed a healthy and vigorous one, but of a stubborn bent. For our purposes however this is actually excellent, for he is learning effectively to operate well in the physical environment while at the same time he is manipulating within that inner reality.
quotes.translation: 他的自我确实健康而充满活力，但带有固执的倾向。不过就我们的目的而言，这实际上非常出色，因为他正在有效学习在物质环境中良好运作，同时也在内在实相中进行操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The breath of life, so to speak, is breathed into the ego by the inner self, but from that point on the ego is independent.
quotes.translation: 可以说，生命的气息是由内在自我注入自我的，但从那一刻起，自我便独立了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You know then from past discussions that the dream world as you know it is the result of your awareness of a plane of existence which you help create, and in which you manipulate. In other words, on an unconscious level you here manipulate in another plane of existence entirely, one in which your conscious camouflage ego may not enter.
quotes.translation: 从过去的讨论中你便知道，你所知的梦境世界是你对某个实相层面的觉知结果——你协助创造这个层面，并在其中运作。换言之，在无意识层面，你在此完全于另一个实相层面中运作，而你的意识伪装自我无法进入其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now, to return to an earlier discussion. What you call suggestion is indeed expectation. You should understand by now how the physical image is constructed. This construction is from the inside out. The inner self attempts to construct a physical image in line with its own self-image. Any errors of construction have their origin not in the inner self, but in either the personal subconscious or in the ego.
quotes.translation: 现在回到先前的讨论。你所谓的暗示其实就是期待。此刻你应当理解物质形象是如何构建的。这种构建是由内而外的。内在自体试图根据其自身形象来构建物质形象。任何构建上的错误并非源于内在自体，而是源于个人潜意识或自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: To be effectively organized, however, inner and outer experience had to appear as separate, disconnected events. Historically the characteristics of God changed as man's ego changed. These characteristics of the ego, however, were supported by strong inner changes.
quotes.translation: 然而为了有效组织，内在与外在经验必须呈现为分离、不连贯的事件。历史上神的特质随着人类自我的改变而改变。但这些自我的特质，却受到强烈内在变化的支持。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
