quotes.text: We are equipping ourselves with the necessary background and knowledge. This does not mean that a stiff restraint should be used on either of your parts. Ruburt now can allow himself some additional freedom. The ego however is a necessary protector, and its barriers should not be lowered by force or pressure. It must first feel secure and become flexible while still retaining the integrity of its nature.
quotes.translation: 我们正在为自己配备必要的背景知识。这并不意味着你们任何一方应施加严苛的约束。鲁柏现在可以允许自己拥有更多自由。然而，自我是必要的保护者，其屏障不应通过武力或压力来降低。它必须先感到安全，并在保持其本质完整性的同时变得灵活。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Yet as you can see, what it was when we spoke of it is still present in what it will by now have become. The ego, through its own nature and characteristics, attempts to limit such change, but it succeeds only in limiting itself by limiting its perceptions. It still must change, as is obvious. But it changes along certain lines, moving within certain patterns of perception which are characteristic of it.
quotes.translation: 但正如你所见，当我们谈论它时，它过去的样子仍然存在于它现在所成为的状态中。自我通过其本性和特质，试图限制这种变化，但它只能通过限制自身的感知来限制自己。它仍然必须改变，这是显而易见的。但它沿着特定的路线变化，在其特有的感知模式中移动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You can within them often perceive both your past and present simultaneously, but this has always been a characteristic of the whole self in any case. The whole self is not bound by any system. At various times more of the abilities of the whole self intrude, so to speak, upon the ego system. You then become conscious of action that escaped you earlier. This often occurs with the help of the dream state.
quotes.translation: 在这些模式中，你常常能同时感知到你的过去和现在，但这始终是全我的特性。全我不受任何系统的束缚。在不同时期，全我的更多能力会侵入自我系统，可以说。然后你会意识到先前被你忽略的行动。这常常借助梦境状态发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: In like manner, when the ego concept is discarded as a concept, as the concept of nationalism will be discarded, so the individual self will not lose but gain. The individual self will expand, as the individual man will be capable of expanding when the old idea of nationalism is finally overthrown, and he can be benefited through learning of, and cooperation with, other men as brothers upon your planet.
quotes.translation: 同理，当自我概念被舍弃时——正如国家主义的概念终将被舍弃——个体自我非但不会失去，反而会获得增益。个体自我将得以扩展，如同当陈旧的国家主义观念最终被推翻时，个体人类将能够扩展，并通过学习与你们星球上其他人类同胞合作而受益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: As a personality is molded by his exterior circumstances, so is he also molded by the dreams that he creates, and which help to form his interior or psychic environment. To the whole self there is little differentiation made between actions that are of an exterior nature, and actions that are of an interior nature. While the ego makes these distinctions, the basic core of the personality does not do so.
quotes.translation: 正如人格被外在环境所塑造，它同样被自身创造的梦境所塑造，这些梦境有助于形成其内在或心灵环境。对整体自我而言，外在性质的行为与内在性质的行为之间几乎没有区别。虽然自我做出这些区分，但人格的基本核心却不会如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Such communication between these various selves who compose an entity is natural, continuous. The ego does not perceive the communications, obviously; but the ego, you must understand, is not self one alone, it is only a portion of self one, or the physical self.
quotes.translation: 构成一个存有的各个自我之间的这种沟通是自然而持续的。显然，自我无法感知这些沟通；但你必须明白，自我并非唯一的自我，它只是第一自我或物质自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: This is the dilemma of the ego, particularly in its early states. It looks outward for answers because this is its nature: to manipulate within physical reality. It also senses, however, a deep and abiding connection that it does not understand, with other portions of the self that are not under its domain. It is also aware that this inner self possesses knowledge upon which its own existence is based.
quotes.translation: 这是自我的困境，尤其在早期阶段。它向外寻求答案，因为这是它的天性：在物质实相中运作。然而，它也感受到一种深刻而持久的联系，这种联系它无法理解，与自身其他不受其管辖的部分相连。它也意识到这个内在自我拥有其自身存在所依赖的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I wanted, then, to make another point about Ruburt's experience last night in connection with the inner senses. Ruburt was quite capable as far as ability was concerned, to know what time it was without the addition of the vision of the clock. This was secondary. It seems that on your plane there is almost always the temptation to translate inner data in terms that the ego can understand and interpret.
quotes.translation: 那么，我想就鲁柏昨晚与内在感官相关的经历再补充一点。就能力而言，鲁柏完全能够知道当时的时间，无需借助时钟的幻象。这是次要的。在你们的层面上，似乎几乎总是存在一种诱惑，将内在数据转化为自我能够理解和诠释的术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The emergence of these psychic abilities was indeed resented by his ego, and initiated a necessary overhaul of personality, against which it protested. Ruburt will be more his natural and uninhibited intuitional self now. The ego had simply overgrown its bounds.
quotes.translation: 这些通灵能力的出现确实遭到了他自我的怨恨，并引发了一次必要的人格重组，自我对此表示抗议。鲁柏现在将更多地展现他自然、不受抑制的直觉性自我。自我只是过度膨胀了其界限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: When it attempts to hold the upper position indefinitely, there is frozen motion and built-up pressures, but there will be the inevitable tumbling under. For the tumbling under is the motion that forms the ego itself, and without it the ego would be meaningless.
quotes.translation: 当它试图无限期地维持主导地位时，就会产生冻结的运动和累积的压力，但最终必然会被颠覆。因为这种颠覆正是形成自我本身的运动，没有它，自我将毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Your ego, in common ordinary terms, has changed as a result of our sessions, in that it is now concerned with other realities also. In common senseterms, the ego handles manipulations within physical reality, and focuses brilliantly within a rather narrow range.
quotes.translation: 用普通的话来说，你的自我因我们的课程而发生了变化，因为它现在也开始关注其他实相。就一般常识而言，自我处理物质实相中的操控，并在相当狭窄的范围内聚焦得极为清晰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: It then does not reincarnate again upon that plane. However because of its own extraordinary nature, it itself forms with the inner self in an added gestalt, adding to the energy and ability of the inner self; and in a manner which I cannot yet explain to you, it voluntarily may give up its ego identification to a large degree for the purpose of giving its full energies to the store of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 它随后不再转世于那个层面。然而，由于其非凡的本质，它本身与内在自体形成了一个附加的整体，增强了内在自体的能量与能力；并且以一种我尚无法向你解释的方式，它可能自愿在很大程度上放弃自我的认同，以便将其全部能量贡献给内在自体的宝库。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: They do not know however where identity does reside, and consider it the result merely of organized perceptual patterns. Subsidiary potential egos can then seize upon and use the organisms sensual and perceiving apparatus. They do mention, the authors, that this can sometimes be the result of necessity. The next strongest takes over when the captain is down, so to speak, so that the whole can survive.
quotes.translation: 然而他们并不知晓身份认同究竟位于何处，仅将其视为有组织的感知模式的结果。次要的潜在自我于是能够夺取并利用生物体的感官与感知机制。这些作者确实提到，这种情况有时可能是出于必要。可以这么说，当船长倒下时，次强的自我便会接管，以确保整体能够存活。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You can see this easily for yourself if you consider the way in which psychologists use the terms "ego," "subconscious," and even "unconscious." What seems subconscious in one instant may be conscious the next. An unconscious motive may also be conscious at one point. Even in these terms your experience should tell you that the words themselves make divisions that do not exist in your own experience.
quotes.translation: 如果你思考心理学家如何使用"自我"、"潜意识"乃至"无意识"这些术语，你便能轻易为自己看清这一点。此刻看似潜意识的内容，下一刻可能成为意识。一个无意识的动机也可能在某个时刻变得有意识。即便用这些术语，你的经验也应告诉你，这些词语所划分的界限，在你自身的经验中并不存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There is no particular and definite line between the ego and the personality and the inner self. They must merely be discussed in such terms. There is, believe it or not, no particular and specific and definite boundary between what is self and not self. If we isolate such portions of reality for the sake of discussion, such isolation is artificial, and in no way affects the nature of reality itself.
quotes.translation: 自我、人格与内在自我之间并无特定明确的界线。它们只是必须用这类术语来讨论。信不信由你，自我与非自我之间并无特定、具体且明确的边界。若我们为了讨论之故而将实相的某些部分孤立出来，这种孤立是人为的，绝不会影响实相本身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Communications exist between all portions of the self, and all parts of the personality; or parts of the whole self, rather, operate as what you may call a supraself. Ruburt has referred to this as a supraconsciousness. This is the identity, the whole identity, of the various portions of the self that operate within various systems. To this supraself, of course, your ego future can be easily viewed.
quotes.translation: 自我的各个部分之间，以及人格的所有部分之间，都存在着沟通；更确切地说，整个自我的各个部分，是以你们所谓的“超我”形式运作的。鲁柏曾将此称为“超意识”。这便是存在于不同系统中的自我各个部分的身份，即整体身份。对于这个超我而言，你们自我所认为的未来自然可以轻易被看见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: As this point is reached the ego obviously becomes more disturbed. In very few cases however does the conflict reach this sort of proportion. A lack of communication between the ego and the inner self is obviously one of the main causes for such difficulties.
quotes.translation: 当达到这一点时，自我显然会变得更加不安。然而，在极少数情况下，冲突才会达到这种程度。自我与内在自我之间缺乏沟通，显然是造成此类困难的主要原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Even a quick and automatic rejection or withdrawal from such stimulus is in itself a way by which consciousness knows itself. The ego may attempt to ignore or escape from such experiences, but the basic nature of action itself is the knowing of itself in all aspects; and in a basic manner, in a very basic and deep manner, action does not differentiate between pleasant, painful or enjoyable actions.
quotes.translation: 即便是对这种刺激的快速而自动的拒绝或退缩，其本身就是意识认识自身的一种方式。自我可能试图忽略或逃避这类经验，但行动的基本本质就是在所有面向中认识自身；并且以一种基本的方式，一种非常基本而深刻的方式，行动并不区分愉悦、痛苦或令人愉快的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The inner ego looks inward, yet in looking inward it looks outward toward those vast portions of the self. Because there is always action within action, and because of the three dilemmas of which we have spoken earlier, the new personalities projected outward into other fields of perception, or other moment points, these other personalities in turn create new ones, and the cycle is again repeated.
quotes.translation: 内在自我向内看，然而在向内看时，它又向外看向自身那些广大的部分。因为行动之中总有行动，又因为我们先前谈过的三个困境，那些投射到其他感知领域或其它时间点的新人格，这些其他人格又会创造新的人格，如此循环往复。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now if there is good communication between the self, that is the inner self and the outer ego, then the ego begins to understand what it is, and also to realize that it has greater capacities than it can realize by continued reincarnations, upon one plane.
quotes.translation: 现在，如果自体——即内在自体与外在自我——之间有良好的沟通，那么自我便开始理解它是什么，也领悟到它拥有比在单一层面上通过不断转世所能实现的更伟大的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The human personality has no limitations except those which it accepts. There are no limits to its development or growth, if it will accept no limits. There are no boundaries to the self except those boundaries which the self arbitrarily creates and perpetuates. There is no veil through which human perception cannot see, except the veil of ignorance which is pulled down by the materialistic ego.
quotes.translation: 人类人格除了自身所接受的限制外，并无其他局限。若它不接受任何限制，其发展与成长便没有极限。自我除了自身任意创造并延续的界限外，亦无其他界限。人类感知无法穿透的帷幕，唯有被物质自我拉下的无知之幕。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The emotions, while connected to the ego strongly, nevertheless also belong to what we have been pleased to call the subconscious. But because they are so intertwined with the inner life they are also common to both the ego and the so-called subconscious.
quotes.translation: 情感虽与自我紧密相连，却同样属于我们乐于称之为潜意识的部分。但由于情感与内在生命如此交织，它们既为自我所共有，也为所谓的潜意识所共有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: That which appears empty, such as your space, is empty only for those who will not perceive, who are blind because they fear to perceive that which the ego cannot understand. The ego however is also capable of greater knowledge and potentiality and scope.
quotes.translation: 看似空无之物，如你们的空间，仅对不愿感知者而言是空无的——他们因恐惧感知自我无法理解之物而盲目。然而，自我同样具备更伟大的知识、潜能与格局。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In such circumstances these perceptions may find their way to the ego, appearing as inspirations or intuitive thought. It is obvious that many such intuitions appear when the personality is in a dreaming state or in states of dissociation. The intuitions themselves, while seemingly mental, are action, and as such they produce changes in the physical organism, both chemical and electromagnetic.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，这些感知可能找到通往自我的途径，表现为灵感或直觉思维。显然，许多这样的直觉出现在人格处于做梦状态或分离状态时。这些直觉本身，虽然看似是心智的，却是行动，因此它们会在物质有机体内产生变化，包括化学和电磁方面的变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This analogy is not a very good one however, since the child does eventually leave the parent, but it is a true one because the inner self does indeed leave the physical image with which the ego is so concerned, when it passes beyond the physical field.
quotes.translation: 然而这个类比并不十分恰当，因为孩子最终确实会离开父母，但它是真实的，因为当内在自我超越物质场域时，它确实会离开自我如此关注的物质形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now, however, you understand the reason why even an impeding action is literally accepted by the personality as a portion of the self, and why therefore efforts must be made that will coax the personality to give up any portion of itself, if progress is to be made. Once the personality can understand that an illness has been accepted as a portion of the self, then even the ego will be an aid.
quotes.translation: 然而，现在你明白了为什么即使是阻碍性的行动，也被人格如实接纳为自我的一部分，以及为什么必须努力引导人格放弃自身的任何部分才能取得进展。一旦人格能够理解疾病已被接纳为自我的一部分，那么就连自我也会成为助力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The last struggles of the ego will take place in these hours. It will finally understand that it is not to be dumped aside but taken along as itself, independent as always, to stand beside other independent egos that all represent facets of the entity.
quotes.translation: 自我的最后挣扎将发生在这几个时辰里。它终将明白自己并非要被抛弃，而是作为始终独立的自身被带着前行，与其他同样代表存有不同面向的独立自我并肩而立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: When you realize that you are much more than the egotistical "I am," and that your true personality contains a much larger and really more powerful inner ego, then this relative inavailability of inner comprehension to the outer ego will not annoy you.
quotes.translation: 当你意识到自己远不止那个自我中心的"我是"，并且你的真实人格包含着一个更宏大、更强大的内在自我时，那么外在自我对内在领悟的相对不可及性就不会再困扰你了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now the ego's concepts are your concepts, since it is a part of you. If you dwell on ideas of danger or potential disaster, if you think of the world mainly in terms of your physical survival and consider all those circumstances that may work against it, then you may find yourself suddenly aware of precognitive dreams that foretell incidents of accidents, earthquakes, robberies or murders.
quotes.translation: 自我的概念就是你的概念，因为它是你的一部分。如果你沉溺于危险或潜在灾难的想法，如果你主要从物质生存的角度看待世界，并考虑所有可能威胁生存的情况，那么你可能会突然意识到那些预知性的梦境，它们预示了事故、地震、抢劫或谋杀等事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: You should first of all admit that the feelings exist as a part of yourself, at the ego level. Whenever you close your feelings off from yourself you are, in your terms, less alive. Then, as far as is possible, communicate those feelings verbally in whatever way you choose. Use anger as a method of communication. Often it will lead to results that you do not think of, and beneficial ones.
quotes.translation: 你首先应该承认，这些感受作为你自身的一部分存在于自我层面。当你对自己封闭感受时，用你们的话来说，你就变得不那么鲜活。然后，尽可能以你选择的任何方式用语言表达这些感受。将愤怒作为一种沟通方式。它往往会带来你意想不到的结果，而且是有益的结果。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This should lead you to understand why physical time is basically meaningless to the subconscious, and why the inner self has at its command a knowledge of past lives and past endeavors; for the inner self, dear friends, these lives are not in the past, nor is the life of the ego necessarily present to the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这应该会让你明白，为什么物理时间对潜意识来说基本上毫无意义，为什么内在自我能够掌握过去世和过去努力的认知；亲爱的朋友们，对内在自我而言，这些生命并非存在于过去，而自我的人生对整体自己来说也未必是当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: And good evening, Ruburt, my nervous pigeon. Oh, how the ego fights. It is so sure of its dominance in all matters. Woe to anyone who gives a personality knowledge in the manner in which I am giving you knowledge. Oh, how the ego rises up in arms.
quotes.translation: 晚上好，鲁柏，我紧张的小鸽子。哦，自我是如何抗争的。它如此确信自己在所有事务中的主导地位。任何以我给予你们知识的方式将知识赋予人格的人，都要小心了。哦，自我是如何全副武装地奋起反抗的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is like your stereophonic reality from many levels. You are operating on mono, you see, as a rule. There is no doubt that this sort of experience is new to the ego, which is used to interpreting Sense data in highly rigid and specialized terms.
quotes.translation: 这就像你从许多层面体验到的立体实相。通常你只运作在单声道上。毫无疑问，这种体验对自我来说是陌生的，因为自我习惯于用高度僵化且专门化的术语来解读感官资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: A trip of course was the easiest method and Ruburt hit upon it. Daily methods of dissociation are extremely practical and beneficial. You will notice within a few week's time, if not sooner, an added energy. So-called impulses on your part are often quelled because your ego finds them impractical. The subconscious knows its own meat and sauce, and the best means for its own nourishment.
quotes.translation: 出神之旅当然是最简单的方法，鲁柏恰好发现了它。日常的分离法非常实用且有益。你会在几周内（若非更早）注意到额外的能量。你所谓的冲动常被压抑，因为自我认为它们不切实际。潜意识知道自己的养分与佐料，以及滋养自身的最佳方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The choice is always made by the particular ego, and we are speaking here of outer egos, remember. Many are content to continue indefinitely along the same plane, having almost endless incarnations and in contact more or less with the inner self.
quotes.translation: 选择始终由特定的自我做出，记住我们这里指的是外在自我。许多人满足于无限期地停留在同一层面，经历几乎无尽的转世，并与内在自我保持或多或少的联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now. Since the identity consciousness is composed of the combined and cooperating generalized consciousness of all the body's atoms and molecules, and the consciousness of the inner ego, these molecular consciousnesses that once or initially found expression in forming their physical construction, no longer do so; but are competent to do so again when the self-consciousness so demands.
quotes.translation: 既然身份意识是由身体所有原子和分子的联合且合作的普遍意识，以及内在自我的意识所构成，这些曾最初在形成其物质结构时找到表达的分子意识，如今已不再如此；但当自我意识如此要求时，它们有能力再次这样做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Suggestion, well used, with training and knowledge, will therefore allow you to alter the very cells of your body. The inner senses can be requested to operate in such a way that the ego will accept their communications. For the astral body is not some distant and alien other self, but it is even now that portion of yourself that you know but cannot see, that you feel but cannot touch.
quotes.translation: 因此，经过训练和知识而善加运用的暗示，将允许你改变你身体的细胞。可以要求内在感官以这样一种方式运作，使自我能够接受它们的沟通。因为星光体并非某个遥远而陌生的其他自我，而是即使现在，也是你自身中你知晓却看不见、你感受却触摸不到的那一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: When you sleep the ego becomes unfocused, but still present, and its goals and attitudes to some extent do color dream experiences. The survival personality has somewhat the same relationship to the ego as the dreaming personality has to it now.
quotes.translation: 当你睡眠时，自我变得不聚焦，但仍存在，其目标与态度在某种程度上仍会为梦境经验着色。生存人格与自我的关系，某种程度上正如做梦人格与自我的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: In that state, with the functions of the ego somewhat stilled, there is some considerable communication between various portions of the entire identity. In dreams you may have glimpses of probable roads that you might have taken. You may think that these are fantasy, but instead you may be perceiving a legitimate picture of events that did occur within another system of probabilities.
quotes.translation: 在此状态下，当自我的功能稍事平息时，整个身份的各部分之间会有相当多的交流。在梦中，你可能会瞥见自己本可能选择的可能道路。你或许认为这些只是幻想，但事实上你或许正在感知另一个可能性系统内确实发生的事件的合法画面。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In most circumstances the arrangement is an excellent working operation. However, when the ego carries its categorizing tendency too far, it may reject whole areas of significant action which has been experienced by the whole personality. It may choose to reject whole areas for various reasons, usually out of a mistaken fear that the actions involved threaten the permanence of itself.
quotes.translation: 在大多数情况下，这种安排是极佳的工作机制。然而，当自我将其分类倾向推至极端时，它可能会拒绝整个人格所经历的整个重要行动领域。它可能出于各种原因选择拒绝整个领域，通常是出于错误的恐惧，认为所涉及的行动威胁到其自身的存续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: We can now begin shortly on other aspects of our program, the second. You are not unfamiliar with this program, Joseph, nor indeed is Ruburt. Your own inner knowledge is most adequate. It is Ruburt's independent ego that is here a strong helpmate to us, for since we have taken it into consideration it allows us leeway while automatically keeping the whole personality in good balance.
quotes.translation: 我们现在可以简短地开始我们计划的第二部分。约瑟夫，你对这个计划并不陌生，鲁柏也同样熟悉。你内在的知识非常充足。鲁柏独立的自我在这里是我们强有力的帮手，因为我们已将其纳入考量，这让我们在自动保持整个人格良好平衡的同时，也获得了回旋余地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Of itself however it does not make these judgments in those terms. The decision as to whether or not a particular probable event should be perceived as a physical one depends, of course, upon the nature of the ego which would then experience it. The probable self does not make the decision, but merely passes on the data which it has received through its own experience with the event.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我本身并不会以这些术语做出判断。某个特定可能事件是否应被感知为物质事件，当然取决于将要体验它的自我的本质。可能自我并不做决定，只是传递它通过自身对该事件的体验所接收到的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Again, this is simply a rushing in of energy where it was most needed, once the barriers have been removed. This is a natural reaction. (Long pause.) Whenever the ego gains over control, or sets itself up to oppose deep and basic action within the whole personality, then in doing so it also blocks to some considerable extent the passage or use of the whole personality's vital energy.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这不过是能量在障碍被移除后，涌入最需要它的地方。这是一种自然反应。（长停顿。）每当自我获得过度控制，或设置自身来对抗整个人格内深层而基本的行动时，它也会在相当程度上阻碍整个人格生命能量的流通或运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: A point here: It is not understood at all that the uppermost or personal layer of the subconscious is concerned with maintaining the autocratic control and position of the conscious ego. Its inhibitions always are intended to protect the ego.
quotes.translation: 这里有一点：人们完全不了解，潜意识的最上层或个人层面，负责维持显意识自我的专制控制和地位。它的抑制总是旨在保护自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You already have a way prepared for you. You have already made your inroads long before the time of physical death. Only the ego is usually unaware of these activities. John has himself been with her in his sleep state, and does not remember.
quotes.translation: 你们已经有一条为你准备好的道路。在肉体死亡之前很久，你们就已经取得了进展。只有自我通常对这些活动毫无察觉。约翰自己在睡眠状态中曾与她同在，却不记得。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now, you will see that the inner ego of which we have spoken many times is the projector of energy upon your plane. The inner ego, representing the basic personality, through diffusion makes a materialization of itself and enters your plane.
quotes.translation: 现在你会明白，我们多次提及的内在自我，正是将能量投射到你们层面的投射者。内在自我作为基本人格的代表，通过扩散使自身物质化并进入你们的层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Only then can you fully begin to manipulate the conditions that exist, and communicate the knowledge that you receive to your own ego. For the time, you see, the ego becomes a direct participator in such experiences--at least to some degree.
quotes.translation: 唯有如此，你才能开始充分操控存在的条件，并将你所接收的知识传达给自身的外在自我。你看，此时外在自我至少在某种程度上会成为这类体验的直接参与者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Cellular consciousness is a part of the consciousness of the inner ego or inner self. Very loosely speaking, cellular consciousness is to the inner self what the subconscious is to the outer ego. There are of course many differences however.
quotes.translation: 细胞意识是内在自我或内在自性意识的一部分。粗略而言，细胞意识之于内在自性，正如潜意识之于外在自我。当然，两者之间仍存在诸多差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: I do not mean that Ruburt should not read the material, but he should not read it immediately before a session. It overawes him. I do use much of his subconscious knowledge. I do draw upon the knowledge of his own inner ego. He is helping me very much as it is, but please, Ruburt, do not meddle. Tonight with your overhasty pronouncements on my part you meddled, however innocently.
quotes.translation: 我并非说鲁柏不该阅读这些资料，但他不该在课节前立即阅读。这会使他过度敬畏。我确实运用了他许多潜意识知识，也汲取了他内在自我本体的知识。他已在尽力协助我，但请鲁柏不要干预。今晚你对我那部分过于仓促的论断，便构成了干预——尽管你是无心的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Inner perceptions enlarge the ego's idea of reality however so adjustments are made. It is the ego that insists upon separating itself from events, preferring to imagine itself a spectator above events, rather than a participator in events.
quotes.translation: 内在感知会扩展自我对实相的概念，因此调整是必要的。正是自我坚持将自己与事件分离，偏好想象自己是凌驾于事件之上的旁观者，而非事件的参与者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now. The ego is spoon-fed, being given only those feelings and emotions, only that data, that it can handle. This data is then presented to it in a highly specialized manner, usually in terms of information picked up by the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 现在。自我是被"勺喂"的，只被给予那些它能处理的感受、情绪与资料。这些资料随后以高度专门化的方式呈现给它，通常以物质感官所接收的信息形式出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Your visitors are not as yet acquainted with the inner ego, and I suggest that you fill them in. The point to remember here is that the results from the tests will be so valid that they will not be overlooked, and yet their validity will be different in quality. You remember what I have said about psychological experience. Psychological experience has no reality in space or time.
quotes.translation: 你们的访客目前还不熟悉内在自我，我建议你们向他们说明。这里要记住的重点是，测试结果将非常有效，不容忽视，然而其有效性在性质上会有所不同。你们还记得我关于心理体验的说法。心理体验在空间或时间中并无实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: This is not to say that such surface reality is not vital and important, or that some information about its own nature cannot be gleaned from its study; but only a small amount can be so obtained. The other fields of which I speak exert their influences upon the physical organism as it exists. These forces are dealt with and balanced by the subconscious, and not by the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 这并非说这种表面实相不重要或不关键，也不是说无法从其研究中收集到关于其自身本质的某些信息；但只能获得少量信息。我所提及的其他领域，在物质有机体存在时对其施加影响。这些力量由潜意识处理并平衡，而非由外在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: While so materialized, action is aware of itself in two basic ways: through its innate comprehension of itself, and through a secondary, more limited but more focused perception of a self belonging to such a materialization. The innate comprehension of course involves us with the inner self. The secondary self belonging to the materialization gives us, within your field, the ego.
quotes.translation: 在如此具体化时，行动以两种基本方式觉察自身：通过对其自身的内在理解，以及通过一种次要的、更有限但更聚焦的、属于这种具体化自我的感知。内在理解当然涉及内在自我。而属于具体化的次要自我，在你们的领域中，则构成了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You are midway here. In the future the ego and the intellect will expand sufficiently so that they can contain and use and appreciate all the other functions and portions of the self which they now mistrust. Individual identity will then expand to include a greater variety of impulses and stimuli, which do not necessarily come from the self, and yet maintain specialized identity.
quotes.translation: 你正处于中间阶段。未来，自我与智性将充分扩展，足以容纳、运用并欣赏它们目前所不信任的自我其他所有功能与部分。个体身份将随之扩展，纳入更广泛的冲动与刺激——这些未必源自自我本身，却仍能维持专门化的身份认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Using this third form, there would be a tendency for you not to recognize your own physical situation. It would be difficult to carry the memories of the present ego personality with you. This third form is the vehicle of the inner self. The disorientation that it feels is the disorientation, you see, that it will feel when the physical body is deserted, or at the point of death.
quotes.translation: 若使用这第三种形态，你很可能无法辨识自身的物质处境。将当前自我人格的记忆随身携带将变得困难。这第三种形态是内在自我的载具。它所感受到的迷失方向，正是当物质身体被遗弃时——或死亡之际——将会体验到的迷失状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: It is not bombarded as with drug experiments, and forced to experience chaotic and frightening perceptions that can literally terrify it into complete disorder. Survival in your system is strongly dependent upon the highly specialized, focused, limited but specific organizational qualities of the ego. It should not be rigid but it should not be purposely torn apart, nor weakened.
quotes.translation: 它不会像药物实验那样遭受密集冲击，被迫经历足以将其彻底震入混乱的混沌恐怖感知。在你的系统中，生存强烈依赖于自我高度专门化、聚焦、有限却具体的组织特质。它不应僵化，但也不该被刻意撕裂或削弱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The light trance, again, is necessary only for a time, and theoretically it is not necessary at all. The only necessity here is that you permit yourself not to displace the ego, but more, to enable yourself to look within and past the ego.
quotes.translation: 轻度的出神状态再次只是暂时需要，理论上根本无需如此。这里唯一必要的是：你允许自己不取代自我，而是更进一步，让自己能够向内观照并穿透自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Efficient manipulation within the physical field will soon require that other portions of the self be utilized and recognized. In a manner of speaking, the ego can be compared to the nationalistic state of nations, necessary indeed for man's development, but already growing passé, and perhaps even mitigating against the survival of the species, where once it aided that survival.
quotes.translation: 在物质领域内的高效运作很快将要求自我其他部分被运用和认知。打个比方，自我可比作民族国家——对人类发展确属必要，但已逐渐过时，甚至可能危及物种存续，而它曾助力这种存续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: We will take your physical system as an example. There is general and mass focus of all self structures within that system, binding enough and cohesive enough so that the appearance of a permanent and all-pervading physical reality is maintained. The ego part of the structure concentrates with great intensity, directing itself within those coordinates that form physical reality.
quotes.translation: 我们以你们的物质系统为例。该系统中所有自我结构存在普遍而集中的聚焦，其凝聚性与内聚力足以维持一个看似永恒且无所不在的物质实相。结构中的自我部分以极高强度运作，在构成物质实相的坐标体系内定向行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: The authors ignore this question. The decision has been made on the part of the basic identity. It is not dependent upon any particular ego structure, but it is dependent upon an ego structure for its existence within a physical universe.
quotes.translation: 作者们忽略了这个问题。基本身份已做出决定。它不依赖于任何特定的自我结构，但它在物质宇宙中的存在确实依赖于一个自我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: They share physical life with you therefore, whether the ego realizes this or not. After this existence the ego will not remain dormant either. It simply will not be the dominant psychological entity that it is during physical existence.
quotes.translation: 因此，无论自我是否意识到这一点，它们都与你共享物质生命。在此生之后，自我也不会保持休眠状态。它只是不再像物质存在期间那样成为主导的心理实体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: There are then, obviously, probable futures and probable presents. I am trying to discuss this in your terms, since basically, you must understand, the words "past," "present," and "future" are no more meaningful as far as true experience is concerned than are the words "ego," "conscious," or "unconscious."
quotes.translation: 因此，显然存在着可能的未来和可能的现在。我试图用你们的术语来讨论这一点，因为从根本上说，你们必须明白，就真实体验而言，“过去”、“现在”和“未来”这些词与“自我”、“意识”或“无意识”这些词一样，都没有什么意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I have told you that dreams are a continuing process, whether or not the ego wakes or sleeps, and whether or not it has, or retains, any knowledge of the dreaming. So also the astral self journeys often, whether the ego wakes or sleeps.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你们，梦是一个持续的过程，无论自我是清醒还是沉睡，也无论它是否知道或记得梦境。同样，星光体也经常旅行，无论自我是清醒还是沉睡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: At any given point, the ego is as complete within electrical reality as it is psychologically complete within the physical universe. This includes of course the retention of its dreams, as well as the retention of purely physical data.
quotes.translation: 在任何特定时刻，自我在电性实相中与它在物质宇宙中心理上的完整性一样完整。这当然包括它保留梦境的能力，以及保留纯粹物质资料的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You may see an automobile for example with your eyes, and hear its sound through your ears, but it is also within the human capacity, ideally speaking, to hear the sight of the car, and to see the sound of the car. Practically speaking these capacities have been overlooked in human development simply because the ego hit upon the present method of perception, and clung to it.
quotes.translation: 例如，你们可以用眼睛看到一辆汽车，用耳朵听到它的声音，但理想来说，人类也有能力"听见"汽车的景象，"看见"汽车的声音。实际上，这些能力在人类发展过程中被忽视了，仅仅因为自我偶然发现了当前的感知方式，并紧紧抓住不放。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: They are aware of themselves as a part of action, and therefore through capsule comprehension, which we have discussed, the simple atoms and molecules are aware of their own basic immortality. All this is basic knowledge, if you would understand why the personality accepts even an impeding action, or pain or illness, as a part of itself, despite the ego's resistance to pain.
quotes.translation: 他们觉察到自己是行动的一部分，因此通过我们讨论过的胶囊理解，简单的原子和分子也意识到自身的基本不朽性。若想理解人格为何会接受甚至阻碍性的行动、痛苦或疾病作为自身的一部分——尽管自我抗拒痛苦——这一切都是基本知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Let us consider the following. The individual within your system--and this is quite simplified--an individual finds himself with a choice of three actions. He chooses one of these and experiences it within the physical field. The other two actions are experienced however, but not within the physical system. The results of the other two actions are perceived by the inner ego.
quotes.translation: 让我们考虑以下情况。你们系统内的个体——这已相当简化——发现自己面临三种行动的选择。他选择其中一种并在物质场域中体验它。然而另外两种行动也会被体验，但不在物质系统之内。另外两种行动的结果由内在自我所感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The ego and the outer senses reinforce the belief in a closed system, and therefore close it. The inner senses, when the physical body is relaxed, will carry you through the imaginary boundaries, but a conscious focus upon the boundaries to be passed through will tend to reinforce them. Concentrate upon the goal rather than the means of attaining it, and you will attain it.
quotes.translation: 自我与外在感官强化了封闭系统的信念，从而将其封闭。当肉体放松时，内在感官将带你穿越那些虚构的边界，但若意识刻意聚焦于要穿越的边界，反而会强化它们。专注于目标而非达成目标的手段，你便能达成目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The investigation of dreams, then, must be accomplished in or on a subconscious level. In order to study dreams properly you must indeed immerse yourself in that medium in which dreams occur. The intense but limited focus of usual consciousness will itself distort the true nature of dreams, and the ego will hold any such conscious examination of dreams within rigid bonds.
quotes.translation: 因此，对梦的探究必须在潜意识层面完成。要正确研究梦境，你确实必须沉浸于梦境发生的媒介中。通常意识那强烈却受限的聚焦本身会扭曲梦境的真实本质，而自我会将任何对梦的有意识检视禁锢在僵化的框架内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The whole self not only perceives these limitless moment points, but being a part of action, each whole self projects fragments and personalities from itself to all these points, creating therefore other egos, other intense focus points which are independent, which work out their own destinies and experiences, which in turn perceive any given moment point in slow motion.
quotes.translation: 整体自体不仅感知这些无限的时刻点，而且作为行动的一部分，每个整体自体从自身投射出片段和人格到所有这些点上，从而创造出其他自我、其他独立的强烈聚焦点，它们各自发展自己的命运和经验，反过来以慢动作感知任何给定的时刻点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: For all my humor concerning the particular communication to Philip, I wanted him to be conscious of hearing me. Actually this caused an interruption of action, in order to make the source of the communication stand out in his mind. Otherwise he would have merely automatically recorded my warning, and reacted to it smoothly without any realization on the part of the ego.
quotes.translation: 尽管我对与菲利普的特定沟通感到幽默，但我希望他有意识地听到我。实际上这造成了行动的中断，以便让沟通的来源在他的脑海中凸显出来。否则他只会自动记录我的警告，并顺畅地对其做出反应，而自我毫无察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The "outer ego" and the inner ego operate together, the one to enable you to manipulate in the world that you know, the other to bring you those delicate inner perceptions without which physical existence could not be maintained.
quotes.translation: "外在自我"和内在自我共同运作，一个让你在你所知道的世界中操控，另一个带给你那些微妙的内在感知，没有这些感知，物质存在就无法维持。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Philip was not consciously thinking of me, and his ego was not on guard. His subconscious mind however did consent to the contact, because I impressed upon it the fact that I considered the situation potentially dangerous to him.
quotes.translation: 菲利普并未有意识地想到我，他的自我也未设防。然而他的潜意识确实同意了这个接触，因为我向他强调了一个事实：我认为这个情况对他具有潜在危险。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The inner ego is then this inner identity. It is closely allied with the entity, and connects a reality that is purely psychic, the reality of the entity, with a reality that is mainly physical, the reality of the physical self.
quotes.translation: 内在自我便是这个内在身份。它与存有紧密相连，并将纯粹心灵的实相——存有的实相——与主要属于物质的实相——物质自我的实相——连接起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: All of this data is instantly available to layers of the self, and only the ego is not aware of this field. It would be snowed under completely. Now, this field of probabilities has existed in your past, and formed your present.
quotes.translation: 所有这些资料都立即为自我各层面所取用，只有自我意识对此场域毫无察觉——它会被彻底淹没。这个概率场域存在于你们的过去，并形成了你们的当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The conscious ego then manipulates this material for the purposes of camouflage constructions. The transformation of vitality into physical properties is done by this self-conscious self that faces the inner world. The subconscious is the link between these two self-consciousness, and here you find an acceptance by the camouflage personality of the materials at hand.
quotes.translation: 有意识自我随后操控这些资料，以进行伪装建构。将生命力转化为物质属性的工作，是由这个面向内在世界的自我意识完成的。潜意识则是这两种自我意识之间的桥梁，在此处你会发现伪装人格对现有材料的接纳。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Before we close I want to mention the importance of the third inner sense with the experience of concept patterns. The third inner sense, involving what you would call perception of past, present and future, is the sense that enables the inner ego and entities to experience direct concept-patterns, and free them therefore from successive cause and effect limitations.
quotes.translation: 在结束前，我想提及第三内在感官与概念模式经验的重要性。第三内在感官涉及你们所谓的过去、现在与未来的感知，它使内在自我与存有得以直接体验概念模式，从而摆脱连续因果的限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Indeed as you may have observed, the personality continues in a rather unruffled fashion, considering the circumstances. This is why valid communications can occur between us, and it is also the reason why such communications rarely occur, generally speaking. In the case of an insecure ego you have two immediate problems, and are involved instantly with difficulties:
quotes.translation: 诚如你们所见，考虑到当前处境，人格仍以相当从容的方式持续运作。这正是我们之间能进行有效沟通的原因，也是此类沟通通常鲜少发生的原因。当自我缺乏安全感时，你们会立即面临两个问题，并迅速陷入困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now. You have become somewhat aware of the subconscious. This means that your ego has enlarged its conception of the self, of itself, to include certain activities of which it is now aware. Progress in the development of personality in the long run will be determined by the ability of the whole self to recognize and become aware of all of its self-conscious portions.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们已经对潜意识有了些许认识。这意味着你们的自我已扩展了它对自身、对自我的概念，将某些它现在意识到的活动包含在内。从长远来看，人格发展的进展将由整个自我识别并觉察其所有有意识部分的能力所决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The intellect chooses from the total physical situation those elements with which the personality will ultimately have to deal. The intellect is discriminating and selective. An ego that is overly rigid will inhibit the intellect from perceiving various portions of physical reality, and therefore distort the appearance of reality, limiting the intellect's abilities.
quotes.translation: 智性从整体物质情境中选择那些人格最终必须处理的元素。智性具有辨别力和选择性。一个过于僵化的自我会抑制智性感知物质实相的各个部分，从而扭曲实相的表象，限制智性的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is a most difficult one for you to dispense with. As convenient aids you will find yourselves imagining, for example, open windows through which you will seem to travel. This is an aid to the ego only. Electromagnetically all living things are connected, yet each retains individuality. There is no nirvana in those terms, in which individuality will be vanquished.
quotes.translation: 这对你们来说是最难摆脱的。作为便利的辅助，你们会发现自己在想象，例如，敞开的窗户，你们似乎会穿越其中。这仅是对自我的辅助。电磁上，所有生物都是相连的，但每个都保持个体性。在这些术语中，不存在个体性会被消灭的涅槃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You tie yourself in knots, so to speak. You think so rigidly of concerns that are primarily insignificant to you, as a whole self(long pause, eyes closed) and make a fetish of them. You identify, despite your knowledge, mainly with the ego. This cuts you off from the inner self. I am speaking generally here, to you. Joseph, applying no more to you than anyone else.
quotes.translation: 可以说，你把自己缠成了死结。你僵化地执着于那些作为整体自我而言对你并不重要的顾虑（长停顿，闭眼），并将它们奉为圭臬。尽管你拥有知识，却主要与小我认同。这切断了你与内在自我的联系。我在此是泛泛而谈，约瑟，这并非只针对你一人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The ego to some large extent, you see, has extended its functions and performance. Since our sessions began, for example, it has expanded in both of your cases. It has expanded not because it has grown more egotistic but because it has accepted as a part of itself, intuitional realizations and inner psychic responsibilities in a way that it did not consider before.
quotes.translation: 你看，小我在很大程度上已扩展了其功能与表现。例如，自我们的课程开始以来，你们两人的小我都已扩展。这种扩展并非因为小我变得更自我中心，而是因为它以过去未曾考虑的方式，将直觉性领悟与内在心灵责任接纳为自身的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This provides necessary balance and necessary control, and results in the sturdy anchorage of the personality in the environment in which it must survive. You have here one of the main reasons why you must request the subconscious to enable you to recall your dreams. The ego would see no reason for such a memory, and on general principles attempts to repress them.
quotes.translation: 这提供了必要的平衡与控制，使人格得以稳固锚定于其必须存续的环境中。这正是你必须请求潜意识协助回忆梦境的主要原因之一。自我意识认为这种记忆毫无必要，并基于普遍原则试图压抑它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Until then the ego and the intuitive self had not come into conflict, as far as basic philosophy was concerned. The intuitive self presented the ego however with a new line of development that it was not prepared to follow.
quotes.translation: 在此之前，就基本哲学而言，自我与直觉自我尚未产生冲突。然而直觉自我向自我意识呈现了一条它尚未准备好遵循的新发展路径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: As many light snacks would actually be much better than three large meals a day, so short naps rather than such an extended period would also be more effective. There would be other benefits. The conscious self would recall more of its dream adventures as a matter of course, and gradually these would be added to the totality of experience as the ego thinks of it.
quotes.translation: 少量多餐实际上比每日三大餐更为有益，同样，短时小憩比长时间睡眠也更有效。此外还有其他益处：意识自我将自然回忆起更多梦境冒险，这些经历将逐渐被纳入自我意识所认知的整体经验之中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This will give you the satisfaction of making the time twice as valuable. You can indeed suggest to the subconscious that it carry on in such a manner regardless of your conscious concern. As a result the ego can apply itself to the job at hand while the subconscious works for you and your inner purposes. This is very practical, and works without much difficulty.
quotes.translation: 这将带给你让时间加倍宝贵的满足感。你确实可以向潜意识暗示，让它以这种方式运作，而不论你意识层面的关注为何。如此一来，自我便能专注于手头的工作，同时潜意识为你和你的内在目的效力。这非常实用，且运作起来毫不费力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It will often neglect any clairvoyant or precognitive material that comes into the conscious mind from the deeper portions of the self. On occasion, when the ego recognizes that such data can be highly practical, it then becomes more liberal in its recognition of it -- but only when such information fits in with its concepts of what is possible and not possible.
quotes.translation: 它常常会忽略从自我深层进入意识心灵的任何千里眼或预知性材料。偶尔，当自我认识到这类数据可能高度实用时，它才会更开明地承认它——但仅限于此类信息符合它关于可能与否的概念时。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: As a rule Ruburt's ego will jealously guard its interests. When he feels it shout at him it is good to lessen the pace during the rest of the session, as he attempted to do. The wording of any suggestions is very important, however. The phrase, "I will progress safely", is an excellent one to use, since it allows for continuation and progress balanced by safety.
quotes.translation: 通常，鲁柏的自我会嫉妒地守护其利益。当他感到自我对他大喊时，在余下的课程中放慢节奏是好的，正如他试图做的那样。然而，任何暗示的措辞都非常重要。"我将安全地进步"这句话是极好的选择，因为它允许在安全的平衡下继续并进步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Someone who sees him, a male, is not doing him good at this time. It is important to realize that the condition would have erupted in any case. The usual ego would have been much more serviceable however, for a longer period of time, had he not taken the drugs. The whole personality however needed a readjustment, though this is more drastic than was necessary.
quotes.translation: 此刻有位男性访客对他并无助益。必须认清的是，这个状况无论如何都会爆发。若他未曾服用药物，惯常的自我本可维持更久的功能。不过整个人格确实需要重新调整，尽管此次调整比必要程度更为剧烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: There is what amounts at times to a wall that separates us, as far as emotion is concerned, and this is our Ruburt's doing, though of course he does not do it deliberately. Again, the strength and indeed the stubbornness of his ego, made the sessions possible, for without it in the beginning there would have been difficulty in maintaining necessary stability.
quotes.translation: 在情感层面，有时确实存在一道仿佛将我们隔开的墙，这是我们鲁柏的作为——当然他并非刻意为之。再次强调，正是他自我的强大乃至固执，才使得这些课程成为可能，因为若没有它，最初便难以维持必要的稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Your own talents have worked for the survival of your personality, Joseph. They have given you a strength that you would not possess if your ego had not allowed them to emerge. You may not think of your artistic abilities as serving any practical purpose, insofar as survival is concerned, and yet they have been your main security, and in very practical ways.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你的天赋一直为你的人格存续效力。若非你的自我允许这些才能显现，你本不会拥有如今的力量。你或许认为艺术才能与生存无关，不具实用价值，但事实上它们正是你最根本的安全保障，且以非常实际的方式运作着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Under enforced annihilation, there is a frantic attempt at reorganization as the inner self tries to "send up" alternate egos to handle the situation -- and in those terms, the more egos you kill the more will emerge.
quotes.translation: 在被迫的湮灭状态下，内在自我会疯狂尝试重组，试图"派遣"替代性自我来应对局面——用这个比喻来说，你消灭的自我越多，涌现的自我就会越多。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The powers of the seeds are to remain latent, but many times they bear fruit. In each life the new consciousness struggles to tie together the whole present personality, to use what is necessary from the subconscious for the good of the personality, and to keep submerged in the subconscious any knowledge that would threaten the dominancy of the present ego.
quotes.translation: 种子的力量本应保持潜伏状态，但许多时候它们会结出果实。在每一世生命中，新的意识都努力将整个当前人格整合起来，从潜意识中提取对人格有益的必要部分，并将任何可能威胁当前自我主导地位的知识深埋于潜意识之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: If you have a limited conception of the nature of reality, then your ego will do its best to keep you in the small enclosed area of your accepted reality. If, on the other hand, your intuitions and creative instincts are allowed freedom, then they communicate some knowledge of greater dimensions to this most physically oriented portion of your personality.
quotes.translation: 如果你对实相的本质持有狭隘的观念，那么你的自我会竭尽全力将你困在已接受实相的小小封闭区域中。反之，若你的直觉与创造本能获得自由，它们便会将关于更大维度的某些知识，传达给你人格中最具物质导向性的这部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The physical system suffers. It is impossible for the ego to block off specific connections with the whole personality, therefore any barriers effectively impede whole blocks of active and necessary vitality. In Ruburt's case now, the floodgates to the inner self are opened, so that the vitality rushes into those areas that have been to some extent denied.
quotes.translation: 物质系统承受着痛苦。自我无法完全阻断与整个人格之间的特定连接，因此任何障碍都会有效阻碍大量活跃且必要的生命力。以鲁柏目前的状况而言，内在自我的闸门已经开启，使得生命力涌入那些曾被部分否定的领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: It would seem to be that the waking personality could learn much from his sleeping counterpart, and this is indeed the case. Theoretically speaking, and in theory only, anything that a personality can do or achieve in the sleeping state, he can do and achieve in the waking state. The limitations are those adopted by the ego, in many cases for good reason.
quotes.translation: 醒时人格似乎能从其睡眠对应体那里学到许多，事实也确实如此。理论上讲——且仅限理论层面——人格在睡眠状态所能做到或达成的一切，在清醒状态同样能够做到或达成。这些限制多由自我所采纳，在许多情况下是基于充分的理由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: All of the inner senses are not utilized to the same degree on any plane. Many planes are given over to the training in the use of one or two of the most important inner senses. I liked the analogy of the spider and his web because it is such a simple and uncomplicated example of camouflage construction, divorced from intermediaries such as ego or tools.
quotes.translation: 所有内在感官在任何层面上都不会被同等程度地运用。许多层面专门用于训练使用一两个最重要的内在感官。我喜欢蜘蛛与蛛网的比喻，因为它如此简单明了地示范了伪装结构的构建，且无需借助自我或工具这类中介。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: However our friend has developed his abilities in ways that he will not be able to close off, and that is after all not so terrible indeed. He shall not be reading tomorrows newspaper today, but he shall be more receptive to communications from the inner self, and his own ego shall be better informed, though this will not necessarily make it any happier.
quotes.translation: 不过我们的朋友已经发展出的能力无法就此关闭，这其实也没那么可怕。他不会今天就读到明天的报纸，但会更善于接收内在自我的讯息，他的自我也会获得更充分的资讯——虽然这未必会让它更快乐。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: I have explained to you how the inner self is connected to the present personality, and how the emotions at your end change through the layers of the subconscious, begin in your plane as parts of the personality, and as part of your force field, and then are transformed and become the innersense connective that connects the outer ego to the inner self.
quotes.translation: 我曾向你解释过内在自我如何与当前人格相连，你们层面的情绪如何透过潜意识各层次转化，始于你们层面的人格片段与力场部分，继而转化为连接外在自我与内在自我的内在感官纽带。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Quietly but firmly, without antagonizing the ego further, Ruburt quiet edit down by the suggestion of safety and slow motion; as you suspected the slow motion suggestion and/or coupled with the cautionary warning, was interpreted rather expertly, that is slyly, by the subconscious, which then waited a good interval of several hours before trying again.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏温和而坚定地安抚自我，通过安全感和慢动作的暗示使其平静下来；正如你所怀疑的，慢动作暗示和/或谨慎警告被潜意识相当巧妙地——也就是狡猾地——解读了，随后它等待了足足几个小时才再次尝试。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The consciousness had its origin in the subconscious, from which it sprang. The consciousness was not at one time the center of the subconscious. However, the inner ego was always the center of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 意识起源于潜意识，并从其中涌现。意识并非始终是潜意识的中心。然而，内在自我始终是潜意识的中心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There is also here connected only with his present personality an ego image of the writer with a cigarette. In this case the cigarette represents independence and even individuality, and even female emancipation. So it is all bound up together in a rather mazelike web. I hope that when Ruburt understands this it will make the situation easier for him.
quotes.translation: 这里也有一幅与作者当前人格相关的自我形象，他抽着烟。在这幅形象中，香烟代表着独立甚至个性，乃至女性解放。所以这一切都交织在一个相当迷宫般的网络中。我希望当鲁柏理解这一点时，这能让他处境更轻松。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In order for such information to rise to conscious levels, it must of necessity be translated into terms that the ego can handle, and the translation must to some extent distort the original experience. The whole physical organism of the body has been trained from infancy to react to certain patterns, these patterns based on physical root assumptions.
quotes.translation: 为了让这类信息上升到意识层面，它必须被翻译成自我能够处理的术语，而这种翻译在某种程度上会扭曲原始体验。整个身体的生理机制从婴儿时期就被训练成对某些模式做出反应，这些模式基于物质性的基本假设。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There is no point in giving you a superficial analysis, since dreams usually impart knowledge that can be utilized by several levels of the personality; though consciously the information perceived and brought into meaningful context by the subconscious may not be at all comprehensible to the ego, it is nevertheless utilized by the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 给你一个肤浅的分析毫无意义，因为梦境通常传递能被人格多个层面利用的知识；虽然潜意识所感知并赋予意义的信息，自我可能完全无法理解，但整个人格仍会加以利用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Such a development would result in the strengthening of her ego, in added self-confidence. And her abilities are strong enough so that they do operate with some efficiency when her ego does let down its guard.
quotes.translation: 这样的发展将强化她的自我，增添自信。而她的能力足够强大，当自我放下戒备时，这些能力便能有效运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I am going to speak about your past condition, and I am also going to speak about action. Although the reason, or reasons, for your particular illness involves personal causes, indeed in one way or another all illnesses have a root within ego's attempt to stand apart from the action of which it is composed, so that at times it fights against itself.
quotes.translation: 我要谈谈你过去的状况，也要谈谈行动。虽然你特定疾病的缘由涉及个人因素，但事实上，所有疾病在某种程度上都根源于自我试图脱离构成它的行动，以至于有时它会与自己对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is therefore the director of afi activities, both in the waking and dream condition. It is the inner ego from whom you receive your inspiration, and it is the inner ego which gives consent to our meetings.
quotes.translation: 因此，它既是清醒状态也是梦境中所有活动的指挥者。它是内在自我，你从中获得灵感，也是内在自我同意我们的会面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: In time Ruburt will recognize fully my independent nature, but he did not completely (underlined) even admit the revelationary source of the material until quite lately. He knew it, but the ego did not admit it. Now the intellect is free from the only tie-up it would encounter, for again, it has always accepted the legitimacy of revelationary data.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏终将完全认识到我的独立本质，但他直到最近才完全（强调）承认这些材料的启示性来源。他心知肚明，但自我却拒不承认。如今，理智终于摆脱了它唯一可能遭遇的束缚——因为理智始终认可启示性数据的合法性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The inner ego however is always aware of both aspects of its reality. In the deepest sense (Pause), this inner self is organized about its primary aspect, which is creativity. It constantly translates the components of its gestalt into reality, either physical reality through the EE units I have mentioned, or into other realities equally as valid.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在自我始终知晓其现实的两个面向。在最深层的意义上（停顿），这个内在自体围绕其首要面向——即创造力——而组织。它不断将其完形的组成部分转化为现实，要么通过我提及的EE单位转化为物质现实，要么转化为同样有效的其他现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The individuals receiving such knowledge already are capable of understanding it, and their own inner ego helps them in this comprehension. I have been against the deep trance for this reason, in that I prefer to work with you in such a manner that you are able to use this knowledge consciously, and also feel that you have a part in its delivery.
quotes.translation: 接收此类知识的个体已具备理解它的能力，其内在自我亦协助他们领悟。正因如此，我一直反对深度出神状态——我更倾向于以这样的方式与你合作：使你能够有意识地运用这些知识，并感受到自己在传递过程中所扮演的角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: From this focus position communication may be set up between personality essences no longer in the physical field, and those still in it, provided that those still in it are able to remove focus from the ego to this particular level. It is from this focus point then that communication between what is termed the living and the dead may take place.
quotes.translation: 从这一焦点位置，不再处于物质领域的人格本质与仍处于其中者之间可建立沟通，前提是后者能够将焦点从自我转移至这一特定层面。正是通过这一焦点，所谓生者与死者之间的交流才得以发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The personality is more integrated, yet through its acceptance of inner data, the ego, to use the term lightly, has expanded. It has not shrunk. It is now composed of more various elements from the whole personality. Retaining its own consciousness of reality it can now afford to step out of itself momentarily in order to gain further experience.
quotes.translation: 人格更加整合，然而通过接纳内在资料，自我（姑且用这个术语）已扩展而非萎缩。它现在由整个人格中更多元的元素组成。在保有自身对实相的意识的同时，它已能暂时跳出自身以获取进一步经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The unconscious and subconscious areas, however, are aware of much more of this information than the ego, for it receives only the minute residue of dream material as a rule. The Speakers therefore may appear within dreams as historical characters, as prophets, as trusted old friends, or in whatever guise will impress the particular personality.
quotes.translation: 然而无意识和潜意识领域比自我知晓更多这类信息，因为自我通常只接收到梦境材料中微乎其微的残余。因此，说者可能以历史人物、先知、可信赖的老友或任何能打动特定人格的伪装出现在梦境中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The boundaries, limitations, extent and vistas of the self are merely arbitrary. In a very true sense each self is infinite, unbounded, connected in a most intimate way to all other things in the universe on your plane; and through the inner senses and the inner ego connected also in a most intimate way to the unknown and unseen inner universe.
quotes.translation: 自我的边界、限制、范围与视野仅是武断的。在非常真实的意义上，每个自我都是无限的、无界的，以最亲密的方式与你层面宇宙中所有其他事物相连；并通过内在感官与内在自我，同样以最亲密的方式与未知且不可见的内在宇宙相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Priestley does not go far enough with his time one, time two and time three, but he is fairly correct up to that point. In a different way he says many of the things that I am saying. I have told you that upon physical death the ego becomes the subconscious in the next existence, and that its conscious knowledge is retained electromagnetically.
quotes.translation: 普里斯特利对时间一、时间二和时间三的论述还不够深入，但他在此之前的观点基本正确。他以不同的方式阐述了我所说的许多内容。我曾告诉过你们，在肉体死亡后，自我会成为下一世存在的潜意识，而其有意识的知识则以电磁方式被保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The personality ego structure had to be strong, for the whole personality is in many respects a transparent one through which we can speak and through which other realities can be seen. In most basic respects this statement is meant literally and not symbolically. The personality in itself is formed from components existing in many realities...
quotes.translation: 人格自我结构必须强大，因为整个人格在许多方面是透明的，通过它我们可以说话，通过它可以看到其他实相。在最基本的层面上，这句话是字面意思而非象征性的。人格本身由存在于许多实相中的成分构成……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: You may in a dream experience two or three hours in a flash of physical time. You have not aged two or three hours. The experience of space and time within the dream universe comes very close to the pure expression of the inner self. For here, free from the ego, the self is relieved of the necessity of constructing ideas into physical reality.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，你可能在物理时间的一瞬间经历两三个小时。你并未因此衰老两三个小时。梦宇宙中的时空体验非常接近内在自性的纯粹表达。因为在此处，自我得以摆脱小我的束缚，不再需要将概念构建成物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It should be fairly easy to understand now how the second dilemma evolved from the first. I have said that the second dilemma resulted in, and constantly results in, consciousness of self. Now. Consciousness of self is not the same thing as consciousness of ego self. Consciousness of self is still consciousness directly connected with action.
quotes.translation: 现在应该相当容易理解第二个困境是如何从第一个演变而来的。我曾说过，第二个困境导致了——并持续导致——自我意识。请注意，自我意识与小我意识并非同一回事。自我意识仍是直接与行动相连的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The intellect is a part of the ego, and its development is important. Therefore the appearance of separate events trains the intellect. Otherwise full use of the intuitions would be relied upon and the intellect would not develop, for the intellect is an important feature in the further specialization of individual consciousness and identity.
quotes.translation: 智力是小我的一部分，其发展至关重要。因此，分离事件的出现训练了智力。否则，人们会完全依赖直觉的运用，而智力将无法发展——因为智力是个人意识与身份进一步专门化的重要特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now. Ruburt's abilities were so strong since childhood that he feared using them, and so I am quite used to that development. On the other hand, I wanted someone with a strong-enough ego structure to contain what will amount to... 40 years of mediumistic experience. I needed a personality who would be able to maintain psychological stability.
quotes.translation: 现在。鲁柏自幼便拥有极为强大的能力，以至于他害怕运用这些能力，因此我对这种发展模式早已习以为常。另一方面，我需要一个拥有足够稳固自我结构的人，来承载将长达四十年的通灵经验。我需要一个能够维持心理稳定的人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The inner ego knows what it is about. This inner data is transmitted through the mental genetic system by way of the generalized molecular consciousness to the chromosome system, and the chromosome system then translates data into a physical code for the cells to follow. You will find this fits in with the material from our previous session.
quotes.translation: 内在自我深知其本质。这些内在数据通过心灵遗传系统，经由广义分子意识传递至染色体系统，随后染色体系统将数据转化为细胞遵循的物理密码。你会发现这与我们上次课程的内容相符。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is one thing to conceive of basic time as being outside of physical time, for the sake of making a point; but it must be realized that Priestley's time one, while only real to the ego, is nevertheless a part or a materialization that exists within this basic time framework, and the life force is at the same time within as well as without.
quotes.translation: 为阐明观点而将基本时间设想为独立于物理时间是一回事；但必须认识到，普里斯特利的时间一虽仅对自我而言是真实的，却仍是存在于这个基本时间框架内的部分或物质化显现，而生命力同时存在于其内与外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Knowledge in your terms does change your own physical structure, merging with the physical stuff of your image, but your ego remains relatively detached from it, you see. (Long pause.) There is a psychic merging with knowledge. To you, knowledge in the abstract means little. There is a merging with concepts, however. This you can understand.
quotes.translation: 用你们的说法，知识确实会改变你们自身的物理结构，与你们形象的物质成分融合，但你们的自我仍相对超脱于它，你明白吗。（长停顿）存在一种与知识的心灵融合。对你们而言，抽象的知识意义甚微。然而，与概念融合却是可以理解的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Give the spider an ego and an intellect and you will see then how the picture would change. These would enable him to enlarge upon his scope of awareness and activity, but at the same time impediments would be placed so that the web construction would no longer appear either as direct as far as its source is concerned, nor as spontaneous.
quotes.translation: 给蜘蛛一个自我与智力，你便会看到画面如何改变。这些能力将使它得以扩展自身的觉知与活动范围，但与此同时也会设置障碍，使得织网的过程——就其源头而言——不再显得那么直接，也不再那么自发。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It was aware, and conscious. However it was simply frightened to find what seemed like the body in a position normally impossible for it. The next time it will go further. In the same way however you will both find the inner ego inserting itself into periods of waking consciousness, and there may or may not be a momentary disorientation.
quotes.translation: 它曾具有觉知与意识。然而它只是惊恐地发现，那个看似身体的东西竟处于通常不可能的位置。下一次它会走得更远。同样地，你们两人都会发现内在自我逐渐渗入清醒意识时段，并可能或不会出现短暂的迷失方向感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It is very close to the entity. Largely due to its abilities are the creative processes used, but hardly understood by the ego. In many cases this supraselfis already, so to speak, moving into completely new systems. It is, of course, aware of your reincarnations on the individual's part, but these are not present nor future to the self.
quotes.translation: 它非常接近存有。很大程度上，创造性的过程正是凭借它的能力得以运作，但自我却几乎无法理解这些过程。在许多情况下，这个超我可以说已经正在进入全新的系统。它当然知晓个体层面的转世经历，但这些对自我而言既非过去也非未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Legitimate, balanced psychic journeyings will result in a beneficial effect as far as the ego and its ability to handle its concerns are involved; and whenever such journeyings or investigations result in a lessening of egotistic control over circumstance then anyone so involved should instantly ask himself questions, and abruptly halt.
quotes.translation: 合法且平衡的心灵旅程，就自我及其处理事务的能力而言，将产生有益的影响；每当此类旅程或探索导致自我对环境的控制力减弱时，任何涉入其中的人都应立即自问，并骤然停止。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I did want to make the point however that you are now aware in practical terms of a conscious part of the personality that appears to be independent of the ego and aware of the ego's activities.
quotes.translation: 然而，我确实想指出，你现在已实际意识到人格中似乎独立于自我、且能觉察自我活动的那部分意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: I cannot stress too strongly the fact that any investigation into the nature of the human personality must indeed follow the lines which have been here given. The nature of reality, uncamouflaged, can be glimpsed to some degree as you study the personality in the dream state, where awareness does not operate in an ego-directed manner.
quotes.translation: 我无论如何强调都不为过：对人类人格本质的任何探索，都必须遵循此处所述的方向。当你研究梦境状态中的人格时——此时觉知不以自我导向的方式运作——便能隐约窥见未经伪装实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: As it is these dreams, having an electrical reality, are deposited in coded form, with all other experience, within but independent of the physical cells. Dream experience is as real to the personality as waking experience. Only the ego makes any distinction. Therefore the personality that has survived makes no distinction on its own.
quotes.translation: 这些梦具有电性实相，以编码形式与其他所有经验一同储存于肉体细胞之内，却又独立于细胞之外。梦的经验对人格而言与清醒时的经验同样真实，只有自我会加以区分。因此，幸存下来的人格本身不会做此区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This self can give directions to both the ego and the subconscious and can instruct the subconscious to speed up healing processes. Now you address this I automatically and identify it in with your own mind as a sort of supra-consciousness. You are only familiar with a small part of it, however. Here again, the division is arbitrary.
quotes.translation: 这个自体既能向自我下达指令，也能向潜意识下达指令，并可指示潜意识加速疗愈过程。你们自动将这种"我"视为某种超意识，并与自己的心智等同视之。然而你们仅熟悉其极小部分。在此再次强调，这种划分是人为的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now I am speaking not only of legitimate projections, but of projections vivid enough to be recalled and recorded. Projections in other words in which the ego can take at least some small part. Spontaneous projections of which you are not aware occur frequently.
quotes.translation: 我此刻所言不仅指合法的投射，更指那些鲜明到足以被回忆并记录的投射。换言之，即自我至少能参与一小部分的投射。你们未曾察觉的自发性投射其实频繁发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The ego indeed is a fiction, but a highly useful one. It is an artificial division, indeed ever changing, and yet the illusion of its existence must be maintained while you are in this existence. It need not be inflexible, with training. With training it will be willing to grant you much more freedom, and yet it will remain intact.
quotes.translation: 自我确实是一种虚构，但却是极为有用的虚构。它是一种人为的划分，确实在不断变化，然而当你处于此世时，必须维持其存在的幻相。经过训练，它不必僵化不变。通过训练，它会愿意给予你更多自由，同时仍保持完整。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: What you have in the spider's activity amounts to a demonstration of the sixth inner sense almost in its pure form. The spider has no intellect or outer ego, and his manipulations are the direct result of activities performed by pure and spontaneous use of the inner senses. They are unhampered and un-camouflaged to a great extent.
quotes.translation: 蜘蛛的活动所展现的，几乎是第六内在感官的纯粹形式。蜘蛛没有智性或外在自我，其操作是纯粹自发运用内在感官所产生活动的直接结果。它们在很大程度上不受阻碍且未经伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: These are very simple suggestions. At our next session we shall go into this more deeply and define the psychedelic experience for you. There are many reasons why" illumination" (in quotes) occurs in the third and fourth decade. Such illumination represents the first contact of the ego with its inner self, and is only a beginning.
quotes.translation: 这些是非常简单的建议。下次课程中我们将更深入探讨此主题，并为你定义迷幻体验。"开悟"（引号内）之所以发生在第三与第四个十年，有许多原因。这种开悟代表自我与其内在自性的首次接触，且仅仅是个开始。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The self will truly utilize the atoms and molecules; the consciousness will travel by this method. The particular physical body will then be known for what it is: a cooperative psychic gestalt, a psychio-physical structure formed together by the inner ego, utilizing atoms and molecules that are in themselves living and conscious.
quotes.translation: 自我将真正运用原子与分子；意识将以此方式旅行。特定的物质身体届时将被认知为其本质：一个合作性的心灵完形，一个由内在自我共同形成的心理-物理结构，运用着本身即具有生命与意识的原子与分子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The one stability between self and what is not-self, and the one and only difference, is not an identity that is part and parcel of constantly changing physical framework, not the outer ego whose conception of who it is constantly changes, according to its age and environment, but the inner self behind all physical constructions.
quotes.translation: 自我与非我之间的唯一稳定，以及唯一且仅有的差异，并非一个与不断变化的物质架构密不可分的身份，也非那个根据年龄与环境不断改变自我认知的外在自我，而是所有物质构造背后的内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The conflict between the ego and subconscious, as given, was symbolically expressed in the tying of the hand symptoms. He was tied in knots, hence the swollen joints. There is a line from a poem of his, written years ago, in a period of stress, " If I can't move one finger, how can the whole soul rise?" from his dance floor poem.
quotes.translation: 自我与潜意识之间的冲突，如所述，象征性地表现在手部症状的束缚中。他被捆绑成结，因此关节肿胀。他多年前在压力时期所写的一首诗中有这样一句："若我无法移动一根手指，整个灵魂如何能升起？"——出自他的《舞池》诗作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: (9:45.) The Hebrew god, however, represented a projection of a far different kind. Man was growing more and more aware of the ego, of a sense of power over nature, and many of the later miracles are presented in such a way that nature is forced to behave differently than in its usual mode. God becomes man's ally against nature.
quotes.translation: （9点45分）然而，希伯来神祇代表了一种截然不同的投射。人类日益意识到自我，意识到驾驭自然的力量，许多后来的神迹被描绘成自然被迫以异于常态的方式运作。神成为人类对抗自然的盟友。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You may find it helpful, and certainly fascinating, to study your own dreams, looking at them for the purpose of searching in their framework for abilities of which the ego is not aware.
quotes.translation: 你可能会发现研究自己的梦境既有益又引人入胜，在梦境框架中寻找自我尚未察觉的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: He is still dependent upon it symbolically, however, generally speaking. The inner ego however can be utilized in such a dissociated state as such a director of activities, with sufficient training. I must emphasize that indeed years of training are required. But then the experience is ten times more rewarding and informative.
quotes.translation: 不过一般而言，他仍象征性地依赖它。然而，经过充分训练，内在自我可以在这种解离状态下被用作活动的指挥者。我必须强调，这确实需要经年累月的训练。但随之而来的体验将十倍地更具回报性与启发性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: In many respects actions within the dream universe are indeed more direct than in your own. It is because you remember but vague glimmerings and disconnected episodes that dreams appear, sometimes, chaotic or meaningless, particularly to the ego, which censors rigidly much of the information that the subconscious does retain.
quotes.translation: 在许多方面，梦宇宙中的行动确实比你们自己的宇宙更为直接。正因你们只记得模糊的微光与零散的片段，梦境有时显得混乱或毫无意义，尤其对自我而言——它严格审查潜意识确实保留的许多信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The experience will be must less startling to the ego than an abrupt projection, and the ordinary nature of the activities, walking into the next room for example, will be reassuring. You are more calm, and in your own surroundings. Of course Ruburt was out of his body when he saw Miss Callahan, who was in the same condition.
quotes.translation: 这种体验对自我而言远不如突然的投射那般惊骇，而日常活动的平凡性质——例如走进隔壁房间——会带来安心感。你更平静，且身处自己熟悉的环境中。当然，鲁柏看见卡拉汉小姐时已脱离肉身，而对方也处于相同状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The inner self or the whole personality consists of many such egos, as you know, but the inner self is also aware of itself as something more than the sum of its parts. Now this something more than the sum of its parts is a curious phrase, but within it lies a key that can give you some small understanding of what God may be.
quotes.translation: 内在自体或完整人格由许多这样的自我组成，如你所知，但内在自体也觉察到自身是超越各部分总和的某种存在。这个"超越各部分总和"的说法颇为奇特，其中却藏着一把钥匙，能让你对神可能是什么获得些许理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The discipline, for Mark or for anyone else, is difficult to achieve, in that what is necessary is a passive discipline rather than an aggressive discipline. The passive discipline allows for a fuller perception. It also helps prevent the conscious ego from snapping too quickly back, as is what happens often in Mark's case.
quotes.translation: 对马克或任何人而言，这种训练都难以达成，因为所需的是被动的纪律而非主动的纪律。被动的纪律允许更完整的感知，也有助于防止意识自我过快弹回——这正是马克案例中常见的情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The inner self obviously needs the outer ego with its outer senses, in order to permit its own materialization in various camouflage forms. This should not be underrated or forgotten. Without the outer core, the inner self could simply not add to its own value fulfillment through participation in energy-constructs （hyphen）.
quotes.translation: 内在自体显然需要外在自我及其外在感官，才能以各种伪装形式实现自身物质化。这一点不应被低估或遗忘。没有外在核心，内在自体便无法通过参与能量建构来增益其自身价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Necessary and vital information is therefore not collected. The problem is not seen in any total light, but in a distorted manner. This distorted picture is then delivered to the subconscious, which is able to make some corrections. It still cannot view the physical situation as clearly as can the ego under best conditions.
quotes.translation: 因此必要且关键的信息未被收集。问题未能以整体视野被审视，而是以扭曲的方式呈现。这幅扭曲的图像随后被传递给潜意识，潜意识虽能做出部分修正，但仍无法像最佳状态下的自我那样清晰地审视物质情境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is obvious that the dream images are not responsible to the ego, however. While they contain within them compositions that are also seen in the physical self, these properties appear in different percentages.
