As leaves bring vital nutrients to the tree trunk, so also do dream images bring nourishment to the personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，显然梦境影像并不对自我负责。虽然它们包含也在物质自我中看到的组成，但这些属性以不同的比例出现。正如树叶为树干带来重要的养分，梦境影像也为人格带来滋养。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Practically speaking, this is seldom done, but it has been on occasion. The brain cannot contain such episodes. A portion of the self would retain these experiences. Now in a creative individual, some of these could be expressed symbolically in a painting or other work of art, but the ego could not consider them as actual.
quotes.translation: 实际上，这很少发生，但偶尔也有过。大脑无法容纳这样的片段。自我的一部分会保留这些体验。现在，在一个有创造力的人身上，其中一些可以通过绘画或其他艺术作品象征性地表达出来，但自我无法将它们视为真实的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: We will be dealing rather extensively with a study of space and distance and time as they appear within the dream state, and with the freedoms that are possible for the personality within it. All of this information can be used most beneficially. It will enable the ego itself to expand its consciousness and its knowledge.
quotes.translation: 我们将相当深入地探讨梦境状态中的空间、距离与时间，以及人格在其中所能获得的自由。所有这些信息都能被最有益地运用，它将使自我本身得以扩展其意识与知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Value fulfillment opens the many eyes of the self to its various portions. It enables the self to expand, to join in a gestalt with other selves. It is only your ego which leads you to believe that such an expansion would result in a lessening of consciousness on the one hand, or an invasion of other selves on the other.
quotes.translation: 价值完成开启了自性的众多眼睛，使其得以看见自身的各个部分。它使自性能扩展，并与其他自性形成完形。唯有你的自我使你相信：这种扩展一方面会导致意识减弱，另一方面会侵犯其他自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The knot, or the main concentration of focus, in ego concern, prevents true refreshment, either through the inner self or from the outer world. The knot of energies is indeed caused by fear, and it can be dissolved. The knotted energies amount to a frozen immobility, where nothing is lost, but neither is anything gained.
quotes.translation: 自我关注中的那个结——或主要焦点凝聚处——阻碍了真正的更新，无论这更新是来自内在自性还是外在世界。这个能量之结确实由恐惧造成，而它是可以被化解的。纠结的能量相当于一种冻结的停滞状态，其中既无损失，亦无增益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The system or the mental enclosure, again, is only closed comparatively speaking. An endeavor is made to close one opening from one plane, and keep the alternate or inner communication channel open. As an analogy here, the conscious ego could be said to exist within this copper tube, located at approximately its center.
quotes.translation: 这个系统或心智围场，再次强调，只是相对封闭的。它试图关闭来自某一层面的开口，同时保持另一条内在沟通渠道畅通。打个比方，有意识的自我可以被视为存在于这根铜管内部，大约位于其中心位置。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: For the personality in such circumstances will shrivel up, and ultimately the physical self will die ahead of its time, and despite all emergency efforts made by the ego, unless it makes the necessary effort. Survival within the physical universe, as within all others, is determined by the full development of potential.
quotes.translation: 因为在这种情况下，人格会萎缩，最终物质自我会提前死亡，除非自我做出必要的努力，否则即便它采取所有紧急措施也无济于事。在物质宇宙中的生存，如同在其他所有宇宙中一样，取决于潜能的充分发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It must be recognized also that these portions of the self exist in each incarnation. In the materialization of personality through various incarnations, only the ego and the layers of the personal subconscious adopt new characteristics. The other layers of the self retain their past experiences, identity and knowledge.
quotes.translation: 也必须认识到，自我的这些部分存在于每一个转世中。在人格通过不同转世显化的过程中，只有自我和个人潜意识的层次会采用新的特征。自我的其他层次则保留着它们过去的经验、身份和知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Self-consciousness entered in very shortly after, but not what you are pleased to call human self-consciousness. I certainly do not like to wound your egos in this manner. However the fact remains, and I can hear you all yell foul, that there is no actual differentiation between the various types of self-consciousness.
quotes.translation: 自我意识随后很快出现，但并非你们所谓的人类自我意识。我当然不愿以这种方式伤害你们的自我。然而事实仍是——我能听见你们齐声抗议——各种自我意识之间并无实质区别。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The outer ego, under such advantageous circumstances, is more nearly able also to communicate its experience in the physical world to the inner self, and hereby to actually help enlarge the inner self, which then directly experiences stimulation and manipulations in a camouflage pattern which is otherwise denied to it.
quotes.translation: 在这种有利条件下，外在自我更能将其在物质世界的经验传达给内在自我，从而实际帮助扩展内在自我。内在自我由此得以直接体验在伪装模式中的刺激与操控，这种体验在其它情况下是无法获得的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now, the time in which the inner ego exists is, as you know, the spacious present. The spacious present is the basic time in which the whole self has its existence, but the various portions of that self have their experience in their own time systems, which are the results of their characteristic methods of perception.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，内在自我存在的时间是广袤的当下。广袤的当下是整体自我存在的基本时间，但自我的各个部分在其自身的时间系统中获得经验，这些时间系统是其特有感知方式的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: True identity is as much divorced from ego reality as the photograph is from the person. There are connections between an individual and his photograph, and there are connections between the physical individual and the inner self, but the person must recognize the image in the photograph, for it will not recognize him.
quotes.translation: 真正的身份与自我实相的关系，就如同照片与人的关系一样疏离。个体与其照片之间存在关联，物质个体与内在自我之间也存在关联，但人必须认出照片中的影像，因为照片不会认出他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: I am not, therefore, a product of Ruburt's subconscious, any more than he is a product of my subconscious mind. Nor am I a secondary personality, cleverly trying to undermine a precarious ego. I have seen to it in fact that all portions of Ruburt's personality are benefited, and their integrity maintained and honored.
quotes.translation: 因此，我并非鲁柏潜意识的产物，正如他并非我潜意识的产物。我也不是试图巧妙瓦解脆弱自我的次人格。事实上，我已确保鲁柏人格的所有部分都得到裨益，其完整性得以维持与尊重。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: But self A is not limited to the egos perceptions only, therefore it may be said that self As perceptions are not limited, in toto, to the field in which it exists. For it is not so limited in dreams and in other states, yet while consciousness is in these other conditions, self A still exists within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 但自我A并不局限于自我的感知，因此可以说自我A的感知整体上不受其存在领域的限制。因为在梦境及其他状态中它不受此限，而当意识处于这些其他状态时，自我A仍存在于物质实相之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: If self A were limited to the perceptions of the ego, and if self A were limited then to the dimensions in which it found itself, then my dear friends precognition in dreams would be impossible, and in order to perceive the future self A would of necessity be forced to discontinue existence within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 如果自我A局限于自我的感知，且自我A受限于其所在的维度，那么我亲爱的朋友们，梦中的预知将不可能实现，而为了感知未来，自我A必然被迫终止在物质系统中的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: For those of you who wonder where I place the subconscious, as psychologists think of it, you can imagine it as a meeting place, so to speak, between the outer and inner egos. You must understand that there are no real divisions to the self, however, so we speak of various portions only to make the basic idea clear.
quotes.translation: 对于那些想知道我将潜意识置于何处的人——正如心理学家所理解的那样——你们可以将其想象为一个交汇点，可以说是外在自我与内在自我的会合处。然而，你们必须明白，自体并没有真正的分割，因此我们谈论不同部分只是为了阐明基本概念。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This process continues beneath conscious and even subconscious awareness. It is not dependent upon the ego, but predates it. These are the first and the last images. The individual cells are the first animals possessing innate awareness of their environment with rudimentary sensemechanisms, to your way of thinking.
quotes.translation: 这个过程持续进行，存在于意识甚至潜意识觉知之下。它并不依赖自我，而是先于自我存在。这些是最初与最终的意象。个体细胞是最早的动物，以你们所认为的方式，拥有对环境的天生觉知及初级的感官机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now it adds its strength. I made no attempts to browbeat it, recognizing its purposes. Ruburt chose a strong ego as a necessary guardian in adolescence, and as a balance to the strong spontaneous self, until a mission made itself known, and the correct mission. It simply did not recognize the mission for some time
quotes.translation: 现在它增强了自身的力量。我并未试图威吓它，而是认可了它的目的。鲁柏选择了一个强大的自我，作为青春期必要的守护者，并作为强烈自发自我的平衡，直到一项使命——且是正确的使命——自行显现。它只是在一段时间内未能认出这项使命。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The ego thwarts the subconscious often out of mere perversity, to prove its superiority. You might also ask the pendulum, or the subconscious through the pendulum, about the times of the month, if any, when you may be more open to psychic phenomena. But here, check with me concerning the answers that you receive.
quotes.translation: 自我常常出于纯粹的乖僻而阻挠潜意识，以证明自身的优越性。你也可以通过钟摆，或通过钟摆询问潜意识，关于每月的某些时段（如果有的话），在这些时段你可能对灵性现象更为开放。但在此，请就你所收到的答案与我核对。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: I think that you will find this particular session most beneficial. The desire to set yourself apart from emotion, and coolly appraise it, is merely an indication of the ego's characteristic nature. It tries to separate itself from action, to view it objectively, and to see itself as something apart from action.
quotes.translation: 我认为你会发现这一节特别有益。想要将自己与情感分离并冷静评估它的欲望，仅仅是自我特性本质的体现。它试图将自己与行动分开，客观地审视行动，并将自身视为与行动分离的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There is also something you forget. You are your subconscious self, and oftentimes what makes no sense to the ego makes good sense to the overall personality. Still, there are psychological balances that always operate when the overall personality gestalt is operating effectively, as it is in both of your cases.
quotes.translation: 还有一件事你忘了。你就是你的潜意识自我，而往往对自我来说毫无意义的事，对整体人格却大有意义。不过，当整体人格完形有效运作时——就像你们两人的情况那样——总会有心理平衡机制在运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: It is the ego which fears death so strongly. And yet the stability which ego so urgently seeks would, indeed, result in a death, since no further action would be allowed.
quotes.translation: 正是自我如此强烈地恐惧死亡。然而自我如此迫切寻求的稳定，实际上会导致死亡，因为那将不允许任何进一步的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Direct experience alone will bring you such knowledge, and yet it will not be held by the conscious mind or by the ego, although flashes of the experience may be momentarily projected within these realms. Such knowledge indeed is communicated to the various levels of the self through dreams, as you should know.
quotes.translation: 只有直接体验才能带给你这样的知识，然而它不会被意识心或自我所持有，尽管这些体验的闪光可能暂时投射到这些领域。正如你所知，这类知识确实通过梦境传达给自我的各个层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Without knowing what he was doing Ruburt has been developing his inner senses to an almost amazing degree, but naturally he did this unknowingly, pursuing other aims. In the past he was so bound to the conscious ego that in fiction he found it difficult to write anything that was not strictly autobiographical.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在浑然不觉中已将内在感官开发至惊人程度，但自然他是在追求其他目标时无意为之。过去他过于受制于意识自我，以致在小说创作中，若非严格自传体题材便难以下笔。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Man is himself a particular system or unit of action within other systems of action, and he is himself composed of other units of action. This unity and interdependence is in itself responsible for that interplay of mental and psychic action which results in the individual consciousness, that is, with the ego.
quotes.translation: 人本身是其他行动系统内的特定系统或行动单元，同时自身也由其他行动单元构成。这种统一性与相互依存性，正是导致心智与心灵活动相互作用的根源，由此产生个体意识——即自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Such easy communication with the subconscious will also allow the subconscious to be more flexible, in allowing various information through to the ego from the deeper layers of the whole self. As a further benefit there will be increased joy, and a feeling of oneness with the self, and with reality in general.
quotes.translation: 与潜意识的这种轻松沟通，也将使潜意识更具弹性，从而允许各种信息从整体自性的更深层面传递到自我。作为进一步的好处，将会有更多的喜悦，以及与自我、与整体实相合一的感觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You do this in the dream state. You do it in the waking state. There must be therefore definite connections between inner energy and the world of objects. There are methods and means, hidden to the ego, whereby the physical universe as you know it is constantly created and maintained. Underline as you know it.
quotes.translation: 你在梦境状态中这样做。你在清醒状态中也这样做。因此，内在能量与物质世界之间必然存在确定的连接。存在着自我所隐藏的方法和手段，你们所知的物质宇宙正是通过这些方法和手段被不断创造和维持的。请强调"你们所知的"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: These will also be sifted of course through the layers of personal subconscious. The experience will still be meaningful without the ego, but it will not be as meaningful, and you will not be able to utilize in efficient manners. It must become a part of the organization of the whole present identity, you see.
quotes.translation: 这些体验当然也会透过个人潜意识的层次被筛选。没有自我，体验仍然有意义，但不会那么有意义，而且你无法有效地运用它。它必须成为整个当下身份组织的一部分，你明白吗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now: You are not listening to what your own inner voice says. You are listening to what your ego says, and this I speaks through your mouth and then you hear this I's words. But these are not the words of the whole self. These are merely the words of the one part of the self with which you are most acquainted.
quotes.translation: 现在：你并没有在聆听自己内在的声音。你在聆听自我说的话，而这个“我”透过你的嘴巴说话，然后你听到这个“我”的话语。但这些并非整体自性的话语。这些只是你最熟悉的那部分自性的话语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: If this sounds difficult then indeed it is, because I will not deal in platitudes, and the exercise of the inner abilities demand, as a bulwark, the sometimes difficult achievement of an ego that can adapt itself in the outer environment, and so hold its own while the inner self is then freed to go its way.
quotes.translation: 如果这听起来困难，那确实如此，因为我不打算说些陈词滥调，而内在能力的运用需要——作为一道屏障——一个能在外在环境中适应自身、从而站稳脚跟的自我，这个自我有时需要艰难地达成，然后内在自性才能被释放去走自己的路。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: An ego could be compared to a small dam in this respect. However, action constantly forms perceptual patterns in which it can view itself. Again, these patterns are formed one within the other, and they could be said to form that imaginary structure which we called the fifth dimension, so many sessions ago.
quotes.translation: 就此而言，自我可比作一座小水坝。然而，行动不断形成可供其反观自身的感知模式。再次强调，这些模式彼此嵌套，可视为构成了我们许多节前所称的第五维度那个虚构结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Your concept of time does not of course change time itself, but it does force you to perceive actions in a certain manner. Much of this is the result of the limitations of the physical organism, but much more is the effect of the development of the ego, which attempts to set itself up and apart from action.
quotes.translation: 你们的时间概念当然不会改变时间本身，但它确实迫使你们以特定方式感知行动。这很大程度上是生理有机体局限性的结果，但更多则是自我发展的影响——自我试图将自己独立于行动之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The knowledge then available is first of all creative, intuitive knowledge which the outer ego may translate into intellectual terms when possible. But it is no longer fearful of intuitive data. It no longer fights the inner senses, nor does it fear for its own survival in the midst of intuitional onrushes.
quotes.translation: 因此可获得的认知首先是创造性的直觉知识，外在自我在可能时会将其转化为理性术语。但它不再畏惧直觉资料，不再对抗内在感官，也不再在直觉洪流中担忧自身存续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: A grudging indulgence is perhaps worse than none however. At this time the plan is excellent, to offset the tight discipline that Ruburt attempted to force upon all other elements of the personality. He has been depriving it physically, in a misguided attempt to force it into the ego's idea of spirituality.
quotes.translation: 勉强给予的纵容或许比完全没有更糟。然而目前这个计划极佳，能平衡鲁柏试图强加于人格所有其他元素的严苛纪律。他一直以肉体上的剥夺来惩罚自己，这是出于一种错误的企图，想强迫它符合自我对灵性的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Nothing is seen directly. You are always forming such constructions, and the methods by which this is accomplished are the same regardless of the nature of the consciousness which is to be perceived in physical terms. In all cases, if the ego consciousness is to be reached, some sense imagery is necessary.
quotes.translation: 没有任何事物能被直接看见。你始终在构建这样的结构，而完成此过程的方法是一致的，无论被感知为物质形态的意识本质为何。在所有情况下，若要触及自我意识，某种感官意象都是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: It provides for the deepest spontaneous expression of the subconscious, gives the ego a directive and sense of purpose, and develops the overall abilities of the personality, which in the past were completely denied, for lack of training and out of fear. The poetry was always a part of the psychic nature.
quotes.translation: 它提供潜意识最深沉的自发性表达，给予自我方向感与目标感，并发展人格的整体能力——这些能力在过去因缺乏训练与恐惧而被完全否定。诗歌始终是心灵本质的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You on your plane for example do not even have conscious memory of your own dream fragments. For that matter you can hardly remember one idea from one week to another on a conscious deliberate basis. It is simply impossible for the ego as you know it to maintain conscious dominance at this time. （Pause.）
quotes.translation: 例如，在你们的层面上，你们甚至无法有意识地记住自己的梦境片段。更甚者，你们几乎无法有意识地、刻意地记住一周到另一周的任何想法。就目前而言，你们所认知的自我根本不可能维持有意识的支配地位。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: On your plane such transformations are carried on without the awareness of the ego with which you are familiar, and therefore other mechanisms become necessary. On some planes the inner senses are the only senses, because all other necessities vanish since the inner senses function at greatest capacity.
quotes.translation: 在你们的层面上，这类转化是在你们所熟悉的自我毫无觉察的情况下进行的，因此需要其他机制来运作。在某些层面上，内在感官是唯一的感官，因为所有其他需求都已消失，而内在感官以最大能力运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is much easier for me to deal with other people's illnesses and health nuisances, than it is to deal with Ruburt's. He asks me a question and then slams the ego gates down, refusing to hear the answer. Because of any distortive possibilities, I try to stay out of such matters unless they are serious.
quotes.translation: 处理鲁柏的健康问题比处理他人的疾病与健康困扰要棘手得多。他向我提问后，却猛然拉下自我（ego）的闸门，拒绝聆听答案。由于任何扭曲的可能性，除非情况严重，我尽量不介入这类事务。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: These things vary with personality; with Ruburt, while the ego cannot directly or immediately participate in such, shall we say excursions, it nevertheless must be kept up to date, and give consent. The concentration of energy on Ruburt's part is increasing. His capability for such focus is increasing.
quotes.translation: 这些情况因人而异；以鲁柏而言，虽然自我无法直接或即时参与这类——姑且称之为——心灵漫游，但它必须随时掌握进展并给予许可。鲁柏方面，能量的凝聚正在增强，其专注能力亦在提升。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When these circumstances no longer exist, then other layers of the self take over the dominant position, and the personality realigns its psychological components. The ego does not disappear, however. It merely takes a back seat in some respects, as your own subconscious does during physical existence.
quotes.translation: 当这些情况不再存在时，自我的其他层面便会占据主导地位，人格会重新调整其心理组成。然而，自我并不会消失，它只是在某些方面退居次要位置，就像你们在物质存在中的潜意识一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: This is a difficult procedure, and in all cases and in all developments of this nature, there must be no attempt made to browbeat the ego, for in this way lies schizophrenia and disorientation. Ruburt's abilities now are beginning to develop. We are sure of our foundation, and this was most necessary.
quotes.translation: 这是一个困难的过程，在所有此类性质的发展中，绝不能试图威吓自我，因为这样会导致精神分裂和迷失方向。鲁柏的能力现在开始发展。我们对基础很有把握，这一点至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: However, the doctor of whom I am speaking also has an excellent bedside manner, so to speak (humorous and slow) and he usually communicates with other levels of the personality that are unknown to the ego. (Long pause.) There would be no harm then, and perhaps some good done, by making such a contact.
quotes.translation: 不过，我所说的那位医生也拥有极佳的病床态度（幽默而缓慢），他通常与自我所不知的人格其他层面沟通。（长停顿）那么，进行这样的接触不会有坏处，或许还会带来一些好处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: The achievement, the book itself, is excellent. The book was written by other portions of the self than the ego, and it was not written at the egos wish alone.
quotes.translation: 成就本身、那本书本身都极为出色。那本书是由自我中非自我的其他部分所写，而非仅凭自我的意愿写成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The subconscious is not a cellar piled high with explosives, rocking at the foundations of the ego. The subconscious contains a collection of diverse, varied and vital personalities who represent the losers when the time arrived to send one of them to the topmost level, or to the surface of the self.
quotes.translation: 潜意识并非堆满炸药、动摇自我根基的地窖。潜意识包含着一群多样、多变且充满活力的人格，它们代表着在决定将其中一人提升至最高层级或自我表层时落败的选手。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego however is quite secure. It would exist regardless, now, of the particular theories of time which might be held, for it is strongly anchored as a specific manipulator of physical reality. And physical reality, believe it or not, is not dependent upon the theory of time as a series of moments.
quotes.translation: 然而自我相当稳固。无论现在持有何种特定的时间理论，它都会存在，因为它作为物质实相的具体操控者被牢牢锚定。而物质实相，信不信由你，并不依赖于将时间视为一连串瞬间的理论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It becomes bitter and mortally frightened, with no place to turn, and it sickens the body, and shrivels, and concentrates more and more upon the morbid aspects of its environment, until it cannot even appreciate the splendid accomplishment of itself, and the joys that are peculiarly part of the ego.
quotes.translation: 它变得苦涩而极度恐惧，无处可去，使身体生病、萎缩，越来越专注于环境中病态的面向，以至于甚至无法欣赏自身辉煌的成就，以及那些专属于自我的喜悦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You should be able to see that Ruburt has grown intellectually, emotionally, and psychically, as a result of the sessions, as have you. Not only has his inner self expanded, but his ego has become stronger, even while it has become more flexible. So there is no need for your concern in that regard.
quotes.translation: 你们应该能看到，鲁柏在智力、情感和心灵层面都因这些课而成长，正如你一样。不仅他的内在自我扩展了，他的自我也变得更强大，同时也更灵活。因此，在这方面你无需担心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Otherwise I should be all life force and no self. Now, I communicate through this level of Ruburt's consciousness. It is subconscious to him or to his ego, but it is not without consciousness by any means. And again, I communicate through that level. At my own level this is not in itself difficult.
quotes.translation: 否则我将全是生命力而没有自我。现在，我透过鲁柏意识的这个层面沟通。这对他或他的自我而言是潜意识，但绝非没有意识。而我再次透过那个层面沟通。在我自己的层面，这本身并不困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: In actuality of course both impulses exist simultaneously. The inner self knows this, but the ego does not. All of this material should add dimension to your understanding of capsule comprehension, and of the initial appearance of consciousness within the physical field, as I explained it earlier.
quotes.translation: 实际上，两种冲动当然同时存在。内在自己知道这一点，但自我不知道。所有这些资料应该能加深你对胶囊式理解的理解，以及我对意识在物质场域中最初显现的解释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In your present daily life the same process continues. Most of these dreams are very disconnected from the ego, and will seldom be recalled. The self who pursues these divergent paths is actual however. These are legitimate projections. They represent systems of reality of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 在你们当前的日常生活中，同样的过程仍在继续。这些梦大多与自我非常脱节，很少会被记起。然而，追寻这些分歧路径的自己是真实的。这些是合法的投射。它们代表了你尚未意识到的实相系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: I will first discuss our own particular circumstances, and then proceed to a more general discussion. There is Ruburt's ego, and his subconscious, as you know. There are also other areas or levels that are part of his whole personality. In our case a gestalt personality or a psychological bridge.
quotes.translation: 我将先讨论我们自身的特定情况，再展开更普遍的论述。如你所知，存在鲁柏的自我及其潜意识。此外，还有属于他整体人格的其他领域或层次。就我们而言，这是一个完形人格或心理桥梁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Increased concentration of the conscious individual is the trend. Then these split personality fragments or images can be kept under scrutiny without taxing the present ego to distraction. Now, the subconscious performs this task- not too well, since it was never meant to focus clear attention.
quotes.translation: 有意识的个体增强专注力是趋势所在。这样分裂的人格片段或意象就能在持续审视下保持稳定，而不会让当前的自我因分心而过度消耗。目前潜意识承担着这项任务——但效果欠佳，因为它本非为清晰聚焦而设。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Neither should the ego react so violently that it remembers and reacts to past storms in the midst of clear and sunny weather. You can understand this analogy, Joseph. You know that such a tree bark would be death to the tree. What you must still understand is that the same applies to yourself.
quotes.translation: 自我也不应反应过度，以致在晴空万里时仍对过往风暴记忆犹新并做出应激反应。约瑟，你能理解这个比喻。你明白这样的树皮对树木而言意味着死亡。但你必须明白的是，同样的道理也适用于你自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It may be thought of in an analogy, as a shadow, in that you create it or project it, but without conscious knowledge. It is a natural consequence of your own existence. But it does not vanish when the ego blots out the inner light from the whole self. Its existence is as permanent as your own.
quotes.translation: 不妨以影子作比喻：你创造或投射它，却毫无自觉意识。它是你自身存在的自然产物。但当自我遮蔽了整体自性的内在光芒时，它并不会消失。它的存在与你自身同样恒久。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Force of various kinds is also exerted by these fields upon your universe. Until it is thoroughly understood little real progress can be made. Mankind still deals with surfaces, depending mainly as he does upon the powers of the outer ego, whose purpose it is to deal only with surface reality.
quotes.translation: 这些场域也以各种力量作用于你们的宇宙。除非彻底理解这一点，否则难有实质进展。人类仍停留在表面，主要依赖外在自我的能力——而外在自我的目的本就只处理表面实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Give us a moment here. (Pause,) To some extent the symptoms did represent caution. He did not want to move until he was sure of his direction once more. It was the stubborn ego in this case that prevented him from seeing clearly the direction which had been given by other portions of the self.
quotes.translation: 请稍候片刻。（停顿）某种程度上，这些症状确实代表谨慎。在重新确定方向前，他不想轻举妄动。但在此案例中，正是固执的自我阻碍了他看清自性其他部分早已指引的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The invisible environment within your mind is not as lonely as you might think, and your seeming inner isolation is caused by the ego's persistent guard. It sees no reason, for example, why you should be informed of information that it does not consider pertinent to day-by-day daily activity.
quotes.translation: 你心智内的无形环境并不如你所想的那般孤寂，而你表面上的内在孤立是由自我持续的守卫造成的。例如，它认为你没有理由去获知那些它认为与日常活动无关的信息。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The various levels of the self possess this sort of reality. They are actions which are aware of themselves as identities, whether or not such distinctions are made by the ego. They are sensitive to other realities which fall within their particular range, and they repel actions which do not.
quotes.translation: 自我的各个层次都拥有这种实相。它们是意识到自身为身份的行动，无论自我是否做出这样的区分。它们对落入其特定范围内的其他实相敏感，并排斥那些不在其中的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Nor would any intrinsically valuable information have come through, unless of course Ruburt had no strong, utilized creative outlets of his own. For oftentimes a benevolent secondary personality will indeed act as an outlet for creative abilities that the dominant ego has been unable to use.
quotes.translation: 任何具有内在价值的信息也不会被传递过来，除非鲁柏本身拥有强大且被充分利用的创造性宣泄渠道。因为一个仁慈的次人格往往会成为主导自我无法运用的创造能力的出口。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The outer ego, being of later development, is jealous of its position and would have all knowledge at its fingertips. This is impossible. It cannot stand to have anything hidden, but the very mechanism of its own behavior is hidden from itself, and it knows only the feel of its own surfaces.
quotes.translation: 外在自我作为较晚发展的部分，对自己的地位充满嫉妒，渴望掌握所有知识。这是不可能的。它无法容忍任何隐藏的事物，但自身行为的运作机制却对它自己隐藏着，它只能感知到自己表面的感受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now, my dear friends, your self-consciousness is the self-consciousness of the ego which you know, and which you consider . But where this self -conscious self ends, another self-conscious self begins. The two selves, being self-conscious selves, cannot be aware of any reality but their own.
quotes.translation: 现在，我亲爱的朋友们，你们的自我意识是你们所认知并视为自我的意识。但在这个自我意识终结之处，另一个自我意识开始了。这两个自我作为有自我意识的存在，只能意识到自身的实相，而无法认知其他实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The emotions belong to the personality, that is to the present personality, and are strongly connected both to the conscious ego and to the inner self, which is so often ignored. This is the rather difficult part for me to explain, I'm afraid. I'm not sure how to go about making this clear.
quotes.translation: 情感属于人格，即当前的人格，并且与有意识的自我以及常被忽视的内我紧密相连。恐怕这部分对我来说相当难以解释。我不确定该如何阐明这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The important point here is that identity cohesion is projected upon the human physical structure from within, that is, from the inner ego by way of the inner senses. This of course includes the consciousness also, that is inherent in the separate molecules and atoms that compose the cells.
quotes.translation: 这里的关键在于，身份认同的凝聚是从内在投射到人类身体结构上的，即通过内在感官从内我投射而来。这当然也包括意识，而意识本就内在于构成细胞的各个分子和原子之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You journey through intensities, as I have told you. These moment points are like spirals however, and journeying through them these other portions of the self will come in contact with both future and past actions, that have occurred, or will occur, according to the view point of the ego.
quotes.translation: 正如我告诉过你的，你穿越各种强度。然而这些时间点如同螺旋，穿越它们时，自我的其他部分将会接触到根据自我的观点已经发生或将要发生的未来与过去的行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: But the ego also grows and learns and evolves, and it can assimilate more and more, and accept more, as a portion of its own identity. It is only because your scientists overestimate the physical that it seems to them that man has not evolved to any great degree in the last million years.
quotes.translation: 但自我同样在成长、学习和进化，它能够吸收越来越多，接纳越来越多，作为自身身份的一部分。只是因为你们的科学家过于高估物质层面，才让他们觉得人类在过去百万年间并未有太大进化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now, it can form new ego elements to help it, and this is what is happening now. (Long pause.) These are impressions. A room on a third floor. The letters SCREW, having to do with a name or street name. A Washington, I believe, D.C. connection. A dirty washstand. Bernard at a window here.
quotes.translation: 现在，它能形成新的自我元素来协助自己，这正是此刻正在发生的事。（长停顿。）这些是印象。三楼的一个房间。字母SCREW，与某个名字或街道名有关。我认为与华盛顿特区有关联。一个肮脏的洗脸架。伯纳德在此处的窗边。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: I told you from the beginning that the inner ego is aware of data that is received through the inner senses as well as data from the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 我从一开始就告诉过你，内在自我能觉察到通过内在感官接收的数据，以及来自外在感官的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Their psychic benefits quite outweigh their physical benefits for him in particular. At such times as now, the ego imprisons him, and he does not allow himself inner freedom. The exercises give a daily relief, and creative refreshment. They will also be indirectly a help in our sessions.
quotes.translation: 对他而言，这些心灵上的益处远超过物质上的益处。在像现在这样的时刻，自我囚禁了他，他不允许自己拥有内在自由。这些练习能提供每日的舒缓与创造性的更新，它们也会间接对我们的课有所帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now where the ego operates you will always find chemical repercussions; to some extent or another then the physical body will be involved. Deeper or less familiar portions of the self exist without a chemical manifestation. These usually take electromagnetic forms to some degree however.
quotes.translation: 凡有自我运作之处，你总会发现化学上的连锁反应；在某种程度上，物质身体也会被牵涉其中。自我中更深层或较不熟悉的部分则不存在化学显现，不过它们通常会在某种程度上采取电磁形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: This is an unbending conscious pose of the ego, and not to be confused with the lithe subconscious detachment which is actually warm, flexible and expansive. That is, it can contain within it many elements, acknowledge them but be not affected by bad or negative suggestions or elements.
quotes.translation: 这是自我的一种僵化有意识姿态，不可与那种温暖、灵活且具扩展性的柔韧潜意识超脱相混淆。也就是说，它能容纳诸多元素，承认它们的存在，却不受不良或负面暗示或元素的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The same can be said for the probable self. Were it not for the experience of this probable self and for the information which it gives, via the dreaming self to the subconscious, then it would be most difficult for the ego to come to any kind of a decision within the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 这句话同样适用于可能的自我。若非这个可能自我的经验，以及它通过做梦自我传递给潜意识的信息，自我在物质宇宙中做出任何决定都将极为困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It is the self that looks outward. It is the self that you call egotistically aware. The inner self became what I refer to as the inner ego. It looks into that inner reality, that psychic dimension of awareness from which both your own consciousness and your body consciousness emerged.
quotes.translation: 它是向外看的自我。它是你称之为自我意识觉醒的那个自我。内在自我成为了我所说的内在自我。它向内审视那个内在实相，那个灵性维度的觉知——你自身的意识与身体意识皆由此而生。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: This is why I speak often of more or less disciplined experiments, with slow gradations. For following our analogy, your psychic footpath is then composed of stones laid out in some order, and not too far from one another, that can lead you both away from the ego and back to it safely.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么我常谈到要循序渐进地进行有纪律的实验。因为按照我们的比喻，你的心灵小径是由排列有序、间距适中的石块铺就的，既能带你远离自我，也能安全地将你带回自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It has not been drowned completely by any means. Attempting to cut itself off, however, from the wholeness of the whole personality, the ego must strain for its reserves of energy; for in a large measure, it refuses to accept the energy of the whole personality that is available to it.
quotes.translation: 它绝未完全被淹没。然而，当自我试图与整个人格的完整性割裂时，它必须竭力汲取自身的能量储备；因为它在很大程度上拒绝接受整个人格中可供其使用的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego is a state resulting from the third creative dilemma, which happens when consciousness of self attempts to separate itself from action.
quotes.translation: 自我是第三种创造性困境的产物，这种困境发生在自我意识试图与行动分离之时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Art often appears timeless to the ego because it often merges within it a greater number of moment points than the ego can ordinarily perceive.
quotes.translation: 艺术对自我而言常显得超越时间，因为它融合了比自我通常能感知的更多瞬间点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: I do suggest a brief break. I want to go into this a little more tonight. Then I want to mention briefly Ruburt's idea of my idea about the bed, and I want to at least mention the condensed time concept, and cover briefly something new, which is the self-conscious self behind the ego.
quotes.translation: 我建议稍作休息。今晚我想进一步探讨这个问题。然后我想简要提及鲁柏对我关于床的想法的理解，并至少提及浓缩时间概念，最后简要介绍一个新内容——即自我背后的自觉性自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: We will discuss what you call suggestion in more practical terms, for your particular uses. Nevertheless it is necessary that its basic nature be understood. The ego simply cannot judge, as a rule, whether an action is a constructive or an impeding one, for the personality as a whole.
quotes.translation: 我们将以更实用的方式讨论你们所谓的暗示，以便你们能具体运用。然而，其基本性质仍需被理解。一般而言，自我无法判断某个行动是建设性的还是阻碍性的，因为这是整个人格的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Here is a clue for so-called astral travel. Again, the inner self has limitless intensities of pulsation available to it. When the inner self in its constant motion travels through an impulse range which it has once experienced, to the ego this will appear as a journey into the past.
quotes.translation: 这里提供一条所谓星光体出游的线索。再次强调，内在自体拥有无限强度的脉动可供其使用。当内在自体在其持续运动中穿越一个它曾经历过的冲动范围时，对自我而言，这看起来就像一次进入过去的旅程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Neither, then, is the ego ever finished, nor the inner self, nor the entity. Each field of existence merges into every other, and yet each retains its own identity. The subconscious layers of the self dwell also in many realities, and here I speak of actual fields and not fantasies.
quotes.translation: 因此，无论是自我、内在自体还是存有，都从未完成过。每个存在领域都融入其他领域，然而每个领域又保留着自身的身份。自体的潜意识层面也栖身于许多实相中，此处我指的是实际领域而非幻想。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The inner self that knows its existence within action, has a firm foothold within reality. The ego can perform its function, fulfill its responsibilities within the physical field, and be free to know adequate joys and pleasures. But such an inner self must be renewed within action.
quotes.translation: 那个在行动中知晓自身存在的内在自己，在实相中拥有稳固的立足点。自我能在物质领域履行其功能、承担其责任，并自由地体验足够的喜悦与欢愉。但这样的内在自己必须在行动中不断更新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: On leaving the dream state, he becomes more and more aware of the ego, and creates then activities which have meaning to it. In the deep dream state the inner purposes are more involved. As I have mentioned however, all dream symbols have meanings to all portions of the personality.
quotes.translation: 离开梦境状态后，他越来越意识到自我的存在，并创造出对其具有意义的活动。在深层梦境状态中，内在目的更为复杂。然而正如我所提过的，所有梦境象征对人格的各个部分都具有意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The temporary and apparent sense of freedom from the camouflage pattern often times leads the subject or student into a false sense of freedom from it in daily life, and causes a lack of ego discipline that should be maintained. Our method does not involve such dangerous territory.
quotes.translation: 暂时且表面脱离伪装模式的自由感，常导致学生或研究者误以为日常生活中也能脱离该模式，从而缺乏应保持的自我约束。我们的方法不涉及如此危险的领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Many concepts, huge advancements and practical inventions, simply wait in abeyance in the world of dreams until some man accepts them as possibilities within his frame of reality. Why man so often mistrusts the dream reality would escape me, if I did not know the nature of the ego.
quotes.translation: 许多概念、巨大进步和实用发明，只是静待于梦境世界中，直到有人将它们视为其现实框架内的可能性。若非我了解自我的本质，我实在难以理解为何人类如此不信任梦境实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The intuitions must go hand in hand with the intellect. The intellect is useful in interpreting your data in terms that the ego can understand. The intuitions come close to mankinds source, and it is through the intuitions that information pertaining to the dream reality will come.
quotes.translation: 直觉必须与智力携手并进。智力有助于以自我能理解的术语诠释你的资料。直觉则接近人类的源头，正是通过直觉，与梦境实相相关的信息才会到来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: At death on your plane the ego merely changes the focus of its awareness. We have come through very well this evening, and I will here end our session. My fondest wishes to you both. We will take up the question of transubstantiation, as asked by our friend, at a not distant date.
quotes.translation: 在你们层面的死亡中，自我只是改变了其意识的焦点。今晚我们进展得非常顺利，我在此结束本次课程。向你们两位致以最深的祝福。关于我们朋友所问的圣体转化问题，我们将在不久后予以探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now when I first spoke of the inverted time system, I spoke of it as if it were apart from your own time system, to enable you to see it with some objectivity. However as you know by now, this system operates within your own. It simply is not the time system recognized by the ego.
quotes.translation: 当我最初提及倒置时间系统时，我将其描述为独立于你们自身时间系统之外的存在，以便你们能以某种客观性看待它。然而如你们所知，这个系统其实运作于你们自身的时间系统之内。它只是不被自我所认可的时间系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: There are levels of which we have not yet spoken. The repository of potentiality however is contained within those layers that are not conscious. As a rule the ego chooses those elements from this repository which it feels will be most beneficial in dealing with physical reality.
quotes.translation: 还有我们尚未探讨的层次。但潜能库确实存在于那些非意识层面之中。通常情况下，自我会从这个库藏中选择那些它认为最有利于处理物质实相的元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now. When you consider that in sleep the ego is not dominant, then it should not seem strange to you that it is not dominant after death.
quotes.translation: 现在。当你们考虑到睡眠时自我并不主导，那么死后自我不再主导这件事，对你们而言就不该显得奇怪了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Full use of the inner senses is not even for me yet. There is still a long way for me to go. We progress along these lines according to our capabilities and our own strengths. The conscious ego also develops in a strange manner through all this, as I will now attempt to explain.
quotes.translation: 内感官的全面运用对我而言也尚未达成。我仍有很长的路要走。我们根据自身的能力与长处，沿着这些方向逐步进展。有意识的自我也会在此过程中以奇特的方式发展，我现在将尝试解释这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: A fine tuning of focus takes place here, where Ruburts abilities are focused in new directions, directions that are unfamiliar to the ego. A focusing is involved on my part also, and a kind of synthesis formed that allows us to bridge the gap that separates our fields of action.
quotes.translation: 此处发生了一种精微的焦点调整，鲁柏的能力被导向新的方向——那些自我所不熟悉的方向。我这边也涉及一种聚焦，并形成某种综合，使我们得以跨越分隔彼此行动领域的鸿沟。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now. The search for answers, and this passionate yearning toward truth, has driven Ruburt's personality, and he became ill only when he was afraid to continue the search, because it led him into byways that he had not planned upon; or rather, upon which the ego had not planned.
quotes.translation: 现在。对答案的追寻，以及这股对真理的热切渴望，驱动了鲁柏的人格，而当他害怕继续追寻时，他才会生病，因为这条追寻之路将他引向了未曾预料的岔路；或者更确切地说，是自我未曾计划过的路径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Again however, through this excellent balance and these fine controls, the ego will accept knowledge derived from the dream state, as a man might accept a message from a distant land in which he does not care to dwell, and whose environment would both mystify and frighten him.
quotes.translation: 然而，再次通过这种卓越的平衡与精妙的控制，自我会接受来自梦境状态的知识，如同一个人可能接受来自遥远国度的信息，尽管他并不想居住在那里，那里的环境既令他困惑又令他恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This portion of the self then can be utilized to keep the ego and the subconscious in balance. Your own identity is still greater than this however. This portion of the self can serve to keep you informed as to the balance and efficiency of the immediate operating personality.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我的这一部分可以用来维持自我与潜意识之间的平衡。然而，你自身的身份认同仍比这更为宏大。自我的这一部分可以让你随时了解当前运作人格的平衡状态与效率。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The inner ego has access, again, to a much vaster amount of knowledge. It is aware not only of its own private position, as you are of yours, but it is also familiar with the mass events of its reality. It is intimately involved in the creation of your own private experience.
quotes.translation: 内在自我再次能够获取更庞大的知识量。它不仅知晓自身私密处境（如同你知晓自己的处境），也熟悉其真实性的群体事件。它密切参与着你个人经验的创造。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: For the present Ruburt's ego will exert balancing resistance, like an anchor perhaps, or a weight. However the inner self has also tasted new freedom, so there will be a brief jolting while the relationships and forces work themselves out to achieve a new, integrated balance.
quotes.translation: 目前鲁柏的自我将发挥平衡性的阻力，或许像锚或重物。然而内在自我也已尝到新的自由，因此当各种关系与力量自行运作以达成新的整合平衡时，将会出现短暂的震荡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This loss of contact applies only to the ego. It does not apply to those other portions of the self, and it is through the inner self, through inner consciousness, that to some degree the nature of action can make itself known. And when it is made known it will be seen then--
quotes.translation: 这种接触的丧失只适用于自我。它并不适用于自我的其他部分，而正是通过内在自我、通过内在意识，行动的本质才能在某种程度上得以显现。当它显现时，人们将会看到——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I am making this discussion as simple as possible, and using the conscious self simply because less difficulties are presented in explanation. It is obvious, for example, that some events are experienced by the subconscious also, that may or may not be experienced by the ego.
quotes.translation: 我尽可能简化这场讨论，并使用意识自我，仅仅是因为这样解释起来困难较少。例如，很明显，某些事件也会被潜意识所体验，而这些事件可能被自我体验到，也可能不被自我体验到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: As you know however, it is almost impossible for you to be aware of the full perceptions possible, for the ego would never stand for it. Oftentimes, even in simple dreams, you feel concepts, you understand a particular piece of information, without a word having been spoken.
quotes.translation: 然而，如你所知，你几乎不可能意识到所有可能的感知，因为自我绝不会容忍这一点。常常，即使在简单的梦境中，你也能感受到概念，理解某条特定信息，而无需任何言语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: There had been a tendency, as given, for a rigid personality ego framework in any case. The qualities thrown up to the surface were those in the past most capable to handle highly difficult situations, and in some of these stubbornness was, comparatively speaking, a virtue.
quotes.translation: 如前所述，原本就存在一种僵化人格自我框架的倾向。浮上表面的那些特质，是过去最能处理高度困难情境的，其中某些固执，相对而言，竟成了美德。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You have built defenses so strongly that you have not heard the voice of the inner self. The inner self is hardly to be feared. You have allowed the ego to become a counterfeit self, and you take its word because you will not hear the muffled voice that is within you speak.
quotes.translation: 你建立的防御如此坚固，以至于听不见内在自我的声音。内在自我根本不足为惧。你让自我变成了一个伪造的自我，你相信它的话语，是因为你不愿聆听内心那被压抑的声音。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: This man will not be a stranger, yet he will not be the old Bernard, and Sarah can only help him by letting him know that she is there, and waiting. This is more important than it may appear, for the new ego will need guides to manipulate within physical reality once again.
quotes.translation: 这个人不会是个陌生人，但他也不会是过去的伯纳德，莎拉只能通过让他知道她在那里并等待来帮助他。这比表面看起来更重要，因为新自我需要向导来再次在物质实相中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: "Egotistically, you make arbitrary designations of necessity, perceiving only portions of any given action: again, the ego attempting to separate itself from overall action, and to see itself as an entirely independent structure." (See the excerpts from the 242nd session.)
quotes.translation: "从自我中心的角度，你任意指定必要性，只感知任何给定行动的部分片段：再次强调，自我试图将自己与整体行动分离，并视自己为完全独立的结构。"（参见第242节摘录。）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Recall here also the cooperation that exists between the smallest particles and the cells and organs. Each molecule has its own self-image, without which it could not exist as a physical construction. The subconscious has its own self-image, the ego has its own self-image.
quotes.translation: 这里也请回想存在于最小粒子、细胞与器官之间的合作。每个分子都有其自身形象，若无此形象，它便无法作为物质结构存在。潜意识有其自身形象，自我也有其自身形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: We will either cut our friend down as to allotted time per day for a while, or we will not have him experiment alone in the apartment. Any difficulties would be caused by a temporary impasse of ego and inner self, which should clear itself up. I do not foresee difficulty.
quotes.translation: 我们要么暂时削减朋友每日的独处时间，要么不让他独自在公寓里实验。任何困难都将源于自我与内在自我之间的暂时僵局，这种僵局会自行化解。我预见不到困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This cannot be done, obviously, at a conscious level. The subconscious can be trained to do so, but usually it is necessarily hampered in that it cannot use those ranges of intensity which make up meanings to the ego. Hence the appearance of what you may call distortions.
quotes.translation: 这显然无法在意识层面完成。潜意识可以被训练做到这一点，但通常它必然受到阻碍，因为它无法运用那些构成自我意义所必需的能量强度范围。因此便出现了你们所谓的扭曲现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Nevertheless it is fully capable of perceiving far more than Western man allows it to perceive. Fear and ignorance and superstition quite obviously limit the potentialities of the ego, and therefore to some degree limit even its effectiveness within the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 然而它完全有能力感知到远比西方人允许它感知的多得多的内容。恐惧、无知与迷信显然限制了自我的潜能，因此也在某种程度上限制了它甚至在物质宇宙中的效能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The realities are formed by psychic intent, and the true cohesiveness is intuitive. The deep connections that occur, for example in various reincarnations, are not apparent to the ego. The connections between us, now, are far more logical than any simple cause and effect.
quotes.translation: 实相由心灵意图所形成，真正的凝聚力是直觉性的。例如各种转世中发生的深层关联，对自我而言并不明显。我们此刻之间的关联，远比任何简单的因果关系更具逻辑性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: We have spoken, saying that the ego has a relatively small but intense focus. Your friend however has an even smaller specific field of attention, to your way of thinking. The concentration however and the focus is much more intense than that with which you are familiar.
quotes.translation: 我们曾说过，自我具有相对较小却高度集中的焦点。然而以你们的思维方式来看，你朋友注意力的特定领域更为狭窄，但其专注程度与聚焦强度却远比你熟悉的更为强烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The use of psychological time will make the experience of death much less frightening. You will already have learned to recognize the spacious present for what it is, and the conscious ego will not be so bewildered and confused by the sudden perception that is involved.
quotes.translation: 运用心理时间将使死亡的体验不再那么令人恐惧。你将早已学会辨识广袤当下的本质，而意识自我也不会因突然的感知而陷入如此困惑与混乱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Obviously however this analogy only carries us so far. You will say, "The four egos belonging to Eve all belonged to one physical body, but in the reincarnational process we are faced with the issue of several bodies, each one discarded and experiencing physical death."
quotes.translation: 然而显然这个比喻只能到此为止。你会说："属于夏娃的四个自我都属于同一个物质身体，但在转世过程中，我们面对的是多个身体的问题，每个身体都被丢弃并经历物质死亡。"
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: There may be a strong feeling of oneness with All That Is. This is of course much to those who have been primarily ego oriented, and it represents a meaningful breakthrough that can indeed provide the opportunity and impetus for a far more fulfilling earthly existence.
quotes.translation: 可能会产生与一切万有合一的强烈感受。这对那些原本以自我导向为主的人来说当然意义重大，它代表着一个有意义的突破，确实能为更充实的尘世存在提供机会和动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Because of its relative freedom, however, the self, returning from the dream world, can impart to the individual knowledge of much the physical self could not ordinarily be aware. Much of this knowledge, then, resides in the subconscious while the ego goes on its way.
quotes.translation: 然而，由于其相对的自由，从梦境世界返回的自我能够将物质自我通常无法察觉的许多知识传递给个体。因此，当自我继续前行时，这些知识大多存于潜意识之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The event is actual all the same, and is experienced in variation. The whole self therefore perceives and is affected by probabilities, and experiences these as action, regardless of whether or not the ego has chosen to accept any given event as a physical occurrence.
quotes.translation: 事件本身仍然是真实的，并以变异的形式被体验。因此，整体自己感知并受到可能性的影响，将这些体验视为行动，无论自我是否选择接受任何特定事件为物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The order within the probable system is based upon something that could be compared to subjective associations, or intuitive flashes of insight, that can combine elements that would appear to the ego as quite disconnected, into whole and integrated patterns of action.
quotes.translation: 可能性系统内的秩序基于某种可类比于主观联想或直觉灵光闪现的东西，它能将自我看来毫不相干的元素组合成完整而整合的行动模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: If you compare the whole sell with an ocean, then the topmost wave at any given time would represent the ego. It is not by or of itself a separate thing, but part of the whole, forever changing, to return to the whole and be tumbled under and emerge again in new form.
quotes.translation: 若将整体自己比作海洋，那么任何特定时刻最顶端的波浪就代表自我。它本身并非独立存在之物，而是整体的一部分，永恒变化着，回归整体后沉入浪底，再以新形态浮现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The ego as you know it, the conscious self within your time system, this ego, let us say, arrives at and experiences event X.
quotes.translation: 你所知的自我，即你时间系统内的意识自我，这个自我，我们这么说，抵达并经历了事件X。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The eye rises out of the physical structure. The ego rises out of the structure of the psyche. It cannot see itself, as the eye cannot. Both look outward -- in one case away from the physical body, and in the other case away from the inner psyche to the environment.
quotes.translation: 眼睛从肉体结构中升起。自我从心灵结构中升起。它无法看见自身，正如眼睛无法看见自身。两者都向外看——一个离开肉体，另一个离开内在心灵而朝向环境。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Part of what I am about to say may sound callous, but you should see that such is not the case. From the viewpoint of the concerned and conscientious ego-self, truly there appears to be great and disastrous evils that overflow like poison the cup of human existence.
quotes.translation: 我接下来要说的话或许听来冷酷，但你们应明白事实并非如此。从关切且尽责的自我意识角度来看，确实存在着如毒液般溢满人类存在之杯的巨大灾难性邪恶。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It begins to reject stimuli, because stimuli must be reacted to, and it rejects action because action must be reacted to. Therefore it chooses areas of rejection. The areas it chooses to reject are determined by characteristics that are unique to the particular ego.
quotes.translation: 它开始拒绝刺激，因为刺激必须被回应；它拒绝行动，因为行动必须被回应。因此它选择拒绝的领域，而选择拒绝的领域由该特定自我独有的特质所决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is amazing how man regrets the hours spent in sleep, for he does not realize how hard he works when his ego is unaware.
quotes.translation: 人类对睡眠中流逝的时光感到惋惜，这实在令人惊奇，因为他们并未意识到当自我意识沉睡时，自己仍在辛勤工作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It cannot maintain stability, for all its efforts, and it cannot in any way limit the self. It, the ego, merely does not perceive because it will not perceive those other perception patterns, and that larger scope with which the whole self is constantly involved.
quotes.translation: 它（自我）竭尽全力也无法维持稳定，更无法以任何方式限制本体。自我之所以无法感知，仅仅是因为它拒绝感知那些其他认知模式，以及整个本体始终参与其中的更广阔范畴。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Therefore each portion of action is aware of its simultaneous experience within all levels. Again, action carries itself along. Each self is therefore aware of its previous gestalt affiliations. Now. Identities may or may not have egos. An atom is an identity--
quotes.translation: 因此，行动的每个部分都意识到其在所有层面上的同时性体验。再次地，行动自行推进。因此，每个自我都意识到其先前的完形关联。现在。身份可能有自我，也可能没有。一个原子就是一个身份——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Ruburt himself, unconsciously but also to some extent consciously, has been more intrigued with questions concerning consciousness and personality -- the role of the ego consciousness, for example -- since beginning his novel, Oversoul 7 (in late March, 1972).
quotes.translation: 鲁柏本人，在无意识层面，也在某种程度上于有意识层面，自从开始撰写《超灵7号》小说（1972年3月下旬）以来，对意识与人格——例如自我意识的作用——相关的问题愈发着迷。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The return home temporarily seemed to stop this steady progress toward diffusion. The crisis occurred at 2:30 that morning, when Miss Callahan awakened, momentarily completely naked of ego, face to face with the subconscious, and sensing the inner self within.
quotes.translation: 返家暂时中止了这种朝向扩散的稳定进程。危机发生在凌晨2点30分，当时卡拉汉小姐醒来，瞬间完全剥离了自我，直面潜意识，并感知到内在自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The information is not closed to it. It simply does not use it, and there are several quite sufficient reasons for this, reasons that have to do with the necessary apart manner in which the ego, when it operates as a separate unit, views the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 信息并未对其封闭。它只是不使用这些信息，而对此有数个充分理由，这些理由与自我在作为独立单元运作时，必须以必要的隔离方式看待物质宇宙有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In your terms, the ideas of good and evil help you recognize the sacredness of existence, the responsibility of consciousness. The ideas of opposites also are necessary guide lines for the developing ego. The inner self knows quite well the unity that exists.
quotes.translation: 就你们而言，善恶观念帮助你们认识到存在的神圣性以及意识的責任。对立观念也是发展中的自我所必需的指引。内在自体非常清楚存在的统一性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The energy that would be used to solve the problem instead is spent maintaining the illness. It is therefore necessary that an attempt be made as soon as possible to solve the problem, which of course must first be discovered by the ego, which has avoided it.
quotes.translation: 本应用于解决问题的能量，反而被用来维持疾病。因此必须尽快尝试解决问题——当然，这首先需要那个一直回避问题的自我去发现它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You are ashamed to admit that to some extent you resent the payments that you both make, and this is the main reason why these fears were not recognized sufficiently by the ego, but forced into the subconscious where they made themselves known in this manner.
quotes.translation: 你羞于承认自己在某种程度上对双方支付的款项心怀怨怼，这正是这些恐惧未被自我充分觉察，反被逼入潜意识并以这种方式显现的主因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: When the ego is artificially forced to let such experiences through then it is in severe danger. I suggest a break.
quotes.translation: 当自我被人为强迫让此类经验通过时，它将陷入严重危机。我建议暂停片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: You may know that intense immersion into any particular activity results in a momentary loss, or seeming loss, of ego identity, in that the activity and the personality become one. Ruburt becomes his poem during such occasions, and you become your painting.
quotes.translation: 你或许知晓，全神贯注于任何特定活动时，会导致自我认同的短暂丧失或看似丧失——此时活动与人格合为一体。鲁柏在那些时刻化身为他的诗作，而你则成为你的画作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: And what meaning you give it is there, and part of it, since you who project the meaning are yourselves part of it. The inner self is, therefore, that inner portion of action which forms the egos, and the selves, through the dilemmas of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 你赋予它的意义就在那里，并成为它的一部分，因为投射意义的你本身就是它的一部分。因此，内在自体是构成自我与诸自体的内在行动部分，通过我曾提及的那些困境而运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Its composition is not easy to explain in your terms. At your end there are strong chemical and electromagnetic connections that you do not understand. These in large measure help form the physically oriented ego, or at least form its characteristic manner.
quotes.translation: 其构成难以用你们的术语解释。在你们这一端，存在着你们尚未理解的强烈化学与电磁连接。这些连接在很大程度上帮助形成了以物质为导向的自我，或至少塑造了其特有的运作模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You have what you may think of then as a split action, where one portion of the self, the inner ego, is allowed to travel through the other states of action that compose the whole self, purposefully as a director, and retain the knowledge thereby received.
quotes.translation: 你们可以将其视为一种分裂行动：自体的某个部分——内在自我——被允许如同导演般有目的地穿越构成整体自体的其他行动状态，并保留由此获得的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Now let us start with Jung for a bit. He presumes that consciousness must be organized about an ego structure. And what he calls the unconscious, not so egotistically organized, he therefore considers without consciousness, without consciousness of a self.
quotes.translation: 现在我们稍微谈谈荣格。他假定意识必然围绕一个自我结构来组织。而他所谓的无意识，由于组织方式不那么以自我为中心，因此他认为无意识是没有意识的，没有自我意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now these potential egos, you see, made up of various potentials and needs and abilities, these pooled resources that belong to the inner identity, did not simply spring into existence. They are the result of psychological experience gained in past lives.
quotes.translation: 现在，这些潜在的自我，你看，由各种潜能、需求和能力组成，这些属于内在身份的共同资源并非凭空产生。它们是过去世所获得的心理经验的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Yet within the dream state the familiar physical props sometimes disappear. The inner I operates very well without them. In order to manipulate a physical reality however, the inner I needs a self that is acclimated to physical conditions; hence the ego.
quotes.translation: 然而在梦境状态中，熟悉的物质道具有时会消失。内在自体没有它们也能运作得很好。但为了操控物质实相，内在自体需要一个适应物质条件的自我，因此便产生了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: (Very possible that subconscious controls were used this time, without my knowledge of course, consciously. Nevertheless there must be conscious control and the ego must be certain of its dominant position--not be afraid of being taken over, willy-nilly.
quotes.translation: （很可能这次潜意识控制被使用了，当然我意识上并不知情。不过必须存在意识控制，且自我必须确信其主导地位——不惧怕被随意接管。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now I will let you end the session, but this is information that is highly valuable. The spontaneous self is also highly relieved that it is on good terms again with the ego, and that the personality is establishing itself and the main work is beginning.
quotes.translation: 现在我将让你结束这堂课，但这是极具价值的信息。自发自体也因与自我重归于好、人格正在确立自身且主要工作即将展开而感到如释重负。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The ego, the inner ego, the subconscious, the whole self, and even the entity, these are all states of tension.
quotes.translation: 自我、内在自我、潜意识、整体自我，甚至存有，这些都是张力的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Nevertheless a freedom from the ego must be permitted to some extent, so that the inner self can most freely operate. I have spoken of tests and experiments that can be conducted, and which will yield physical results that will be ultimately accepted.
quotes.translation: 然而，必须允许一定程度的自我解脱，以便内在自性能够最自由地运作。我曾提及可进行的测试与实验，这些将产生最终能被接受的物质性结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is unfortunate that the idea of tests often disturbs the flexibility that is necessary in order to achieve results. That is, Ruburt, wanting correct information, （pause） has some tendency to want it so badly that the ego stiffens, forming barriers.
quotes.translation: 不幸的是，测试的概念常常会干扰达成结果所必需的灵活性。也就是说，鲁柏渴望获得正确信息时，（停顿）有时会因过度渴求而导致自我僵化，形成屏障。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: He allows me to make some adjustments in it however, and we shall discuss these in detail before too long. Now. One of the egos that was mine, you see, is a part of Ruburt's whole personality, and we use this as a bridgework. I can use it momentarily.
quotes.translation: 不过他允许我对其自我进行某些调整，不久后我们将详细讨论这些调整。须知，我曾拥有的某个自我，正是鲁柏整体人格的一部分，我们以此作为桥梁。我能暂时运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Again, this is an important point. The ego has accepted the goals of the inner self. Its identity has already changed, so that its main concern, underline main, is no longer primarily with physical manipulation, but with inner growth and development.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这点很重要。自我已接纳内在自我的目标，其身份认同已然转变，因此其主要关注——强调"主要"——不再聚焦于物质操控，而是转向内在成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You have by now become acquainted with a self you did not know before our sessions, a self who keeps watch upon both the ego and the subconscious. This is no longer theory to you, for you are practically aware of the self in an ever-growing fashion.
quotes.translation: 如今你已逐渐认识一个在我们课程前未曾知晓的自我——这个自我同时观照着自我与潜意识。这对你而言已非理论，因为你正以日益增长的方式实际感知到这个自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The ego would have chosen an easier road, through fiction. (Pause.) Through easy success, through in fact a far more shallow route, but the intuitive self would have suffered drastically in your future, and there would have been severe difficulties.
quotes.translation: 自我本会选择更轻松的路径——通过虚构（停顿）、唾手可得的成功、实则更肤浅的途径。但直觉自我将在你的未来遭受重创，届时将面临严峻困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Ego in its own way senses these particular potentialities also; merely senses them as say a dog might sniff danger, and it directs its efforts to block them. A frightened dog takes very careful handling, or you may lose a hand and gain very little.
quotes.translation: 自我以其自身方式也感知到这些特定潜能；它只是像狗嗅到危险般感知到它们，并努力阻挡它们。受惊的狗需要非常谨慎地对待，否则你可能失去一只手却一无所获。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: A comparable change occurred in your personality, Joseph, after the sessions began. It was less difficult, mainly since you had been ill earlier, you see, and already forced to know the weight of the body when the ego fights the intuitional self.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，在课程开始后，你的人格也发生了类似的变化。这变化没那么困难，主要是因为你在更早之前生过病，你知道的，当自我对抗直觉性自我时，你早已被迫认识到身体的沉重。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You have seen that the ego is a building block. It never becomes less than a unit, and may become more.
quotes.translation: 你已明白自我是一个积木块。它永远不会小于一个单位，却可能变得更大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The original propulsion of inner characteristics outward into the formation of the ego could be compared with the birth of innumerable stars -- an event of immeasurable consequences that originated on a subjective level and within inner reality.
quotes.translation: 内在特质向外投射形成自我的原始动力，可比拟为无数星辰的诞生——这起源于主观层面与内在实相的事件，其影响无可估量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Beneath this layer, in a third subconscious level, still dealing with the present personality, lie those possibilities of development which have lain barren and were not sufficiently strong to send up seeds to bloom in the sun of conscious ego.
quotes.translation: 在此层面之下，第三个潜意识层次仍与当前人格相关，其中蕴藏着那些未曾萌芽的发展潜能——它们因不够强韧而未能将种子送入意识自我的阳光中绽放。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This is not the result of any inherent egotistical quality. It is true that the egos responsibility is with the relationship between the self and the physical environment. It must of necessity be focused within the confines of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这并非源于任何固有的自我特质。诚然，自我的职责在于协调自体与物质环境的关系，它必然需要聚焦于物质实相的界限之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There is a constant give and take between the probable self and the dreaming self, for much data is received, particularly by the dreaming personality from the probable self, or the self that experiences what the ego would term probable events.
quotes.translation: 可能性自我与做梦自我之间存在着持续不断的给予与索取，因为许多资料——尤其是做梦人格——是从可能性自我那里接收来的，也就是从体验着自我所称的可能性事件的那个自我那里接收来的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: We shall tie these two subjects together. The book should make one point plain: Identity, despite all appearances to the contrary, does not reside primarily in the ego. Social identity may possibly there reside, but the basic identity does not.
quotes.translation: 我们将把这两个主题联系在一起。这本书应该阐明一点：尽管所有表象都与此相反，但身份认同主要并不存在于自我中。社会身份或许存在于那里，但基本身份认同并不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: These various stages of the subconscious represent what was once the conscious ego of an individual, left now almost like living archeological heritage, from which the present individual may draw both knowledge, psychic continuity and balance.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的这些不同阶段代表了个人曾经有意识的自我，如今几乎像活生生的考古遗产一样留存下来，现在的个人可以从其中汲取知识、心灵连续性与平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: One dream will enable the ego to solve pressing immediate problems. The dream drama will enable the personality to act out various possibilities which are experienced as reality. The most effective drama is then reacted to in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 一个梦境能让自我解决迫切的现实问题。梦的戏剧性让个性得以演绎各种可能性，这些可能性被体验为真实。最有效的戏剧随后会在物质实相中得到回应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The second layer, still of the personal subconscious, contains those elements most deeply feared for personal psychological reasons, those which somewhat frequently arise as in an earthquake, to shatter the seemingly solid surface of the ego.
quotes.translation: 第二层仍属于个人潜意识，包含那些因个人心理原因而被最深切恐惧的元素，它们时常如地震般涌现，粉碎自我看似坚固的表面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: (Seth, in the 512th session in Chapter 1 of Seth Speaks: "Now at times I will be using the term 'camouflage,' referring to the physical world to which the outer ego relates, for physical form is one of the camouflages that reality adopts.")
quotes.translation: 赛斯在《赛斯书》第一章第512节中说道："有时我会使用'伪装'一词，指涉外在自我所关联的物质世界，因为物质形态是实相所采用的伪装之一。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The ego structure had been in danger for some time previous. Psychologically there was some considerable distance between his identity and the physical universe as he knew it. He did not quite make contact. It was too easy for him to stray.
quotes.translation: 自我结构在此前一段时间已处于危险状态。从心理层面而言，他的身份认同与他所认知的物质宇宙之间存在相当距离。他并未完全建立联系，太容易游离失所。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Hypnosis will work well to help your physical and even mental conditions. It is after all only a means of reaching the whole self and of acquainting the ego, through effects, with the abilities of the whole self, of which it is but a part.
quotes.translation: 催眠将有效改善你的身体甚至心理状况。毕竟它只是触及整体自我的途径，并通过效果让自我——这个仅作为整体自我一部分的存在——认识整体自我的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In my own book I will describe the makeup of personality from another viewpoint indeed. You take it for granted that each individual has but one ego, and therefore perhaps understandably you ascribe to it more importance than it possesses.
quotes.translation: 在我的书里，我会从另一个角度描述人格的构成。你们理所当然地认为每个人只有一个自我，因此或许可以理解，你们赋予了它比实际更重要的地位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The ego takes care of physical matters so that the inner self can go about its other concerns. To shunt it aside is highly dangerous. The inner self is then in a precarious position, for it must also attempt to deal with physical reality.
quotes.translation: 自我负责处理物质事务，以便内在自体可以处理其他事务。将其搁置一旁是极其危险的。内在自体随后会处于岌岌可危的境地，因为它也必须尝试处理物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: There is no deeply symbolic meaning here, the stairs having simply become a transitional point between the outside and the inside. Although going down is somewhat significant, representing to the ego the fear of going down into the self.
quotes.translation: 这里并没有深层的象征意义，楼梯只是成为外部与内部之间的过渡点。虽然向下走有些意义，代表自我对沉入自体的恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There is much that you simply cannot perceive at this point. There is much that mankind as such will never learn, simply because such knowledge is beyond the reach of the ego. But there is much that you do not know that you can learn.
quotes.translation: 此刻有许多你们根本无法感知的事物。有许多人类作为整体永远无法知晓的知识，仅仅因为这些知识超出了自我的理解范围。但确实有许多你们尚不知道却可以学习的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Some emotions originate within the personality, but others are simply like winds that are then rationalized and held. Emotions are indeed motion, and not static, and will pass to be replaced by others, unless the ego holds them back.
quotes.translation: 有些情绪源自人格本身，但其他情绪则如同过路的风，被合理化后紧抓不放。情绪本质上是流动的，而非静止的，除非自我将它们强行滞留，否则它们会自然消逝并被其他情绪取代。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Most of my readers are familiar with the term, "muscle bound." As a species you have grown "ego bound" instead, held in a spiritual rigidity, with the intuitive portions of the self either denied or distorted beyond any recognition.
quotes.translation: 多数读者都熟悉"肌肉僵化"这个术语。而你们人类却发展出"自我僵化"的状态，陷入灵性上的僵固，使得内在的直觉部分要么被否定，要么被扭曲得面目全非。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: His ego would have been in great danger of becoming a rigid prison for his intuitive self, because of the necessary defensive mechanisms it had to adopt against the most difficult and threatening aspects of his mother's personality.
quotes.translation: 他的自我很可能沦为囚禁直觉自我的严苛牢笼，因为面对母亲人格中最棘手、最具威胁性的面向，自我不得不采取必要的防御机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Your scientists know that all matter is composed of the same elements. They do not know consciously how to change a river into a forest. This manipulation, as I have explained, is undertaken unknown to the recognized conscious ego.
quotes.translation: 你们的科学家知道所有物质都由相同元素构成。他们并不有意识地知道如何将河流变为森林。如我所解释的，这种操作是在被认可的自我意识不知情的情况下进行的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In this case the so-called secondary personality would express the whole personality to better advantage, and actually reinforce its permanence and identity. After your break, we will discuss the purposes of the ego to some degree.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，所谓的次要人格将更有利地表达整体人格，并实际强化其持久性与身份认同。休息后，我们将一定程度地讨论自我的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: A panic reaction could be set off without the reasons for it known. This leads to ego confusion since the personality, trying hard to act in what it thinks is a reasonable manner, cannot understand the vehemence of its rebellion.
quotes.translation: 恐慌反应可能在不知原因的情况下被触发。这会导致自我混乱，因为人格竭力以自认为合理的方式行事，却无法理解自身反抗的激烈程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now. Another point. The ego will act as a translator of inner experience for you. If such translations contain distortions, they are better than no translations at all, and intuition will allow you to see through the distortions.
quotes.translation: 现在。另一点。自我会为你充当内在经验的翻译者。即使这些翻译包含扭曲，也总比完全没有翻译要好，而直觉会让你看穿这些扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Obviously the conscious mind is a phenomenon, not a thing. It is ever-changing. It can be concentrated or turned by the ego in literally endless directions. It can view outward reality or turn inward, observing its own contents.
quotes.translation: 显然，意识心是一种现象，而非一个物体。它不断变化。自我可以将其集中或转向几乎无穷的方向。它可以观察外在实相，也可以转向内在，审视自身的内容。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: A personality in the primary gestalt is indeed focused upon your present plane of reality, but to suppose that the whole primary gestalt is so focused represents mankind's ego playing with one of its most preposterous proposals.
quotes.translation: 主要完形中的人格确实聚焦于你们当前的实相层面，但认为整个主要完形都如此聚焦，这代表了人类自我在玩弄其最荒谬的主张之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Egotistic ally you make arbitrary designations of necessity, perceiving only portions of any given action; again, the ego attempting to separate itself from overall action, and to see itself as an entirely independent structure.
