quotes.translation: 自我中心地，你们对必要性做出武断的界定，只感知到任何特定行动的片段；再次，自我试图将自己从整体行动中分离出来，并将自己视为完全独立的结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: This, when it occurs, and this particular formation into a self may or may not occur, but when it occurs it is a result of our second previously mentioned dilemma. The self as you know it is in actuality a self plus an ego.
quotes.translation: 这种情况发生时——这种特定的自我形成可能发生也可能不发生——但若发生，则是我们先前提到的第二个困境的结果。你们所认知的自我，实际上是"自己"加上"自我"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: He has literally frightened himself away. He has disrupted the part of the self that usually deals with physical reality, and its manipulation. He tried to dispense with this physically oriented ego, using shortcut methods.
quotes.translation: 他确实把自己吓跑了。他打乱了通常处理物质现实及其操控的那部分自我，试图用捷径方法摆脱这个以物质为导向的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Ruburt exuberantly goes forward, particularly in sleep, when his ego is stilled.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在自我平息时，尤其在睡眠中，会兴高采烈地向前迈进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: They cannot be consciously aware of each other. Now the ego interprets all it perceives mainly in terms of its self. Other portions of the self, also self-conscious, interpret what they perceive in terms of themselves.
quotes.translation: 它们无法有意识地觉察彼此。自我主要依据自身来诠释它所感知的一切。其他同样具有自我意识的部分，则依据自身来诠释它们所感知的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: All existence is present, as you know. What you term past incarnations take place in the present. You simply invented a continual time system as a vehicle of perception for the ego, and it operates at that level only.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，所有存在皆在当下。你所谓的过去转世发生在当下。你只是发明了一个连续的时间系统作为自我的感知载体，而它仅在该层面运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Yet again, the ego is enriched and therefore allows the self more freedom.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我因此得到充实，从而赋予自身更多自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: We find here a situation this morning in which Ruburt achieved excellent communication with his own personal subconscious, spoke with it, giving it credit for being as important to the whole personality as the ego.
quotes.translation: 今早我们发现一种情况：鲁柏与自己的个人潜意识达成了极佳的沟通，与之对话，并承认它对整个人格的重要性与自我同等。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The self, then, is not static by any means. It has no arbitrary boundaries. The term itself is used only for convenience; and indeed the concept of the self is a concept of the ego, which considers itself the self
quotes.translation: 因此，自我绝非静止不变。它没有武断的界限。这个术语本身仅为方便而使用；事实上，自我的概念是自我本位的概念，而自我本位视自身为自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This new ego that he must form will come slowly. It may be scarred, but it will be fairly dependable. He must face his responsibilities. It does him no good to let him avoid them, and it may do him severe harm.
quotes.translation: 他必须形成的这个新自我会缓慢成形。它或许伤痕累累，但会相当可靠。他必须面对自己的责任。让他逃避责任对他毫无益处，反而可能造成严重伤害。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: There is behind the ego a stronger and more vivid self. There is even a more self-conscious self of which he remains in ignorance. And again as I have said, evidence for this self can be and will be received.
quotes.translation: 在自我背后存在着一个更强大、更生动的自己。甚至还有一个更具自我意识的自己，而他对这个自己一无所知。而且正如我所说，这个自己的证据能够且将会被接收到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: He has learned that the ego cannot set itself up against the inner self. He has learned to trust and have confidence in the inner self, and to listen to the subconscious which is a part of his inner identity.
quotes.translation: 他已学会自我不能与内在自己对立。他学会了信任并信赖内在自己，并倾听作为其内在身份一部分的潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This is why there appears to be two such diverse tendencies that show themselves. The personality is indeed divided. The ego fights the inner self, which means of course that the self fights against itself.
quotes.translation: 这就是为何会出现两种看似截然不同的倾向。人格确实分裂了。自我与内在自我对抗，这当然意味着自我与自身对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The ego therefore is a very necessary force within your field. It is also, regardless of current psychological beliefs, the basis for aggression, in general. All aggression is not detrimental, for example.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我是你们领域内非常必要的力量。不论当前心理学观点如何，它通常也是攻击性的基础。例如，并非所有攻击性都是有害的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I do not need therefore to adopt a past ego. Perhaps because this is not necessary, the psychological bridge of which I have spoken is necessary in order to make my communications comprehensible to Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 因此我不需要采用过去的自我。或许正因无此必要，我所提及的心理桥梁才成为必要，以便让我的讯息能被鲁柏理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You cannot displace it completely, except at your own peril. Nevertheless you can learn to trick it. You can learn to cease focusing now and then and let the inner senses look out through the ego's eyes.
quotes.translation: 你无法完全取代它，除非自担风险。然而，你可以学会欺骗它。你可以学会不时停止聚焦，让内在感官透过自我的眼睛向外看。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: What was once the subconscious of these individuals once more united with the inner ego, which always represents the true individual, and these then advanced according to their own abilities and desires.
quotes.translation: 这些个体曾经是潜意识的部分，再次与内在自我（inner ego）结合——内在自我始终代表真正的个体——然后这些个体便依照自身的能力与欲望向前迈进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In many cases these problems are not those belonging to the ego, but to other layers of the self. We spoke in a fairly recent session of illnesses as impeding actions. （See the 163rd and 164th sessions.）
quotes.translation: 许多情况下，这些问题并不属于自我，而是属于自我的其他层面。在最近的一次课中，我们曾谈到疾病会阻碍行动。（参见第163节和第164节。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: For one thing, you are not dealing with one linear self. The self is indeed multidimensional, and the driving force behind the self does not reside in the ego or in what you refer to as the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 首先，你并非在与一个线性的自我打交道。自我确实是多维的，而自我背后的驱动力并不存在于自我或你所谓的潜意识中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Your seasons, and the physical nature of your universe, is that part of action which is instantly renewing, and which automatically lets even ego feel its relation to that reality of which it is a part.
quotes.translation: 你们的季节，以及你们宇宙的物质本质，是行动中不断自我更新的部分，它自动让自我也能感受到自身与所从属的那个实相之间的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: With our methods the ego is taken into confidence, you see.
quotes.translation: 你看，在我们的方法中，自我是被纳入信任的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: If the ego is exceptional it may take one of two courses.
quotes.translation: 若自我出类拔萃，可能采取两种途径之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: When such developments occur, then you have the awareness of the whole self, and the ego does not need to fear for its survival. The self can then act to help others, and can in no way be threatened.
quotes.translation: 当此类发展发生时，你便拥有全我的觉知，自我无需为自身存续而恐惧。此时自体能够行动以助他人，且绝无受威胁之虞。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: A note of further explanation here. The difference between consciousness of self as a result of our second dilemma, and ego consciousness as a result of our third dilemma, should be made very clear.
quotes.translation: 此处需进一步说明。因第二困境产生的自我意识，与因第三困境产生的自我意识，二者差异必须明确厘清。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In such cases the artist captures the dominant essence, and through the energy which he has given the art, it then makes such an effect upon the ego, which could not ordinarily perceive so much.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，艺术家捕捉到了主导的本质，并通过他赋予艺术的能量，对通常无法感知如此之多的自我产生了这样的效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Your ego is fearful and set up in arms about cats.
quotes.translation: 你的自我对猫充满恐惧并严阵以待。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The inner ego is then the "I" of the astral body.
quotes.translation: 内在自我于是成为星光体的“我”。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: They are forever in motion. They change constantly. As you cannot hold even the ego in the palm of your hand, so you cannot hold the inner self within the mind. They always escape in essence.
quotes.translation: 它们永远在运动中，不断变化。正如你无法将自我握在掌心，你也无法将内在自己囚禁于心智中。它们在本质上总是逃逸的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This attempt forms the ego, and is itself action. If illness were thrust upon action, or upon the personality from the outside, then the personality would be at the mercy of outside agencies.
quotes.translation: 这种尝试形成了自我，并且其本身就是行动。如果疾病是强加于行动或人格之上的外在因素，那么人格就会受制于外在力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The inner senses are an attribute of consciousness. The outer senses make this information meaningful to the physical organism, and the body consciousness, the ego. This is for Ruburt's book.
quotes.translation: 内在感官是意识的一种属性。外在感官使这些信息对物质有机体、身体意识和自我具有意义。这是为鲁柏的书准备的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You can see that the inner self is much more spacious and unlimited than the ego self, and that while divisions occur they may vary, and the boundaries of the inner self constantly change.
quotes.translation: 你可以看到内在自我比自我自我更加广阔且不受限制，虽然存在划分，但这些划分可能有所不同，而内在自我的边界也在不断变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The personality and the ego are not the same.
quotes.translation: 人格与自我并非同一回事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The ego that ignores too many of the possibilities of the inner self is soon in dire difficulty, and is forced to realize that it has been considering survival in a very limited light.
quotes.translation: 忽视内在自我太多可能性的自我，很快就会陷入严重困境，并被迫意识到它一直以非常局限的眼光看待生存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now. The inner self has a much richer and deeper heritage than the intellect or ego. Its perceptions are of a different nature, varying particularly in scope and depth. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自体拥有比智性或自我更为丰富深远的传承。其感知本质不同，尤其在广度与深度上各有殊异。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: You are one self, then, but for operating purposes we will say that you have three parts: the inner self or inner ego, the body consciousness, and the consciousness that you know.
quotes.translation: 因此，你是一个自体，但为便于运作，我们姑且说你有三个部分：内在自体或内在自我、身体意识，以及你所知的意识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The inner ego, however, through the subconscious, may at times encourage the development of abilities that will better allow the whole self to achieve balance and fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在自我有时会通过潜意识鼓励发展那些能让整体自我更好地达成平衡与圆满的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This is coded, shielded, even from his own ego. Each painting that is successful forces the consciousness to travel into it, in ways that I will more thoroughly explain.
quotes.translation: 这被编码、屏蔽，甚至对他自己的自我也是如此。每一幅成功的画作都迫使意识以某种方式进入其中，关于这点我将更详尽地解释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: That part of us as you know which deals with these roles is the ego, which lives intimately the role which was assigned to it by the whole self, of which it is a part.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，处理这些角色的那部分自我便是小我，它紧密地活在由整体自我所赋予的角色中，而它正是整体自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You are both acquiring a facility in communication between the ego and the subconscious, which is enabling you to increase the efficiency of your overall behavior.
quotes.translation: 你们两人都在小我与潜意识之间的沟通中获得了熟练度，这使你们能够提升整体行为的效率。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In other positions it is the ego and intellect that suffer most, and since our purpose is to enlighten them as much as possible, this is not to our advantage.
quotes.translation: 在其他情况下，受苦最深的是自我和智力，既然我们的目的是尽可能启发它们，这对我们并无益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: We will have more to say concerning this point, but for now it is enough to realize that your sense of identity and continuity is not dependent upon the ego.
quotes.translation: 关于这一点我们还有更多要说的，但现在只需认识到，你的身份感和连续性并不依赖于自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I suggest your break; and this last point is an important one to remember, for I am getting more help from you, and from your inner egos, than you realize.
quotes.translation: 我建议你们休息；最后这点很重要，请记住，我从你们以及你们的内在自我那里获得的帮助，远比你们意识到的要多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Fragment entity, uneasy with present personality. Gap between （t no） ego and subconscious, vital forces escape. He is a part of his last mother's entity.
quotes.translation: 片段存有，与当前人格不协调。自我与潜意识之间存在鸿沟，生命力由此流失。他是其上一世母亲存有的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The ego, having its birth from within, therefore, must always boast of its independence while maintaining the nagging certainty of its inner origin.
quotes.translation: 因此，从内在诞生的自我，必须始终夸耀其独立性，同时却带着对其内在根源的纠缠不休的确信。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There are no limitations to the self, for the self as a part of action has no boundaries except those imaginary boundaries given to it by the ego.
quotes.translation: 自我没有限制，因为作为行动一部分的自我没有边界，除了自我赋予自身的那些想象边界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The struggle between the ego and intuitional self follows here as I have told you, but with the correct use of energy these elements are balanced.
quotes.translation: 自我与直觉自我之间的斗争在此处正如我告诉你的那样进行，但通过正确运用能量，这些要素会得到平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: They are actually more conscious of their dreams, for the ego does not prevent awareness at this stage to the same degree that it will do later.
quotes.translation: 他们实际上更清醒地意识到自己的梦境，因为自我在此阶段对觉知的阻碍程度，不如后期那样强烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The subconscious is not the cause or the carrier of hatreds. The difficulty here is of an ego's refusal to assimilate subconscious experience.
quotes.translation: 潜意识并非仇恨的起因或载体。这里的困难在于自我拒绝同化潜意识经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now. First of all, some of these states of activity take place so far beneath the ego or the subconscious that you simply do not know of them.
quotes.translation: 首先，这些活动状态中有一些发生在自我或潜意识之下如此深远的层面，以至于你根本无从知晓它们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: If the outer ego would be content to work on an equal basis with its inner counterpart, then many severe difficulties would be sidestepped.
quotes.translation: 如果外在自我愿意与内在对应部分平等合作，那么许多严重的困难本可避免。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The subconscious is a self-conscious portion of the whole self. It is called subconscious because the ego as a rule is not conscious of it.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是整个自我中具有自我意识的部分。之所以被称为潜意识，是因为自我通常无法意识到它的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: If you must think in layers to make this clearer, then this probable self would exist on the other side of the subconscious from the ego.
quotes.translation: 如果为了更清晰而必须用层次来思考，那么这个可能的自己会存在于潜意识相对于自我的另一侧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: That is one possibility. It is followed by egos who have actually worn out not this energy, which is tremendous, but their desires.
quotes.translation: 那是一种可能性。它被那些实际上并非耗尽了这股巨大能量、而是耗尽了自身欲望的自我所追随。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I will speak concerning the ego's censorship, and even to some extent concerning the censorship of the personal subconscious.
quotes.translation: 我将讨论自我的审查机制，甚至在某种程度上讨论个人潜意识的审查机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: When the inner self achieves an impulse or intensity that is new to it, to the ego it will seem a journey into the future.
quotes.translation: 当内在自体获得对它而言全新的冲动或强度时，对自我而言这仿佛是一场进入未来的旅程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I do not mean to underestimate the outer ego. You have simply overestimated it. Nor has its true nature been recognized.
quotes.translation: 我并非要低估外在自我。只是你们过分高估了它。它的真实本质也未被认清。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: It goes without saying that suggestion before sleep will also help. It is the ego that is rigid, not the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，睡前暗示也会有所帮助。僵化的是自我，而非潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is believed that the self must shed its ego and die symbolically in order that the inner self can be free.
quotes.translation: 人们相信，自我必须放下自我并象征性地死去，内在自我才能获得自由。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: It is only the ego which seems to make such questions important, because of the restrictions of its nature.
quotes.translation: 只有自我才会让这类问题显得重要，因为其本质的限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The ego now, once again, sees the whole personality's search as its own, and will wholeheartedly take part.
quotes.translation: 此刻，自我再次将整个人格的探索视为己任，并将全心全意地参与其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: You cannot escape action. The ego attempts to so order events as to direct action along its own lines.
quotes.translation: 你无法逃避行动。自我试图如此安排事件，以便将行动导向其自身的路线。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It is better, as I have said often, that the ego not be shunted aside.
quotes.translation: 正如我常说的，最好不要把自我推到一边。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: --with the inner ego operating consciously to give continuity.
quotes.translation: ——内在自我有意识地运作，以提供连续性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The subconscious has its opinions as the ego does.
quotes.translation: 潜意识如同自我一样，也有其见解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
